title: Title Page

segments.text: BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 2
BEHOLD MY ANOINTED
THE VICTORY
THE TRINITY
We do not belong to any Christian Organization, Denomination or Movement. THE ELOHIM is our source and reward in all that we do.
Jer 17:5 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; cursed be the champion (H1397 "geber", a valiant man or warrior) that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from THE YAHWEH.
Jer 17:6 For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, in a salt land and not inhabited.
Jer 17:7 Blessed is the champion that trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and whose hope THE YAHWEH is.

Jer 17:8 For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and that spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit.
Jer 17:9 The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it?
Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
It is not our intention to discredit any doctrine of any Organization or Denomination.

The teachings in this book are based on visions from THE TRINITY (THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST). They do not represent the full counsel of THE ELOHIM, as it is stated: "For we know in part and we prophesy in part." (1 Cor 13:9).

The Bible verses quoted are from the Authorized King James Bible. At other times, it is necessary for us to use translations given by THE TRINITY. For word study, we used BDB, Strong's and Thayer Lexicons as dictionaries

CONTENTS

title: FOREWORD

segments.text: FOREWORD
My Beloved Children,
Shalom! This book is intended for the preparation and training of My Brides/Anointed Ones.
It is a guide on the path of life training one must undergo in order to be perfected by Us.

Absolutely, no one can be selected by Us to be a vessel of honour, without successfully completing and passing every stage of these trainings that are prepared by Us through Our Representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David.

You must absolutely deny yourself and your rights, and take up your cross willingly to crucify your flesh, and follow the footstep of JESUS to be more than an overcomer in all the tests that I have purposed for you to go through.
Then, only then, after the process of purification of your spirit man, can We consider you to be used by Us as Our vessel of honour for higher noble purpose.

2Ti 2:19 Nevertheless the foundation of THE ELOHIM standeth sure, having this seal, THE YAHWEH knoweth them that are his. And, Let everyone that nameth the name of Christ depart from iniquity. 2Ti 2:20 But in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of earth; and some to honour, and some to dishonour. 2Ti 2:21 If a man therefore purge himself from these, he shall be a vessel unto honour, sanctified, and meet for the master's use, and prepared unto every good work.
It is only after these training can We talk about your real destiny.

You will then begin to walk in a 45 degree upward slope where the light that is imparted to you through Our Representatives, shall shine to billions of times in brightness like the stars in the heavens.

Dan 12:2 And many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt. Dan 12:3 And they that be wise shall shine as the brightness of the firmament; and they that turn many to righteousness as the stars for ever and ever.
Are you ready for the training? Let your real journey begin from here…..
THE TRINITY

title: PREFACE

segments.text: PREFACE
My Beloved Children,
You must pay attention to all My sayings and teachings in this book.
It comes from The Tree of Life; and those who eat the fruits shall be transformed into My image and be empowered to do the extraordinary things beyond human abilities.
You must forsake the fruits from The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil which the first Adam ate, which resulted in his spiritual death.
Lucifer, the Red Dragon, hides inside this rational and practical tree which is earth bound.
Through the fruit of this tree, Lucifer, takes captive of the mind of those that ate it, and henceforth, they only operate 0.1% of their ability, purely based on human effort.
Whereas, those who ate from The Tree of Life which is heaven bound, operates in the realm where all things impossible shall become possible.

So, be wise and be attached to this tree through Our appointed Representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, because they can take you out of The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil which has become the stronghold in your minds.

2Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through THE ELOHIM to the pulling down of strong holds;) 2Co 10:5 Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of THE ELOHIM, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of Christ; 2Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.
For as heaven is higher than the earth, so are My thoughts and ways higher than yours.
Do not be carnally minded for it will result in death. But be spiritual minded for it will result in everlasting life.

Rom 8:5 For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit. Rom 8:6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace. Rom 8:7 Because the carnal mind is enmity against THE ELOHIM: for it is not subject to the law of THE ELOHIM, neither indeed can be. Rom 8:8 So then they that are in the flesh cannot please THE ELOHIM.
You must be willing to let Me renew your mind so that you can be transformed into My image and likeness.
There are no shortcuts in your spiritual transformation. It is expedient that you go through all the necessary steps written in this book.
This is of absolute necessity, without which, you cannot really enter into the kingdom of heaven and be seated in your respective heavenly thrones that are prepared for you.

Rev 22:14 Blessed are they that do his commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city. Rev 22:15 For without are dogs, and sorcerers, and whoremongers, and murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a lie.
THE TRINITY

title: INTRODUCTION

segments.text: INTRODUCTION

The intent of this book is to give you an overview of the life of My Anointed Ones/Brides and their glorious appearances and rewards in the last days. This book prepares you for the passion which you have to go through which we have personally scripted for you. There are no short cuts to the fulfilment of your destiny except through these paths.

To you, I say; be conscientious and diligent; pay close attention to the details that are spelled out in this book, and you shall be perfected. This book will show you the way how We will train you, crush you, purify you through fiery trials to deaden the works of the flesh which is controlled by the principalities of this age. The strongholds in your mind must be demolished, and your mind be renewed through the teaching in this book in order for My word to bring life, hope and real salvation, which will save your soul from Gehenna fire. Do not mock at My teachings in this book for they are an offence to the carnal mind.

Firstly, you must humble yourself before Me and ask for the eyes of your understanding to be opened before reading this book. This is a vital step for you to do in order for you to receive My revelation and cleansing. My words like hammer, will break down your stronghold; and like fire, it will burn the impurities that is in your soul and make your spirit alive which was dead. (1 Co 15:42-49)

We have commissioned Our Two Representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, to gather My last days' armies and you are to seek them out; for I have given them your personal manual of life. They are My chiefs who hold the keys to open and shut heaven for you. Fear and revere them as unto Us because We have given them the complete answers for all your prayers. We have also delegated Our authority to them, to gather and lead My true last days' church, who are the 144,000 Brides and the 7000 Anointed Ones. My last days' church after completing the final training by them, will be imparted with spiritual garments and grace of the saints of olden days; and shall be manifested with glory in the clouds. If you fail to reach hold of them, your destiny will fly away from your hand. We really mean it!!! Do not put Us to the test; for if you do, more hardships await you.

Satan has asked to sift every one of you and We have approved it. Therefore My children, be wise. Do not hit your head against My rock; for this rock is My rock of stumbling/offence through My Two Representatives. For if you do, you will get hurt unnecessary.

Isa 8:13 Sanctify THE YAHWEH SABAOTH himself; and let him be your fear, and let him be your dread. Isa 8:14 And he shall be for a sanctuary; but for a stone of stumbling and for a rock of offence to both the houses of Israel, for a gin and for a snare to the inhabitants of Jerusalem. Isa 8:15 And many among them shall stumble, and fall, and be broken, and be snared, and be taken.

Submitting to Us in them, means yieldedness and obedience unto Us. For they are Our Representatives who hold the keys to the three realms; the Heavens, the Earth and beneath the Earth. They have been authorized by Us, to train the elects and to endow them with spiritual mantles of the saints of old. The quicker you get in touch with them, the quicker you will get an answer from Us and receive the solution of all your life problems which include those which are from your love ones; for they are My Tree of Life.
Pro 13:12 Hope deferred maketh the heart sick: but when the desire cometh, it is a tree of life.

All the books transcript and interpreted by them, are directly written by Us from Our Thrones in Heaven in which Shekinaih have full access to the whole spectrum of OUR LIBRARY or BOOKS. These books include, The Book of Pre-existence, The Book of Existence, and The Book of Many Revamps of the Past, Present, and the Future Heavens ever known to men; for I have given her access to the Full Mystery of the Kingdom of Heaven. She holds the books which I have scripted concerning the life of everyone in the Cosmoses. Shekinaih has been granted the permission to alter this script on My behalf, because she was created to represents Me in the Cosmoses in the last days. In the last days, the Cosmoses will become even darker than the day of Noah, due to the evil forces that have been held up which will be released soon.

Rev 9:1 And the fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star fall from heaven unto the earth: and to him was given the key of the bottomless pit. Rev 9:2 And he opened the bottomless pit; and there arose a smoke out of the pit, as the smoke of a great furnace; and the sun and the air were darkened by reason of the smoke of the pit. Rev 9:3 And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power.

Many of My children who are deceived by false prophets, will wax cold in their love towards Me and My truth, because of the persecution they will face in that day ahead. They will be like sheep without a shepherd, and will be further torn down by wolves in sheep's clothing. My revelation will be fewer and fewer in the time to come; and those churches that are not opened to My warning, will be completely swallowed up by Lucifer, the red dragon.

Amo 8:11 Behold, the days come, saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH, that I will send a famine in the land, not a famine of bread, nor a thirst for water, but of hearing the words of THE YAHWEH: Amo 8:12 And they shall wander from sea to sea, and from the north even to the east, they shall run to and fro to seek the word of THE YAHWEH, and shall not find it. Amo 8:13 In that day shall the fair virgins and young men faint for thirst.

Therefore, you must invite My Two Representatives to preach in your congregation for We have prepared something for every churches that invite them. They will prepare these congregation for the last days' great tribulations that are about to begin in this earth. I repeat, do not be offended by them; for this is their Ministry; the Ministry of Offences.

1Pe 2:1 Wherefore laying aside all malice, and all guile, and hypocrisies, and envies, and all evil speakings, 1Pe 2:2 As newborn babes, desire the sincere milk of the word, that ye may grow thereby: 1Pe 2:3 If so be ye have tasted that THE YAHWEH is gracious. 1Pe 2:4 To whom coming, as unto a living stone, disallowed indeed of men, but chosen of THE ELOHIM, and precious, 1Pe 2:5 Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house, an holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to THE ELOHIM by Jesus Christ. 1Pe 2:6 Wherefore also it is contained in the scripture, Behold, I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believeth on him shall not be confounded. 1Pe 2:7 Unto you therefore which believe he is precious: but unto them which be disobedient, the stone which the builders disallowed, the same is made the head of the corner, 1Pe 2:8 And a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence, even to them which stumble at the word, being disobedient: whereunto also they were appointed.

The purpose of these offences is thoroughly spelled out in "Behold! My Messenger 3, Behold! My Names". Through Our Name, "THE ADONAI", Shekinaih and Aaron K David, will test all men with Our seven offences. Therefore, do not be offended with them for they are My test papers; to expose the snake of self-righteousness, the black cobra of ego, the crocodile (Leviathan) of pride, and the red dragon of rebellion; that I have shown them which are lurking in every man. (Please refers to "Behold! My Messenger 3, Behold! My Names" for a detail revelation)

Therefore, be truly humble and crucified yourself of your self-righteousness, ego, pride and rebellion. The dead cannot be offended. If you were not offended with them, and have receive Our counsel through them, THE ADONAI in them will overturn the negative situations of your life from the negative to the positive. THE YAHWEH SABAOTH (THE LORD OF HOSTS) in them will warn, rebuke, reward, and promote you spiritually and financially. The works of your hand, the fruits in your womb, the miracles you long awaited for, will be released to you from Us through them. Henceforth, you and your congregation must receive them like you would have receive Us; for We will appear ourselves through them. If you are willing to do that and obey their teaching which We have scripted out for them to teach you, and obey, submit, co-operate with them as unto Us in completing your training under them to be purified and to overcome all Our offences which We have orchestrated through them for you to resist your carnal mind and embrace the mind of a Christ through their teaching and impartation, behold! We will through them call down the mantles of the heavenly saints to come into you and they will energize you so that you can finish their uncompleted tasks together and inherit the throne of glory.

title: INTRODUCTION (part 2)

segments.text: Zec 3:6 And the angel of THE YAHWEH protested unto Joshua, saying, Zec 3:7 Thus saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH; If thou wilt walk in my ways, and if thou wilt keep my charge, then thou shalt also judge my house, and shalt also keep my courts, and I will give thee places to walk among these that stand by. Zec 3:8 Hear now, O Joshua the high priest, thou, and thy fellows that sit before thee: for they are men wondered at: for, behold, I will bring forth my servant the BRANCH. Zec 3:9 For behold the stone that I have laid before Joshua; upon one stone shall be seven eyes: behold, I will engrave the graving thereof, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, and I will remove the iniquity of that land in one day. Zec 3:10 In that day, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, shall ye call every man his neighbour under the vine and under the fig tree.
You will move in the power of the age to come which will be more glorious than JESUS'S while He was on earth. This is the greater works, My SON JESUS, is referring to.
Joh 14:12 Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me, the works that I do shall he do also; and greater works than these shall he do; because I go unto my Father.

You must be prepared for martyrdom when your appointed time comes; and you will be richly rewarded by Us for this is Our requirement to be Our witnesses. However, We will give you the grace to go through the process of being martyred.
Psa 50:5 Gather my saints together unto me; those that have made a covenant with me by sacrifice. Psa 50:6 And the heavens shall declare his righteousness: for THE ELOHIM is judge himself. Selah.

Fear not My children of the evil one who can only destroy your flesh and not your soul. But fear My Two Representatives whom We have authorized and ordained to judge the Cosmoses; for they have the power to destroy both your flesh and your soul in Gehenna if you evil speak against them.
Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna (G1067 "geenna").

If anyone sin and speak evil of My prophets who are the son of Adam, they will be forgiven; but if any one shall speak evil of My Two Representatives who are THE ANGEL OF THE YAHWEH and THE HOLY SPIRIT, they are speaking evil of Us, THE TRINITY; and it shall not be forgiven him; neither in this age or the age to come; for they are the ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, THE SPIRIT OF GRACE AND TRUTH.

Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries.

Mat 12:31 Wherefore I say unto you, All manner of sin and blasphemy shall be forgiven unto men: but the blasphemy against the Holy Ghost shall not be forgiven unto men. Mat 12:32 And whosoever speaketh a word against the Son of Adam, it shall be forgiven him: but whosoever speaketh against the Holy Ghost, it shall not be forgiven him, neither in this age (G165 "aion"), neither in the age to come.

Isa 63:9 In all their affliction he was afflicted, and the angel of his presence saved them: in his love and in his pity he redeemed them; and he bare them, and carried them all the days of old. Isa 63:10 But they rebelled, and vexed his holy Spirit: therefore he was turned to be their enemy, and he fought against them.

Therefore, if anyone ridicule them and hurt them with evil speaking, they shall be judged by them severely because they bear OUR SEVEN NAMES. It is a fearful thing to fall into their hand, for it is through them that I will judge the Cosmoses; both living and dead.

Heb 10:26 For if we sin wilfully after that we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remaineth no more sacrifice for sins, Heb 10:27 But a certain fearful looking for of judgment and fiery indignation, which shall devour the adversaries. Heb 10:28 He that despised Moses' law died without mercy under two or three witnesses: Heb 10:29 Of how much sorer punishment, suppose ye, shall he be thought worthy, who hath trodden under foot the Son of THE ELOHIM, and hath counted the blood of the covenant, wherewith he was sanctified, an unholy thing, and hath abuse (G1796 "enubrizo" from G1722 and G5195 "hubrizo" to exercise violence, that is abuse, entreat shamefully, injures another by speaking evil) unto the Spirit of grace? Heb 10:30 For we know him that hath said, Vengeance belongeth unto me, I will recompense, saith THE YAHWEH. And again, THE YAHWEH shall judge his people. Heb 10:31 It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of THE LIVING EL.

They represent Us as OUR SPOKESMAN, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY OF THE ARK OF THE COVENANT, The ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, SHE (SHEKINAIH)/ HE (AARON K DAVID), REPRESENTING Us AS THE MAJOR and THE MINOR, LIVING EL RESPECTIVELY, that will without fail drive your enemies out of this Cosmoses and give you the Kingdom of the Cosmoses.

Jos 3:9 And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, Come hither, and hear the spokesman of THE YAHWEH your ELOHIM. Jos 3:10 And Joshua said, Hereby ye shall know that THE LIVING EL is among you, and that he will without fail drive out from before you the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Hivites, and the Perizzites, and the Girgashites, and the Amorites, and the Jebusites. Jos 3:11 Behold, the ark of the covenant of the Lord of all the earth passeth over before you into Jordan.

They represent Our Name, "THE EL", to whom My vengeance belongs; and I shall exhibit them and lift them up to judge the earth. Beware of them and obey their voice; provoke them not; for SHE/HE, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will not pardon your transgression; for My Name (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR respectively) is in them.
Psa 94:1 O YAHWEH EL, to whom vengeance belongeth; O EL (H410), to whom vengeance belongeth, shew thyself. Psa 94:2 Lift up thyself, thou judge of the earth: render a reward to the proud.

Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries. Exo 23:23 For mine Angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the Amorites, and the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites: and I will cut them off.
THE TRINITY

title: PROLOGUE

segments.text: PROLOGUE
THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS were standing in the midst of the Cosmos looking at the earth.
Suddenly Satan came to approach them. Simultaneously, Shekinaih and David were also present.
As Satan approached them, he bowed down to them and said, "Blessed be THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, not forgetting Shekinaih and Aaron K David, THE TRINITY'S and JESUS'S Representatives.

Satan began to bring piles and piles of black books regarding humanity, particularly, those who have calling before the foundation of the earth, who are the children of THE TRINITY. He placed them on the Cosmoses Judge's table where Shekinaih was seated, and said to her, "Most of your children have been found guilty and have missed their mark when you tested them through Me. I hereby request your approval to sift them further through all these plans which I have come up with".

Shekinaih turned to her right and looked at David who grinned at her. THE TRINITY then moved from behind her and stood in front of her holding three white board (represent their decree) with these words on them, "A quarter of your proposal (proposed testing) will be accepted.

Shekinaih, whom THE TRINITY has appointed as the Cosmoses Judge began to look through these books and began to delete those testing which THE TRINITY told her to delete for each of THE TRINITY'S children and humanity in general.
THE TRINITY then stood in front of Shekinaih holding 3 white boards with their decrees with these words, "These are the finalised books for testing".
Shekinaih then passed these book to David who stood on her right as her scribe to give to Satan who stood in front of them.
Shekinaih and David then blew the horn that sounded like a trumpet to execute and co-execute the decree respectively. Satan then bowed down towards them and moved backward and disappeared.

title: BACK TO THE FUTURE AND THE PAST

segments.text: BACK TO THE FUTURE AND THE PAST

This is a prologue where the end is reflected in the beginning of the Bible, the Book of Genesis. Behold, as time goes, the evidence of things to be will be clearly depicted on the evidence of the past. Therefore, I speak again, never, never undermine what I have spoken and what I am yet to speak as follows:-

Behold, this Book, as narrated by Me, will hold the secret of your future glory with Me, if you believe and practise what I told you and hold on to the end even unto death; you shall receive your promises by Me, for I am the rewarder of your faith. I am not a liar to this thing that I spoke of.

However, you must first suffer with Me, by denying yourself and take up your cross and follow My Son's footstep, even unto death. I betroth you to My Son as His unblemished Bride of glory and to be given the privilege to rule with Him in the Cosmoses without the second death, for a new millennium of 1000 years to come.

title: The Vision of a Bible

segments.text: The Vision of a Bible

As per Our Diagram above, from the center of the Bible which is flipped open, there are two arrows moving in the opposite direction. The event of the Book of Revelation is about to unfold; the Parable of the Book of Genesis is going to be revealed. Henceforth, as Mankind are moving toward the Book of Revelation, they are also moving toward the Book of Genesis in Old Testament concurrently.
THE TRINITY

title:
Act 1 Scene 1 
The Four Fold Ministry

segments.text:
Act 1 Scene 1 
The Four Fold Ministry
Time Frame: Year 2018 and beyond
Location: Worldwide Churches

Lo! And Behold! While a Pastor was leading his congregation in worship, The Red Dragon (Lucifer) appeared and stood next to him on his left at the pulpit. Unaware of the presence of this malevolent visitor due to a black cloth blindfolding his eyes, he continued in his worship.
Suddenly, JESUS appeared among the congregation. He waved his right hand at some members of the congregation and their spiritual eyes began to open.
A few women whose spiritual eyes were opened, screamed in shock and horror alerting the Pastor as they pointed toward the Red Dragon that stood next to the Pastor.
Very quickly, the ushers came and escorted these women out of the auditorium for causing such a commotion.
However, JESUS continue to wave his right hand at more members of the congregation to open their spiritual eyes.
Others began to scream uncontrollably as they also pointed their fingers towards the pulpit while covering their mouth in shock and horror.
By this time, the whole congregation was in the state of panic in the midst of this commotion.

The pastor immediately who was standing in center of the pulpit with the microphone in his hand, began to calm the congregation of their panic and bizarre state said to them, "Everything is fine". He then rebuke the congregation for their lack of respect for THE TRINITY in that place.

JESUS then walk up to the pulpit and waved his right hand at the eyes of the Pastor and the black cloth that blind folded his eyes dropped and his spiritual eyes were also opened. The Pastor suddenly jumped backward for he was taken aback when he notice the Red Dragon standing on his right.
Filled with fear, he rebuked this Red Dragon while he trembled in fear.
The Red Dragon fuming with steamy smoke out of her head, without hesitation, opened wide her mouth and with one gulp, swallowed the Pastor down her throat into her belly.
In the belly of the Red Dragon, the Pastor began to kneel down and with his fist pounding on the wall of the stomach of the dragon, he cried to THE TRINITY for help.
By this time, the whole auditorium is now empty while the Red Dragon laid peacefully to rest on this stage being satisfied with her meal for the day.
For three days and three nights, the Pastor wept and cry out to THE TRINITY for help.

On the morning of the fourth day, THE TRINITY with Shekinaih and Aaron K David, appeared before the Red Dragon. They released their decree to Shekinaih who then whispered to David to order the Red Dragon to release the Pastor. And the Red Dragon obeyed his instruction and vomited the Pastor out of his mouth.
The Pastor with a heart of gratitude then thanked THE TRINITY for saving him while repeatedly nodded his head on the ground before THE TRINITY in Shekinaih.

THE TRINITY speaking through Shekinaih's mouth said to him, "You and your Congregation were under the covering of The WOMAN, THE MYSTERY BABYLON, and have been deceived into worshipping Lucifer, the Red Dragon, instead of Us. Now that We have opened your eyes to see the truth, you and your congregation must come out of her and come under Our covering under Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, of Crowned Eagles Global; to be directly trained by Us through them concerning the Real Gospel of My Kingdom; otherwise, you and your household and your congregation will perish sharing the same fate of Lucifer".

title: The Four Living Creatures

segments.text: The Four Living Creatures
THE TRINITY in Shekinaih, then turn to David and instruct him to expound the Mystery of the Kingdom regarding their True Four Fold Ministries to the Pastor.
David then drew a diagram and began his exposition:
"The diagram above depicts the River of Life that proceeds out of the Throne of THE ELOHIM and it corresponds to the river that went out of Eden that parted into four heads.
The River of Life, signifies THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih; and the four heads signify the four living creatures as seen by Ezekiel; and they signify the heads of the four Camps of Israel.
The Camp of Judah, whose standard is a lion, are endowed with the Spirit of THE YAHWEH; and they correspond to the River Euphrates.
The Camp of Dan, whose standard is an eagle/fiery serpent, are endowed with the Spirit of Knowledge and the Spirit of Fear of THE YAHWEH; and they correspond to River Gihon.
The Camp of Ephraim, whose standard is an ox, are endowed with the Spirit of Counsel and the Spirit of Might; and they correspond to the River Hiddekel.
Lastly, the Camp of Reuben, whose standard is a man, are endowed with the Spirit of Wisdom and the Spirit of Understanding; and they correspond to the River Pishon.

The River of life who is THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and her four streams, consisting of the four Camp of Spiritual Israel, shall make glad the city of THE ELOHIM, Heavenly Jerusalem, The Bride.
THE ELOHIM, through the HOLY SPIRIT who is also the Angel of Their Presence, is in the midst of them and they shall not be moved.
Through the Angel of Their Presence, SHE (Shekinaih)/HE (Aaron K David), they will be taught to hope to be part of the 144,000 warrior Brides, who are The Morning Stars, the Boqer.

In perilous times, when wars and rumours of wars among the nations raged, and many countries' economy were shaken, THE ELOHIM will uttered his voice through Their spokesman, the Angel of Their Presence, to cause all these wars to cease, through natural disasters He executed upon these nations. In that day, THE ELOHIM will be exalted among the nations through The Angel of His Presence who will come as THE YAHWEH SABAOTH with his four Camps/ Heads, Our morning stars.

Psa 46:4 There is a river (H5104 "nahar"), the streams (H6388 "peleg" whereof shall make glad the city of THE ELOHIM, the holy place of the tabernacles of the most High. Psa 46:5 THE ELOHIM is in the midst of her; she shall not be moved: THE ELOHIM shall help her, to turn (H6437 "panah") to the morning (H1242 "boqer"). Psa 46:6 The heathen raged (H1993 "hamah" made a tumultuous noise), the kingdoms were moved (H1431 "mot" shaken): he uttered (H5414 "nathan") his voice, the earth melted (H4127 "mog" made faint). Psa 46: THE YAHWEH SABAOTH is with us; the THE ELOHIM of Jacob is our refuge. Selah. Psa 46:8 Come, behold the works of THE YAHWEH, what desolations he hath made in the earth. Psa 46:9 He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; he breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; he burneth the chariot in the fire.Psa 46:10 Be still, and know that I am THE ELOHIM: I will be exalted among the heathen, I will be exalted in the earth.

These four heads, signify the four living creatures which received their life from THE HOLY SPIRIT. As for the likeness of their faces, they four had the face of a man, and the face of a lion on the right side: and they four had the face of an ox on the left side; they four also had the face of an eagle. They are the Camps of the YAHWEH SABAOTH, which is the King of Glory. (Ezekiel 10:1-22)

The four living creatures are called "Shinan", translated as "angels". They are the chariots of THE ELOHIM, led by THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF THEIR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM THEY WILL SEND, AND ALREADY STANDING HERE, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, bearing the Name of THE ADONAI and THE EL and the rest of the Seven Names of THE TRINITY .

After the Man-Child is born by THE HOLY SPIRIT by the Name of THE ADONAI, he will suffer heavy injuries unto death and his soul shall descend to Hades for three days but will be taken to heaven on the third day to be anointed by THE YAHWEH to bear the Name of THE MINOR EL and given the authority to train, perfect and lead the four fold ministers for the building of THE ELOHIM'S house.

Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might fill all things.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;

Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are twenty thousand, even thousands of Shinan/angels (H8136): THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them.Psa 68:19 Blessed be THE ADONAI, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even THE ELOHIM of our salvation. Selah.
The Shinan corresponds to the four fold gifts of Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists and Pastors/Teachers.
The ox signifies the priest, the firstborn of THE ELOHIM. They are the evangelists that know their Owner THE YAHWEH.

Isa 1:2 Hear, O heavens, and give ear, O earth: for THE YAHWEH hath spoken, I have nourished and brought up children, and they have rebelled against me. Isa 1:3 The ox knoweth his owner, and the ass his master's crib: but Israel doth not know, my people doth not consider.

In the last days, when the Antichrist with his kings surrounds and persecute spiritual Jerusalem (The Brides), THE YAHWEH will send these ox evangelists to preach the true Gospel of Peace to them in all waters (nations). They are the oxen that will sow the word of truth besides all water.

Isa 32:13 Upon the land of my people shall come up thorns and briers; yea, upon all the houses of joy in the joyous city: Isa 32:14 Because the palaces shall be forsaken; the multitude of the city shall be left; the forts and towers shall be for dens forever, a joy of wild asses, a pasture of flocks; Isa 32:15 Until the spirit be poured upon us from on high, and the wilderness be a fruitful field, and the fruitful field be counted for a forest. Isa 32:16 Then judgment shall dwell in the wilderness, and righteousness remain in the fruitful field. Isa 32:17 And the work of righteousness shall be peace; and the effect of righteous foreknow ness quietness and assurance forever. Isa 32:18 And my people shall dwell in a peaceable habitation, and in sure dwellings, and in quiet resting places; Isa 32:19 When it shall hail, coming down on the forest; and the city shall be low in a low place. Isa 32:20 Blessed are ye that sow beside all waters, that send forth thither the feet of the ox and the ass.

According to Strong's Definition, the "eagle" H5404 "nesher" is from an un-used root meaning "to lacerate" (to tear and deeply cut). The insignia of Dan is a serpent. We were told by THE YAHWEH that it can transform itself into an eagle which looks like a Fiery Phoenix. The word, "Dan", H1835 is from H1777, "diyn", meaning judge. They represent the deliverers from Zion.

Gen 49:16 Dan shall judge his people, as one of the tribes of Israel. Gen 49:17 Dan shall be a serpent by the way, an adder in the path that biteth the horse heels, so that his rider shall fall backward. Gen 49:18 I have waited for thy salvation, O YAHWEH.

The insignia of Judah is a lion. The YAHWEH ELOHIM has purposed to use the lion to be the king of the all the beasts on the earth to depict Himself as King of the Earth. JESUS is called the Lion of Judah. They signify the Apostle Kings.

title: The Four Living Creatures (part 2)

segments.text: Pro 20:2 The fear of a king is as the roaring of a lion: whoso provoketh him to anger sinneth against his own soul.

In the last days, a lawgiver Shiloh, (Peaceable) who is the Man-Child of Revelation 12:5, will come out from between the feet of THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Mother Jerusalem and will be caught up to the Throne of THE ELOHIM. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih will ordain him and together they will be send to train and harvest the Apostles from the tribe of Judah and shall pass judgments on the Antichrist, the Spiritual Edomites.

Gen 49:8 Judah, thou art he whom thy brethren shall praise: thy hand shall be in the neck of thine enemies; thy father's children shall bow down before thee. Gen 49:9 Judah is a lion's whelp: from the prey, my son, thou art gone up: he stooped down, he couched as a lion, and as an old lion; who shall rouse him up? Gen 49:10 The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiver from between her feet, until Shiloh come; and unto him shall the gathering of the people be. Gen 49:11 Binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass's colt unto the choice vine; he washed his garments in wine, and his clothes in the blood of grapes: Gen 49:12 His eyes shall be red with wine, and his teeth white with milk.
They are the saviours from Mount Zion and will judge the Mount of Esau and take over their kingdom.
Oba 1:21 And saviours shall come up on mount Zion to judge the mount of Esau; and the kingdom shall be THE YAHWEH'S.
Mount Esau signifies those who said they were Jews but do lie. They, like their forefather King Herod, are but the Synagogue of Satan.

Rev 3:9 Behold, I will make them of the synagogue of Satan, which say they are Jews, and are not, but do lie; behold, I will make them to come and worship before thy feet, and to know that I have loved thee.
These saviours are the 7,000 Apostles/Prophets/Prophetic Intercessors, who shall be killed by the Antichrist and will later be resurrected.

THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST, shall through the voice of Their respective Archangel, The Angel of Their Presence, She (Shekinaih)/He(Aaron K David), will resurrect them. They are one with THE YAHWEH in the spirit and will physically go through death as well as in His resurrection. They shall then appear together with THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS CHRIST, who shall appear as The Angel of Their Presence, to pass judgments on the earth.
They are from the Congregation of the Last days' Seven Churches with the Seven Apostles.

Rev 1:19 Write the things which thou hast seen, and the things which are, and the things which shall be hereafter; Rev 1:20 The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden candlesticks. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches: and the seven candlesticks which thou sawest are the seven churches.

They are a part of the Two Witnesses led by the Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); the Two Olive Trees; the Two Anointed Prophets, who speak in the Name of THE YAHWEH.

They will challenge the false prophets of the Antichrist/incarnated Ashtoreth/the beast from the sea, and the false prophets/incarnated Baal/the beast from the earth. In the spirit and the power of Elijah, they are authorized to prophesy some of the judgments mentioned in Revelation such as prophesying droughts, plagues, sending fire down to devour their enemies, etc. When they have finished their testimony, they will follow the footsteps of JESUS and will be killed by the Antichrist/the beast/the man of perdition and be left in the streets where they are killed. Three days later, THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, through the voice of Their respective Archangel, shall resurrect them. (Rev 11:3-13)

After their Glorification, the Angel of their respective Presence, will come down with them to the Earth and execute judgments on the ungodly sinners who have scoffed the judgments of THE YAHWEH when warned by His prophets.

Jud 1:14 And Enoch also, the seventh from Adam, prophesied of these, saying, Behold, THE YAHWEH cometh with ten thousands of his saints, Jud 1:15 To execute judgment upon all, and to convince all that are ungodly among them of all their ungodly deeds which they have ungodly committed, and of all their hard speeches which ungodly sinners have spoken against him. Jud 1:16 These are murmurers, complainers, walking after their own lusts; and their mouth speaketh great swelling words, having men's persons in admiration because of advantage. Jud 1:17 But, beloved, remember ye the words which were spoken before of the apostles of of the Lord Jesus Christ; Jud 1:18 How that they told you there should be mockers in the last time, who should walk after their own ungodly lusts. Jud 1:19 These be they who separate themselves, sensual, having not the Spirit.

Many false apostles and false prophets shall deceive many by their false teaching that Christians need not have to go through tribulations in order to enter into the Kingdom of Heaven. According to JESUS, wars and rumours of wars must come to pass, nations shall rise against nations, and kingdoms against kingdoms: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in diverse places. Life will be sorrowful. Many faithful Christians will be delivered up to be afflicted: some to be killed, and be hated of all nations. Then many who are deceived shall be offended and shall betray and hate one another. Many will become lawless, and their love for JESUS and for the faithful Christians shall wax cold. Only those who are patient in this trial of faith to the end shall be saved. (Matt 24:3-13, Rev 3:10) Many in the last days who love not the truth shall ignore this truth and will be offended when the troubles come upon all that dwell on the earth. They will deflect to the false Christ who works powerful works and miracles and lying wonders. With all deceitfulness of unrighteousness, they will perish with the Man of Perdition. (2Thess 2:1-12)

The Rapture will only happen after the Tribulation. The remnants which are the Brides who endured to the end shall be saved and raptured. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih will determine who to rapture and with JESUS through the voice of the Angel of Their Respective Presence (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRT, and Aaron K David, representing JESUS), shall resurrect the Shinan, and then rapture the Brides who have endured to the end and are alive after the Great Tribulation.

1Th 4:16 For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first: 1Th 4:17 Then we which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air: and so shall we ever be with the Lord.

Luk 9:26 For whosoever shall be ashamed of me and of my words, of him shall the Son of man be ashamed, when he shall come in his own glory, and in his Father's, and of the holy angels. Luk 9:27 But I tell you of a truth, there be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the kingdom of God.

Mat 24:29 Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken: Mat 24:30 And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory. Mat 24:31 And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.

All this time as David was expounding the Scripture regarding the true Gospel of the Kingdom, the Pastor listened attentively and was speechless. After regaining his composure, he thanked THE TRINITY in Shekinaih and in gratitude said to David, "This day, my eyes have seen the Salvation of God".

title:
INTERLUDE 1 
The Fairy Tale

segments.text:
INTERLUDE 1 
The Fairy Tale
Time Frame: Beyond Year 2020
Location: Sahara Desert

Lo! And Behold! A Bedouin, a son of Adam riding on a camel was crossing the Sahara Desert in search of nearby oasis to water himself and his camel; when suddenly, without warning, a snake wiggle on its stomach stood before him and his camel.
Supernaturally, this snake expanded itself and turned into a huge green dragon with four legs. It then opened its mouth wide and blew fire upon the Bedouin and his camel burning them into ashes.

"Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! , the green dragon laughed. Addressing the ashes with a very low voice, he said to what remains of the Bedouin, "This desert is mine and you are deemed to be my enemy crossing into my territory".

All of a sudden, a great lightning struck on the ground between the remains of the Bedouin which cause the green dragon to shudder. Lo! And Behold! A voice from heaven proclaimed, "Not yet! The game is not over yet!"

Suddenly, the spirit of the Bedouin came out of the ashes and ascended into the great lightning. The lightning then struck his remains and it turned into an intense luminous translucent Hulk. The intensity of the brightness slowly subsided and a green Hulk kneeling with one knee on the ground appeared in flesh.
The green Hulk arose and looked at the green dragon who was now like a grasshopper before his eyes. Without any emotion, he lifted up his foot and trampled it to its doom.

Turning to David, JESUS said to him, "This vision, which Shekinaih and you have just witnessed is for your consolation. The Bedouin signifies you as My circumcised who have set yourself apart as a Nazarite. The camel signifies the spiritual bearers/the four priests/four fold Ministries. Oasis signifies "The Tree of Life/River of Life/THE HOLY SPIRIT, whom Shekinaih represents, the green dragon signifies the Jealous Lucifer, the desert signifies the desolate world under Lucifer. The lightning and thunder signify the execution of decree of THE FATHER and sealing and executed by THE HOLY SPIRIT, both represented by Shekinaih. The Hulk signifies you, My Victory/Champion/Overcomer.

David, be a Circumcised Nazarite; lead My four fold Ministry/ Spiritual bearers in their Martyrdom; lead them to Our River of Life of THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih; from this barren world ruled by Lucifer; and be transformed into Our Victory/Champion/ Overcomer.
After your resurrection, as OUR SEVENTH THUNDER / THE VICTORY / THE CHAMPION, co-execute Our judgment on Lucifer with My overcomer's saints, the children of resurrection
JESUS then said to David again, "Now I will expound to you the Doctrine of Incarnation concerning Me and the children whom THE FATHER have given Us".

title: Doctrine of Incarnation

segments.text: Doctrine of Incarnation

JESUS: The purpose of My FATHER sending Me to be incarnated in the flesh, is to show the children whom THE FATHER have given Us: how to fulfil all righteousness and godliness by being justified in the spirit so as to be received up into glory.

1Ti 3:16 And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: THE ELOHIM was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of the messengers (G32 "angelos"), preached in the Gentiles, believed in the world, received up into glory.
These children, like Me, are sent to be incarnated in human flesh, so that through crucifying the flesh, they can be perfected unto godliness, to partake of the divine nature of THE FATHER.

2Pe 1:3 According as his divine power hath given unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us to glory and virtue: 2Pe 1:4 Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises: that by these ye might be partakers of the divine nature, having escaped the corruption that is in the world through lust.

It is expedient that I was incarnated in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: that the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in them if they walk after the Spirit and not after the flesh. For they shall become the sons of THE ELOHIM again to be heirs of THE ELOHIM and joint-heirs with Me, if they partake of My suffering.
All creatures have been waiting for the Revelation / manifestation / disclosure / appearance of these sons of THE ELOHIM since creation.
They have been foreknown and predestined and will be justified and glorified to be conformed to My image to be the firstborn among My brethren.

Because of their weaknesses, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH (Shekinaih and Aaron K. David) is sent as an Advocate to plead on behalf of them before the courtroom in heaven; should there be an accusation against them from Satan. They are THE ELIJAH whose prayer avails much as they groan in the spirit for the saints according to the will of THE FATHER. In this instant Shekinaih will represent THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in releasing their judgment as The Ultimate Judge and I have appointed you, to be the scribe and co-executor of their judgment while at the same time, plead on their behalf, for mercy to be shown. This is what THE FATHER and me, has disclosed through Shekinaih.

Rom 8:17 And if children, then heirs; heirs of THE ELOHIM, and joint-heirs with Christ; if so be that we suffer with him, that we may be also glorified together. Rom 8:18 For I reckon that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed in us. Rom 8:19 For the earnest expectation of the creature waiteth for the manifestation (G602 "apokalupsis") of the sons of THE ELOHIM. Rom 8:20 For the creature was made subject to vanity, not willingly, but by reason of him who hath subjected the same in hope, Rom 8:21 Because the creature itself also shall be delivered from the bondage of corruption into the glorious liberty of the children of THE ELOHIM. Rom 8:22 For we know that the whole creation groaneth and travaileth in pain together until now. Rom 8:23 And not only they, but ourselves also, which have the firstfruits of the Spirit, even we ourselves groan within ourselves, waiting for the adoption, to wit, the redemption of our body. Rom 8:24 For we are saved by hope: but hope that is seen is not hope: for what a man seeth, why doth he yet hope for? Rom 8:25 But if we hope for that we see not, then do we with patience wait for it. Rom 8:26 Likewise the Spirit also helpeth our infirmities: for we know not what we should pray for as we ought: but the Spirit itself maketh intercession for us with groanings which cannot be uttered. Rom 8:27 And he that searcheth the hearts knoweth what is the mind of the Spirit, because he maketh intercession for the saints according to the will of THE ELOHIM. Rom 8:28 And we know that all things work together for good to them that love THE ELOHIM, to them who are the called according to his purpose. Rom 8:29 For whom he did foreknow, he also did predestinate to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brethren. Rom 8:30 Moreover whom he did predestinate, them he also called: and whom he called, them he also justified: and whom he justified, them he also glorified.
I am the head of My brothers/sisters who are called out into this glory, and has the pre-eminence over them, because of My sacrifice in the flesh through My death.

I had made peace through My blood on the cross to reconcile them unto Myself so as to present them holy and blameless and irreproachable in My sight to be a Christ to be commended with the Glory of THE FATHER.

Col 1:18 And he is the head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the first-born from the dead; that in all things he might have the pre-eminence. Col 1:19 For it pleased the Father that in him should all fulness dwell; Col 1:20 And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to reconcile all things unto himself; by him, I say, whether they be things in earth, or things in heaven. Col 1:21 And you, that were sometime alienated and enemies in your mind by wicked works, yet now hath he reconciled Col 1:22 In the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and unblameable and unreproveable in his sight:….; Col 1:26 Even the mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made manifest to his saints: Col 1:27 To whom THE ELOHIM would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
Being the first son of THE ELOHIM, I was sent into the world to fulfil all righteousness; and thus became the captain of their restoration /salvation.

As the children are also incarnated in flesh and blood, I also Myself likewise took part of the same; that through death, I might destroy him that had the might of death, that is, the Accuser; and deliver them who through fear of death were all their lifetime subject to bondage.
As I hath suffered being tempted with many tribulations, and had overcame them, I am also able to come to aid them that are tempted.

Heb 1:6 And again, when he bringeth in the first-begotten into the world, he saith, And let all the angels/messengers (G32) of THE ELOHIM worship him. Heb 2:9 But we see Jesus, who was made a little lower than THE ELOHIM for the suffering of death, crowned with glory and honour; that he by the grace of THE ELOHIM should taste death for all. Heb 2:10 For it became him, for whom are all, and by whom are all, in bringing many sons unto glory, to make the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings. Heb 2:11 For both he that sanctifieth and they who are sanctified are all of one: for which cause he is not ashamed to call them brethren, Heb 2:12 Saying, I will declare thy name unto my brethren, in the midst of the church will I sing praise unto thee. Heb 2:13 And again, I will put my trust in him. And again, Behold I and the children which THE ELOHIM hath given me. Heb 2:14 Forasmuch then as the children are partakers of flesh and blood, he also himself likewise took part of the same; that through death he might destroy him that had the might of death, that is, the accuser; Heb 2:15 And deliver them who through fear of death were all their lifetime subject to bondage. Heb 2:16 For verily he took not on him the nature of angels; but he took on him the seed of Abraham. Heb 2:17 Wherefore in all things it behoved him to be made like unto his brethren, that he might be begotten as a merciful and faithful high priest in things pertaining to THE ELOHIM, to make reconciliation for the sins of the people. Heb 2:18 For in that he himself hath suffered being tempted, he is able to succour them that are tempted.
These are the firstborn whose names are written in heaven. They, at the beginning, were with Us in heavenly Zion together with Shekinaih and you, before they are sent down to the earth.

Heb 12:22 But ye are come unto mount Sion, and unto the city of the living THE ELOHIM, the heavenly Jerusalem, and to an innumerable company of angels, Heb 12:23 To the general assembly and church (G1577 "ekklesia" called out) of the firstborn, which are written in heaven, and to THE ELOHIM the Judge of all, and to the spirits of just men made perfect, Heb 12:24 And to Jesus the mediator of the new covenant, and to the blood of sprinkling, that speaketh better things than that of Abel.
These shall follow my example to be faithful martyrs and begotten from the dead after being killed, resurrected and glorified to be kings of the earth under me, their King.

Rev 1:4 John to the seven churches which are in Asia: Grace be unto you, and peace, from him which is, and which was, and which is to come; and from the seven Spirits which are before his throne; Rev 1:5 And from Jesus Christ, who is the faithful martyr (G3144 "martus"), and the first begotten of the dead, and the prince of the kings of the earth. Unto him that loved us, and washed us from our sins in his own blood, Rev 1:6 And hath made us kings and priests unto THE ELOHIM and his Father; to him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

title: The Incarnation of JESUS

segments.text: The Incarnation of JESUS
I, being in the BOSOM of My FATHER, who is THE HOLY SPIRIT, is always together with Him/Her at the beginning.

However, when the first Adam and Eve had sinned, My FATHER already formulated his backup plan at the back of His mind to send Me, His son, to lead His lost sons/daughters back to the right path with the everlasting life of My FATHER.
Therefore, I, voluntarily request for My FATHER to send Me to be incarnated/born in the earth to show My brethren the right path back to My FATHER.

While on the earth, I had endured all manner of shame and was unmoved by it because I have always focused My eyes on My FATHER and who He is in HIS SEVEN NAMES, which have kept Me going in enduring and despising the shame; even unto death on the cross.
Therefore, all My beloved brethrens must imitate Me by focusing their eyes on My FATHER (represented by Shekinaih) and His Seven Major Names.

These will enable them to see that My FATHER is in control through His Seven Names; and thereby, they will be able to endure all manner of despise/shame whom My FATHER has preordained them to walk through; being tried, tested and proven to remain unscratched, unmoved and have thereby, being transform day by day, through the daily testing pre-written by My FATHER for them before the foundation of the earth.

Rejoice! Therefore, rejoice and give thanks for your daily trials and pray for your testers except Shekinaih whom My FATHER sent to release His test papers to all His beloved children on the earth and whom will be marking their test paper on behalf of My FATHER for them.
I was sent to incarnate as a human to reveal the name of THE FATHER unto the sons of THE ELOHIM who are My brethren.
They are called sons of Adam which signifies their potential to be restored back to the image of My FATHER.

I came for My incarnated brothers/sisters but not many received Me. But for those who did received Me, I gave them the authority to be begotten as the sons of THE ELOHIM, even to them that believe on Our Name (the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL SEND, AND HAVE ALREADY SENT, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.
John was another son of Adam, a son of THE ELOHIM who was begotten after Me.

Joh 1:15 John bare witness of him, and cried, saying, This was he of whom I spake, He that cometh after me is begotten before me: for he was before me. Joh 1:16 And of his fulness have all we received, and grace for grace. Joh 1:17 For the law was given by Moses, but grace and truth was begotten by Jesus Christ. Joh 1:18 No man hath seen THE ELOHIM at any time; the begotten Son, which is in the bosom of the Father, he hath declared him.
David, who was also a prophet, saw My incarnation and resurrection.

Act 2:30 Therefore being a prophet, and knowing that THE ELOHIM had sworn with an oath to him, that of the fruit of his loins, according to the flesh, he would raise up Christ to sit on his throne; Act 2:31 He seeing this before spake of the resurrection of Christ, that his soul was not left in Hades, neither his flesh did see corruption.

Rom 1:3 Concerning his Son Jesus Christ our Lord, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh; Rom 1:4 And declared to be the Son of God with power, according to the spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead: Rom 1:5 By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name:
It is only through Me who condemned sin in the flesh, that My brethrens are able to fulfil the righteousness of the law if they walk in the spirit like Me.

Rom 8:1 There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ Jesus, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, God sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.
THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih, is THE MAJOR YAHWEH, while I, in you represent THE MINOR YAHWEH in heaven,
But when I am incarnated as a human, I emptied Myself and void all My divinity.
With the weakness of a man in My struggle with sin, I humbled Myself and became obedient unto death, even the death on the cross.
Wherefore THE FATHER also hath highly exalted Me, and given Me a Name which is above every name: That at My Name every knee in the three realms should bow to Me and address Me as their Lord.

Php 2:5 Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus: Php 2:6 Who, being in the form of THE ELOHIM, thought it not robbery to be equal with THE ELOHIM: Php 2:7 But empty himself (G2758 kenoo), and made of none effect (G2758 kenoo) and took upon him the form of a servant, and was begotten in the likeness of men: Php 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross. Php 2:9 Wherefore THE ELOHIM also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: Php 2:10 That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth; Php 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of THE ELOHIM THE FATHER.
I was begotten by THE FATHER and was authorized to be the chief high priest forever after the order of Melchisedec.
In all My weaknesses as a human, being fearful, I cried to THE FATHER to save Me from death.
Nevertheless, as a son, I obeyed THE FATHER in the suffering and death, and was made perfect and thus became the leader of those who are called to be restored with their former glory.

Heb 5:5 So also Christ glorified not himself to be begotten an high priest; but he that said unto him, Thou art my Son, today have I begotten thee. Heb 5:6 As he saith also in another place, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec. Heb 5:7 Who in the days of his flesh, when he had offered up prayers and supplications with strong crying and tears unto him that was able to save him from death, and was heard in that he feared; Heb 5:8 Though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience by the things which he suffered; Heb 5:9 And being made perfect, he became the author of eternal salvation unto all them that obey him; Heb 5:10 Called of THE ELOHIM an high priest after the order of Melchisedec.

It is through My overcoming sin in the flesh that those who are called in the order of Melchisedec, may have the boldness to enter into the holiest by My blood, by a new and living way which I hath consecrated through the veil by My flesh.

Heb 10:19 Having therefore, brethren, boldness to enter into the holiest by the blood of Jesus, Heb 10:20 By a new and living way, which he hath consecrated for us, through the veil, that is to say, his flesh;
I am 100% human when I was incarnated.
I resisted sin in every area and endured every shame even unto death on the cross.
Therefore, I became the completer and leader of the faith, and was set down at the right hand of the Throne of THE FATHER, setting an example for the children whom THE FATHER have given Us.

I endured the chastening of THE FATHER through overcoming all reproaches that I have to bear from insolent people who despised, ridiculed, abhored and misquote Me on top of disputing My teaching and doctrine.

I sympathized with them, and forgave them; for they knew not what they were doing; and thereby, prayed for their conversion, and it pleased My FATHER very much; for by doing so, I overcame evil with good, and thereby, being transformed into My FATHER'S character; and be perfected in the process.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of martyrs (G3144 "martus"), let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto Jesus the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the Throne of THE ELOHIM. Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction (G485 "antilogia" dispute, gainsaying) of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds. Heb 12:4 Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin. Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of THE YAHWEH, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom THE YAHWEH loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom the father chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby.
Those who are called into the order of Melchisedec should also imitate My example with the same mental perspective and heart attitude and thereby be perfected just like Me.

1Pe 4:1 Forasmuch then as Christ hath suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves likewise with the same mind: for he that hath suffered in the flesh hath ceased from sin; 1Pe 4:2 That he no longer should live the rest of his time in the flesh to the lusts of men, but to the will of THE ELOHIM. 1Pe 4:3 For the time past of our life may suffice us to have wrought the will of the Gentiles, when we walked in lasciviousness, lusts, excess of wine, revellings, banquetings, and abominable idolatries: 1Pe 4:4 Wherein they think it strange that ye run not with them to the same excess of riot, speaking evil of you: 1Pe 4:5 Who shall give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead. 1Pe 4:6 For for this cause was the gospel preached also to them that are dead, that they might be judged according to men in the flesh, but live according to THE ELOHIM in the spirit.

title: The Doctrine of "The Only Begotten Son

segments.text: The Doctrine of "The Only Begotten Son
David: LORD JESUS, this is hard saying seeing most of the authorities in Christendom had agreed with the Nicea Creed that you were the only begotten son.

JESUS: Lucifer's with her tactical Battle Plan of Thesis, Anti-Thesis and Synthesis, concluded the Nicene Creed in AD 325 by her offspring Emperor Constantine about Me as the only begotten son of God and begotten and not made, consubstantial with THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT. Arius and Athanasius are just instruments of her diabolical plan of misinformation.

title: THE TRUTH OF WHO I AM

segments.text: THE TRUTH OF WHO I AM
David: LORD JESUS, what is the Truth?

JESUS: My FATHER is the only ULTIMATE MOST HIGH. THE HOLY SPIRIT and I, are merely two higher order angels created as an extension of THE FATHER, who manifest Himself through Us. My FATHER exists before all time. THE HOLY SPIRIT (symbolized by His womb) was first created before I was created. We are both the chief of the first begotten of the creation of God. I am made mightier than all angels except THE HOLY SPIRIT; for she is the Master Architect in executing while I am the the main contractor in co-executing of the creation of My FATHER.

Together, Shekinaih is in THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, representing both of them in being the Master Architect and in executing; and you in Me, is the main Contractor in co-executing both the creation and the destruction of all that have been created before; in order to recreate a new set of the Cosmoses; after the main destruction which will mark the closing of the era, and the beginning of another new era of Mankind on the earth.

Pro 8:22 THE YAHWEH create (H7069 "qanah" to erect, that is, create) me at the beginning of his way, before his works of old. Pro 8:23 I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, or ever the earth was. Pro 8:24 When there were no depths, I was brought forth; when there were no fountains abounding with water. Pro 8:25 Before the mountains were settled, before the hills was I am form (H2342 "chul"): Pro 8:26 While as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the highest part of the dust of the world. Pro 8:27 When he prepared the heavens, I was there: when he set a compass upon the face of the depth: Pro 8:28 When he established the clouds above: when he strengthened the fountains of the deep: Pro 8:29 When he gave to the sea his decree, that the waters should not pass his commandment: when he appointed the foundations of the earth: Pro 8:30 Then I was by him, as the architect (H525 "amon": and I was daily his delight, rejoicing always before him; Pro 8:31 Rejoicing in the habitable part of his earth; and my delights were with the sons of Adam.
Col 3:10 And have put on the new man, which is renewed in knowledge after the image of him that created (G2936 "ktizo") him:
Rev 3:14 And unto the angel of the church of the Laodiceans write; These things saith the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the beginning of the creation (G2934 "ktisis") of God;

Heb 1:1 God, who at sundry times and in divers manners spake in time past unto the fathers by the prophets, Heb 1:2 Hath in these last days spoken unto us by his Son, whom he hath appointed heir of all things, by whom also he made (G1096 "ginomai" come into being) the ages (G165 "aion"); Heb 1:3 Who being the brightness of his glory, and the express image of his person, and upholding all things by the speech (G4487 "rhema") of his power, when he had by himself purged our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high; Heb 1:4 Being made (G1096 "ginomai" come into being) so much stronger (G2909 "kreitton" comparative of a a derivative of G2904 "kratos" force, strength, power, dominion) than the angels, as he hath by inheritance obtained a more excellent name than they. Heb 1:5 For unto which of the angels said he at any time, Thou art my Son, this day have I begotten thee? And again, I will be to him a Father, and he shall be to me a Son? Heb 1:6 And again, when he bringeth in the firstbegotten into the world, he saith, And let all the angels of God worship him. Heb 1:7 And of the angels he saith, Who maketh his angels spirits, and his ministers a flame of fire. Heb 1:8 But unto the Son he saith, Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: a sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom. Heb 1:9 Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore God, even thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
THE HOLY SPIRIT which THE FATHER sent is not greater than THE FATHER for I have spoken, "The servant is not greater than his lord; neither he that is sent greater than he that sent him".
Joh 13:16 Verily, verily, I say unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord; neither he that is sent greater than he that sent him.
Neither am I greater that THE FATHER for I have also spoken, "My Father is greater than I. "

Joh 14:26 But the Comforter, which is the Holy Ghost, whom the Father will send in my name, he shall teach you all things, and bring all things to your remembrance, whatsoever I have said unto you. Joh 14:27 Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid. Joh 14:28 Ye have heard how I said unto you, I go away, and come again unto you. If ye loved me, ye would rejoice, because I said, I go unto the Father: for my Father is greater than I.

THE FATHER give the blue print of his entire plan: whether it is for creation, destruction, etc. THE HOLY SPIRIT executes the Major structure of THE FATHER'S entire blue print: including the creation, the destruction, etc, and I co-execute to fill in all the details of this blue print: whether in the creation, the destruction, etc. Therefore, the entire creation of THE TRINITY is being upheld by THE FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT, who also sub-delegate the minor roles in upholding to Me as well.

Joh 1:1 At the beginning was the Word/oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought), and the Word/Oracle was for (G4314 "pros" in favor, on the side) God, and the Word/Oracle was of God. Joh 1:2 The same was at the beginning for (G4314 "pros" in favor, on the side) God. Joh 1:3 All were made through (G1223 "dia") him; and without him was not any made (G1096 "ginomai" come into being) that was made. Joh 1:4 In him was life; and the life was the light of Adam. Joh 1:5 And the light shineth in darkness; and the darkness seize (G2638 "katalambano") it not. Joh 1:6 There was a man set apart (G649 "apostello") beside G3844 "para" near, beside) by God, whose name was John. Joh 1:7 The same came for a witness, to bear witness of the Light, that all through him might believe. Joh 1:8 He was not that Light, but to the intent (G2443 "hina") to bear witness of that Light. Joh 1:9 That was the true Light, which lighteth every Adam that cometh into the Cosmos (G2889 "kosomos"). Joh 1:10 He was in the Cosmos, and the world was made through (G1223 "dia") him, and the world knew him not. Joh 1:11 He came unto his own, and his own received near (G3880 "paralambano") him not. Joh 1:12 But as many as received near him, to them gave he authority to be made sons of God, even to them that believe on his name: Joh 1:13 Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God. Joh 1:14 And Word/oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought was made (G1096 "ginomai" come into being) was made flesh, and dwelt among us, (and we beheld his glory, the glory as of the remaining come into being (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 and G1096, G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, only, merely and G1096" "ginomai" come into being) of the Father,) full of grace and truth. Joh 1:15 John bare witness of him, and cried, saying, This was he of whom I spake, He that cometh after me is made (G1096 "ginomai" come into being) before me: for he was the chieftest (G4413 "protos" foremost in time, place, order, or importance, best, chiefest) of me. Joh 1:16 And of his fulness have all we received, and grace for grace. Joh 1:17 For the law was given by Moses, but grace and truth came by Jesus Christ. Joh 1:18 No man hath seen God at any time; the remaining come into being (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 and G1096, G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, only, merely and G1096" "ginomai" come into being) Son, which come into being (G5607 "on" The feminine, the neuter and present participle of G1510 "eimi to be, to exist) into (G1519 "eis") the bosom of the Father, that one hath lead out (G1834 "exegeomai" from G1537 "ek" out and G2233 "hegeomai: to lead, that is, command with official authority, governor, chief, have the rule).

Col 1:15 Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature: Col 1:16 For by him were all things created, that are in heaven, and that are in earth, visible and invisible, whether they be thrones, or dominions, or principalities, or powers: all things were created by him, and for him: Col 1:17 And he is before all things, and by him all things consist. Col 1:18 And he is the head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.

My FATHER together with THE HOLY SPIRIT and Me, and together with Shekinaih and you, Our respective Representatives, then created Lucifer/Satan and all the other angels. That is why Lucifer is called son of Morning; for THE HOLY SPIRIT and I, are the Morning, the Angel of Dawn/Daystar/The East Wind.

Psa 110:2 THE YAHWEH shall send the rod of thy strength out of Zion: rule thou in the midst of thine enemies. Psa 110:3 Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in the honour of holiness from the womb of the morning (THE HOLY SPIRIT): thou hast the dew of thy children (H3208 "yalduth" abstractly from H3206 "yeled" child, children, offspring).
Rev 22:16 I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.

THE HOLY SPIRIT and I, are always in unity attached to THE FATHER as if by an umbilical cord. Each time, after co-executing THE FATHER's determination We will always go back to THE FATHER to be part of Him. But when the first thought of rebellion enters into Satan's mind, My FATHER permanently cut off this umbilical cord and THE HOLY SPRIT and Me, become individual person. But each time after co-executing My FATHER'S will, We will still go back to THE FATHER and sit in Our respective thrones to rest.

THE FATHER'S substance is greater in glory, brightness, authority and power than THE HOLY SPIRIT'S substance, which is greater than My substance. Our spiritual heights are also different.
