My spiritual height and realms is lower than THE HOLY SPIRIT'S, whose height and realms, is lower than THE FATHER. The ultimate power and decision making lies with THE FATHER'S alone. THE HOLY SPIRIT is TO SEAL AND EXECUTE while I, CO-EXECUTE THE FATHER'S decree.

Satan is one of my son. I have many sons. All are instigated by him to rebel against Me. The entire creation, the angel in charge of the planets, stars and their principalities all follow Lucifer in her rebellion.

Gen 6:1 And it came to pass, when men began to multiply on the face of the earth, and daughters were born unto them, Gen 6:2 That the sons of THE ELOHIM saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives of all which they chose. Gen 6:3 And the THE YAHWEH said, My spirit shall not always strive with man, for that he also is flesh: yet his days shall be an hundred and twenty years.

title: THE TRUTH OF WHO I AM (part 2)

segments.text: Job 1:6 Now there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before THE YAHWEH, and Satan came also among them.

Psa 82:1 A Psalm of Asaph. God standeth in the congregation of the mighty; he judgeth among the gods. Psa 82:2 How long will ye judge unjustly, and accept the persons of the wicked? Selah. Psa 82:3 Defend the poor and fatherless: do justice to the afflicted and needy. Psa 82:4 Deliver the poor and needy: rid them out of the hand of the wicked. Psa 82:5 They know not, neither will they understand; they walk on in darkness: all the foundations of the earth are out of course. Psa 82:6 I have said, Ye are gods; and all of you are children of the most High. Psa 82:7 But ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes. Psa 82:8 Arise, O THE ELOHIM, judge the earth: for thou shalt inherit all nations.

Shekinaih: I see THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, wearing white robe. I see that THE FATHER'S height is taller than THE HOLY SPIRIT whose height is taller than JESUS. I saw THE FATHER created an angel slightly higher than his ankle with 2 white wings. He covered it from head to feet with a purple embroidered color shawl closely packed with many yellow, green, blue, red, purple, and transparent color stones. I saw the angel admiring and adoring herself and become prideful and self-exalted herself. I saw her move around and showing off her covering robe to the other angels and boasted that this was only given to her and she is the most favored of THE MOST HIGH. Then I saw Feminine and Masculine angels in white admiring her. They were touching her covering robe and brilliant stones admiring it. As the scene zoomed in, I saw the angel with the purple shawl resembled a fair Northern Indian woman with black curly hair with a ring on her nose.

Next I saw her leading a choir of angels in worship. They looked like Chinese heavenly fairies playing musical instruments and dancing before THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, and We in them respectively, who were seated in them at different levels in descending levels.

I then saw her talking to herself that she deserved to be worshipped more than THE TRINITY. Then, I saw THE FATHER with white hair and beard seated on His throne perceiving her thoughts, and I saw the word, "Backup Plan", written at the back of the head of THE FATHER. Then I saw at the back of His head with these words, "CONCEPTION OF SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID", to replace Lucifer/Molech.

Next, THE FATHER used a divine pair of scissors and cut the invisible strings/cords that tied both Shekinaih and Aaron K David to HIMSELF and/or THE HOLY SPIRIT, and from JESUS respectively, and made them as higher order angels, that can function as individuals; whereas, before that moment, they were both fully attached to THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS respectively, to operate as one with Them and in Them.

After this, I saw THE FATHER used a knife and cut a piece of his flesh and made a human figure with my name, "Shekinaih", written on the body, and at the same time, JESUS cut a piece of his flesh and made a human figure with your name, "Aaron K David", written on the body. Next I saw the words, "Replace Lucifer written on the forehead of the human figure which is with your face, and the words, "Replace Molech" on the forehead of the human figure which have your name written on it. I saw Molech as a green demon with two horn inside Lucifer's body. Molech looked like "Gollum" of "Lord of the Rings" Movie.
I then saw THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT breathed into the human figurine representing me, and JESUS blew His breath over the human figurine representing you.

Next, I saw THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS, in the labour ward with their angels. They then instructed the angels to extract the spirit of the baby out and bring the baby spirit to heaven, and I saw me walking into the body of that baby that is to be delivered. I saw my mother's face. It is the same for you for I saw the spirit of the baby that was to be delivered taken out of the body and you walk into that baby. Then, I saw myself, as the golden Empress came out of my mother's womb. It is the same with you. The golden Emperor came out of your mother's womb. I saw the BOOK OF LIFE with my name, "Shekinaih", recorded on the date of my incarnation. It is the same for you, with your name, "Aaron K David", recorded in the BOOK OF LIFE on the date of your birth. This is a last minute swap.

I saw only half of our spirit were in our reincarnation. The other half is our counterpart angels in heaven. We have live many lives. I saw before we were incarnated on earth, our spirits were doing the creation.

I saw that upon seeing our reincarnations, Lucifer was furious, so she subdued and demanded all the angels to bow down to her instead of THE TRINITY by promising them great Titles and Positions in her New Empire. One third had succumbed to her seduction and there was a war in heaven between Michael and Lucifer and her angels were driven with her and cast down to middle heaven in obscure planets.

JESUS: Yes, Lucifer till her ultimate destruction will continue to challenge THE FATHER that none is better than her and will continue to mock and defile all THE FATHER'S creation, and mislead and destroy all the children whom THE FATHER has given Us through Molech who executes her determination.

The Nicaea creed, was an egg that came out of Lucifer, the distorted snake, that had led the early father Jerome, to alter the word "menogenes" to the word 'monogenes' due to intimidation by group pressure. Therefore instead of the "remaining created son", it is translated to "only begotten son". The word, "MENO" which means "REMAINING" was altered to the word, "MONO" as the word, "MONO" has wide interpretation. Therefore, they purposely misinterpret the word "MONO" as the word, "ONLY". But the word, "ginomai" G1096 "ginomai" means 'to cause to be, come into being, made') was not altered, thus betraying their erroneous teachings that I was not made or created.

1Jn 4:1 Beloved, believe not every spirit, but try the spirits whether they are of God: because many false prophets are gone out into the world. 1Jn 4:2 Hereby know ye the Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesseth that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is of God: 1Jn 4:3 And every spirit that confesseth not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is not of God: and this is that spirit of antichrist, whereof ye have heard that it should come; and even now already is it in the world. 1Jn 4:4 Ye are of God, little children, and have overcome them: because greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world. 1Jn 4:5 They are of the world: therefore speak they of the world, and the world heareth them. 1Jn 4:6 We are of God: he that knoweth God heareth us; he that is not of God heareth not us. Hereby know we the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error. 1Jn 4:7 Beloved, let us love one another: for love is of God; and every one that loveth is born of God, and knoweth God. 1Jn 4:8 He that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love. 1Jn 4:9 In this was manifested the love of God toward us, because that God sent remaining created (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, remaining) and G1096 "ginomai" to cause to be, come into being , made) Son into the world, that we might live through him. 1Jn 4:10 Herein is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us, and sent his Son to be the propitiation for our sins.

After him, all the other fathers, followed his error. The Church became corrupted by Constantine through his Babylonian priests and many of the early fathers started to forget My true teachings. Instead of not loving the things of this world, they fell in love with the authority and power and riches bestowed by the Roman Emperor. This is what John meant when he said: "They went out from Us, but they were not of Us; for if they had been of Us, they would no doubt have continued with Us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of Us.

1Jn 2:15 Love not the Cosmos, neither the things that are in the Cosmos. If any man love the Cosmos, the love of the Father is not in him. 1Jn 2:16 For all that is in the Cosmos, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the Cosmos. 1Jn 2:17 And the Cosmos passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of THE ELOHIM abideth for ever. 1Jn 2:18 Little children, it is the last time: and as ye have heard that antichrist shall come, even now are there many antichrists; whereby we know that it is the last time. 1Jn 2:19 They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would no doubt have continued with us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of us. 1Jn 2:22 Who is a liar but he that denieth that Jesus is the Christ? He is antichrist that denieth the Father and the Son. 1Jn 2:23 Whosoever denieth the Son, the same hath not the Father: (but) he that acknowledgeth the Son hath the Father also. 1Jn 2:24 Let that therefore abide in you, which ye have heard from the beginning. If that which ye have heard from the beginning shall remain in you, ye also shall continue in the Son, and in the Father. 1Jn 2:25 And this is the announcement (G1860 "epaggelia") that he hath upon an angel (G1861 "epaggello" from G1909 "epi" upon and G32 "aggelos" angel/messenger) to us, even eternal life.
Its aim, is to blind all My brothers/sisters whom THE FATHER has sent to the world from knowing their heavenly beginning and their purpose of their incarnation.

THE FATHER: During Lucifer's rebellion, two third of My sons follow her; but one third later repented, were forgiven and restored back to their original roles. Only one third of My sons remained faithful (unscratched and unaffected).
Therefore, those who rebelled with Lucifer, their fate will be sealed after Shekinaih and you have given them a last chance to repent before their fate is eternally sealed.

These are Our sons who had missed the mark and have rebelled against Our pre-ordained path for their life. These group includes the one third that fell and subsequently repented, as well as the rebellious ones who follow Lucifer in her rebellion.

I and the one third of My sons who do not rebel, are the remaining sons of THE FATHER and Me am not the only begotten son as Lucifer would want My sons to believe so that they will never be able to fulfil their destiny.

Joh 1:14 And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us, (and we beheld his glory, the glory as of the remaining created (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, remaining) and G1096 "ginomai" to cause to be, come into being , made) of the Father,) full of grace and truth.

title: THE TRUTH OF WHO I AM (part 3)

segments.text: Joh 1:18 No man hath seen God at any time; the remaining created (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, remaining) and G1096 "ginomai" to cause to be, come into being , made) Son, which is in the bosom of the Father, he hath declared him.

Joh 3:16 For God so loved the world, that he gave his remaining created (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, remaining) and G1096 "ginomai" to cause to be, come into being , made) Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life. Joh 3:17 For God sent not his Son into the world to condemn the world; but that the world through him might be saved. Joh 3:18 He that believeth on him is not condemned: but he that believeth not is condemned already, because he hath not believed in the name of remaining created Son of God.
Like JESUS, Isaac is not the only begotten son of Abraham but the remaining after I sent Ishmael away from Abraham,

Heb 11:17 By faith Abraham, when he was tried, offered up Isaac: and he that had received the promises offered up his remaining (G3439 "monogenes" from G3441 "monos" alone without a companion, forsaken, destitute, remaining) and G1096 "ginomai" to cause to be, come into being , made) son,

When My SON, JESUS was in heaven, He was in My womb which is THE HOLY SPIRIT. When I send Him down to be incarnated to be a human, I took away all his glory. He was 100% a mortal being. Those who denied that he came in the flesh are not from Me because it nullified his finished work on the cross. This is the spirit of Antichrist for they denied that I through My SON, JESUS have put Satan under Our feet through the cross in the flesh.

Php 2:5 Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus: Php 2:6 Who, being in the form of God, thought it not robbery to be equal with God: Php 2:7 But empty (H2758 "keno") himself and made void(H2758 "keno"), and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men: Php 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross. Php 2:9 Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: Php 2:10 That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth; Php 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

JESUS: Yes, what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, and I came in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: that the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled for all My brothers/sisters as they walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. It is through THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, the Golden Empress, at that time before her reincarnation as Shekinaih on the earth, that came upon Me, that have led Me, and energized Me to be able to mortify the deeds of the flesh.

Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, God sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.

In heaven, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and I, bear record of this truth. In earth, the water, and the blood that came out of My side, which was pierced by a spear, also bore witness with the HOLY SPIRIT, that I am/was 100% human when on earth.

1Jn 5:4 For whatsoever is born from THE ELOHIM overcometh the Cosmos: and this is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith. 1Jn 5:5 Who is he that overcometh the Cosmos, but he that believeth that Jesus is the Son of THE ELOHIM? 1Jn 5:6 This is he that came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not in water only, but in water and blood. And it is the Spirit that beareth witness, because the Spirit is truth. Jn 5:7 For there are three that bear record in heaven, the Father, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one. 1Jn 5:8 And there are three that bear witness in earth, the spirit, and the water, and the blood: and these three are into (G1519 eis) one.

This is what My early teaching is all about. There is no controversy at the beginning until THE WOMAN, LUCIFER, MYSTERY BABYLON, through her false Ministers mixed her leaven to corrupt My ministers with false doctrine and the spirit of hypocrisy
I was sent to reveal to them this Mystery of godliness; that they being incarnated into this world as flesh, shall walk in the spirit and be justified and receive into glory.

1Ti 3:15 But if I tarry long, that thou mayest know how thou oughtest to behave thyself in the house of God, which is the church of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth. 1Ti 3:16 And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: God was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed on in the world, received up into glory.

My brothers/sisters who knew who they were and purified themselves, shall not be ashamed when they shall be revealed to the Cosmoses as chidren of THE ELOHIM when My FATHER and me shall appear through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY in Shekinaih and you.

1Jn 3:1 Behold, what manner of love the Father hath bestowed upon us, that we should be called the sons of THE ELOHIM: therefore the Cosmos knoweth us not, because it knew him not. 1Jn 3:2 Beloved, now are we the sons of THE ELOHIM, and it doth not yet appear what we shall be: but we know that, when he shall appear, we shall be like him; for we shall see him as he is. 1Jn 3:3 And every man that hath this hope in him purifieth himself, even as he is pure.

Therefore, the teaching that I am both God and Man, when I am on earth, had misled and had deceived all My lost Bethrens/daughters of THE FATHER, and has caused disillusion fogging them from the correct perspective; that none need to crucify all the works of their flesh together with its affections and lusts; to follow My footstep unto crucifixion and be perfected by Us, in order to be really saved; because their excuses is, "JESUS is God, but we are not; so we cannot be like Him; sinless". Therefore, many did not make it to heaven but have descended into Gehenna (Tartarus), Perdition and Hades.

1Pe 4:1 Forasmuch then as Christ hath suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves likewise with the same mind: for he that hath suffered in the flesh hath ceased from sin; 1Pe 4:2 That he no longer should live the rest of his time in the flesh to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.

THE FATHER: THE HOLY SPIRIT left the first temple for Heaven when Solomon fell into idolatry. Later, I sent THE HOLY SPIRT down from Heaven to Elijah to manifest My glory and power. When I took Elijah in a chariot to Heaven, THE HOLY SPIRIT left the earth and came back to Me. When John the Baptist was in his mother's womb, THE HOLY SPIRIT (in 100% fullness which consists of THE HOLY SPIRIT wearing white being the 50% portion and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih in Golden Empress robe being the other 50% portion) dwelled in him. When John baptized JESUS, 50% of THE HOLY SPIRIT who is being represented by Shekinaih in Golden Empress robe, came out of him and became a light came upon JESUS and stayed upon Him. When John was executed, the remaining 50% of THE HOLY SPIRIT who is in white robe, went back to heaven. The remaining 50% of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih with Golden Empress robe as a light that was upon JESUS went back to Heaven when He was taken up to Heaven. On the day of the Pentecost, 20% of THE HOLY SPIRIT came down from Heaven as a big ball of light which further broke into many smaller balls of light and went into many people who were present.

At present, I have put 5% of THE HOLY SPIRIT into Shekinaih, but I will continue to pour out My HOLY SPIRIT into her in increasing measure. The power in her is yet to be fully activated. At My Kairos (at the appointed) time when I put Shekinaih and you, on the public ministry, I and My SON JESUS, will manifest Our Presence through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY in increasing measure.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE COSMOS JUDGE and SUB-JUDGE respectively, shall punish the Beast, the False Prophets and the nations that serve them.

We have put Our SEVEN NAMES in Shekinaih and you, as Our Major and Minor Names respectively. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, The Angel of Our Presence, shall lead Our children to Our Heavenly Mount Zion.

Isa 27:1 In that day THE YAHWEH with his sore and great and strong sabre shall punish leviathan the piercing serpent, even leviathan that crooked serpent; and he shall slay the dragon that is in the sea. ...... Isa 27:7 Hath he smitten him, as he smote those that smote him? or is he slain according to the slaughter of them that are slain by him? Isa 27:8 In measure, when it shooteth forth, thou wilt debate with it: he stayeth his rough wind in the day of the east wind. Isa 27:9 By this therefore shall the iniquity of Jacob be purged; and this is all the fruit to take away his sin; when he maketh all the stones of the altar as chalkstones that are beaten in sunder, the groves and images shall not stand up. Isa 27:10 Yet the defenced city shall be desolate, and the habitation forsaken, and left like a wilderness: there shall the calf feed, and there shall he lie down, and consume the branches thereof. Isa 27:11 When the boughs thereof are withered, they shall be broken off: the women come, and set them on fire: for it is a people of no understanding: therefore he that made them will not have mercy on them, and he that formed them will shew them no favour. Isa 27:12 And it shall come to pass in that day, that THE YAHWEH shall beat off from the channel of the river unto the stream of Egypt, and ye shall be gathered one by one, O ye children of Israel. Isa 27:13 And it shall come to pass in that day, that the great trumpet shall be blown, and they shall come which were ready to perish in the land of Assyria, and the outcasts in the land of Egypt, and shall worship THE YAHWEH in the holy mount at Jerusalem.
THE FATHER then walked towards Shekinaih and waved His hand over her eyes.
Immediately, both Shekinaih and Aaron K David were transported to witness the moment that they were being created.

title:
ACT 1 SCENE 2 
The Incarnation/Reincarnation of THE FATHER/THE HOLY SPIRIT and the Reincarnation of JESUS

segments.text:
ACT 1 SCENE 2 
The Incarnation/Reincarnation of THE FATHER/THE HOLY SPIRIT and the Reincarnation of JESUS
Time Frame: Year 1965/1959
Location: In the Heaven and on the Earth
At a park beside the river of life situated in the Planet of JESUS, THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS seated on a bench in front of a table are having a conversation.

In a spur of a second, in unison with one voice they said to one another, "It's time for Us to incarnate/reincarnate ourselves in the Earth Planet to fulfil what We have written in Our script concerning the Earth with its inhabitants, in particular to lead Our children back to Us, as well as to fulfil Our destruction plan as per Our script in the Book of Revelation. Therefore, this day(today) let Us do that".
Following, THE FATHER took out a short knife and carve out a reasonable size piece of his flesh from the lower part of his left arm and THE HOLY SPIRIT also do likewise, followed by JESUS

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT then mixed both their flesh that were cut out and form a small size golden Empress figurine representing Shekinaih and begin to blow their breath on this human figurine.
After that, JESUS formed five different sizes of golden Emperor human figurines putting 50%, 20%, 10%, 10%, 10% of his spiritual DNA in each of these human figurine respectively.

THE TRINITY then descended to a delivery room whereby a woman is about to give birth. With the command of THE TRINITY, two angels came to escort the existing spirit in that baby in this woman up to heaven and Shekinaih, the Golden Empress enter into the body of this baby.

Likewise, JESUS commanded the angels to escort the spirit of the baby of the five candidates he chose for his incarnation and the spirit of the five candidates also went into the selected body of their incarnation at their appointed time.

title: The Incarnation of Shekinaih and Aaron K David

segments.text: The Incarnation of Shekinaih and Aaron K David
JESUS then turn to Shekinaih and David who were transported there and drew a diagram as above and explained to them their incarnation/reincarnation,

JESUS: According to the diagram, pink outer layer signifies love, and five signifies holiness. Therefore the five petals outer layer of pink rose signifies the sweet fragrance sacrificial holy love of the Godhead. The inner Yellow Petal Rose of THE FATHER signifies "Original Divinity", the Red Petal Rose of THE HOLY SPIRIT signifies "Purging Fire" and the Blue Petal Rose of JESUS signifies "The Cleansing Water.

The river from the FATHER to THE HOLY SPIRIT to THE SON signifies the river of life from the throne of THE ELOHIM. It is made up 50% fire on the right and 50% water on the left of the river. The fire represents the spirit and the water represents the word. The spirit signifies the fire of purging (spirit of judgment) unto holiness and the word signifies cleansing/regeneration (the washing of water by My spoken word)
Joh 3:5 Jesus answered, Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born of water and of the Spirit, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost;

This river is the sweet fragrance of the sacrificial holy love of THE TRINITY by which the fire of purging and the word of cleansing will perfect you unto holiness; so that you can partake of Our divine nature.

Eph 5:26 That he might sanctify and cleanse it with the washing of water by the word, Eph 5:27 That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.

Isa 4:4 When THE ADONAI shall have washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion, and shall have purged the blood of Jerusalem from the midst thereof by the spirit of judgment, and by the spirit of burning.

It is through this river that the Brides and the Anointed Ones are regenerated and sanctified and restored to partake of the divine nature of THE FATHER. The dotted line represent the sprinkling of gold dust which is the imputation of divinity DNA.
I, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, each sliced a piece of Our flesh from Our arm and put it on a mortar; and with a pestle, I pounded it into a paste.
THE FATHER: I then kneaded the paste into a figurine of a human and this is Shekinaih who is wearing a Golden Empress's gold robe.
Following that, THE HOLY SPIRIT and I, breathe Our breath into her and she became alive.
I then put her into the womb of a woman who is lying on a bed who later gave birth to a miniature Golden Empress.

Following that, My Son, JESUS sliced a piece of His flesh from His hand and likewise pound it on a mortar and knead into 5 figurines. The first figurine, He put 50% of his DNA of His full character and for the second figurine, He put 20% of His DNA, and for the rest of three, he put 10% of His DNA each. Then, He blow his breath into all of them. The figurine that have 50% of the DNA of JESUS was David and he is JESUS's first choice to be His reincarnation. That is why I have shown Shekinaih some years ago, during an overnight travailing prayer, a baby came out of her womb and the baby is David.
(JESUS then drew another diagram and said to them as he pointed to the diagram.)

JESUS: The bigger pink outer layer with yellow and red rose signify THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, and is represented by Shekinaih. The smaller blue rose signify Me, represented by you. This smaller blue rose was inside a bamboo basket which is supported by two pairs of hand; a bigger pair supporting a smaller pair. The basket was superimposed on a globe which is inflamed with fire all over it. There are also four smaller roses which represent four others who are called to represent Me.
The rainbow signifies the promises as per the bible, which states that your hope is, "Christ in you, the Hope of Glory"; or "Christ may be formed in you".
Col 1:27 To whom THE ELOHIM would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
Gal 4:19 My little children, of whom I travail in birth again until Christ be formed in you.

The bigger hand that is supporting the smaller hand which supports a bamboo basket containing a blue rose, signifies the hand of THE FATHER supporting the hand of THE HOLY SPIRIT who in turn supports Me incarnated in you, signified by the blue rose.

I have shown Shekinaih a vision of a mother carrying a baby in her arm and THE FATHER besides her, to make her to understand the meaning of the two pairs of hands that is supporting the basket with the baby inside.
THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih is to oversee the full development of the grown of the baby with the support of THE FATHER.
The globe which is on fire; signifies the fiery trial you have to go through in this world; and the bamboo basket signifies the furnace pot.
As bamboo through intense heat turned to charcoal and is able to dehumidify, and purify air and water, you will be purified through fiery trial in this world through many tribulations.

The cord that link the rose above to the rose below depicts the heart of Our heart through the heart of Shekinaih being attached to the heart of the SON. Hence Shekinaih and you, are spiritually attached to one another by an umbilical cord.

As the umbilical cord connected the opening in the baby's stomach to the placenta in the womb of her mother, at this current stage, you were still depending on THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih for sustenance for your spiritual growth.

Like an unborn baby, you need to receive your spiritual blood that is rich in spirit oxygen and spirit nutrients from one of My spirit vein in My spirit bloodstream from My spirit placenta via the spirit umbilical cord. In addition, through two spirit arteries, the deoxygenated spirit blood and spirit waste products, such as spirit carbon dioxide, from you as an unborn baby must go back to Our spirit placenta as a process of purging. Towards the end of THE HOLY SPIRIT spiritual pregnancy through Shekinaih, We will still need to pass spirit antibodies from Our spirit placenta through the spirit umbilical cord to you, giving you spiritual immunity from defilement.

The rest of the four smaller roses who are not 100% circumcised during the tests and are not chosen by Me to be My incarnation, if they repent, they will have the potential to be in the first 500 row of My army.

THE FATHER, and THE HOLY SPIRIT took a part of their spiritual substance and incarnate and reincarnate in Shekinaih, so that she can represent them in human form on earth. They have put their brains and hearts inside her brain and her heart and hold the remote control of her feelings and thoughts. I likewise did what they did and reincarnated into you.

The Feminine aspect of THE TRINITY is manifested through Shekinaih as the incarnation and reincarnation of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT respectively, and the Masculine aspect of THE TRINITY is manifested through Me incarnated in you.
Together, Shekinaih and you represent THE ELOHIM in the totality of THE TRINITY. As THE FATHER and Me are one. So are they on this earth.
Joh 10:29 My Father, which gave them me, is greater than all; and no man is able to pluck them out of my Father's hand. Joh 10:30 I and my Father are one.

Shekinaih who is the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT, is also called the Spirit of Holiness. It is through Our decree through her, will the resurrection of the dead be executed by her and co-executed by you, Our male archangel Metatron who will be united with Me, as it is written: "For THE YAHWEH Himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of THE ELOHIM: and the dead in Christ shall rise first: Then, We which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet THE YAHWEH in the air: and so shall we ever be with THE YAHWEH. (1Th 4:15-17)

Rom 1:3 Concerning his Son Jesus Christ our Lord, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh; Rom 1:4 And declared to be the Son of THE ELOHIM with power, according to the spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead:
Being THE HOLY SPIRIT re-incarnated as well, Shekinaih, is also called the Spirit of Faith. My disciples address THE HOLY SPIRIT as "Pistis". (The Greek word for "FAITH")
Paul when writing to the Galatian, addressed THE HOLY SPIRIT as "Spirit" and "Pistis" as the same being.

Gal 3:2 This only would I learn of you, Received ye the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith (G4102 "pistis")? Gal 3:3 Are ye so foolish? Having begun in the Spirit, are ye now made perfect by the flesh?

When Paul stated that Abraham staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief; but was strong (G1743 "endunamoo") in faith (Pistis), he was referring to THE HOLY SPIRIT. The real translation should be "but was empowered of Pistis". The English word "in" was never in the original Greek text.

My FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and Me, through the Angel of Our Presence promised Abraham a son. It is THE HOLY SPIRIT Pistis that imputed to Abraham for righteousness. This imputation was not for him alone but for Us also, to whom it will be imputed if we believe on him (Angel of THE YAHWEH, through the decree of THE HOLY SPIRIT) that raised JESUS from the dead by the decree of the spirit of holiness (THE HOLY SPIRIT).

Rom 4:20 He staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief; but was empowered (G1743 "endunamoo") of Pistis (G4102 "pistis" faith), giving glory to THE ELOHIM; Rom 4:21 And being fully persuaded that, what he (the angel that appear to him) had promised, he was able also to perform. Rom 4:22 And therefore it was imputed to him for righteousness. Rom 4:23 Now it was not written for his sake alone, that it was imputed to him; Rom 4:24 But for us also, to whom it shall be imputed, if we believe on him (the co-executing angel of THE YAHWEH) that raised up Jesus our Lord from the dead; Rom 4:25 Who was delivered for our offences, and was raised again for our justification. Rom 5:1 Therefore being justified out of faith (Pistis), we have peace with THE ELOHIM through our Lord Jesus Christ: Rom 5:2 By whom also we have access by faith (Pistis) into this grace wherein we stand, and rejoice in hope of the glory of THE ELOHIM.

title: The Incarnation of Shekinaih and Aaron K David (part 2)

segments.text: Paul again encouraged the Corinthians that they are to hold on to the same spirit of faith (THE HOLY SPIRIT) that raise JESUS from the dead shall also raise them up from the dead in the last day.

2Co 4:13 We hold (G2192 "echo" to hold") same the same spirit of faith, according as it is written, I believed, and therefore have I spoken; we also believe, and therefore speak; 2Co 4:14 Knowing that he which raised up the Lord Jesus shall raise up us also by Jesus, and shall present us with you.
But many in the last days shall be instigated to rebel against THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and give heed to seducing spirits and doctrines of demons instead.

1Ti 4:1 Now the Spirit discourse (G4490 "(G3004 "lego") outspokenly (G4490"rhetos"), that in the latter times some shall be instigate to revolt (G868 "aphistemis" to remove, instigate to revolt) the Pistis (H4102 faith), giving heed to seducing spirits, and doctrines of demons (G1140);

Shekinaih represents THE SPIRIT (HOLY SPIRIT) and you represent THE TRUTH (WORD/ ORACLE); and together are THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE SHALL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME. Together, you shall testify of Me that I came in the flesh and was resurrected and is now reincarnated in you as My second coming.
Joh 15:26 But when the Comforter is come, whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of truth, which proceedeth from the Father, he shall testify of me:
It was expedient for Me to die and be resurrected and left the physical world: for if I did not, I cannot be joined with you.

Now that you has come, you will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment: Of sin, because they believe not on Me that I am the SON of THE ELOHIM; of righteousness, because I had overcome the Cosmoses by total obedience unto death according to will of THE FATHER and returned to him. Of judgment, because Satan, the prince of this world had been sentenced, and will be locked up in the bottomless pit for a thousand years by you.

Joh 16:7 Nevertheless I tell you the truth; it is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Advocate will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you. Joh 16:8 And when he is come, he will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment: Joh 16:9 Of sin, because they believe not on me; Joh 16:10 Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more; Joh 16:11 Of judgment, because the prince of this world is judged.

The incarnation of THE FATHER and the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT, in Shekinaih and My reincarnation in you, as THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH is not easily to digest and bear by My disciples during My time. But the time has come for Shekinaih and you to guide My children into all truth and shall show them the things that are coming; especially the judgment of the seven seal, seven trumpets and the seven vials of the Book of Revelation.

Joh 16:12 I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now. Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come. Joh 16:14 He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:15 All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.

I had compared My second coming to the birth of a child that is delivered from a woman, and this woman is the woman that brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron after he was caught up unto THE ELOHIM, and to his throne.

Joh 16:19 Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them, Do ye enquire among yourselves of that I said, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me? Joh 16:20 Verily, verily, I say unto you, That ye shall weep and lament, but the world shall rejoice: and ye shall be sorrowful, but your sorrow shall be turned into joy. Joh 16:21 A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the world. Joh 16:22 And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man taketh from you.

Rev 12:1 And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars: Rev 12:2 And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered. Rev 12:3 And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads. Rev 12:4 And his tail drew the third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born. Rev 12:5 And she brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto God, and to his throne.

The woman is Shekinaih who is also, the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT (The Mother Jerusalem) and the child is you, who shall be caught up to Me in heaven and I will change you into Metatron and will unite with you and you shall sit on your throne to rule all nations with a rod of iron. You shall be called THE VICTORY.
In ancient time, the Angel of THE YAHWEH is addressed by My people as "NETSACH" which in English is translated as "THE VICTORY".

Together with the representative of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, they are THE VOICE OF THE YAHWEH, the spokesman who instructed Samuel to tell Saul that THE YAHWEH had rejected him for being a king because of his rebellion and stubbornness for not obeying Her/Him. When Saul pleaded with Samuel to intercede to this angel for him, Samuel told him that THE ANGEL VICTORY (who came together with the representative of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT), THE SPOKEMAN OF THE YAHWEH, will not lie nor repent from HER/HIS decision to give his kingdom to a better man than him.

1Sa 15:23 For rebellion is as the sin of witchcraft, and stubbornness is as iniquity and idolatry. Because thou hast rejected the word (Spokesman) of THE YAHWEH, he hath also rejected thee from being king. 1Sa 15:24 And Saul said unto Samuel, I have sinned: for I have transgressed the commandment of THE YAHWEH, and thy words: because I feared the people, and obeyed their voice. 1Sa 15:25 Now therefore, I pray thee, pardon my sin, and turn again with me, that I may worship THE YAHWEH. 1Sa 15:26 And Samuel said unto Saul, I will not return with thee: for thou hast rejected the word (spokesman) of THE YAHWEH, and THE YAHWEH hath rejected thee from being king over Israel. 1Sa 15:27 And as Samuel turned about to go away, he laid hold upon the skirt of his mantle, and it rent. 1Sa 15:28 And Samuel said unto him, THE YAHWEH hath rent the kingdom of Israel from thee this day, and hath given it to a neighbour of thine, that is better than thou. 1Sa 15:29 And also THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") of Israel will not lie nor repent: for he is not a man, that he should repent.

Shekinaih and you, as THE ELOAH, Our Masculine and Feminine manifestation, shall in Our wrath destroy the lawless and the ungodly with the breath of your mouth. As We have through you, THE VICTORY, punished the rebellious angels in the past, We will not hesitate to punish the high and lofty in the last days for they are mere men that are only made of clay, before THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM THEY SHALL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.

Job 4:8 Even as I have seen, they that plow iniquity, and sow wickedness, reap the same. Job 4:9 By the blast (H4480 "min" from, H5397 "neshamah" breath) of THE ELOAH (H433 "eloahh") they are destroyed (H6 "abad"), and by the breath of his nostrils are they consumed. Job 4:10 The roaring of the lion, and the voice of the fierce lion, and the teeth of the young lions, are broken. Job 4:11 The old lion perisheth for lack of prey, and the stout lion's whelps are scattered abroad. Job 4:12 Now a thing was secretly brought to me, and mine ear received a little thereof. Job 4:13 In thoughts from the visions of the night, when deep sleep falleth on men, Job 4:14 Fear came upon me, and trembling, which made all my bones to shake. Job 4:15 Then a spirit passed before my face; the hair of my flesh stood up: Job 4:16 It stood still, but I could not discern the form thereof: an image was before mine eyes, there was silence, and I heard a voice, saying, Job 4:17 Shall mortal man be more just than THE ELOAH (H433 "eloahh")? shall a man be more pure than his maker? Job 4:18 Behold, he put no trust in his servants; and his angels he charged with folly: Job 4:19 How much less in them that dwell in houses of clay, whose foundation is in the dust, which are crushed before the moth? Job 4:20 They are destroyed from morning to evening: they are destroyed (H6 "abad") by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") without any regarding it. Job 4:21 Doth not their excellency which is in them go away? they die, even without wisdom.

My FATHER has given Shekinaih to represent him to release His decree, sealing and execute to take the lives of any human; and you, THE VICTORY will co-execute His counsel and overpower them and they shall pass away.

Job 14:18 And surely the mountain falling cometh to nought, and the rock is removed out of his place. Job 14:19 The waters wear the stones: thou washest away the things which grow out of the dust of the earth; and thou destroyest the hope of man. Job 14:20 Thou overpower (H8630 "taqaph") by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach"), and he pass away: thou changest his countenance, and sendest him away. Job 14:21 His sons come to honour, and he knoweth it not; and they are brought low, but he perceiveth it not of them. Job 14:22 But his flesh upon him shall have pain, and his soul within him shall mourn.

title: The Incarnation of Shekinaih and Aaron K David (part 3)

segments.text: Since Adam was placed on earth, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE LAST DAYS' MOSES AND AARON, have destroyed the male and female incarnation of Satan and their seeds; who were the incarnated kings in the past.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, have brought the great flood; destroyed the tower of Babel; brought ruin to Sodom and Gomorrah; wasted Egypt, and destroyed many Satan's seed who ruled the earth in the different era.

Job 20:4 Knowest thou not this of old, since Adam (H120) was placed upon earth, Job 20:5 That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the hypocrite but for a moment? Job 20:6 though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds; Job 20:7 Yet he shall be destroyed by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") like his own dung: they which have seen him shall say, Where is he?..... Job 20:27 The heaven shall reveal his iniquity; and the earth shall rise up against him. Job 20:28 The increase of his house shall depart, and his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath. Job 20:29 This is the portion of a wicked man from THE ELOHIM (H430), and the heritage appointed unto him by THE EL (H410).

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih sit as THE MAJOR JUDGE and I, represented by you, THE VICTORY, sit as THE MINOR JUDGE, in both your respective thrones in the heaven, executing and co-executing respectively, Our judgment in the three realms; heavens, earth and beneath earth.

Job 23:1 Then Job answered and said, Job 23:2 Even today is my complaint bitter: my stroke is heavier than my groaning. Job 23:3 Oh that I knew where I might find him! that I might come even to his seat! Job 23:4 I would order my cause before him, and fill my mouth with arguments. Job 23:5 I would know the words which he would answer me, and understand what he would say unto me. Job 23:6 Will he plead against me with his great power? No; but he would put strength in me. Job 23:7 There the righteous might dispute with him; so should I be delivered from THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") my judge.
THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and I, represented by you, THE VICTORY, will try and discipline all who rebel against us.

Job 34:35 Job hath spoken without knowledge, and his words were without wisdom. Job 34:36 My desire is that Job may be tried by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") because of his answers for wicked men. Job 34:37 For he addeth rebellion unto his sin, he clappeth his hands among us, and multiplieth his words against THE EL.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih as THE MAJOR EL, and I, represented by you, as THE MINOR EL, THE VICTORY will together manifest Our might and wisdom and shall bring justice to My 7,000 Anointed Ones (poor) and 144,000 righteous ones (Brides) and established them to sit on the thrones that are prepared for them before the foundation of the earth, if they obey and submit to Our discipline through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL AND HAVE SENT. If not, they shall die without knowledge.

Job 36:5 Behold, THE EL is mighty, and despiseth not any: he is mighty in strength and wisdom. Job 36:6 He preserveth not the life of the wicked: but giveth right to the poor. Job 36:7 He withdraweth not his eyes from the righteous: but with kings are they on the throne; yea, he doth establish them by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach"), and they are exalted. Job 36:8 And if they be bound in fetters, and be holden in cords of affliction; Job 36:9 Then he sheweth them their work, and their transgressions that they have exceeded. Job 36:10 He openeth also their ear to discipline, and commandeth that they return from iniquity. Job 36:11 If they obey and serve him, they shall spend their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasures. Job 36:12 But if they obey not, they shall perish by the sword, and they shall die without knowledge.

We, in the Day of Judgment, represented by Shekinaih, and you, THE VICTORY, will make a complete desolation on the cities of Lucifer whose seed ruled the nations of this world. And they that know My Name in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, will put their trust in Us; for I through you, THE VICTORY will not forget the cry of My needy Brides but will establish the hope of My depressed Anointed Ones.

Psa 9:5 Thou hast rebuked the heathen, thou hast destroyed the wicked, thou hast put out their name for ever and ever. Psa 9:6 O thou enemy, desolations are complete (H8552 "tamam") by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach"): and thou hast destroyed cities; their memorial is perished with them. Psa 9:7 But THE YAHWEH shall endure for ever: he hath prepared his throne for judgment. Psa 9:8 And he shall judge the world in righteousness, he shall minister judgment to the people in uprightness. Psa 9:9 THE YAHWEH also will be a refuge for the oppressed, a refuge in times of trouble. Psa 9:10 And they that know thy name will put their trust in thee: for thou, THE YAHWEH, hast not forsaken them that seek (H1875: darash" inquire) thee. Psa 9:11 Sing praises to THE YAHWEH, which dwelleth in Zion: declare among the people his doings Psa 9:12 When he maketh inquisition for blood, he remembereth them: he forgetteth not the cry of the humble. Psa 9:18 For the needy shall not by THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") be forgotten: the expectation of the poor (H6041 "aniy" depressed in mind and circumstances, afflicted) shall not perish for ever. Psa 9:19 Arise, O YAHWEH; let not man prevail: let the heathen be judged in thy presence. Psa 9:20 Put them in fear, O YAHWEH: that the nations may know themselves to be but men. Selah.

We, THE EL, will not hide Our Face/Presence from the wicked but will through the Angel of Our Presence, SHE (Shekinaih)/HE (Aaron K David), contest against those who persecute the poor (7,000 Anointed Ones) and the 144,000 fatherless (needy Brides).

Psa 10:11 He hath said in his heart, THE EL hath forgotten: he hideth his face (H6440 "paniym" presence); for fear (H1077 "bal") THE VICTORY (H5331 "netsach") see it. Psa 10:12 Arise, O YAHWEH; O EL, lift up thine hand: forget not the poor (H6035 "anav" depress in mind and circumstance). Psa 10:13 Wherefore doth the wicked contemn THE ELOHIM? he hath said in his heart, Thou wilt not require it. Isa 10:14 Thou hast seen it; for thou beholdest mischief and spite, to requite it with thy hand: the poor committeth himself unto thee; thou art the helper of the fatherless. Psa 10:15 Break thou the arm of the wicked and the evil man: seek out his wickedness till thou find none. Psa 10:16 THE YAHWEH is King for ever and ever: the heathen are perished out of his land. Psa 10:17 THE YAHWEH, thou hast heard the desire of the poor (H6035): thou wilt prepare their heart, thou wilt cause thine ear to hear: Psa 10:18 To judge the fatherless and the oppressed, that the man of the earth may no more oppress.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and I, through you, shall take delight in Our saints (144,000 Brides) and My 7,000 excellent; and will seal them with Our name. They shall hold on to both of you, and will not worship the image of beast, nor receive his mark on their hand or forehead. And I will not leave the 7,000 Anointed Ones in Sheol (hell) to suffered corruption; for I shall resurrect them on the third day by Shekinaih, and you, THE VICTORY, who delight to do all My counsel and commands.

Psa 16:1 Michtam (H4387 "miktam" seal) of David. Preserve me, O EL: for in thee do I take my refuge. Psa 16:2 O my soul, thou hast said unto THE YAHWEH, Thou art my ADONAI: my goodness extendeth not to thee; Psa 16:3 But to the saints that are in the earth, and to the excellent, in whom is all my delight. Psa 16:4 Their idolatries shall be multiplied that hasten after another god: their drink offerings of blood will I not offer, nor take up their names into my lips. Psa 16:5 THE YAHWEH is the portion of mine inheritance and of my cup: thou maintainest my lot. Psa 16:6 The lines are fallen unto me in pleasant places; yea, I have a goodly heritage. Psa 16:7 I will bless THE YAHWEH, who hath given me counsel: my reins also instruct me in the night seasons. Psa 16:8 I have set THE YAHWEH always before me: because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved. Psa 16:9 Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth: my flesh also shall rest in hope. Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy presence is fulness of joy; at thy right hand is The Delightful (H5273 "naiym") VICTORY (H5331 "netsach").
(JESUS then drew another diagram and continued to enlighten Shekinaih and David)

JESUS: The above diagram depicts Our fivefold glory of Our holiness. Shekinaih and you, are my perfected diamond whom We will use, to magnify Our glory and power. Shekinaih represents Us as the power house; and I, in you, is The Morning Star, the brightest star in the heavens; which at present is obscured from men.

I am within THE HOLY SPIRIT; THE HOLY SPIRIT is within THE FATHER. Through the incarnation of THE FATHER and the reincarnation of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih; and My reincarnation in you, the knowledge of Our glory will be known throughout the Cosmoses.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih shall from their thrones, and I in you, from My throne, shall judge and sub-judge The Cosmoses with the purging fire of Our severity of judgment as well as the water of regeneration of My word/oracle of mercy respectively.

Rom 11:22 Behold therefore the goodness and severity of THE ELOHIM: on them which fell, severity; but toward thee, goodness, if thou continue in his goodness: otherwise thou also shalt be cut off. Rom 11:23 And they also, if they abide not still in unbelief, shall be graffed in: for THE ELOHIM is able to graff them in again. Rom 11:24 For if thou wert cut out of the olive tree which is wild by nature, and wert graffed contrary to nature into a good olive tree: how much more shall these, which be the natural branches, be graffed into their own olive tree?

Shekinaih and you, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH shall call My children to repentance and proclaim to My Brides Our acceptable day that is at hand. As Our voice (spokesman), shall turn My people to My way and shall make upright My highway of holy people through the great tribulation of the wilderness of the testing. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall exalt the valley of humble (those who are depressed by persecutions), and bring low every mountain and hill (authorities of the nations that are united with the antichrist): and the crooked people shall be made straight and the rough places (haughty) made plain (humble).

title: The Incarnation of Shekinaih and Aaron K David (part 4)

segments.text: As THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL SEND, AND HAVE ALREADY SENT, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, Our glory shall be revealed in flesh and blood; and all flesh shall see it together.

Isa 40:1 Comfort (H5162 "nacham" be sorry, repent) ye, comfort (H5162 "nacham" be sorry, repent) ye my people, saith your ELOHIM (H430). Isa 40:2 Speak ye according (H5921 "al") to the heart (H3820 "leb") to Jerusalem, and cry unto her, that her hosts (H6635 "tsaba") is accomplished, that her iniquity is pardoned: for she hath received of THE YAHWEH'S hand double for all her sins. Isa 40:3 The voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, turn (H6437 "panah") ye to the way of THE YAHWEH, make straight in the desert a highway for our ELOHIM (H430). Isa 40:4 Every valley shall be exalted, and every mountain and hill shall be made low: and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough places plain: Isa 40:5 And the glory of THE YAHWEH (through the Two Cherubim of Glory/Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS above the mercy seat) shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it unitedly: for the mouth (oracle/ word/spokesman Elijah through the decree of Shekinaih) of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it.

Isaiah 40:6-8 is an example on how Shekinaih and you operate as Our spokesman on behalf of THE TRINITY. Shekinaih represents THE FATHER/THE HOLY SPIRIT in sealing, releasing and executing their decree, and you, represent Me in the co-executing of the decree.
The voice (THE FATHER represented by Shekinaih in decreeing) said: "Cry".
And he (Aaron K David in co-executing) said, "What shall I cry?"

The voice (THE FATHER represented by Shekinaih in decreeing) said: All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because the spirit of THE YAHWEH (THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih in executing and I in Aaron K David, The Elijah, the Angel of THE YAHWEH in co-executing the decree) bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word (oracle, spokesman Elijah through the decree of THE FATHER and sealing and executing by THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih) of Our ELOHIM (THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih) shall stand for ever.

Isa 40:6 The voice said, Cry. And he said, What shall I cry? All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: Isa 40:7 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because the spirit of THE YAHWEH bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. Isa 40:8 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word of our ELOHIM shall stand for ever.

Shekinaih represents Mother Heavenly Jerusalem; and you, represent Mount Zion. Shekinaih is the head of the Moses' company, who are the Brides, and you are the head of the company of Elijah, Our Anointed Ones.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih as THE ADONAI YAHVIH, in the decreeing, sealing and Major execution of Our decree, will come with me, in you in co-execution, are Our strong hand, The Elijah, and shall rule on Our behalf with our reward; and shall guide the children of Zion like a shepherd in the lowliness and gentleness of a Christ.

Isa 40:9 O Zion ( The Elijah that is the chief of the 7000 anointed ones called Zion that is from the Spiritual tribe of Judah), that bringest good tidings, get thee up into the high mountain (Mount Zion); O Jerusalem ( Shekinaih, THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Mother Jerusalem), that bringest good tidings, lift up thy voice with strength; lift it up, be not afraid; say unto the cities of Judah, Behold your ELOHIM ( THE TRINITY through Shekinaih and Aaron K David)! Isa 40:10 Behold, THE ADONAI YAHVIH (Shekinaih representing the feminine aspect of THE TRINITY) will come with strong hand (THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih as THE MAJOR EL and I, represented by Aaron K David as THE MINOR EL, The Mighty Elijah), and his arm shall rule for him: behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him. Isa 40:11 He shall feed his flock like a shepherd: he shall gather the lambs with his arm, and carry them in his bosom, and shall gently lead those that are with young.

My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, will give authority and power to you to co-execute our judgment. Together, both of you as the Advocate sent by Us to Our children, shall teach Our children all things, and bring all things to their remembrance. (Joh 14:26)

As THE SPIRIT OF THE YAHWEH, both Shekinaih and you, as THE MAJOR and THE MINOR will judge and sub judge respectively and measure the waters (peoples, multitudes, and nations and tongues) and the heavens (Cosmoses) according to the standard of the just weight of THE YAHWEH. (Please read Book 4 for the criteria of judgment)

Isa 40:12 Who hath measured the waters (The waters signifies peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues as stated in Rev 17:15) in the hollow of his hand, and mete out heaven (refers to the universe) with the span (spread of the fingers), and comprehended the dust of the earth in a measure, and weighed the mountains in scales, and the hills in a balance? Isa 40:13 Who hath directed the Spirit of THE YAHWEH (Aaron K David, THE ELIJAH), or being his counsellor (another Advocate, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH) hath taught him? Isa 40:14 With whom took he counsel, and who instructed him, and taught him in the path of judgment, and taught him knowledge, and shewed to him the way of understanding?

All the nations are as a drop of a bucket and are counted as the small dust and counted as nothing before THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH WHO WAS AND IS AND IS TO COME.

Isa 40:15 Behold, the nations are as a drop of a bucket, and are counted as the small dust of the balance: behold, he taketh up the isles as a very little thing. Isa 4016 And Lebanon is not sufficient to burn, nor the beasts thereof sufficient for a burnt offering. Isa 40:17 All nations before him are as nothing; and they are counted to him less than nothing, and vanity.

Through THE MAJOR EL represented by Shekinaih who decreeing, sealing and execution and through I, in you who represents THE MINOR EL in co-executing the decree with authority and power, the gods of the Cosmoses are nothing compare to them. Seated in heavenliest representing Us, the inhabitants of the earth are like grasshoppers. Before the foundation of the earth, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH and THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOSTS respectively, who create the heaven and the earth, shall bring to nothing the princes and judges of the earth in the day of THE YAHWEH.

Isa 40:18 To whom then will ye liken THE EL (through Aaron K David, THE ELIJAH)? or what likeness will ye compare unto him? Isa 40:19 The workman melteth a graven image, and the goldsmith spreadeth it over with gold, and casteth silver chains. Isa 40:20 He that is so impoverished that he hath no oblation chooseth a tree that will not rot; he seeketh unto him a cunning workman to prepare a graven image that shall not be moved. Isa 40:21 Have ye not known? have ye not heard? hath it not been told you from the beginning? have ye not understood from the foundations of the earth? Isa 40:22 It is he that sitteth upon the circle of the earth, and the inhabitants thereof are as grasshoppers; that stretcheth out the heavens as a curtain, and spreadeth them out as a tent to dwell in: Isa 40:23 That bringeth the princes to nothing; he maketh the judges of the earth as vanity. Isa 40:24 Yea, they shall not be planted; yea, they shall not be sown: yea, their stock shall not take root in the earth: and he shall also blow upon them, and they shall wither, and the whirlwind shall take them away as stubble.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, will bring out Our hosts, and number them all unto conspicuous position, according to the greatness of Our might. Not one of Our hosts will fall from their rank as they bind themselves together with both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. They shall renew their strength and shall mount up with wings as eagle prophets in My army and wherever they are being sent, there will be calamity and death. (Matt 24:27)

Isa 40:25 To whom then will ye liken me, or shall I be equal? saith the Holy One. Isa 40:26 Lift up your eyes on high, and behold who hath created these things, that bringeth out their host by number: he calleth them all by names by the greatness of his might, for that he (Aaron K David who bears the name of THE EL) is strong in power; not one will fall from their rank (H5737 "adar" fall from the rank). Isa 40:27 Why sayest thou, O Jacob, and speakest, O Israel, My way is hid from the YAHWEH, and my judgment is passed over from my ELOHIM? Isa 40:28 Hast thou not known? Hast thou not heard, that the everlasting ELOHIM, THE YAHWEH, the Creator of the ends of the earth, fainteth not, neither is weary? There is no searching of his understanding. Isa 40:31 But they that bind together (H6960 "Avah") with THE YAHWEH (in his two representatives) shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles (prophets); they shall run, and not be weary; and they shall walk, and not faint.

title:
INTERLUDE 2 
"Word of Endorsement"

segments.text:
INTERLUDE 2 
"Word of Endorsement"

title: Visions by Jessie, Abraham's Mother on 16th July 2015

segments.text: Visions by Jessie, Abraham's Mother on 16th July 2015
(Below is a phone conversation between Jessie, and Shekinaih with David besides her. During the conversation on speaker phone, Jessie saw the following visions.)
JESSIE: I saw a vision of my spirit man which is slightly larger than a peanut and was between Shekinaih's left big toe and index toe.
In the second vision, I saw Shekinaih sitting in the air. Next, I saw a vision of JESUS standing at the left of Shekinaih and his height is at her navel's height.

After a while, I saw JESUS lying on the legs of Shekinaih; with his face on her belly. JESUS then hugged Shekinaih's waist like a child who longed to be cared and protected while he closed his eyes in comfort with his face in tranquil.
Following, I heard JESUS said to Shekinaih, "There are times, I am weak and hope to receive your comfort".

Anyways, he was like a child lying on her mother's legs; longing to get comfort from her. I heard THE FATHER said to Shekinaih, "You need to strengthen Him. Yes, sometimes, I also hope that you will discipline Him".
I presume he mean, "To discipline JESUS". I don't understand what this mean?"
Shekinaih: I understand.
THE FATHER through Jessie: To discipline Him; to make his spirit man stronger.

JESSIE: I saw David upon hearing that, clapped his hands and started dancing around you as he strummed something like a Chinese guitar pipa. Then I heard David said, "JESUS also needs to rest as well. He also loves the music I play".

I then saw JESUS listening to the music David was playing while lying on your (Shekinaih) lap. He felt very peaceful. Then I saw your face bending down towards JESUS comforting Him and caressing Him with love like a mother. Then JESUS started to laugh. I then saw David going round both of you, while strumming his string instrument nonstop in the air. All of you are in the air. I could hear the beautiful melody made by David, but I could not describe it. There was rainbow afar away. It seemed like the rainbow moved according to the melody that David made with his instrument. I also saw THE FATHER clapping His hands as well. I can hear the music but I can't describe it. Then I saw the same vision which I saw the last time when we converse; David was leading the living creatures and innumerable company of angels and the general assembly of saints like Abraham, Moses and many others in heaven worshipping THE FATHER. I also saw Jose. I then heard THE FATHER said, "This is what I desire. This is My household". I saw His face which was tranquil while he closed His eyes as one who is at rest. The face of everyone was tranquil.
David: Can we ask Jessie what THE FATHER wants to speak to Me? It is more direct. THE ELOHIM knows what to speak.
Shekinaih: Jessie, please ask THE ELOHIM whether He has anything to say to David?
JESSIE: LORD, ABBA FATHER, do you have anything to say to David?
THE FATHER replied through Jessie: You must serve Shekinaih! You need to be her bond-servant!
David: See! Subservient!

THE FATHER through Jessie: You need to obey and trust her with all your heart and mind, just like trusting Me. You cannot have any sort of rebellion; because Shekinaih represents Me. She has my sceptre in her hand. David! Receive My decree!
David: See! Decree, this is good. This is a witness.
JESSIE: Then I saw THE FATHER giving you a decree like a holy scroll. I saw inside the scroll was a knife. Lord! What is this knife used for?

I heard ABBA FATHER said to David, "If you have any spirit of rebellion on you, you have to use this knife to cut them away from your body for they are the rope that bound you. You need to use this knife to purge yourself before you can come near Me, because you are the General of generals of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. You must become completely pure and clean so that you can fly in My kingdom and carry My decree you receive from the hand of Shekinaih to go to all the kingdoms of the world to co-execute My judgment".

I saw David flying. I also saw David carrying that small knife which THE ELOHIM has given him. He was using it to cut the little ropes from his body. I heard THE FATHER said, "Did you hear it, David?"
David: Yes, I heard it!
JESSIE: THE FATHER wants you to say it three times, shout it out loudly.
David: Yes, I heard it! Yes, I heard it! Yes, I heard it!

THE FATHER through Jessie: Yes, I heard you shouted three times. Now you must kneel in front of Shekinaih! You must repent in front of her because there are times you are not subservient to her in your heart. You need to wash Shekinaih's feet; just like My SON JESUS washes the feet of His disciples in order to wash your sins. Did you hear it?
David: I heard it!
THE FATHER through Jessie: Only then can I make you the General of generals of the Lord of hosts. You will also become "Always-Win-General", one who never lose in a battle.
JESSIE: I then saw David sitting on a throne which is in front of Shekinaih's throne.
Then I heard THE FATHER said, "Ok, I want to rest now".
JESSIE: So, THE ELOHIM wants David to wash your feet.
Shekinaih: Yeah, David has been quite rebellious these few days, so THE FATHER is scolding him.
JESSIE: I see that he is using the knife from THE FATHER to cut all the things on his body. It means that whenever he need to see you, he need to cleanse himself by cutting these things.
Shekinaih: Say it again so that David can hear.

JESSIE: THE FATHER said, "Whenever David wants to see you, he needs to use the knife that was given by THE FATHER to cut all the steel wires, little ropes and tentacles of little octopus (rebellious spirit of Lucifer) from his body. When he wants to see you, he must first kneel down before you; asking for your forgiveness, before getting up to converse with you".
David: Yes, FATHER, I submit to Shekinaih; I ask for forgiveness from her for all my rebellion and disobedience.

JESSIE: I saw that only then, can David be fit to be the General of generals and able to fly here and there and be undefeatable and able to command the hosts. Even the music he play, the sound can even command the army. Also I saw only through this, can David be enlarged and become a muscular giant, tall and mighty in strength; even able to lift up demons like little creatures and toss them effortlessly everywhere. This is what I saw. However, if he disobeys you, he will lose his power and become very small. Then, he will be punished by THE FATHER to wash Shekinaih's feet.

title: Visions by Jessie, Abraham's Mother on 16th July 2015 (part 2)

segments.text: David: Ok FATHER, I've washed her feet!
JESSIE: Lord, is this from you?
David: Yes it is.
Shekinaih: Yes, it is from THE FATHER. He is training David like JESUS.
JESSIE: THE FATHER is awake now and he said, "Yes! Because you are the General of generals of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH." When He speak these words, His voice is extremely loud.
Shekinaih: You are forgiven.
David: Thank You!
JESSIE: I saw our Abba Father clapping his hand. Then touching his beard, He said, "But you haven't cut the band with the knife!
David: I'm cutting!
JESSIE: You have not kneeled before Shekinaih to repent.
David: Shekinaih, please forgive me for all my resistance and rebellion. Please forgive me.
Shekinaih: Forgiven. You are discharged.
David: Thank you, I promise that I will not do it again, because these visions bear witness to what you say. THE FATHER has vindicated you. Amen.
JESSIE: OK, it's done. But you haven't used the knife THE FATHER gave to you. It looks like a small dagger.
David: FATHER, I cut all the entanglements and band; Egoistic snakes, pride, rebellion, self-righteousness, and self-will. I cut off all these bands.

JESSIE: Let me instruct you. THE FATHER wants me to instruct you. He says that there is a rope between your legs; cut it! And the rope that ties your two hands like a cuff; cut it! The rope surrounding your body; cut it from top to bottom.
David: I cut the snakes; I cut all the strongholds in my mind in JESUS' Name. Thank you JESUS.

JESSIE: David, I saw you wielded the knife like a martial art artist. As you cut those things, there appeared light around you. The light is very bright; like the glorious appearance of JESUS which nobody could come near because the light is eye blinding. THE FATHER said that only when you has this light, can you then kneel before Shekinaih; and after repenting before her, will THE FATHER then allow you to get up. As you do that, you will always receive the light from THE FATHER every time when you are with Shekinaih.

The source of this bright light looks like from a distant place ( Shekinaih saw, it is from THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in heaven represented by her and channeling to David through the spiritual embilical cords from her belly buttom to his belly button") and it is encircle by a halo.
In this way, as long as the halo encompasses Shekinaih, you are able to understand what THE FATHER is speaking through her.
Shekinaih: Confirmed, JESUS is standing here affirming what you have said.

JESSIE: Now I see both of you, who represent THE TRINITY surrounded fully by glaring light. Normal people like us, find it hard to come close to both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. THE FATHER said that David must do this every time; so that his spirit man will greatly be enlarged. ABBA FATHER also help me grow a bit. My spirit man that was between your toes which is a little larger than a peanut, has become bigger a bit. It is now much bigger than a peanut.

THE FATHER through Jessie: David! You should read the Bible more often and whatsoever I revealed to him, you should write it down. You should also write down what Shekinaih revealed to you through the word of knowledge and through the visions I gave her to both of you. This is My command; so that it can be transmitted to the people of this world. When you come before the people of this world, you will need to use this knife to cut away all the unclean spirits that try to attach to you, so that you will have this light. Wherever you go, you will then be able to protect Shekinaih, just like you protect Me! In reality, I don't need your protection. I am just joking! Wherever you go, I will follow both of you. I will always be on the head of Shekinaih.

JESSIE: I saw the belly of THE FATHER which is very big covered by a cloud and I could not see it clearly. His face is also very big. THE FATHER is always superimpose on Shekinaih. I always see the FATHER in this way through visions. Wherever Shekinaih goes, THE FATHER goes. Wherever David goes, the light shines forth. You need to carry this knife with you all the time.
JESSIE: FATHER! Where is this knife? How to give it to David?
Shekinaih: Now I give it to him.
Jessie: THE FATHER said that He gives it to him. The knife is not big, it's like a dagger.
Shekinaih: I've given him.
JESSIE: Yes, THE FATHER said, "Yes it is done. Shekinaih has given him on My behalf".
David: Please repeat the usage of the knife.

JESSIE: It to used to cut the bands on your feet and hands. I saw you like a martial art artist wielding his knife and after cutting the bands, THE FATHER give you the light. After ridding yourself from being bound, whenever you raised this knife, there will be light from THE FATHER everywhere. All you have to say is "In the Name of JESUS", light will radiate from the knife and all the Satanists in black hooded robe will be in terror and darkness will retreat. I saw they dare not look at the knife because of the light.
David: FATHER, what other uses this knife has?
THE FATHER through Jessie: To protect Shekinaih and yourself. To break the harassments of demons. As long as it is broken, you will have light and the light will cover Shekinaih.

JESSIE: I see that this knife is supposed to be bound around David's right leg so that he can take it out at will. Lord, he is wearing shorts, it can't be bound that way. Should he put it on his loin?
THE FATHER through Jessie: Well, it is with him wherever he is.
JESSIE: Lord is there anything more you want to say to us or David?
THE FATHER says through Jessie: Obey THE FATHER, and you will have everything. Listen to the word of Shekinaih, and I will reward you greatly. Ok, that's all! I am tired.
Shekinaih: Ok, THE FATHER Bless You! Jessie. Keep me inform of your daily happening.
David: Thank you Jessie! May THE FATHER Bless you!

title:
INTERLUDE 3
Word of Wisdom

segments.text:
INTERLUDE 3
Word of Wisdom

title: David vomited out of Shekinaih's womb (16th July 2015)

segments.text: David vomited out of Shekinaih's womb (16th July 2015)

As Shekinaih and David were praying and enquiring from THE FATHER regarding the interpretation of Jessie's vision, THE FATHER answer David through Shekinaih. This is a recording of their conversation.
THE FATHER through Shekinaih: The knife that THE FATHER gave you, has the word, '100% Submission', written on one side of the blade, and the word, 'Full of Power', on the other side of the blade.
