But before you can take this knife to cut away all the fetters and cords which the defiled spirits had put on you from the waist up, you need to first repent before THE FATHER for your disobedience toward me and ask for His forgiveness for giving in to the Diabolos, the Accuser to break our unity.

You must surrender your will to submit to the will of THE FATHER by submitting to me 100%. Only by doing this, will the light on this knife be activated so that it can be used to completely overpower the enemy.

Then, only then, will the power and the authority of THE FATHER flows from my body into your body; and the moment you says, "In the Name of JESUS", light will come out from this knife, and you will be able to cut the fetters and cord that bind you from the head to the waist.
After you had done that, then are you allowed to kneel down in front of me, and ask for my forgiveness?

As you do that, I will then take out the other 50% of the defiling spirit from your waist down. As I do that, I saw a big ball of light flows from my body into your body and your light in you is increased.
I then saw myself dressing as a Golden Empress making a long trumpet sound with my mouth. As I do that, I saw myself lifting you up and put you on your throne in heaven.
I saw you became the brightest star in heaven; I saw your light exploded in the Cosmoses; and saw the word, "The Morning Star", written on it.
But if you do not repent and cleanse yourself from the defilement and come before me for forgiveness, I saw in 3D many snakes' heads sticking out of your head and body.
I then saw a vision of your spirit that is defiled in my womb; and I have to immediately run to the toilet and vomit you out together with all the snakes inside you.

But when you are 100% in submission to THE FATHER in me, I saw when I gave you the decree of THE FATHER to co-execute his judgment, you were able to fly all over the world because I saw two wings appeared on your back. One wing has the word, "YIELDEDNESS" written on it, and on the other wing has the word, "OBEDIENCE" written on it. So when you were yielded and obey me in yieldedness and obedience, I saw your wings kept increasing in size until it reached the throne of JESUS in heaven and you were able to fly very high and far.
THE FATHER revealed to me that my light at present is hidden from humanity,
He showed me a spot light; and explain to me that if someone shines a spot light directly on the eyes of somebody, the eyes will not be able to see; because of the glare. To them, it is very bright.

He then shows me another spot light which is far away; whose light is greater and bigger than the first spotlight; but because it is further away from the beholder, its light is perceived to be dimmer. This was what Jessie saw but could not describe it clearly.
Following that, I saw THE FATHER used my hand to turn the knob to increase the illumination of your light; and as I do that, THE FATHER concurrently turned the knot to increase my light.
Next, I saw a big ball of light from heaven descended into me; it became a big light and as THE FATHER downloaded more and more light into me, I also became bigger and brighter.
I saw our two light, one big and one small, a smaller light within a bigger light.

David: My FATHER! I am exhilarated. Shekinaih! What you saw was in the front cover of our Book 1. The design is really from the throne room of THE TRINITY. Now I understand why the letter of the words, "BEHOLD MY MESSENGER", was bigger than the word, "BEHOLD MY GLORY.

"BEHOLD MY MESSENGER", refers to me; the spot light that shine directly on the eyes of the beholder; and "BEHOLD MY GLORY", refers to you, THE HOLY SPIRIT; the bigger and brighter spotlight that are far away; like the remote throne of THE FATHER where no man can see and live.
The letters used for my name which is bigger than yours, speaks of the same thing. I remember what JESUS said. I and my FATHER are one. My Father is greater than I.

I acknowledge that you are greater than me. I am humbled. Now, I know that as the SON JESUS cannot do anything without THE FATHER, I cannot do anything without you who represents THE FATHER. I need to be pure, so that the light from THE FATHER through you will keep me from defiling you. Now, I understand why I need to protect you. Indeed! I need to protect you from me, if I am defiled.

The sun that rises from the horizon is referring to us. You are inside the holy of holy in decreeing, sealing and executing, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, and I in the co-execution from the throne of JESUS. I must, like JESUS listen to THE FATHER in you.

Now I understand why THE FATHER showed you that you are the last day Moses and I am The Elijah that is to come. Together, we are the day of THE YAHWEH, who shall judge all the ungodly in the Cosmoses. THE FATHER's name is in us in different proportion.

Mal 4:1 For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud, yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch. Mal 4:2 But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings; and ye shall go forth, and grow up as calves of the stall. Mal 4:3 And ye shall tread down the wicked; for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet in the day that I shall do this, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 4:4 Remember ye the law of Moses my servant, which I commanded unto him in Horeb for all Israel, with the statutes and judgments. Mal 4:5 Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and dreadful day of THE YAHWEH: Mal 4:6 And he shall turn the heart of the fathers to the children, and the heart of the children to their fathers, lest I come and smite the earth with a curse.

Now I know why Aaron was added to my name K David. I am supposed to minister to The Shekinah, the Glory of THE ELOHIM in you. Now, I also understand why THE FATHER told you that you are the Moses and I am the Aaron; for you represent THE ELOHIM and I am your spokesman. The ten plagues will be enacted again according to the seven seals, seven trumpets and seven vials of the Book of Revelation. THE FATHER will harden the hearts of The Antichrist and his antichrist kings, so that THE TRINITY in us can do great signs and wonders in the nations that are united with him. We will bring complete desolation the kingdoms of The Antichrist and his antichrist kings as THE TRINITY have done it through Moses and Aaron in the scriptures.

Exo 7:1 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, See, I have made thee THE ELOHIM to Pharaoh: and Aaron thy brother shall be thy prophet. Exo 7:2 Thou shalt speak all that I command thee: and Aaron thy brother shall speak unto Pharaoh that he send the children of Israel out of his land. Exo 7:3 And I will harden Pharaoh's heart, and multiply my signs and my wonders in the land of Egypt.
Shekinaih: What you have just expounded, I saw JESUS standing beside me, writing the word, 'BINGO!'

Let me continue my vision. Where am I? Yes! As you knee down in front of me, I saw there is a light flowing out of my body to your body to intensify your light and then, THE FATHER pointed out to me that I am the power house and you are the light bulb. That is why, you are more conspicuous not because you are greater than I, but THE FATHER delights to glorify the SON when he is obedient to Him. When the SON glorifies THE FATHER, it is THE FATHER's joy and delight to share his glory with the SON. THE FATHER chooses to glorify the SON due to the SON'S obedience to obey THE FATHER unto death.

THE TRINITY had made our spirit like a DNA nucleic double helix. Our spirits are one in THE TRINITY and your spirit is in my womb. Therefore, if you are defiled, I am affected and can feel the defilement also in my spirit. That is why, it will cause me to have nausea and I will automatically run to the toilet to vomit you out. As I do that, I saw your spirit being vomited out of me but your umbilical cord is still attached to me.

title: David vomited out of Shekinaih's womb (16th July 2015) (part 2)

segments.text: David: I am sorry for vexing you like this. Each time, when you run to the toilet, I thought air had gone into you or you are not feeling well. Sorry for tiring you with my mischief. Now I understood why THE FATHER told you that I was very mischievous. Now I know why in Jessie's vision, THE FATHER said that he wanted to rest because He was tired. Shekinaih, THE FATHER is consoling you. He wants me to know that I have tired you for gainsaying you because of the abundance of revelations of the scriptures; and for my lack of meekness of love and wisdom, and my attitude problems when I commune with you. I am fully convicted that I must submit to you as unto THE FATHER.

Shekinaih: At last you understood how I feel. Yes! When I vomited you out, JESUS told me that the sanctity and spiritual balance of the masculine and the feminine aspect of THE ELOHIM is spiritually unbalanced. He commanded me that I need to confront you and you need to repent and cut off the fetters and cords that bind you. When you entertained the evil imagination and evil speak against me, you broke The Protocol of THE FATHER in relation to our function that is announced throughout the three realms.
If you abide in The Protocol, all the three realms will bow down to you. If not, you will lose all your authority and power over them.
And not only will you suffer these consequences, but the army that is under you, will be also under attack. You must really keep yourself holy so that the unity of THE TRINITY is not affected.
That is why, I will always confront you and make sure that you are always clean as per THE FATHER'S INSTRUCTION.

David: I know that THE FATHER is using you to confront me regarding the stronghold in my mind; especially my self-righteousness, ego, pride, critical spirit, and many strongholds that came from The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil which made me puffed up.

I know that He is purging me so that I can be more fruitful to bear the fruits of THE HOLY SPIRIT, and not give in to the spirit of bitterness and be bound with fetters and cords of affliction of condemnation, discouragement and bitterness. But sometimes, I felt you are too harsh to me.
Shekinaih: It is not me. It is THE FATHER that is confronting you through me.

David: I know THE FATHER has approved the humiliation to train me (practice) to overcome them instead of being swallowed up by the spirit of bitterness and be embittered by it. I know, I must overcome evil with good, and be perfect in mercy like my FATHER in heaven. I am supposed to love my enemies, bless those who cursed me and pray for those who abused me.

Shekinaih: David, when you are embittered, I usually see a snake by the name of "bitterness" in your heart and this snake will lead you to unbelief, which will cause you to rebel against me, and this will lead to you missing the mark and being locked up and tormented in Gehenna. You need to cut it out. Same goes with pride, I always see a green dinosaur walk into you in full size when you rebel against me.
David: I understand what you mean. This is the old dragon who rebel against THE FATHER because of his pride.

THE FATHER speaks through Shekinaih: Shekinaih knows what I think in my mind and she feels My heart as well. After you have sincerely repented, My heart softened through her towards you and My love and compassion enveloped you through her.

Shekinaih: I saw myself as a Golden Empress using a brush to brush glue to patch up a cracked brown earthen urn. She then put her two hands on the earthen urn to release inner healing and to bind up the wound and blow THE FATHER's love, comfort and restoration into it. The urn is you.

David: Shekinaih, when I heard Jessie relating the vision about JESUS pouring out to you; telling you that sometimes, he is embittered because of your unrelenting discipline toward Him; and confessing of his weakness, and hoping that you will comfort him instead of being so severe to Him, I knew THE FATHER is consoling me. I was very comforted when Jessie related this part of her vision and suddenly, all THE FATHER's chastisement which I had experienced through you,were instantly erased from my memory. I felt energized by His love and was delighted to obey and trust you as I trust THE FATHER with all my heart, mind and strength willingly.

When Jessie, conveyed the counsel of THE FATHER to you, she said that she saw David clapping his hands in delight and dancing around you as he strummed his musical Chinese guitar. And when she said that she heard David said: "JESUS also needs to rest as well. He also loves the music I play", that moment, I knew THE FATHER will discipline me with meekness of love and wisdom after I repented. And when I heard that you started to caress JESUS with love like a mother, and he felt comforted, I knew that THE FATHER will make the vision come to pass for me as JESUS signifies me in the vision.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto Jesus the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of God. Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds. Heb 12:4 Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin. Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of THE YAHWEH, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom THE YAHWEH loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom the father chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears.
Shekinaih: May the will of THE FATHER be done.

David: Yes, May the will of THE FATHER be done. Shekinaih, thank THE FATHER for you and thank THE FATHER for Jessie. THE FATHER is indeed wise. He is full of manifold wisdom. Now I know the secret to delight Him is to avoid striving with you using the revelation I have. Knowledge really puffed up but only walking in the love mentioned in 1 Corinthian 13, edifies all. I pray that THE FATHER will fills us with His love to recover all those who opposes us in our doctrine which is of THE FATHER with meekness of love and we will always have mercy on them and intercede for them because, they really do not know what they are doing. They do not know that the devil has their remote control and they are doing the works of the Diabolos as an accuser of the brethren: accusing and evil speaking against us according to the energizing of his evil spirits.

Gal 6:1 Brethren, if a man be overtaken in a fault, ye which are spiritual, restore such an one in the spirit of meekness; considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted. Gal 6:2 Bear ye one another's burdens, and so fulfil the law of Christ.

2Ti 2:23 But foolish and unlearned questions avoid, knowing that they do gender strifes. 2Ti 2:24 And the servant of THE YAHWEH must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient, 2Ti 2:25 In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if THE ELOHIM peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth; 2Ti 2:26 And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the Diabolos (G1228 Accuser) who are taken captive by him at his will.

title: David vomited out of Shekinaih's womb (16th July 2015) (part 3)

segments.text: Shekinaih: I understand what you are saying. JESUS, once showed me that Satan has many methods in discrediting the truth of THE ELOHIM. But there are two snakes that have ensnared many Christians, even Ministers. One is the python called Self-Righteousness and the other snake is called Religious spirit.

David: I have experienced their fetters and cords of affliction. The python snake will energized you to pass judgment without mercy, squeezing the life of the victim. The religious snake whose strength is from The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil, will puff up a person and energized them to contend against the truth because of pride and envy. These are from the pits of hell.

Jas 3:13 Who is a wise man and endued with knowledge among you? let him shew out of a good conversation his works with meekness of wisdom. Jas 3:14 But if ye have bitter envying and strife in your hearts, glory not, and lie not against the truth. Jas 3:15 This wisdom descendeth not from above, but is earthly, sensual, demonic. Jas 3:16 For where envying and strife is, there is confusion and every evil work. Jas 3:17 But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and easy to be intreated, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy. Jas 3:18 And the fruit of righteousness is sown in peace of them that make peace.
Shekinaih: Yes! They are indeed defiling. They defiled the whole body.
David: Yes, when I gave in to them, I could felt my spirit bashed by them in hell. I must be vigilant against them.

Shekinaih: I saw these word: 'THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS' written on the forehead of THE FATHER. He was standing next to my left and as He pointed His finger towards me, saying, 'This is how We, THE TRINITY will discipline our children through her. I then saw JESUS standing on the left of a green board and THE FATHER standing on the right of the board; and as THE FATHER speaks, JESUS wrote it on the green board.
I then saw JESUS inside THE HOLY SPIRIT; and THE HOLY SPIRIT inside THE FATHER, and they all are inside in me. I then saw the word, 'THE TRINITY', written on my forehead.

I was wearing a Golden Empress robe and I saw THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS as THE TRINITY in me, flipping the bible from Genesis to Revelation and said: 'We will use the soft method of encouragement and rewards first, followed by Our gentle reminder to call for repentance to those who sinned'.
Now I saw a vision of a person falling down upon a white rock who was broken into pieces.

Next, I saw a person kneeling down using his fist pounding on the concrete floor and his forehead has the Chinese character, "Bu Fu", written on it; which in English means "Remain unconvinced and refuse to comply".

Following that, I saw a giant stone came down from heaven and crushed him; and that person I saw is you, David. The size of this white stone is from your shoulder to your loin. I saw you being crushed, with your face facing flat on the ground and you had suffered severe internal injuries.

Despite the affliction, you did not repent and still insist on your thinking; and I saw myself as the Golden Empress with THE TRINITY inside me, wrote these words on a white piece of paper, "DEATH SENTENCE". I threw the decree on the floor where you are kneeling and I saw you, your wife, Paul, and all those below you, sentenced to death.

Then, I saw the King of Death who was dressed in a red hooded gold embroidered robe, tore away your golden robe and white robe and those of the others and clothed all of you with the Black Death clothes. He took a sabre and smote your neck and those of the rest. He then put every one of you in their allotted coffins and bury them in a hole in Tarturus.
Following, I saw you laid inside the coffin crying out, "ABBA FATHER, please do not take your HOLY SPIRIT from me. Restore the joy of my salvation".
I saw your neck was 90 % severed and you were breathless and was struggling for your last breath.

Next, I saw myself as the Golden Empress spoke these word, "You should have repented when I confronted you at first, rather than keep agreeing with the Diabolos and give in to him to be his host to blasphemy THE HOLY SPIRIT in me".

Next, I saw the two horn hell demon brought you to kneel down in front of me as the Golden Empress sitting on the gold throne. Your hands were tied behind your back. I saw your sincere repentance, and I wrote this word on a white piece of paper, "FORGIVEN, FULLY DISCHARGED, BE CLEANSED AND BE RESTORED".

I then saw my giant hand lifting up you and every one that were sentenced to death because of your stubbornness and rebellion. I then made a trumpet sound with my mouth and send purging fire and cleansing water to rid all the snakes that are in you all.

After doing that, I clothed all of you with white garments and gold garments and breathes life into you and all of you were seated back in your respective thrones with your respective power and authorities in heaven.

Finally, I heard THE FATHER said, 'This is how, I will discipline My last day army. My method of discipline has not changed since the time of Genesis and it will be the same for My determination in the Book of Revelation. Amen'
David: Shekinaih, I can foresee there will be many death for those who fell under the above categories which FATHER mentioned as in Luke 20:1-19.

THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: This is My last days' judgment on this group of people. They are the tyrant who refused to return back what rightfully belongs to me. These are the thieves and the robbers who plot against me and My children. For the blood of My holy Apostles and holy prophets, I will surely visit them and show them through My decree through you which I will execute My vengeance on them through Shekinaih and you, The VICTORY.

Luk 20:1 And it came to pass, that on one of those days, as he taught the people in the temple, and preached the gospel, the chief priests and the scribes came upon him with the elders, Luk 20:2 And spake unto him, saying, Tell us, by what authority doest thou these things? or who is he that gave thee this authority? Luk 20:3 And he answered and said unto them, I will also ask you one thing; and answer me: Luk 20:4 The baptism of John, was it from heaven, or of men? Luk 20:5 And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say, Why then believed ye him not? Luk 20:6 But and if we say, Of men; all the people will stone us: for they be persuaded that John was a prophet. Luk 20:7 And they answered, that they could not tell whence it was. Luk 20:8 And Jesus said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things. Luk 20:9 Then began he to speak to the people this parable; A certain man planted a vineyard, and let it forth to husbandmen, and went into a far country for a long time. Luk 20:10 And at the season he sent a servant to the husbandmen, that they should give him of the fruit of the vineyard: but the husbandmen beat him, and sent him away empty. Luk 20:11 And again he sent another servant: and they beat him also, and entreated him shamefully, and sent him away empty. Luk 20:12 And again he sent a third: and they wounded him also, and cast him out. Luk 20:13 Then said the lord of the vineyard, What shall I do? I will send my beloved son: it may be they will reverence him when they see him. Luk 20:14 But when the husbandmen saw him, they reasoned among themselves, saying, This is the heir: come, let us kill him, that the inheritance may be ours. Luk 20:15 So they cast him out of the vineyard, and killed him. What therefore shall the lord of the vineyard do unto them? Luk 20:16 He shall come and destroy these husbandmen, and shall give the vineyard to others. And when they heard it, they said, THE ELOHIM forbid. Luk 20:17 And he beheld them, and said, What is this then that is written, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner? Luk 20:18 Whosoever shall fall upon that stone shall be broken; but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder. Luk 20:19 And the chief priests and the scribes the same hour sought to lay hands on him; and they feared the people: for they perceived that he had spoken this parable against them.

title: Home Run

segments.text: Home Run

THE FATHER in Shekinaih: 'Look at My eyes! Do you know that how you respond to My rebuke, will determine how the rest of My army will respond to My rebuke and My chastisement toward them? Look at Me straight in the eyes, do you know your response to My chastisement and rebuke, will determine your length of time for your perfection? You must be consistent, and be steady in your walk and fellowship, with Us through her.

Shekinaih: I saw Jesus standing beside me pointing to me and said to you, "You must show Us, that you have put Satan under your feet at all times, regardless of whatever arrows we throw at you". (I saw a vision of a red dragon standing behind you pouring a big bag of black snakes over you, which THE FATHER had permitted to test you).
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: These are the fiery trials.
Shekinaih: I saw myself sitting as a Golden Empress releasing the river of life, which made up of 50% fire of purging and 50% of water of cleansing and regeneration to you)
David: I know this is the river of holiness for my perfection unto holiness before him.
Shekinaih: Then, I saw myself as the Golden Empress throwing a white baseball at you. You are holding a baseball bat. As I pitched the ball toward you, I saw you miss the hit.

I heard THE FATHER says, "You must keep practicing the same stroke until you can consistently hit every ball unto home run, and score 10 out of 10. Only then, can I advance you to another level to complete your training and endorse you and activates you as THE VICTORY. Do you understand My son?"
David: I don't understand; I will try to understand. Can I ask you something ABBA FATHER?
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: Go ahead.
David: The person who throw the baseball and the person who hits the baseball, are they together as a team or are they enemies?

Shekinaih: It's THE FATHER who is throwing the ball at you. Do you consider yourself, as in the team of THE FATHER? This is your answer, I heard JESUS said to you. The white ball that I, as the Golden Empress threw at you, has the word "REPRIMAND" written on the top side of the ball; and the word "THE FATHER" written on the bottom side of the ball.
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: NOW, LISTEN CAREFULLY. SHE IS NEVER YOUR ENEMY.
David: No, no…

THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: NOW LISTEN CAREFULLY, WE ARE YOUR ENEMY. WHEN YOU PERMIT SATAN TO POSSESS YOU. Regarding how the ball is pitch; the amount of strength and the velocity it is released; and the height and the angle it is served; depend on Us, for We are the one throwing it and not her. She is 100% controlled by Us and she is unaware that We control her like a puppet.

JESUS in Shekinaih: It will sharpen your skills to be a great player in the field; and no matter how, and whatever ball that comes your way, you are then able to hit home run. This is because, you have become AN EXPERT IN ALL LEVELS OF WARFARE IN THE ENTIRE COSMOSES IN MY THREE REALMS.

THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: Response well in all things; whether I reprimand you through her or permit the accuser to attack you with all the negative voices and feeling. The only winning formula is that you submit 100% to Shekinaih in Us.

Shekinaih: I saw the word, "SUBMIT", has the word, "SURE WIN", superimposed on it. I then saw myself wearing the golden robe and you are wearing a white robe over a golden robe, and we are both standing on a round platform hidden beneath a performance stage rising up to the stage; and written on this round platform is the word, "SURE WIN".

I then heard THE FATHER said, "YOU WILL NEVER BE DEFEATED OR TAKEN DOWN BY THE ENEMIES AT ALL TIMES, IF YOU SUBMIT TO HER 100%. IT WILL SAVE YOUR SOUL FROM HELL and THWARTS ALL THE ARROWS WHICH THE ACCUSER THREW AT YOU; AND YOU WILL HAVE MY IMMUNITY IN THE ENTIRE COSMOSES BECAUSE I HAVE GIVEN YOU COMPLETE AUTHORITY OVER THEM; AND IN AUTHORITY, YOU ARE SECOND TO SHEKINAIH".

David: Amen, it is settled. So, it is not how the ball is pitched, but how I hit home run consistently. I have an attitude problem. I need to delight in THE FATHER'S chastisements through Shekinaih. I need to deny myself, forsake all, and carry my cross to crucify my flesh with all the human emotion and lust which exalts itself against what THE FATHER has commanded me to do through you. Shekinaih, can you still remember the heavenly scene that Jessie saw in her vision? I was in heaven, leading the four living creatures and innumerable company of angels and the general assembly of saints like Abraham, Moses and many others? We were all worshipping THE FATHER. And Jessie heard THE FATHER said, "This is what I delight, this is my household".
And after this, she saw THE FATHER's face was tranquil while he closed His eyes, as one who is at rest and the face of everyone there were also tranquil?
Shekinaih: Yes, I can recall.

David: There is a revelation in this scene. THE FATHER is reminding me that if I want to be his delight, I must be a peace maker. Now I know why THE FATHER call me a Wiseman in one of the prophecy which I have received from a prophetess.

He is imparting His maturing gift to me through prophecy. I have received the wisdom from my FATHER indeed. I will be pure, peaceable, gentle, easy to be entreated, full of mercy, without partiality, and without hypocrisy. I will bear the peaceable fruit of righteousness; because I will intently sow in peace and reap peace with you who represents THE FATHER. I will daily delight in the law of THE YAHWEH by meditating day and night concerning his revelation. I will delight in his 7,000 holy ones and His 144,000 principal men and will in meekness of wisdom and love bring them back to THE FATHER even if they are rebellious. I will delight in the correction of THE FATHER/THE HOLY SPIRIT through you and response in meekness of love and lowliness of mind regardless of whether I think I am right or wrong in according to my carnal mind. As THE FATHER had revealed through you before, that I maybe carnally correct but spiritually, I am wrong. I will be in delight co-execute all the counsels of THE FATHER upon Mystery Babylon through you in subservient attitude. I will bring delight to THE FATHER in His great congregation as His delightful (sweet) Psalmist leading the four living creatures (four camps of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH); and as The Delightful Victory (Captain of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH) standing on the right hand of THE YAHWEH (THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in and represented by Shekinaih) as His right hand man; delighting in THE YAHWEH forever Amen.
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY standing here now holding 3 white board with these words written on them "DEFINITELY, DEFINITELY, DEFINITELY".

title: The Secret to make it in My Kingdom

segments.text: The Secret to make it in My Kingdom
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: David, do you know the secret for you to make it to the Kingdom now?
David: Yes! I think so, ABBA FATHER.
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: There is only one truth in My kingdom, as far as Aaron K David representing JESUS, is concerned:

SUBMIT to Us in Shekinaih WITH ALL YOUR HEART, WITH ALL YOUR MIND, WITH ALL YOUR SOUL, WITH ALL YOUR SPIRIT AND WITH ALL THAT YOU HAVE; REGARDLESS OF WHAT YOU THINK, OR WHAT YOU FEEL, OR WHAT YOU THINK YOU KNOW, OR WHAT YOU THINK IS THE TRUTH THAT YOU NEED TO UPHOLD? EVERYTHING THAT YOU THINK, THAT YOU FEEL, OR WHAT YOU THINK YOU NEED TO UPHOLD, WILL COME TUMBLING DOWN IF YOU FAIL IN THIS ONE THING: THAT IS TO SUBMIT TO HER (SHEKINAIH) 100%.
David: Amen
THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih: SUBMIT 100% TO HER THAT IS YOUR WAY OF GLORIFYING ME.
David: Amen
Shekinaih: I saw THE FATHER through me, as a giant Golden Empress lifting you up high in the Cosmoses to glorify THE FATHER which will result in the glory of the son.

title:
PRELIMINARY 
BEHOLD! MY ANOINTED!

segments.text:
PRELIMINARY 
BEHOLD! MY ANOINTED!

title:
ACT 1 SCENE 3
The Two Invincible Ones

segments.text:
ACT 1 SCENE 3
The Two Invincible Ones
Time Frame: Year 2018 onwards
Location: Worldwide
At a busy International Airport whereby many tourists are transitting to multi cities worldwide, emerged two weird characters unexpectedly in the nearby vicinity, waiting for a taxi.
At the same time, cameras at the airport also detected strange activities which looked like an UFO hovering above this International airport.
It was undetected earlier on due to the alien technology which had made this UFO invisible and was thereby, undetected by the airport and military sensor.
Suddenly, a laser beam of light from this UFO beams at one of the International Jumbo jet; thereby causing an explosion of this plane filled with many passengers, as it prepares to take off.
The airport immediately announces to all the passengers and the crew members and its staff to quickly vacate from the building and from the plane, warning of the impending attack.

Lo! And Behold! Shekinaih and Aaron K David are in a taxi which is heading towards that airport, five minutes away from that location. As they approached the airport, they saw large crowd of people in panic running from the airport towards them. Suddenly, the UFO levitates and stop and stood still in front of the taxi. The crowd begin to scream in great terror and horror and flee at once from the scene.
Shekinaih, who sat at the back of this taxi together with David, begins to release their invincible and invisible energy toward the UFO causing it to explode.
Henceforth, all things return back to normal and the rest of the people are saved from further attack by this UFO, which is planning to attack other Major Buildings in this city.

Shekinaih woke up from the trance and as she opened her eyes, Lo! And Behold! THE TRINITY appeared to her and David suddenly and JESUS said to her, "What you have just witnessed during your trance, I will now unfold further in My teachings below. Shekinaih and you shall have angelic ability to subdue the three realms together with its host. We, THE TRINITY have given both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, authority to represent Us in decreeing, sealing and executing, and co-executing all Our determinations in the heaven(s), the earth and beneath the earth fearlessly."

title:
Chapter 1
The Two Anointed

segments.text:
Chapter 1
The Two Anointed

JESUS: In the time of Moses, My FATHER by THE HOLY SPIRIT through Me, spoke to Moses through Our Two Cherubim; the Angel of Our Presence, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, who are both your counterpart angels,

Num 7:89 And when Moses was gone into the tabernacle of the congregation to speak with him, then he heard the voice of one speaking unto him from upon (H5921 "al) the mercy seat that was upon (H5921 "al") the ark of testimony, from (H4480 "min") out of (H996 "beyn") the two cherubims: and he spake unto him.
In the time of Samuel, these Two Cherubim, being Our spokesman bearing Our Names, as THE MAJOR and THE MINOR YAHWEH, spoke to Samuel.
1Sa 3:21 And THE YAHWEH appeared again in Shiloh: for THE YAHWEH revealed himself to Samuel in Shiloh by the word (spokesman) of THE YAHWEH.

These Two Cherubim bear the Ark (H727 "aron" from H717 "arah" to gather) of the Covenant of THE YAHWEH within them and will join with Shekinaih and you, and work with both of you, who represent THE TRINITY to gather those who have made a covenant with Us unto death.

1Sa 4:4 So the people sent to Shiloh, that they might bring from thence the ark of the covenant of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, which dwelleth (the word "between" was not in the Hebrew text) the cherubims: and the two sons of Eli, Hophni and Phinehas, were there with the ark of the covenant of THE ELOHIM.

Both of you, indeed shall be Our perfection of beauty to represent Our Names, THE EL, THE ELOHIM, THE YAHWEH, and be the Deliverer from Heavenly Mount Zion, to judge the children whom My FATHER has given both of you, and gather to Our Heavenly Mount Zion, those who has presented their bodies as a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable by not conforming to this age: but has renewed their mind living according to the good, and acceptable, and perfect will of THE FATHER.

Psa 50:1 A Psalm of Asaph (H623 "asaph" gatherer). The EL , THE ELOHIM, even THE YAHWEH, hath spoken, and called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof. Psa 50:2 Out of Zion, the perfection (H4359 "miklal" completeness) of beauty, THE ELOHIM hath shined. Psa 50:3 Our ELOHIM shall come, and shall not keep silence: a fire shall devour before him, and it shall be very tempestuous round about him. Psa 50:4 He shall call to the heavens from above, and to the earth, that he may judge his people. Psa 50:5 Gather my saints together unto me; those that have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.

title: My Last days' Tabernacle

segments.text: My Last days' Tabernacle

My FATHER and me shall be united with our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Our authentic Tabernacle of Glory. However, many men are looking for Me to return in the spirit. Little do they know that My FATHER and Me, will come in Our Glory through these Two Cherubim of Our Glory?
Luk 9:26 For whosoever shall be ashamed of me and of my words, of him shall the Son of man be ashamed, when he shall come in his own glory, and in his Father's, and of the holy angels.

As for My last days' people, these Two Cherubim of Our Glory, is their only answer for Me to restore them to their last days' glory in Me. However, they must first be purged, purified, crucified and trained to obey the protocol of Heaven for My last days' army before they can enter My Kingdom.

My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT have tabernacleth in Shekinaih, and I have made My dwelling in you, and have given you access to be in My secret counsel as the Tabernacle of Our Glory. My FATHER will reveal Our secret to Shekinaih who in turn will reveal it to you who represent Me. Shekinaih represent 50% of the spiritual Ark of the Covenant while the other 50% is represented by you.

We have put Our two heavenly tablets of Our law in Sheknaih and you, giving both of you, who represent THE TRINITY the authority to act as Our mediator and lawgiver to govern spiritual Israel. This is signified by the two tablets in the Ark,

We have made Shekinaih and you, as Our mouthpiece; to establish Our present day truth for the children whom My FATHER has given both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, in order for them to enter into Our everlasting kingdom. This is signified by the Manna in the Ark; for it is written, "Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth from the mouth of THE ELOHIM.

2Pe 1:11 For so an entrance shall be ministered unto you abundantly into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. 2Pe 1:12 Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE THUNDEROUS MAJOR AND MINOR EL respectively, will humble, prove, and test the hearts of My last days' remnants; whether they will keep My commandments by obeying every spoken words We spoke through both of your mouths; in order that they be qualified to be part of Heavenly Mount Zion as My Brides.

Deu 8:1 All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which THE YAHWEH sware unto your fathers. Deu 8:2 And thou shalt remember all the way which THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, and to prove thee, to know what was in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no. Deu 8:3 And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of THE YAHWEH doth man live.

We have put Our heavenly rod that budded in Shekinaih and you, to represent Us as THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR DISCIPLINARY EL respectively, the disciplinary master, who has the FINAL SAY, who shall put an end to all controversies, murmurings, and gainsaying and challenging; from the authorities in Christendom who shall go against both your authority regarding Our teaching through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

This is a token and a warning to the people who murmur, gainsay, challenge both of you, who represent THE TRINITY that they shall suffer the fate of Korah, Dathan and Abiram, and their families, and the two hundred and fifty princes if they go against both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. (Please refer to "Behold! My Messenger 3, Behold! My Names" for a detailed study of the Name "THE EL")

Num 17:9 And Moses brought out all the rods from before THE YAHWEH unto all the children of Israel: and they looked, and took every man his rod. Num 17:10 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Bring Aaron's rod again before the testimony, to be kept for a token against the rebels; and thou shalt quite take away their murmurings from me, that they die not. Num 17:11 And Moses did so: as THE YAHWEH commanded him, so did he. Num 17:12 And the children of Israel spake unto Moses, saying, Behold, we die, we perish, we all perish. Num 17:13 Whosoever cometh anything near unto the tabernacle of THE YAHWEH shall die: shall we be consumed with dying?

This will happen in the last days because they are not going against both of you, but against THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE YAHWEH SABAOTH and CAPTAIN OF OUR HOST respectively, who have Our authority and power over Our hosts.

2Sa 6:2 And David arose, and went with all the people that were with him from Baale of Judah, to bring up from thence the ark of THE ELOHIM, whose name is called by the name of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH that dwelleth upon (H5921 "al") the cherubims.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH and THE CAPTAIN of THE HOST respectively, The Two Cherubim of Olive Tree, The Two Anointed that dwell in Our Holy of Holy.

1Ki 6:23 And within the oracle he made two cherubims of olive tree, each ten cubits high. Heb 9:5 And over it the cherubims of glory shadowing the mercy seat; of which we cannot now speak particularly.

In the last days, THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and I, through Our Name, THE YAHWEH, shall be mightily and in brilliancy be manifested through Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, The Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY. Before both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the four corners of the earth. Every place that you set your feet on to execute Our judgment, shall tremble: all nations shall be terrified: the principalities and power shall be dashed in pieces and bow before THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.

Hab 3:1 A PRAYER OF THE PROPHET AMBACUM, WITH A SONG. Hab 3:2 O Lord, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon the two living creatures, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH shall come from Thaeman, and the Holy One from the dark shady mount Pharan. Pause. Hab 3:4 His excellence covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength. Hab 3:5 Before his face shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth. Hab 3:7 Because of troubles I looked upon the tents of the Ethiopians: the tabernacles also of the land of Madiam shall be dismayed. Hab 3:8 Wast thou angry, O THE YAHWEH, with the rivers? or was thy wrath against the rivers, or thine anger against the sea? for thou wilt mount on thine horses, and thy chariots are salvation. Hab 3:9 Surely thou didst bend they bow at scepters, saith THE YAHWEH. Pause. The land of rivers shall be torn asunder. Hab 3:10 The nations shall see thee and be in pain, as thou dost divide the moving waters: the deep uttered her voice, and raised her form on high. Hab 3:11 The sun was exalted, and the moon stood still in her course: thy darts shall go forth at the light, at the brightness of the gleaming of thine arms. Hab 3:12 Thou wilt bring low the land with threatening, and in wrath thou wilt break down the nations. Hab 3:13 Thou wentest forth for the salvation of thy people, to save thine anointed: thou shalt bring death on the heads of transgressors; thou has brought bands upon their neck. Pause. Hab 3:14 Thou didst cut asunder the heads of princes with amazement, they shall tremble in it; they shall burst their bridles, they shall be as a poor man devouring in secret. Hab 3:15 And thou dost cause thine horses to enter the sea, disturbing much water. Hab 3:16 I watched, and my belly trembled at the sound of the prayer of my lips, and trembling entered into my bones, and my frame was troubled within me; I will rest in the day of affliction, from going up to the people of my sojourning. Hab 3:17 For though the fig-tree shall bear no fruit, and there shall be no produce on the vines; the labour of the olive shall fail, and the fields shall produce no food: the sheep have failed from the pasture, and there are no oxen at the cribs; Hab 3:18 yet I will exult in THE YAHWEH, I will joy in THE ELOHIM my Saviour. Hab 3:19 THE YAHWEH ADONAI is my strength, and he will perfectly strengthen my feet; he mounts me upon high places, that I may conquer by his song. (Septuagint Version)

title: My Last days' Tabernacle (part 2)

segments.text: Shekinaih and you, are the two olive trees of Revelation 11:4 who will be given authority to shut heaven that it rain not in the days of their prophecy: and have authority over waters to turn them to blood, and to smite the earth with all plagues, as often as they will. Both of you, shall lead two of the last days' congregation who are chosen to be martyred as a Christ and they also shall subprophesy 1260 days before they are killed and resurrected.

Rev 11:3 And I will give power unto my two witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred and threescore days, clothed in sackcloth. Rev 11:4 These are the two olive trees, and the two lampstands standing before THE ELOHIM of the earth. Rev 11:5 And if any man will hurt them, fire proceedeth out of their mouth, and devoureth their enemies: and if any man will hurt them, he must in this manner be killed. Rev 11:6 These have power to shut heaven, that it rain not in the days of their prophecy: and have power over waters to turn them to blood, and to smite the earth with all plagues, as often as they will….. Rev 11:11 And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from THE ELOHIM entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them. Rev 11:12 And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them. ….Rev 11:15 And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this world are become the kingdoms of our YAHWEH, and of his Christ (G5547 "christos" anointed); and he shall reign for ever and ever.

Shekinaih and you, are the two Cherubim of Olive trees, Our Two Anointed Ones that stand in Our counsel; who shall pour Our oil on Our two lampstand (Spiritual Smyrna and Thyatira assembly) chosen to be part of the two witnesses.

Zec 4:10 For who hath despised the day of small things? for they shall rejoice, and shall see the plummet in the hand of Zerubbabel with those seven; they are the eyes of THE YAHWEH, which run to and fro through the whole earth. Zec 4:11 Then answered I, and said unto him, What are these two olive trees upon the right side of the lampstand and upon the left side thereof? Zec 4:12 And I answered again, and said unto him, What be these two olive branches which through the two golden pipes empty the golden oil out of themselves? Zec 4:13 And he answered me and said, Knowest thou not what these be? And I said, No, my ADON. Zec 4:14 Then said he, These are the two anointed ones, that stand by THE ADON of the whole earth.

Rev 1:1 The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which THE ELOHIM gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which must in speed (G5034 "tachos") come to pass; and he sent and signified it by his angel unto his servant John: Rev 1:2 Who bare record of the word of THE ELOHIM, and of the testimony of Jesus Christ, and of all things that he saw. …. Rev 1:19 Write the things which thou hast seen, and the things which are, and the things which shall be hereafter; Rev 1:20 The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches: and the seven lampstands which thou sawest are the seven churches.

title: Jachin and Boaz (Speedy)

segments.text: Jachin and Boaz (Speedy)
(JESUS then drew another diagram and continued his exposition to Shekinaih and David.)

JESUS: My two Cherubim are also signified by the two pillars of the temple of Solomon, Jachin and Boaz. Shekinaih is the Jachin, THE HOLY SPIRIT, the hidden power generator of THE TRINITY. Through her, We will establish and set up the last days' spiritual temple which is the Bride. And you, David, is the Boaz, the mighty redeemer who will in speed co-execute Our determination in the Book of Revelation to bring it come to pass. We have surnamed you "Speedy"

1Ki 7:21 And he set up the pillars in the porch of the temple: and he set up the right pillar, and called the name thereof Jachin (H3199 "yakiyn= He will establish", set up): and he set up the left pillar, and called the name thereof Boaz (H1162 "boaz"= fleetness, quickness, speediness)

Rev 1:1 The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which in speed (G5034 "tachos" quickness, in speed) come to pass; and he sent and signified it by his angel unto his servant John.

My FATHER and Me, will suddenly come to Our temple (the body of Christ) with Shekinaih and you, THE MESSENGER/ANGEL OF THE COVENANT; and will refine and purify Our ministers (the sons of Levi) and the Bride (spiritual Jerusalem) unto righteousness unto holiness. Following that, you will speedily judge the Satanist, the apostate who commit adultery with the Woman Mystery Babylon, the false ministers and false Christians, and all who persecute My bride (the widow and her fatherless children who are stranger in this world) in the last day under the reign of Antichrist.

Mal 3:1 Behold, I will send my messenger, and he shall prepare the way before me: and THE ADON, whom ye seek, shall suddenly come to his temple, even the messenger of the covenant, whom ye delight in: behold, he shall come, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 3:2 But who may abide the day of his coming? and who shall stand when he appeareth? for he is like a refiner's fire, and like fullers' soap: Mal 3:3 And he shall sit as a refiner and purifier of silver: and he shall purify the sons of Levi, and purge them as gold and silver, that they may offer unto THE YAHWEH an offering in righteousness. Mal 3:4 Then shall the offering of Judah and Jerusalem be pleasant unto THE YAHWEH, as in the days of old, and as in former years. Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift (H4116 "mahar" speedily) witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith the LORD of hosts.

We shall tarry no more for My FATHER and Me, have been hearing the cry of the souls of them that were slain for Me, and for the testimony which they held: from the blood of righteous Abel to the blood of Our marytrs all over the earth.

Luk 18:1 And he spake a parable unto them to this end, that men ought always to pray, and not to faint; Luk 18:2 Saying, There was in a city a judge, which feared not THE ELOHIM, neither regarded man: Luk 18:3 And there was a widow in that city; and she came unto him, saying, Avenge me of mine adversary. Luk 18:4 And he would not for a while: but afterward he said within himself, Though I fear not God, nor regard man; Luk 18:5 Yet because this widow troubleth me, I will avenge her, lest by her continual coming she weary me. Luk 18:6 And the Lord said, Hear what the unjust judge saith. Luk 18:7 And shall not THE ELOHIM avenge his own elect, which cry day and night unto him, though he bear long with them? Luk 18:8 I tell you that he will avenge them speedily (G5034 "tachos"). Nevertheless when the Son of Adam cometh, shall he find faith on the earth?

Mat 23:26 Thou blind Pharisee, cleanse first that which is within the cup and platter, that the outside of them may be clean also. Mat 23:27 Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which indeed appear beautiful outward, but are within full of dead men's bones, and of all uncleanness. Mat 23:28 Even so ye also outwardly appear righteous unto men, but within ye are full of hypocrisy and iniquity. Mat 23:29 Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! because ye build the tombs of the prophets, and garnish the sepulchres of the righteous, Mat 23:30 And say, If we had been in the days of our fathers, we would not have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets. Mat 23:31 Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets. Mat 23:32 Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers. Mat 23:33 Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell? Mat 23:34 Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city: Mat 23:35 That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar. Mat 23:36 Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation. Mat 23:37 O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, thou that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and ye would not! Mat 23:38 Behold, your house is left unto you desolate. Mat 23:39 For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord.
(By now, Shekinaih and David, were emotionally moved and in tears. Empathizing with JESUS, they hugged and cried. Suddenly, David vehemently stirred up in zeal, said to JESUS)
David: LORD JESUS, Shekinaih and I will not disappoint THE TRINITY.
JESUS: Yes, We know. Have not My FATHER scripted concerning Shekinaih and you in Isaiah 42:13-17?

My FATHER and Me, shall go forth as a mighty man and stir up our jealousy in Shekinaih and you. He shall through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih travail you out as the Man-child representing me; and We shall through both of you, as a unit, unitedly blow away and snuff out all Our enemies.

Isa 42:13 THE YAHWEH shall go forth as a mighty man, he shall stir up jealousy like a man of war: he shall cry, yea, roar; he shall prevail against his enemies. Isa 42:14 I have long time holden my peace; I have been still, and refrained myself: now will I cry like a travailing woman; I will destroy and devour in unison (H3162 "yachad" a unit, unitedly). Isa 42:15 I will make waste mountains and hills, and dry up all their herbs; and I will make the rivers islands, and I will dry up the pools. Isa 42:16 And I will bring the blind by a way that they knew not; I will lead them in paths that they have not known: I will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight. These things will I do unto them, and not forsake them. Isa 42:17 They shall be turned back, they shall be greatly ashamed, that trust in graven images, that say to the molten images, Ye are our gods.
Shekinaih and you, as the Eagle from the East, the Morning/daystar, shall EXECUTE AND CO-EXECUTE all Our counsel and great will the devastation on Our enemies.

Isa 46:9 Remember the former things of old: for I am God, and there is none else; I am God, and there is none like me, Isa 46:10 Declaring the end from the beginning, and from ancient times the things that are not yet done, saying, My counsel shall stand, and I will do all my pleasure: Isa 46:11 Calling a ravenous bird from the east, the man that executeth my counsel from a far country: yea, I have spoken it, I will also bring it to pass; I have purposed it, I will also do it. Isa 46:12 Hearken unto me, ye stouthearted, that are far from righteousness: Isa 46:13 I bring near my righteousness; it shall not be far off, and my salvation shall not tarry: and I will place salvation in Zion for Israel my glory.

title:
Chapter 2
The Morning Star

segments.text:
Chapter 2
The Morning Star
(JESUS again drew another diagram and showed it to Shekinaih and David and expounded to them.)
JESUS: Shekinaih and you, are Our Morning stars. Have I not spoken before that I come as a thief in the night, likewise My Morning Star shall arise when My children least expected.

Mat 24:27 For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be. Mat 24:28 For wheresoever the carcase is, there will the eagles be gathered together.

As the morning that give light and nourish Our creation, THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih shall irradiate THE FATHER'S light through you, THE MINOR ELIJAH, as Our Morning who shall give light to My children who are still sitting in darkness and under the covering of Lucifer (shadow of death) because of their mind being blinded by Lucifer from Our true gospel of salvation.

Luk 1:76 And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of THE YAHWEH to prepare his ways; Luk 1:77 To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins, Luk 1:78 Through the tender mercy of our ELOHIM; whereby The Morning (G395 "antole" from G393; a rising of light, that is dawn, east) from on high hath visited us, Luk 1:79 To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace. Luk 1:80 And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.

2Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: 2Co 4:4 In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ, who is the image of God, should shine unto them.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih, will together with Me in you, as Sun of Righteousness shall arise with healing in His wings restore and turn Our children's heart back to THE FATHER before THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, exterminate the heavens and earth under the rule of Lucifer.

Mal 4:1 For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud, yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch. Mal 4:2 But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings; and ye shall go forth, and grow up as calves of the stall. Mal 4:3 And ye shall tread down the wicked; for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet in the day that I shall do this, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 4:4 Remember ye the law of Moses my servant, which I commanded unto him in Horeb for all Israel, with the statutes and judgments. Mal 4:5 Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and dreadful day of THE YAHWEH: Mal 4:6 And he shall turn the heart of THE FATHER to the children, and the heart of the children to their FATHER, lest I come and smite the earth with a curse.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, the Spirit of Prophecy, as The Morning shall illuminate My elect's hearts.

2Pe 1:17 For he received from THE ELOHIM THE FATHER honour and glory, when there came such a voice to him from the excellent glory, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased. 2Pe 1:18 And this voice which came from heaven we heard, when we were with him in the holy mount. 2Pe 1:19 We have also a more sure word of prophecy; whereunto ye do well that ye take heed, as unto a light that shineth in a dark place, until the day beam through (G1223 "dia" and G826 "augazo" to beam, irradiate, shine forth), and the morning star (G5459 "phosphoros") arise in your hearts: 2Pe 1:20 Knowing this first, that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation. 2Pe 1:21 For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of THE ELOHIM spake as they were moved (G5342 "phero") by the Holy Ghost.
And to our overcomers, we will give Shekinaih and you, Our Morning Star to lead them into their destiny.

Rev 2:26 And he that overcometh, and keepeth my works unto the end, to him will I give authority over the nations: Rev 2:27 And he shall rule them with a rod of iron; as the vessels of a potter shall they be broken to shivers: even as I received of my Father. Rev 2:28 And I will give him the morning (G4407 "proinos" pertaining to dawn) star. Rev 2:29 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

And through the decree of THE FATHER through Shekinaih to you, as The Angel ascending out of the east, ye shall seal My 144,000 trees of righteousness (Brides) from the earth and fishes (Anointed Ones ones/christs) from the sea.

Rev 7:2 And I saw another angel ascending out of (G575 "apo" out of) the rising (G395 "anatole") sun (G2246 "helios"), having the seal of the living ELOHIM: and he cried with a loud voice to the four angels, to whom it was given to hurt the earth and the sea, Rev 7:3 Saying, Hurt not the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, till we have sealed the servants of our ELOHIM in their foreheads. Rev 7:4 And I heard the number of them which were sealed: and there were sealed an hundred and forty and four thousand of all the tribes of the children of Israel.

As the mighty angel arrayed with My cloud of witnesses; and a rainbow upon your head representing Our Seven Names, Shekinaih and you shall release Our decree to Our seven angels to proclaim Our judgment on earth.

Rev 10:1 And I saw another mighty angel come down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow was upon his head, and his face was as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire: Rev 10:2 And he had in his hand a little book open: and he set his right foot upon the sea, and his left foot on the earth, Rev 10:3 And cried with a loud voice, as when a lion roareth: and when he had cried, seven thunders uttered their voices. ….Rev 10:7 But in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he shall begin to sound, the mystery of THE ELOHIM should be finished, as he hath declared to his servants the prophets……. Rev 10:10 And I took the little book out of the angel's hand, and ate it up; and it was in my mouth sweet as honey: and as soon as I had eaten it, my belly was bitter. Rev 10:11 And he said unto me, Thou must prophesy again before many peoples, and nations, and tongues, and kings.
Shekinaih and you, as The Angel standing in the sun, shall called out Our glorified saints in the supper of the great EL in the battle of Armaggeddon.

Rev 16:12 And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the rising (G395 "anatole") sun (G2246 "helios") might be prepared. Rev 16:13 And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet. Rev 16:14 For they are the spirits of devils, working miracles, which go forth unto the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the battle of that great day of God Almighty.…..Rev 19:17 And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God; Rev 19:18 That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great. Rev 19:19 And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, The Morning Star, shall surely come speedily.

title:
Chapter 2
The Morning Star (part 2)

segments.text: Rev 22:16 I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright (G2986 "lampros") and morning (G3720 "orthrinos" relating to dawn) star (Note: this statement is spoken by the angel). Rev 22:17 And the Spirit and the bride say, Come….. Rev 22:20 He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus. Rev 22:21 The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
David: LORD JESUS, this Revelation is very profound.
JESUS: Yes, it is for Shekinaih and you and all the children whom We have given both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.
Deu 29:29 The secret of THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM: are revealed unto us and to our children for ever, that we may do all the words of this law.
Now, finally to nail this Revelation in your hearts and minds; all that I have just reveal and expounded, are all hidden in the parable in the Book of Job.
Job in the Book of Job, is a parable and hid the Revelation of The Morning Star, The Day star.
Job means the hated one or persecuted one. He signifies you whom Satan hated because you are born to confront and defeat her/him at her/his core.
As written in Genesis, the seed of the woman shall bruise the head of the serpent, so shall My Morning Star (My champion) completely crush the serpent head (10 kings of the earth) under his feet.
Gen 3:15 And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; it shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.

Lo! And behold! The Leviathan are terrified to see that day. Both the Red Dragon or the Ancient Serpent and her counterpart shiver at the mention of the name both THE TRINITY in Shekinaih and THE VICTORY, My Archangel in you. All the Cosmic Worlds will tremble when We schedule both of you representing Us to meet them face to face according to My prophetic time timetable.
Upon your birth, We have protected you from death, though many times you experiences "death". However, We restore you back to life, in order for you to fulfil your destiny in Us.
Together, with Us in Shekinaih, new and hidden light of illumination which was held back from Mankind all this while, are given to you.

Job 3:1 After this opened Job his mouth, and cursed the day. Job 3:2 And Job spake, and said, Job 3:3 Let the day perish wherein I was born, and the night in which it was said, there is a man child / champion (H1397 "geber" champion, to prevail) conceived. Job 3:4 Let that day be darkness; let not THE ELOAH regard it from above, neither let the light shine upon it. Job 3:5 Let darkness and the shadow of death stain it; let a cloud dwell upon it; let the blackness of the day terrify it. Job 3:6 As for that night, let darkness seize upon it; let it not be joined unto the days of the year, let it not come into the number of the months. Job 3:7 Lo, let that night be solitary, let no joyful voice come therein. Job 3:8 Let them curse it that curse the day, who are ready to stir up (H5782 "ur") Leviathan (H3882 "livyathan"). Job 3:9 Let the stars of the dawn (H5399 "nesheph") thereof be dark; let it look for light, but have none; neither let it see the eyelash (H6079 "aph aph" figuratively morning ray) of the morning (H7837 "shachar" dawn) …..Job 3:23 Why is light given to a man-child (H1397 "geber" champion, to prevail) whose way is hid, and whom THE ELOAH (H433 "eloahh") hath hedged in?

Our manifestation, will appear as My burning bush (theoretically). It can also appear, spiritually like a morning sun with its light and heat, gradually intensifying. Together with Shekinaih, you are with Me when We laid the foundations of the earth through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, while the rest of My mini elohim (mini morning called dawn stars and mini Shekinaih called sons of THE ELOHIM) clapped their hand in marvel at Our creation process. My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, through Me in you, the Angel of THE YAHWEH signified the east wind which divided the water for My redeemed to cross during the time of Moses.
As Captain of My heavenly hosts commanding the dawn stars to take hold of the ends of the earth, I in you will arise to shake out terribly the wicked of the earth in the last day.

Job 38:3 Gird up now thy loins like a champion (H1397 "geber" champion, to prevail); for I will demand of thee, and answer thou me. Job 38:4 Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth? declare, if thou hast understanding. Job 38:5 Who hath laid the measures thereof, if thou knowest? or who hath stretched the line upon it? Job 38:6 Whereupon are the foundations thereof fastened? or who laid the corner stone thereof; Job 38:7 When the dawn (H1242 "boqer") stars sang together, and all the sons of THE ELOHIM shouted for joy? Job 38:8 Or who shut up the sea with doors, when it brake forth, as if it had issued out of the womb? Job 38:9 When I made the cloud the garment thereof, and thick darkness a swaddlingband for it, Job 38:10 And brake up for it my decreed place, and set bars and doors, Job 38:11 And said, Hitherto shalt thou come, but no further: and here shall thy proud waves be stayed? Job 38:12 Hast thou commanded the dawn (H1242 "boqer") from (H4480 "min") the day (H3117 "yom") the MORNING (H7837 "shachar" ), know his place; Job 38:13 That it might take hold of the ends of the earth, that the wicked might be shaken out of it? Job 38:14 It is turned as clay to the seal; and they stand as a garment. Job 38:15 And from the wicked their light is withholden, and the high arm shall be broken.

I am the first of the Morning Star, followed by you. Through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR, the rest of My sons whom I chosen to be joined in one spirit with Me whom I called My darling/Yachidy who are My brethren shall also carry their cross and follow My footstep as a Christ. Have I not spoken that those who are Christ shall first suffer and then enter into glory? They all shall suffered reproach and despised of people. They shall be hated and persecuted by the beast and the nations that served him and be killed but will be resurrected by My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih by you, My Victory, whom I will give you the keys of Hades and Death.

Psa 22:1 To the chief Musician upon Aijeleth (H365 "ayeleth" doe, hind) Shahar (H7837 "shachar" MORNING), A Psalm of David. My EL, my EL, why hast thou forsaken me? why art thou so far from helping me, and from the words of my roaring?...... Psa 22:18 They part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture. Psa 22:19 But be not thou far from me, O THE YAHWEH: O my strength, haste thee to help me. Psa 22:20 Deliver my soul from the sword; my darling (H3173 "yachiyd" from H3161 "yachad" to join, united) from the power of the dog. Psa 22:21 Save me from the lion's mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns. Psa 22:22 I will declare thy name unto my brethren: in the midst of the congregation will I praise thee.

Shekinaih and you are Our dove, Our Perfect one who is united with THE HOLY SPIRIT (represented by Shekinaih) to be the Two Anointed Ones, The Morning. Shekinaih represents the Heavenly Jerusalem (THE MOTHER HOLY SPIRIT) which is signified by the moon; and you represents Me and is signified by the sun; and My FATHER and Me through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY shall lead Our last's day company of two armies of Anointed Ones and Brides into Our Heavenly Mount Zion.

Son 6:8 There are threescore queens, and fourscore concubines, and virgins (H5958 "almah") without number. Son 6:9 My dove, my perfect (H8535 "tam" complete) is united (H259 "echad"); she is united with her mother, she is the choice one of her that bare her. The daughters saw her, and blessed her; yea, the queens and the concubines, and they praised her. Son 6:10 Who is she that looketh forth as the morning (H7837 "shachar"), fair as the moon, clear as the sun, and terrible with banners? Son 6:11 I went down into the garden of nuts to see the fruits of the valley, and to see whether the vine flourished, and the pomegranates budded. Son 6:12 Or ever I was aware, my soul made me like the chariots of Amminadib. Son 6:13 Return, return, O Shulamite; return, return, that we may look upon thee. What will ye see in the Shulamite? As it were the company of two armies.

title:
ACT 1 SCENE 4
The Conqueror, "The Champion"

segments.text:
ACT 1 SCENE 4
The Conqueror, "The Champion"
Time Frame: Since the day of Creation
Location: Everywhere on the Planet Earth
Once upon a time, there lives an upright man, one that never compromises his stand on what he believe is righteous and the right things to do.
Then one day, there was a heavy storm with heavy downpour and the top of some houses were blown off and the vicinity was flooded due the lower ground they were situated.
Out of a sudden, he heard the desperate cry of a young boy who was screaming and shouting for help as he helplessly struggled to continuously stay afloat in the flooded water.

Upon hearing the distress cry of this little boy, the upright man rushed out of his house and dived into the water and swim towards the boy hoping to rescue the little boy from drowning and carried away by the waters.
Suddenly, there appeared three large crocodiles, green, grey and black, swimming across the water towards this little boy.

The man upon seeing these predators, was in a fit as he was thinking to himself how he could rescue this boy without endangering his own life, As he continue to swim towards the boy, in his heart, he started to pray, "Lord, please help us".
At that moment, a motor boat suddenly appeared and one man in the boat managed to pull this boy out of the water just in time before these three crocodiles were able to swallow up the little boy up.
The three angry crocodiles suddenly turned around and pursue the upright man as their highly sought after prey furiously.

Upon seeing these three crocodiles swimming vigorously towards him, this upright man begin to turn back and swam for his life speedily. However, these three crocodiles outswam him. With their mouths wide open and just before they can gulp him down, a man in the motor boat suddenly pulled him out of the water in the nick of time.
"Phew!!! What a narrow escape", he exclaimed with relief.
All of a sudden, THE TRINITY appear to hover above the water in front of him and said to him, "We have heard your prayer; for you have been found righteous in Our eyes".
JESUS then said to Shekinaih and David, "What you have seen in this vision, always keep it in your heart".

title:
Chapter 3 
My Champion

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
My Champion

Turning to Shekinaih and Aaron K David, THE TRINITY said to them, "The prayer of a righteous man avail much. The Champion equal to Overcomer equal to The Righteous One. Therefore, We will come to your aid/help in times of your need when you earnestly called for Our help. Henceforth, the steps of an Overcomer/ Champion is established by Us and uphold by Us when his foot slip and will not be utterly destroyed by their predator, the crocodiles of the evil doers.

Psa 37:23 The steps of a champion (HH1397 "geber") are ordered by THE YAHWEH: and he delighteth in his way. Psa 37:24 Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down: for THE YAHWEH upholdeth him with his hand.
Psa 37:37 Mark the perfect, and behold the upright: for the end of that man is peace.
Lo! And Behold! A champion is born, like no other. I have captivated your heart and put My SON's DNA in you. You are Our pride whom We will display throughout the Cosmoses as Our Masterpiece.

Currently, though, Our work is still in progress in you, you are getting there very soon.
