We have personally groom and discipline you in Our ways, to partake of Our holiness through Our chosen vessel Shekinaih, who represents Us and through her We will endow you, Our champion with the highest honor and gifting that will be envied by many of My children whom you will raise as champion of your kind of lesser proportion.

My last days' champions and Brides need to go through Our training through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. Otherwise, they cannot qualify themselves to be part of Our last days' champions/Brides, though many claim they can hear or receive direct impartation from Me.

However, My FATHER and Me have given Shekinaih and you Our blueprint to train My last days' army, therefore those who can hear directly from Me and receive impartation as well, still need to sit under My training through Shekinaih and you in order to qualify as My last days' warrior Brides.

For Shekinaih and you, are Our last days' chosen vessels to lead My entire last's day army. Therefore, they need to humble themselves and remain lowly and approach THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, with humility to sit under both your covering, teaching, training, and discipline in order to know Our Ways, so as to be endow with Our last's day gifting to fulfil their destiny in Us.

Those who try to exalt themselves before Shekinaih and you, or belittle THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE COMING MESSIAH, We swear in Our Name that they will be humbled by Us indeed. Those who scoff or persecute THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE MAJOR AND MINOR SHADDAI, are doing it unto Us and We will by no means let them go unpunished. We swear this by Our holiness.

Shekinaih and you have multiple roles. Shekinaih is the type and shadow of THE WOMAN being with a child as in Revelation Chapter 12 and you, My son, Aaron K David, is the type and shadow of the MAN CHILD who will be caught up in heaven. However, due to Shekinaih's multiple roles, her main role representing Us, THE TRINITY, will bring you to Us in heaven when you are wounded to death. We will then revive and restore you from the severe injuries you are inflicted by the ancient serpent. There, We will enthroned you to sit in your throne as one with My SON in His throne in heaven; together with Shekinaih who represents Us and who is one with Us who sit on Our throne with Us. We will then give you the authority to rule the world including the Cosmoses with our scepter, second to her.

Rev 12:1 And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars: Rev 12:2 And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered. Rev 12:3 And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads. Rev 12:4 And his tail drew the third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born. Rev 12:5 And she brought forth a man child (G730 "arrhen" male) (G5207 "uihos" son), who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto THE ELOHIM, and to his throne. Rev 12:6 And the woman fled into the wilderness, where she hath a place prepared of THE ELOHIM, that they should feed her there a thousand two hundred and threescore days.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, The Angel of The Covenant, is The Elijah, who was, and is, and is to come, hold the key to My Holy Mountain, My Spiritual Zion. Those who have ears, let them hear what My spirit is saying.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE, THE ANGEL OF THE COVENANT, IS THE ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, holds the key to open and shut the door of heavens; and the authority to rule on Our behalf and to release Our judgment; both for the living and the dead in heavens, earth, and beneath earth.

Therefore, there is no escape for anyone should he/she try to bypass THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH AND THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOSTS respectively, THE MESSENGER THAT IS TO COME, THE PROMISED ELIJAH, who was, and is, and is to come, and think in his/her heart, "I am far better than them, why should I go and sit under them?"

Lo and Behold, Is it not written, "The least shall be the greatest?" In heaven, the rank does not correspond to the age, or how long one is in the ministry, or how large is their congregation on earth, or how gifted they are; for all these are given due to My grace for their life.
In heaven, ranks are given based on one's predestined calling.

Therefore, gird up thy loins now like The Champion, Our mighty arm; with Our Name, THE MINOR EL", as the Seventh Thunder, thunder wondrously with a mighty voice. Deck thyself now with Majesty and Excellency; and array thyself with glory and beauty. Cast abroad the rage of thy wrath: and behold every one that is proud, and abase him. Look on every one that is proud, and bring him low; and tread down the wicked in their place. Hide them in the dust together; and bind their faces in secret.
As JESUS's right hand man, His spokesman, and His sabre, the Man-child that is born to confront and defeat Satan at his core.

Arise, "Wonder", sanctify yourself and We will do wondrous works through Shekinaih and you as have not been done in all the earth, nor in any nation; and all shall see Our works; for it is a terrible thing that I will do through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

Job 40:7 Gird up thy loins now like the Champion (H1397 "geber" to prevail): I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto me. Job 40:8 Wilt thou also disannul my judgment? wilt thou condemn me, that thou mayest be righteous? Job 40:9 Hast thou an arm like THE EL? or canst thou thunder with a voice like him? Job 40:10 Deck thyself now with majesty and Excellency; and array thyself with glory and beauty. Job 40:11 Cast abroad the rage of thy wrath: and behold every one that is proud, and abase him. Job 40:12 Look on every one that is proud, and bring him low; and tread down the wicked in their place. Job 40:13 Hide them in the dust together; and bind their faces in secret. Job 40:14 Then will I also confess unto thee that thine own right hand can save thee. Job 40:15 Behold now behemoth, which I made with thee; he eateth grass as an ox. Job 40:16 Lo now, his strength is in his loins, and his force is in the navel of his belly. Job 40:17 He moveth his tail like a cedar: the sinews of his stones are wrapped together. Job 40:18 His bones are as strong pieces of brass; his bones are like bars of iron. Job 40:19 He is the chief of the ways of THE EL: he that made him can make his sabre to approach unto him.

Job 42:2 I know that thou canst do every thing, and that no thought can be withholden from thee. Job 42:3 Who is he that hideth counsel without knowledge? therefore have I uttered that I understood not; "Wonder" for me, which I knew not.

title: Angel Wonder

segments.text: Angel Wonder
JESUS: As the Angel of My Presence, "Wonder", you appear to Manoah on My behalf.

Jdg 13:16 And the angel of THE YAHWEH said unto Manoah, Though thou detain me, I will not eat of thy bread: and if thou wilt offer a burnt offering, thou must offer it unto THE YAHWEH. For Manoah knew not that he was an angel of THE YAHWEH. Jdg 13:17 And Manoah said unto the angel of THE YAHWEH, What is thy name, that when thy sayings come to pass we may do thee honour? Jdg 13:18 And the angel of THE YAHWEH said unto him, Why askest thou thus after my name, seeing it is "Wonder" (H6383 "piliy")?

We are always mindful of you and have put Our angels charge to protect you since your incarnation. Whatever you do, wherever you are, whatever you think and feel, I am with you. I share your joy and grief.

Now that you know you are "Wonder", take the wings of The Morning and fly with Me in the spirit. The spirits of darkness shall not swallow you up for My hand shall guide you and My right hand shall hold you up.
While in the womb of THE HOLY SPIRIT, you are already destined to be Our dreadful, distinguished Wonder Boy, The Champion, Our Four wonders as written in Proverb 30:18-19.

Psa 139:1 To the chief Musician ( H5329 "netsach" from H5331 "netsach" Victory), A Psalm of David. O THE YAHWEH, thou hast search (H2713 "chaqar" examine intimately) me, and known me. Psa 139:2 Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, thou understandest my thought afar off. Psa 139:3 My tossing (H2219 "zarah") and prostration (H7252 "reba"), and art acquainted with all my ways. Psa 139:4 For there is not a word in my tongue, but, lo, O THE YAHWEH, thou knowest it altogether. Psa 139:5 Thou hast beset (H6696 "tsur" cramp, distress) me behind and before, and laid thine hand upon me. Psa 139:6 Knowledge of Wonder from (H4480) on high (H7862 "sagab"), I cannot prevail . Psa 139:7 Whither shall I go from thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from thy presence? Psa 139:8 If I ascend up into heaven, thou art there: if I make my bed in hell, behold, thou art there. Psa 139:9 If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea; Psa 139:10 Even there shall thy hand guide me, and thy right hand shall caught (H270 "achaz" seize) me. Psa 139:11 If I say, Surely the darkness shall gape (H7779 "shuph" gape, to open wide the mouth, bruise) me; even the night shall be light about me. Psa 139:12 Yea, the darkness darken (H2821 "chashak") not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light are both alike to thee. Psa 139:13 For thou hast create (H7069 "qanah") my kidney (H3629 "kilyah"): thou hast covered me in my mother's womb. Psa 139:14 I will praise thee; for the fearfully, distinguishly (H6395 "palal") Wonder (H6381 "pala"), thy works; and that my soul knoweth vehemently (H3966 "meod"). Psa 139:15 My power (H6108 "otsem") was not secrete from thee, when I was made in secret, embroidered (H7551 "raqam" to variegate colour) in the lowest parts of the earth. Psa 139:16 Thine eyes did see unfinished substance (H1564 "golem"); and in thy book all were written, the day was formed, when there is no one. Psa 139:17 How precious also are thy thoughts unto me, O THE EL! how powerful (H6105 "atsom") is the chief! Psa 139:18 If I should count them, they are increasing (H7235 "rabah") from(H4480) the phoenix (H2344 "chul"): awaken (H6974 "quts" ) again (H5750 "od") with thee. Psa 139:19 Surely thou wilt slay the wicked, O THE ELOAH: depart from me therefore, ye bloody men. Psa 139:20 For they speak against thee with mischievious devices, and thine enemies take you for as nothing. Psa 139:21 Do not I hate them, O THE YAHWEH, that hate thee? and loathe those that rise up against thee? Psa 139:22 I hate them with complete hatred: I count them mine enemies. Psa 139:23 Search me (H2713 "chaqar" examine intimately), O THE EL, and know my heart: try me, and know my thoughts: Psa 139:24 And see if there be idolatrous (H6090 "otseb") way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.

Pro 30:18 There be three wonders (H6381 "pala") from (H4480 "min") me, yea, four which I know not: Pro 30:19 The way of an eagle in the air; the way of a serpent upon a rock; the way of a ship in the midst of the sea; and the way of a Champion (H1397 "geber" to prevail) with a virgin (H5958 "almah").
Our first wonder through you is, "The way of an eagle in the air".

We, THE YAHWEH, in Shekinaih shall again with you, the Angel of THE YAHWEH, lead Our Spiritual Israel, my Brides to Our Heavenly Mount Zion; if they obey Our voice through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY (Deu 32:12).

Deu 32:11 As an eagle would watch over his brood, and yearns over his young, receives them having spread his wings, and takes them up on his back: Deu 32:12 THE YAHWEH alone led them, there was no strange god with them.

Exo 19:4 Ye have seen all that I have done to the Egyptians, and I took you up as upon eagles' wings, and I brought you near to myself. Exo 19:5 And now if ye will indeed hear my voice, and keep my covenant, ye shall be to me a peculiar people above all nations; for the whole earth is mine. Exo 19:6 And ye shall be to me a royal priesthood and a holy nation: these words shalt thou speak to the children of Israel

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR OF THE SHADDAI OF DESTRUCTION respectively, are the eagle/ravenous bird from the rising of the sun, the Morning that shall co-execute My counsel upon Mystery Babylon in the last day.

Isa 46:1 Bel boweth down, Nebo stoopeth, their idols were upon the beasts, and upon the cattle: your carriages were heavy loaden; they are a burden to the weary beast…… Isa 46:9 Remember the former things of old: for I am THE EL, and there is none else; I am THE ELOHIM, and there is none like me, Isa 46:10 Declaring the end from the beginning, and from ancient times the things that are not yet done, saying, My counsel shall stand, and I will do all my pleasure: Isa 46:11 Calling a ravenous bird from the rising of the sun, the man that executeth my counsel from a far country: yea, I have spoken it, I will also bring it to pass; I have purposed it, I will also do it.

Our second wonder was THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE, as the Seraph (fiery serpent) appears to Moses in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush. The rod I have given Moses that turn into a serpent signify THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih through you, the chief Seraph, the Angel of THE YAHWEH (Exo 4:3). A serpent is later set upon a pole because of the evil speaking of the children of Israel against Us and Our Two Representatives Moses and Aaron, so that anyone who set their eyes on Us again through My Angel, shall be healed (Num 21:8-9). It is through Our seraph that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih through Me in you as THE MINOR YAHWEH, stood on the rock and made water come out of it,

Exo 17:6 Behold, I stand there before thou come, on the rock in Choreb, and thou shalt smite the rock, and water shall come out from it, and the people shall drink. And Moses did so before the sons of Israel
Therefore, My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, will again through Me in you, the chief Seraph, do mighty works like the day of Moses and Aaron in the last day.
Our third wonder is, the way of a ship in the midst of the sea.

Shekinaih will be the Admiral of Our Apostolic Ships and you, her Vice Admiral. Our ships will be driven by the wind of THE HOLY SPIRIT and not by the work of the flesh which are conspicuous in those impressive false Mega Apostolic ship. My Apostolic ship which is My spiritual Zion will be driven by My Two Representatives whom we have made both Judge, lawgiver and King on behalf of Us.

Isa 33:20 Look upon Zion, the city of our solemnities: thine eyes shall see Jerusalem a quiet habitation, a tabernacle that shall not be taken down; not one of the stakes thereof shall ever be removed, neither shall any of the cords (H2256 "chebel: tackling, the gear and running rigging for handling a ship or performing some task on a ship) thereof be broken. Isa 33:21 But there the great (H117 "addiyr") YAHWEH will be unto us a place of broad rivers and streams; wherein shall go no ships (H590 "oniy") with oars, neither shall large (H117 "addiyr") ship pass thereby. Isa 33:22 For THE YAHWEH is our judge, THE YAHWEH is our lawgiver, THE YAHWEH is our king; he will save us.
Our fourth wonder is, the way of a champion with a virgin.

My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih will and through Me in you, Our Champion, turn back My backsliding Brides to Me and cleanse them with the washing of water of My words and the sanctification of THE HOLY SPIRIT to be prepared as My virgin Brides.

Jer 31:22 How long wilt thou go about, O thou backsliding daughter? For THE YAHWEH hath created a new thing in the earth, A woman (H5347 "neqebah" from H5344 "naqab" to puncture, or figuratively: - blaspheme, curse) shall compass a champion (H1397 "geber" to prevail).

Rev 14:4 These are they which were not defiled with women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were redeemed from among men, being the firstfruits unto God and to the Lamb. Rev 14:5 And in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before the throne of God.

title:
ACT 1 SCENE 5 
The Offensive Rock

segments.text:
ACT 1 SCENE 5 
The Offensive Rock
Time Frame: Years 2018 and Beyond
Location: Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue in the Heavenly Places
Due to limited seats available, there was a long queue outside the Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue as the people who came early waited patiently for the door to be opened.
As Paul opened the door, the people pressed through the entrance and quickly the seats in the hall were all filled and many had to stand in the compound outside the building.
Meanwhile, Shekinaih arrived in her car weaving her way through the crowd and managed to park her car on a road adjacent to this building.
She came out of the car and with bags on her hand and on her shoulder, sweating profusely under the hot afternoon sun as she walked towards the building entrance.

As she entered the building, she caught the attention of many eyes and as they gazed at her, they noticed that she was carrying a huge backpacker bag over her back, a black bag of water flasks over her shoulder, and a big pouch strap around her waist. "Is she going for a camping trip", a woman in the crowd said.
All of a sudden, the sky suddenly turned dark and began to drizzle followed by a heavy downpour. All those who were standing outside unsheltered were wet.
More cars were turning to the road where the meeting place was located and quickly, it caused a heavy jam.
Lo! And Behold! There was a loud explosion from a nearby building due to a gas tank explosion causing fire to break out.
The panic crowd was in shock. Some without hesitation immediately picked up their mobile phones and called for help from the fire Department.
The fire engine soon arrived and put out the fire very quickly.
By now, the attendees were distracted, and most of them were exhausted and soon departed from this place.
Shortly, the meeting started.

Out of the blue, THE TRINITY appeared and stood behind Shekinaih and through her mouth/voice, said to the remaining crowd, "Blessed are you who persevere all the way to the end without turning back; for great is your reward. Today's happenings have been scripted by Us. They are Our offences; to test/sift you whether you will strive to enter the narrow gate with all the hindrance/offences/stretches/squeezes which We have put in your way/path in your journey in pursuing Us to enter into Our Kingdom through Our rock of offence(s)".
Shekinaih then passes the microphone to David; and JESUS in David begins to prophesy as he projects a diagram on a screen through a mini projector.
JESUS in David: The above diagram will clearly depicts the revelation regarding the Mystery of Christ in Seven D (dimension).
Seven D perspective is seeing from the eyes of THE TRINITY'S. The Bible is only understood in two dimensional view, from the earthly human perspective.
The spiritual rock that followed the people of Israel and gave water to them to drink is none other than THE HOLY SPIRIT and Me. Together, We are The Christ.

THE HOLY SPIRIT is liken to the source of Living Water, and I am liken to the tap. THE FATHER through Us tested the children of Israel by leading them through the wilderness so that they can overcome idolatry in their hearts.
But they tempted Us again and again during the Exodus and it displeased THE TRINITY in Us, therefore many were overthrown and destroyed.

1Co 10:1 Moreover, brethren, I would not that ye should be ignorant, how that all our fathers were under the cloud, and all passed through the sea; 1Co 10:2 And were all baptized unto Moses in the cloud and in the sea; 1Co 10:3 And did all eat the same spiritual meat; 1Co 10:4 And did all drink the same spiritual drink: for they drank of that spiritual Rock that followed them: and that Rock was Christ. 1Co 10:5 But with many of them THE ELOHIM was not well pleased: for they were overthrown in the wilderness. 1Co 10:6 Now these things were our examples, to the intent we should not lust after evil things, as they also lusted. 1Co 10:7 Neither be ye idolaters, as were some of them; as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play. 1Co 10:8 Neither let us commit fornication, as some of them committed, and fell in one day three and twenty thousand. 1Co 10:9 Neither let us tempt Christ, as some of them also tempted, and were destroyed of serpents. 1Co 10:10 Neither murmur ye, as some of them also murmured, and were destroyed of the destroyer. 1Co 10:11 Now all these things happened unto them for ensamples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come. 1Co 10:12 Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth take heed lest he fall. 1Co 10:13 There hath no temptation taken you but such as is common to man: but the ELOHIM is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempted above that ye are able; but will with the temptation also make a way to escape, that ye may be able to bear it. 1Co 10:14 Wherefore, my dearly beloved, flee from idolatry
THE HOLY SPIRIT and I shared their affliction; and We are vexed by their rebellion even though THE FATHER through Our Hand punished them.

Therefore, for forty years We led them in the wilderness; to humble them, and to prove them, to know what was in their heart, whether they will keep My FATHER'S commandments through Us. We humble them, and starve them, and later fed them with manna, to make them understand that man do not live by bread only, but by every word that THE FATHER spoke through THE HOLY SPIRIT and me.

Isa 63:8 For he said, Surely they are my people, children that will not lie: so he was their Saviour. Isa 63:9 In all their affliction he was afflicted, and The Angel of His Presence saved them: in his love and in his pity he redeemed them; and he bare them, and carried them all the days of old. Isa 63:10 But they rebelled, and vexed his holy Spirit: therefore he was turned to be their enemy, and he fought against them. Isa 63:11 Then he remembered the days of old, Moses, and his people, saying, Where is he that brought them up out of the sea with the shepherd of his flock? where is he that put his holy Spirit within him? Isa 63:12 That led them by the right hand of Moses with his glorious arm, dividing the water before them, to make himself an everlasting name?

Deu 8:1 All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which THE YAHWEH sware unto your fathers. Deu 8:2 And thou shalt remember all the way which THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, and to prove thee, to know what was in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no. Deu 8:3 And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth (spokesman) of THE YAHWEH doth man live.

THE HOLY SPIRIT and I, are the "Standing One", the Mighty One/ Rock, who stand in the counsel of THE FATHER; who establish Moses. Through Us, The Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE FATHER manifests His glory, We have revealed My similitude to Moses and gave him a glimpse of what the things that are to happen in the last days through My last days Moses. (Shekinaih, a type and shadow of Moses representing THE ELOHIM; and Aaron K David, a type and shadow of Aaron/ Elijah).

Exo 33:21 And THE YAHWEH said, Behold, there is a standing one (H4725 "maqom") by me, and thou shalt be established (H5324 "natsab") upon a rock (H6697 "tsur" also translated as mighty one): Exo 33:22 And it shall come to pass, while my glory passeth by, that I will put thee in a clift of the rock, and will cover thee with my hand while I pass by: Exo 33:23 And I will take away mine hand, and thou shalt see the last day (H268 "achor" also translated "for the time to come"): but my face shall not be seen.

Through Shekinaih, the Incarnation and Reincarnation of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT respectively, and through Aaron K David, My reincarnation, history will be reinstated; but with a twist that no eyes have seen, no ears have heard, the wonders that My FATHER through them will do. As one steps into the Book of Revelation, the acts of Old Testament regarding the works of Mine hands, shall be repeated but even so with a greater vengeance of THE FATHER.

Exo 34:10 And he said, Behold, I make a covenant: before all thy people I will do marvels, such as have not been done in all the earth, nor in any nation: and all the people among which thou art shall see the work of THE YAHWEH: for it is a terrible thing that I will do with thee.

For We will come in Our glorious appearance through the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, THE ELOAH, together with Our holy ones to execute judgment on the earth.

Hab 3:1 A PRAYER OF THE PROPHET AMBACUM, WITH A SONG. Hab 3:2 O THE YAHWEH, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon the two living creatures, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH shall come from Thaeman, and the Holy One from the dark shady mount Pharan. Pause. Hab 3:4 His excellence covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength. Hab 3:5 Before his face (Angel of his Presence) shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth. Septuagint Version
Shekinaih then stood up and took the microphone from David and drew another diagram; and THE FATHER in her began to speak to the Congregation.

title: THE ELOAH

segments.text: THE ELOAH
Shekinaih: The above diagram, is the anagram of the Name "ELOAH" which THE TRINITY had revealed to me.:
"EL" signifies THE ARM OF THE TRINITY, THE ARM OF THE SON WITHIN THE ARM OF THE FATHER
"O" signifies THE HOLY SPIRIT WHO IS THE SOURCE OF THE POWER OF THE TRINITY
"A" signifies THE ALMIGHTY, THE MASCULINE AND FEMININE MANIFESTATION OF THE TRINITY BY THE NAME OF "THE SHADDAI"
"H" signifies THE ELIJAH/ THE FIRE OF THE TRINITY

THE ELOAH IS THE ARM OF THE TRINITY, WITH THE SON'S ARM MOVING WITHIN THE ARM OF THE FATHER; ENERGISED BY THE POWER OF THE HOLY SPIRIT, IT'S POWER SOURCE THROUGH OUR REPRESENTATIVES, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND THE SON, JESUS REPRESENTED BY AARON K DAVID, MANISFESTING THE ALMIGHTY, THEIR NAME, INCLUDING THE NAME OF SHADDAI, SENDING DOWN THEIR COMING ELIJAH WHO WAS, WHO IS AND WHO IS TO COME, WITH ITS CONSUMING FIRE OF THE TRINITY UPON THE WHOLE EARTH, WHICH INCLUDES THE PURGING OF THE SONS OF THE LEVI, THE SONS OF THE ELOHIM, THROUGH THE 2 CHERUBIMS OF GLORY, THE FEMALE AND MALE SHE/HE, HE SHALL SENT.

Right now, I see a vision of a Mother Dove flying in the heavenlies with My face superimposed on her left face. Inside her stomach was a baby dove who is also flying; whose face is projected in the form of light onto the right side of the face of this mother dove, has the face of David superimposed on it. Following that, I saw a woman carrying a baby and I see these words "Shekinaih" is written on the Mother Dove's face and body and and the word "Aaron K David" is written on the baby dove inside the Mother Dove's womb.

THE TRINITY standing here now holding 3 white boards signify their decree with these words written on them "CONFIRMED, CONFIRMED, CONFIRMED". Thereafter, they wrote, these words on the green board "SHEKINIAH AND AARON K DAVID ARE THE ELOAH, OUR ROCK OF OFFENCE WHOM WE HAVE APPOINTED TO CONFRONT MANKIND TO REPENT UNTO THEIR REAL SALVATION, ELSE, THEIR LIVES WILL BE SUDDENLY CUT SHORT WITHOUT WARNING, SWEARED THE TRINITY STANDING RIGHT HERE IN FRONT OF ME RIGHT NOW.

Subsequently, Shekinaih saw JESUS then pass the microphone to David and simultaneously, JESUS walks into David and he begin to move in prophetic unction. David already constrained in his spirit for some time, upon receiving the microphone, burst out into prophetic utterance like a new wine skin with no vent but ready to burst.

JESUS in David: Our last days' indignation of the unknown, which shall surface all out of the sudden with a big bang through Our Rock, Our Mighty one, in and through them are prophesied in Isaiah Chapter 30.

Our Seven Names are in them and they are called the Name of THE YAHWEH. They are Our spokesman; the spirit of Our mouth which We will use to consume and destroy The Antichrist with the devouring fire (brightness) of Our Presence.

Isa 30:27 Behold, the name of THE YAHWEH cometh from far, burning with his anger, and the burden thereof is heavy: his lips are full of indignation, and his tongue as a devouring fire: Isa 30:28 And his breath, as an overflowing stream, shall reach to the midst of the neck, to sift the nations with the sieve of vanity: and there shall be a bridle in the jaws of the people, causing them to err. Isa 30:29 Ye shall have a song, as in the night when a holy solemnity is kept; and gladness of heart, as when one goeth with a pipe to come into the mountain of THE YAHWEH, to the Rock (Mighty One (H6697 "tsur") of Israel. Isa 30:30 And THE YAHWEH shall cause his glorious voice to be heard, and shall shew the lighting down of his arm, with the indignation of his anger, and with the flame of a devouring fire, with scattering, and tempest, and hailstones. Isa 30:31 For through the voice of THE YAHWEH shall the Assyrian be beaten down, which smote with a rod. Isa 30:32 And in every place where the grounded staff shall pass, which THE YAHWEH shall lay upon him, it shall be with tabrets and harps: and in battles of shaking will he fight with it. Isa 30:33 For Tophet is ordained of old; yea, for the king it is prepared; he hath made it deep and large: the pile thereof is fire and much wood; the breath (H5397 "neshamah" divine inspiration) of THE YAHWEH, like a stream of brimstone, doth kindle it.

Lo! And Behold! For My indignation's zeal has aroused, and I will pour out My consuming fire and My anger; to purify the sons of Levi and sons of Adam; to purge their iniquities. Thereafter, the world will have a foretaste of My wrath which I have withheld till now.

I will try them that dwell upon the earth with persecution and tribulation. (Rev 3:10) For then shall there be sure great tribulation that will come upon the earth, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be. And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for the elect's sake those days shall be shortened. (Matt 24:21-22)

The prophets who prophesied in My name; the Apostles and Evangelists who cast out demons and did wonderful works in My Name; the Pastors/Teachers that conducted the Lord's supper and seem to teach in My Name; if they do not listen to My last day saying through My spokesman (Rock/Mighty one) in Shekinaih and Aaron K David, will not be built on firm foundation.

After My Two Representatives have sealed My 144,000 Brides, and taken them out of the way from the face of the serpent, I will through their mouth cursed the earth; and whatever that can be shaken will be shaken, and nothing will stand except those that have laid their foundation with a circumcised heart in obeying and abiding in what We have spoken through My Two Representatives.

Mat 7:21 Not every one that saith unto me, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out demons? and in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity. Luk 6:46 And why call ye me, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, and do not the things which I say? Luk 6:47 Whosoever cometh to me, and heareth my sayings, and doeth them, I will shew you to whom he is like: Luk 6:48 He is like a man which built an house, and digged deep, and laid the foundation on a rock: and when the flood arose, the stream beat vehemently upon that house, and could not shake it: for it was founded upon a rock. Luk 6:49 But he that heareth, and doeth not, is like a man that without a foundation built an house upon the earth; against which the stream did beat vehemently, and immediately it fell; and the ruin of that house was great.
Upon this Rock (My Two Anointed/Christ), which Peter is a Type and Shadow of them, We will built the real Last Days' Congregation and the gates of Hades shall not prevail.

For My real Last Days' remnant, will be like Aaron K David, THE VICTORY; for they have known THE FATHER that is from the beginning because now they knew that they are at the beginning with Him in Heavenly Mount Zion. Through Shekinaih together with Aaron K David, THE VICTORY, they are now made strong through Our oracle and have overcome the wicked one and are no more deceived by the apostate who join the company of Antichrist; loving the Cosmos with its lusts of the flesh, lusts of the eyes and its pride of life.(1 Jn 2:14-19)

Mat 16:16 And Simon Peter answered and said, Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living ELOHIM. Mat 16:17 And Jesus answered and said unto him, Blessed art thou, Simon Barjona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven. Mat 16:18 And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it. Mat 16:19 And I will give unto thee the keys of the kingdom of heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.

But for those who are presumptuous and continue in their gainsaying against My Two Representatives, after We have revealed them in plain sight, they shall not escape the troubles which through their mouth will bring when they smite the earth with a curse. (Mal 4:4-6)
Through their mouth, We will shake not only the earth, but also the Cosmoses. We will remove those things that are made, that those things which We begat and formed through them may remain.
Wherefore humble yourselves before them that you may find grace and serve Us acceptably with reverence and godly fear for they are Our consuming fire. (Heb 12:18-28)
Again, I reinstate, they represent Us and are the Chief of Spiritual Zion and are a Rock of Offence to those disobedient who shall be offended by Our oracle through them.

1Pe 2:1 Wherefore laying aside all malice, and all guile, and hypocrisies, and envies, and all evil speakings, 1Pe 2:2 As newborn babes, desire the sincere milk of the word, that ye may grow thereby: 1Pe 2:3 If so be ye have tasted that THE YAHWEH is gracious. 1Pe 2:4 To whom coming, as unto a living stone, disallowed indeed of men, but chosen of THE ELOHIM, and precious, 1Pe 2:5 Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house, an holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to THE ELOHIM by Jesus Christ. 1Pe 2:6 Wherefore also it is contained in the scripture, Behold, I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believeth on him shall not be confounded. 1Pe 2:7 Unto you therefore which believe he is precious: but unto them which be disobedient, the stone which the builders disallowed, the same is made the head of the corner, 1Pe 2:8 And a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence, even to them which stumble at the word, being disobedient: whereunto also they were appointed.

THEREBY, REPENT! REPENT! FOR YOUR OBSTINATE CONDITION FOR THE FULLNESS OF TIME IS NOW! MY GLORY SHALL BE REVEALED THROUGH MY TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY (SHEKINAIH, REPRESENTING THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT, AARON K DAVID, REPRESENTING JESUS); AND ALL FLESH SHALL SEE IT TOGETHER. FOR SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID, ARE OUR MOUTH PIECE, THE SPIRIT OF THE YAHWEH, AND THE WORD OF THE ELOHIM, AS ONE.
FOR BEHOLD! THE TIME HAS NOW COME FOR Us TO REVEAL OURSELVES TO OUR CREATION, THE GREAT AND DREADFUL OF WHAT THAT HAD BEEN FORETOLD OF LONG AGO, MUST NOW TAKE PLACE WITH LIGHTNING SPEED.
THEREFORE, YOU NEED TO SEARCH YOUR HEARTS TO REFLECT ALL YOUR ACCOUNT OF REBELLION AND IGNORANCE WHICH LEAD YOU TO WHERE YOU ARE TODAY.
PROSTRATE BEFORE ME (Us) TO REPENT OF YOUR SINS, AND BRING FRUITS WORTHY FOR SINCERE REPENTANCE; THAT YOU MAY BE SPARED FROM BEING DESTROYED UTTERLY.

Isa 40:1 Comfort ye, comfort ye my people, saith your ELOHIM. Isa 40:2 Speak ye comfortably to Jerusalem, and cry unto her, that her hardship (H6635) is accomplished, that her iniquity is pardoned: for she hath received of THE YAHWEH'S hand double for all her sins. Isa 40:3 The voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of THE YAHWEH, make straight in the desert a highway for our ELOHIM. Isa 40:4 Every valley shall be exalted, and every mountain and hill shall be made low: and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough places plain: Isa 40:5 And the glory of THE ELOHIM shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it together: for the mouth of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it. Isa 40:6 The voice said, Cry. And he said, What shall I cry? All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: Isa 40:7 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because The Spirit of THE YAHWEH bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. Isa 40:8 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word of our ELOHIM shall stand for ever.

title:
PART 1 
BEHOLD! I WILL SEND MY MESSENGER!

segments.text:
PART 1 
BEHOLD! I WILL SEND MY MESSENGER!

title:
SECTION A 
IT'S APPEARANCE AND/OR ITS WAYS

segments.text:
SECTION A 
IT'S APPEARANCE AND/OR ITS WAYS

title:
Chapter 1 
Synchronise With All Times

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Synchronise With All Times

THE FATHER: Synchronization is the coordination of events to operate a system in unison. I, THE FATHER like a conductor of an orchestra, is synchronizing many happenings and prophecies in the Old Testament, New Testament and the Book of Revelation; to be in time with My Acceptable Time; I called, "NOW".
What happened and prophesied in the Old Testament, New Testament and the Book of Revelation will be enacted in a new way by the chosen people of the last days.

I am merging the past, present, the future; into the time table of heaven; called, "Now". This is The Hour, The Moment, the Time of the Preparation of The Grand Finale, where all the saints in heaven and angels, are witnessing The Preparation of the Real sons of THE ELOHIM in the "COMING".

Shekinaih: I see a vision of sportsmen on a running track. In a sprinting posture, they are making ready to run a race. I saw JESUS with a gun, and as he pulled the trigger, everyone starts to run toward the finishing line. The track that they were on, has the words, "Preparation of the Anointed/Bride", written on it.

I see the spirits of the saints of the Old Testament; those from the New Testament; and the people that were involved in the Book of Revelation; all now merge into one run on this track. They were ready to press into the kingdom of heaven by force, so as to occupy the thrones that are prepared for them before the foundations of the Cosmoses. (Heb 12:1-2)

THE FATHER: Cloud of witnesses! Run as for a prize without looking back till you finish this race. All the prophecies in the Old Testament, New Testament and those from the Book of Revelation, will be fulfilled in this time, called "Now". The whole creation is waiting for the Manifestation of My sons, to increase heaven's population; so as to decrease souls from going to hell. This is the mission of Crowned Eagles Global. The time called "Now", is the Acceptable Time when I, THE FATHER will show mercy to those who are called to be restored as My sons.
Psa 69:13 But as for me, My prayer is unto thee, O THE YAHWEH, in an acceptable (H7522 "ratson") time: O THE ELOHIM, in the multitude of thy mercy hear me, in the truth of thy salvation.
This is the appointed time when they shall be helped and preserved by the Angel of Our Presence, and given the authority and power to establish the earth, and to inherit the kingdoms of the world.

Rev 11:15 And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this Cosmos are become the kingdoms of our YAHWEH, and of his Christ; and he shall reign for ever and ever.

They shall be tended in OUR WAY and be exalted in high position. They shall not hunger nor thirst; neither shall the heat nor sun smite them: for the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, shall hath mercy on them, and shall guide them. Our Two Angels shall gather them from all nations and lead them to walk in the highway of holiness and exalt them. Our Two Angels shall have mercy on them and comfort them for all the affliction they had suffered for the sake of the kingdom. No more shall they said, THE YAHWEH hath forsaken them, and THE ADONAI hath forgotten them; for THE TRINITY shall incarnate/reincarnate themselves in Shekinaih and Aaron K David and shall show them compassion.

Isa 49:8 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, In an acceptable (H7522 "ratson") time have I heard thee, and in a day of salvation have I helped thee: and I will preserve thee, and give thee for a covenant of the people, to establish the earth, to cause to inherit the desolate heritages; Isa 49:9 That thou mayest say to the prisoners, Go forth; to them that are in darkness, Shew yourselves. They shall tend (H7462 "raah") in the ways, and their flocks (H4830 "miriyth") shall be in all high places. Isa 49:10 They shall not hunger nor thirst; neither shall the heat nor sun smite them: for he that hath mercy on them shall lead them, even by the springs of water shall he guide them. Isa 49:11 And I will make all my mountains a way, and my highways shall be exalted. Isa 49:12 Behold, these shall come from far: and, lo, these from the north and from the west; and these from the land of Sinim. Isa 49:13 Sing, O heavens; and be joyful, O earth; and break forth into singing, O mountains: for THE YAHWEH hath comforted his people, and will have mercy upon his afflicted. Isa 49:14 But Zion said, THE YAHWEH hath forsaken me, and my ADONAI hath forgotten me. Isa 49:15 Can a woman forget her sucking child, that she should not have compassion on the son of her womb? Yea, they may forget, yet will I not forget thee.

Shekinaih, the spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH, who is THE HOLY SPIRIT, shall anoint My son, Aaron K David, who is the reincarnation of JESUS; and you shall preach the everlasting gospel of peace to the 7,000 Anointed Ones who are made meek through afflictions.

I, THE FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and through JESUS in David, shall bind up the brokenhearted and shall set them free from the stronghold of their reasoning and from the high things of Satan, the falsifier.
Shekinaih and you shall proclaim the Acceptable Year of THE YAHWEH and show mercy and help those who are called to be in the army of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.

In the end of the age, they shall pass judgment on the Antichrist Nations in the Day of Our Vengeance. The Angel of His Presence shall comfort spiritual Zion and anoint them with the oil of gladness and the garment of praise and the sorrowful spirit shall no more attach to them; for they have become holy as priest of THE YAHWEH. The Angel of His Presence shall greatly reward them and they shall eat the riches of the nations and possess everlasting joy.

Isa 61:1 The Spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH is upon me; because THE YAHWEH hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek; he hath sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to them that are bound; Isa 61:2 To proclaim the acceptable year of THE YAHWEH, and the day of vengeance of our ELOHIM; to comfort all that mourn; Isa 61:3 To appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness, the planting of THE YAHWEH, that he might be glorified. Isa 61:4 And they shall build the old wastes, they shall raise up the former desolations, and they shall repair the waste cities, the desolations of many generations. Isa 61:5 And strangers shall stand and feed your flocks, and the sons of the alien shall be your plowmen and your vinedressers. Isa 61:6 But ye shall be named the Priests of THE YAHWEH: men shall call you the Ministers of our ELOHIM: ye shall eat the riches of the Gentiles, and in their glory shall ye boast yourselves. Isa 61:7 For your shame ye shall have double; and for confusion they shall rejoice in their portion: therefore in their land they shall possess the double: everlasting joy shall be unto them.

The Book of Ecclesiastes is specially written for My sons; and I through you, are their King/ The Preacher, The Teacher of Righteousness, that brings prophetic early and the latter rain for My wheat Brides and the Anointed barley.

Therefore. My sons ought to take heed of Our advice regarding the vanity of this present life; and fear Us and keep Our commands through Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence; for We shall bring everything into judgment; every secret things, whether it be good and evil; as Shekinaih and you shall sit on the Great White Throne as the Judge and Sub Judge respectively, to judge the dead and the living on Our behalf. (Please read Book 4, The Great White Throne for Revelation)

Ecc 1:12 I the Preacher, (H6953 "qoheleth" from H6950 "qahal") was king over Israel in Jerusalem. Ecc 1:13 And I gave my heart to seek and search out by wisdom concerning everyone that work under heaven: this evil (H7451 "ra") employment (H6041 "inyan") hath THE ELOHIM given to the sons of Adam to be abased (H6031 "anah") therewith.
To every one of My sons, the sons of Adam, what is going to happen to them, will be unfolded in its time, to the end that they may be approved and be manifested as My sons in the appointed time.

title: A time to be born, and a time to die;

segments.text: A time to be born, and a time to die;
This is the time, they shall be born from above to be a Spiritual Esther, a deliverer from Zion.

Est 4:13 Then Mordecai commanded to answer Esther, Think not with thyself that thou shalt escape in the king's house, more than all the Jews. Est 4:14 For if thou altogether holdest thy peace at this time, then shall there enlargement and deliverance arise to the Jews from another place; but thou and thy father's house shall be destroyed: and who knoweth whether thou art come to the kingdom for such a time as this?
This is the time, like My SON, JESUS, and My Faithful Witness, they shall be martyred and be made kings of the earth.

Rev 1:5 And from Jesus Christ, who is the faithful witness, and the first begotten of the dead, and the prince of the kings of the earth. Unto him that loved us, and washed us from our sins in his own blood, Rev 1:6 And hath made us kings and priests unto THE ELOHIM and his Father; to him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

title:
A time to plant, 
and a time to pluck up that which is planted;

segments.text:
A time to plant, 
and a time to pluck up that which is planted;
This is the time when they shall be sown as sons of THE ELOHIM by you, the sower, and this is the time, when the harvest is white, you shall pluck them up and gather them into My storehouse.

Mat 13:24 Another parable put he forth unto them, saying, The kingdom of heaven is likened unto a man which sowed good seed in his field: Mat 13:25 But while men slept, his enemy came and sowed tares among the wheat, and went his way. Mat 13:26 But when the blade was sprung up, and brought forth fruit, then appeared the tares also. Mat 13:27 So the servants of the householder came and said unto him, Sir, didst not thou sow good seed in thy field? from whence then hath it tares? Mat 13:28 He said unto them, An enemy hath done this. The servants said unto him, Wilt thou then that we go and gather them up? Mat 13:29 But he said, Nay; lest while ye gather up the tares, ye root up also the wheat with them. Mat 13:30 Let both grow together until the harvest: and in the time of harvest I will say to the reapers, Gather ye together first the tares, and bind them in bundles to burn them: but gather the wheat into my barn.

title: A time to kill, and a time to heal;

segments.text: A time to kill, and a time to heal;

This is the time, when many will be killed by the Antichrist. This is the time, when many will be healed and resurrected by the spirit of life through the shout of THE HOLY SPIRIT in unison with The Angel of THE YAHWEH respectively through both Shekinaih and you..

Rev 11:7 And when they shall have finished their testimony, the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them, and shall overcome them, and kill them. Rev 11:8 And their dead bodies shall lie in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also our YAHWEH was crucified. Rev 11:9 And they of the people and kindreds and tongues and nations shall see their dead bodies three days and an half, and shall not suffer their dead bodies to be put in graves. Rev 11:10 And they that dwell upon the earth shall rejoice over them, and make merry, and shall send gifts one to another; because these two prophets tormented them that dwelt on the earth. Rev 11:11 And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from THE ELOHIM entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them. Rev 11:12 And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them.

1Th 4:15 For this we say unto you by the oracle/spokesman (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought) of THE YAHWEH, that we which are alive and remain unto the coming of THE YAHWEH shall not prevent them which are asleep. 1Th 4:16 For THE YAHWEH himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of THE ELOHIM: and the dead in Christ shall rise first: 1Th 4:17 Then we which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet THE YAHWEH in the air: and so shall we ever be with THE YAHWEH.

title: A time to break down, and a time to build up;

segments.text: A time to break down, and a time to build up;
This is the time, when the old man in them, will be broken by the chastisement of THE FATHER through further tribulations, so as to be made lowly and contrite to be His resting place.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? Isa 66:2 For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith THE YAHWEH: but to this man will I look, even to him that is poor and of a contrite spirit, and trembleth at my word.

This is the time, when their spirit man will be healed, build up and restored thoroughly; and their hope made steadfast; and their faith strengthen; and their fruits consolidated, to become a quickening spirit.

1Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world. 1Pe 5:10 But the THE ELOHIM of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you.

1Co 15:43 It is sown in dishonour; it is raised in glory: it is sown in weakness; it is raised in power: 1Co 15:44 It is sown a natural body; it is raised a spiritual body. There is a natural body, and there is a spiritual body. 1Co 15:45 And so it is written, The first man Adam was made a living soul; the last Adam was made a quickening spirit.

title: A time to weep, and a time to laugh;

segments.text: A time to weep, and a time to laugh;

This is the time, when they shall weep, as they sow in righteousness in their corruptible and dishonored body, in all its weaknesses. This is the time, when they will laugh with joy unspeakable, as they reap the robe of glory.

Psa 126:1 A Song of ascent (H4609 "maalah". When THE YAHWEH turned again the captivity of Zion, we were like them that dream. Psa 126:2 Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing: then said they among the heathen, THE YAHWEH hath done great things for them. Psa 126:3 THE YAHWEH hath done great things for us; whereof we are glad. Psa 126:4 Turn again our captivity, O YAHWEH, as the streams in the south. Psa 126:5 They that sow in tears shall reap in joy. Psa 126:6 He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing precious seed, shall doubtless come again with rejoicing, bringing his sheaves with him.

1Pe 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM and Father of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead, 1Pe 1:4 To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you, 1Pe 1:5 Who are kept by the power of THE ELOHIM through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time. 1Pe 1:6 Wherein ye greatly rejoice, though now for a season, if need be, ye are in heaviness through manifold temptations: 1Pe 1:7 That the trial of your faith, being much more precious than of gold that perisheth, though it be tried with fire, might be found unto praise and honour and glory at the appearing of Jesus Christ: 1Pe 1:8 Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see him not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory:

title: A time to mourn, and a time to dance;

segments.text: A time to mourn, and a time to dance;

This is the time, when they shall mourn because of disappointment, disgrace, humiliation, tribulation, oppression, they receive from Satan, the adversary. This is the time, when they will dance with joy as a bride with the bridegroom, my SON, JESUS in the bridal chamber after they had overcome.

Isa 61:1 The Spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH is upon me; because THE YAHWEH hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek; he hath sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to them that are bound; Isa 61:2 To proclaim the acceptable year of THE YAHWEH, and the day of vengeance of our ELOHIM; to comfort all that mourn; Isa 61:3 To appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness, the planting of THE YAHWEH, that he might be glorified.

title:
A time to cast away stones, 
and a time to gather stones together;

segments.text:
A time to cast away stones, 
and a time to gather stones together;

This is the time, when the stumbling blocks of the Self-Righteous Spiritual Pharisees and Sadducees (Religious Organizations) are cast away from them so that they no more trust in the arm of flesh but put their trust in THE YAHWEH and turn to His way with a contrite and humble spirit.

Isa 57:12 I will declare thy righteousness, and thy works; for they shall not profit thee. Isa 57:13 When thou criest, let thy companies deliver thee; but the wind shall carry them all away; vanity shall take them: but he that putteth his trust in me shall possess the land, and shall inherit my holy mountain; Isa 57:14 And shall say, Cast ye up, cast ye up, prepare the way, take up the stumblingblock out of the way of my people. Isa 57:15 For thus saith the high and lofty One that inhabiteth eternity, whose name is Holy; I dwell in the high and holy place, with him also that is of a contrite and humble spirit, to revive the spirit of the humble, and to revive the heart of the contrite ones. Isa 57:16 For I will not contend for ever, neither will I be always wroth: for the spirit should fail before me, and the souls which I have made.
This is the time, when they shall be gathered as lively stones to be part of Heavenly Jerusalem.
1Pe 2:5 Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house, an holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to THE ELOHIM by Jesus Christ.

title:
a time to embrace, 
and a time to refrain from embracing;

segments.text:
a time to embrace, 
and a time to refrain from embracing;

This is the time, when they will embrace THE HOLY SPIRIT and exalt her and fasten onto her discipline and be promoted, honored and anointed with wisdom, glory and eternal life where their steps shall not be straitened.

Pro 4:7 Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get wisdom: and with all thy getting get understanding. Pro 4:8 Exalt her, and she shall promote thee: she shall bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her. Pro 4:9 She shall give to thine head an ornament of grace: a crown of glory shall she deliver to thee. Pro 4:10 Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; and the years of thy life shall be many. Pro 4:11 I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in right paths. Pro 4:12 When thou goest, thy steps shall not be straitened; and when thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.

This is the time, when they will no more embrace the strange Woman Mystery Babylon, and to commit spiritual adultery with the world; in the lust of the flesh, lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, and be led astray in ungodliness.

Pro 5:20 And why wilt thou, my son, be ravished with a strange woman, and embrace the bosom of a stranger? Pro 5:21 For the ways of man are before the eyes of THE YAHWEH, and he pondereth all his goings. Pro 5:22 His own iniquities shall take the wicked himself, and he shall be holden with the cords of his sins. Pro 5:23 He shall die without instruction; and in the greatness of his folly he shall go astray.

title:
A time to seek (H1245 "baqash"), 
and a time to lose/perish (H6 "abad");

segments.text:
A time to seek (H1245 "baqash"), 
and a time to lose/perish (H6 "abad");

This is the time, when they will seek and pursue to bear the peaceable fruit of righteousness, by going through the strait gate of tribulation, so as to be able to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM with eternal life, and seeing the goodness of THE YAHWEH.

Psa 34:12 What man is he that desireth life, and loveth many days, that he may see good? Psa 34:13 Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile. Psa 34:14 Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.

Mat 6:32 (For after all these things do the Gentiles seek) for your heavenly Father knoweth that ye have need of all these things. Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you. Mat 6:34 Take therefore no thought for the morrow: for the morrow shall take thought for the things of itself. Sufficient unto the day is the evil thereof.

This is the time when they will lose their soul life as they permit Me to crucify their old man with its emotions and lusts; through persecutions, disgrace, betrayal, rejection by friends and loved ones, be excluded from their company and be forgotten in their heart.

Psa 31:10 For my life is spent with grief, and my years with sighing: my strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are consumed. Psa 31:11 I was a reproach among all mine enemies, but especially among my neighbours, and a fear to mine acquaintance: they that did see me without fled from me. Psa 31:12 I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind: I am like a broken vessel. Psa 31:13 For I have heard the slander of many: fear was on every side: while they took counsel together against me, they devised to take away my life.

Mat 10:34 Think not that I am come to send peace on earth: I came not to send peace, but a sword. Mat 10:35 For I am come to set a man at variance against his father, and the daughter against her mother, and the daughter in law against her mother in law. Mat 10:36 And a man's foes shall be they of his own household. Mat 10:37 He that loveth father or mother more than me is not worthy of me: and he that loveth son or daughter more than me is not worthy of me. Mat 10:38 And he that taketh not his cross, and followeth after me, is not worthy of me. Mat 10:39 He that findeth his life shall lose it: and he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.

title:
A time to keep (H8104 "shamar" beware, take heed), 
and a time to cast away (H7993 "shalak" throw)

segments.text:
A time to keep (H8104 "shamar" beware, take heed), 
and a time to cast away (H7993 "shalak" throw)

This is the time, when they will keep My Covenant and My way and take heed to THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF THEIR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE SHALL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, and obey their command so that they can receive their throne.

Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries. Exo 23:23 For mine Angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the Amorites, and the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites: and I will cut them off.
Psa 103:18 To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them. Psa 103:19 THE YAHWEH hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all.
This is the time, when they shall cast away all their lawlessness and with a new heart and a new spirit submit to Our offences through Our Name, THE ADONAI.

Eze 18:29 Yet saith the house of Israel, The way of THE ADONAI (H136) is not equal. O house of Israel, are not my ways equal? are not your ways unequal? Eze 18:30 Therefore I will judge you, O house of Israel, every one according to his ways, saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH. Repent, and turn yourselves from all your transgressions; so iniquity shall not be your ruin. Eze 18:31 Cast away from you all your transgressions, whereby ye have transgressed; and make you a new heart and a new spirit: for why will ye die, O house of Israel?

title: A time to rend, and a time to sew;

segments.text: A time to rend, and a time to sew;

This is the time, when they will be surrendered to Satan, to be tested and have their heart rent by reproach, through persecutions and tribulations from enemies, and friends who are carnally minded and who are not acquainted with My chastening.

Job 16:9 He teareth me in his wrath, who hateth me: he gnasheth upon me with his teeth; mine enemy sharpeneth his eyes upon me. Job 16:10 They have gaped upon me with their mouth; they have smitten me upon the cheek reproachfully; they have gathered themselves together against me. Job 16:11 THE ELOHIM hath delivered me to the ungodly, and turned me over into the hands of the wicked. Job 16:12 I was at ease, but he hath broken me asunder: he hath also taken me by my neck, and shaken me to pieces, and set me up for his mark. Job 16:13 His archers compass me round about, he cleaveth my reins asunder, and doth not spare; he poureth out my gall upon the ground. Job 16:14 He breaketh me with breach upon breach, he runneth upon me like a giant. Job 16:15 I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin, and defiled my horn in the dust. Job 16:16 My face is foul with weeping, and on my eyelids is the shadow of death; Job 16:17 Not for any injustice in mine hands: also my prayer is pure. Job 16:18 O earth, cover not thou my blood, and let my cry have no place. Job 16:19 Also now, behold, my witness is in heaven, and my record is on high. Job 16:20 My friends scorn me: but mine eye poureth out tears unto THE ELOHIM. Job 16:21 O that one might plead for a man with THE ELOHIM, as a man pleadeth for his neighbour! Job 16:22 When a few years are come, then I shall go the way whence I shall not return.

Psa 35:11 False witnesses did rise up; they laid to my charge things that I knew not. Psa 35:12 They rewarded me evil for good to the spoiling of my soul. Psa 35:13 But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth: I humbled my soul with fasting; and my prayer returned into mine own bosom. Psa 35:14 I behaved myself as though he had been my friend or brother: I bowed down heavily, as one that mourneth for his mother. Psa 35:15 But in mine adversity they rejoiced, and gathered themselves together: yea, the abjects gathered themselves together against me, and I knew it not; they did tear me, and ceased not: Psa 35:16 With hypocritical mockers in feasts, they gnashed upon me with their teeth. Psa 35:17 Lord, how long wilt thou look on? rescue my soul from their destructions, my darling from the lions.

This is the time, when they will be sewed up and revived by you, the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, The Morning, The Sun of Righteousness with healing in your wings, by your prophetic rain doctrine as the Teacher of Righteousness.

Mal 4:1 For, behold, the day cometh, that shall burn as an oven; and all the proud, yea, and all that do wickedly, shall be stubble: and the day that cometh shall burn them up, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, that it shall leave them neither root nor branch. Mal 4:2 But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings; and ye shall go forth, and grow up as calves of the stall. Mal 4:3 And ye shall tread down the wicked; for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet in the day that I shall do this, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 4:4 Remember ye the law of Moses my servant, which I commanded unto him in Horeb for all Israel, with the statutes and judgments.

Hos 6:1 Come, and let us return unto THE YAHWEH: for he hath torn, and he will sew (H7495 "rapha" mend, to stitch back); he hath smitten, and he will bind us up. Hos 6:2 After two days will he revive us: in the third day he will raise us up, and we shall live in his presence. Hos 6:3 Then shall we know, if we follow on to know THE YAHWEH: his going forth is prepared as the morning (H7837 "shachar"); and he shall come unto us as the rain, as the latter and former rain unto the earth.

title: A time to keep silence, and a time to speak;

segments.text: A time to keep silence, and a time to speak;
This is the time, during their infancy, matters concerning them will be kept silent; so as to protect them from the Antichrist Nations of Red Dragon/Lucifer.

Psa 83:3 They have taken crafty counsel against thy people, and consulted against thy hidden ones. Psa 83:4 They have said, Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation; that the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.

This is the time, when they are spiritually of full age; despite persecution and tribulations, what they heard from THE HOLY SPIRIT in darkness, they will speak aloud upon the house top without fear of death.

Psa 39:1 To the chief Musician, even to Jeduthun, A Psalm of David. I said, I will take heed to my ways, that I sin not with my tongue: I will keep my mouth with a bridle, while the wicked is before me. Psa 39:2 I was dumb with silence, I held my peace, even from good; and my sorrow was stirred. Psa 39:3 My heart was hot within me, while I was musing the fire burned: then spake I with my tongue,

Mat 10:26 Fear them not therefore: for there is nothing covered, that shall not be revealed; and hid, that shall not be known. Mat 10:27 What I tell you in darkness, that speak ye in light: and what ye hear in the ear, that preach ye upon the housetops. Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna (G1067 "geenna')l.

title: A time to love, and a time to hate;

segments.text: A time to love, and a time to hate;
This is the time, when they will be genuinely loving Us, THE TRINITY by loving those that are begotten of Us.

1Jn 5:1 Whosoever believeth that Jesus is the Christ is born of THE ELOHIM: and every one that loveth him that begat loveth him also that is begotten of him. 1Jn 5:2 By this we know that we love the children of THE ELOHIM, when we love THE ELOHIM, and keep his commandments.
This is also the time, they will hate spiritual Edom, the Synagogue of Satan who called themselves Jews and are not, but are workers of lawlessness and deceitful men.

Mal 1:1 The burden (H4853 "massa" a burden in prophetic song, utterance,) of the oracle (spokesman) of THE YAHWEH to Israel by Malachi (H4401 "malakiy" my messenger). Mal 1:2 I have loved you, saith THE YAHWEH. Yet ye say, Wherein hast thou loved us? Was not Esau Jacob's brother? saith THE YAHWEH: yet I loved Jacob, Mal 1:3 And I hated Esau, and laid his mountains and his heritage waste for the dragons of the wilderness. Mal 1:4 Whereas Edom saith, We are impoverished, but we will return and build the desolate places; thus saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTHs, They shall build, but I will throw down; and they shall call them, The border of wickedness, and, The people against whom THE YAHWEH hath indignation for ever.
This is also the time, they will hate the lawless and unrighteous ministers who boast and teach false doctrines and persecute My anointed sons.

Psa 5:5 The boaster (H1984 "halal") shall not stand in thy sight: thou hatest all workers of iniquity. Psa 5:6 Thou shalt destroy them that speak falsehood (H3577 "kazab"): THE YAHWEH will abhor the bloody and deceitful man.

Psa 139:20 For they speak against thee wickedly, and thine enemies take thy name in vain. Psa 139:21 Do not I hate them, O YAHWEH, that hate thee? and am not I grieved with those that rise up against thee? Psa 139:22 I hate them with perfect hatred: I count them mine enemies. Psa 139:23 Search me, O EL, and know my heart: try me, and know my thoughts: Psa 139:24 And see if there be any wicked way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.

title: A time of war (H4421 "milchamah"), and a time of peace.

segments.text: A time of war (H4421 "milchamah"), and a time of peace.

This is the time, when they shall be established as horse of deliverance against the day of battle, prophesying Our judgment, and will not be discharged from the armies (Synagogue of Satan/ Edomites) of the beast/Antichrist who will make war with them.

Pro 21:30 There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against THE YAHWEH. Pro 21:31 the horse is established (H3559 "kun") against the day of battle: but the deliverance (H8668 "teshuah") is of THE YAHWEH.

Psa 120:1 A Song of ascents. In my distress I cried unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me. Psa 120:2 Deliver my soul, O YAHWEH, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue. Psa 120:3 What shall be given unto thee? or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue? Psa 120:4 Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper. Psa 120:5 Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech that I dwell in the tents of Kedar! Psa 120:6 My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace. Psa 120:7 I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.

Ecc 8:6 Because to every purpose there is time and judgment, therefore the adversity (H7451 "ra") of Adam (H120) is great upon him. Ecc 8:7 For he knoweth not that which shall be: for who can tell him when it shall be? Ecc 8:8 There is no Adam that hath power over the spirit to retain the spirit; neither hath he power in the day of death: and there is no discharge in that war; neither shall wickedness deliver those that are given to it.

Rev 11:7 And when they shall have finished their testimony, the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them, and shall overcome them, and kill them. Rev 11:8 And their dead bodies shall lie in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also our Lord was crucified.
This is the time, when they shall reign in peace, in the order of Melchisedec, to be the priest of the supreme EL after they are resurrected and return to Me who is the source of their origin.

Heb 7:1 For this Melchisedec, king of Salem, priest of the most high EL, who met Abraham returning from the slaughter of the kings, and blessed him; Heb 7:2 To whom also Abraham gave a tenth part of all; first being by interpretation King of righteousness, and after that also King of Salem, which is, King of peace; Heb 7:3 Without father, without mother, without descent, having neither beginning of days, nor end of life; but made like unto the Son of THE ELOHIM; abideth a priest continually.

Ecc 3:9 What profit hath he that worketh in that wherein he laboureth? Ecc 3:10 I have seen the employment (H6041 "inyan"), which THE ELOHIM hath given to the sons of Adam to be abased (H6031 "anah") in it. Ecc 3:11 He hath made everyone (sons of Adam) comely (H3303 "yapheh") in his time: also he hath set the eternity in their heart, so that no man can find out the work that THE ELOHIM maketh from the beginning to the end. Ecc 3:12 I know that there is no good in them, but for a man to rejoice, and to do good in his life. Ecc 3:13 And also that every Adam should eat and drink, and enjoy the good of all his labour, it is the gift of THE ELOHIM. Ecc 3:14 I know that, whatsoever THE ELOHIM doeth, it shall be forever: nothing can be put to it, nor any thing taken from it: and THE ELOHIM doeth it, that Adam should fear before him. Ecc 3:15 That which hath been is now; and that which is to be hath already been; and THE ELOHIM searcheth (H1245 "baqash") those who run after (H7291 "radaph" pursue).
All the above passion which I have given to My sons, the sons of Adam to experience, will take place in order that they may be abased, and be made comely for eternity's sake.
I the script writer, who scripted the past, present and future, had scripted My final script with the same plot for the grand finale, and had ordained them to take place in My acceptable time.
The things that happened to the saints of old, will again be enacted with greater manifestation in wisdom, authority and power in the close of this evil age.
Will you pursue to be the main actors of this masterpiece script in My acceptable time?

title:
Chapter 2 
Undercover/Hidden During Infancy

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Undercover/Hidden During Infancy
Job 3:23 Why is light given to a Champion (H1397 "geber") whose way is hid, and whom THE ELOAH hath hedged in (H5526 "sakak" cover up)?

JESUS: During the preparation stage, Like Moses, these champion sons of Adam, My brothers/sisters, will be hidden from the knowledge of the Antichrist until they are ready to be exhibited as deliverers out of Heavenly Mount Zion.

Like John the baptizer, they will grow and wax strong in the spirit in the desert of testing till the day of their showing unto spiritual Israel. (Luk 1:80). Like Me, they will be set apart, protected and preserved before their ministry (Mat 2:1-23).

Some at present are still living undercover serving as great general in Pharaoh's/Antichrist army until My FATHER turn their hearts (Prov 21:1) to sympathize with the suffering of their brothers and defend them secretly from their oppressors.

Like Moses, they will be exposed and betrayed by those whom they are trying to help, and will end up wallowing in self-pity and enter into oblivion until they are called by the Angel of Our Presence, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, IS THE ELIJAH THAT IS TO COME.

Exo 2:10 And the child grew, and she brought him unto Pharaoh's daughter, and he became her son. And she called his name Moses: and she said, Because I drew him out of the water. Exo 2:11 And it came to pass in those days, when Moses became great (H1431 "gadal"), that he went out unto his brethren, and looked on their burdens: and he spied an Egyptian smiting an Hebrew, one of his brethren. Exo 2:12 And he looked this way and that way, and when he saw that there was no man, he slew the Egyptian, and hid him in the sand. Exo 2:13 And when he went out the second day, behold, two men of the Hebrews strove together: and he said to him that did the wrong, Wherefore smitest thou thy fellow? Exo 2:14 And he said, Who made thee a prince and a judge over us? Intendest thou to kill me, as thou killedst the Egyptian? And Moses feared, and said, Surely this thing is known. Exo 2:15 Now when Pharaoh heard this thing, he sought to slay Moses. But Moses fled from the face of Pharaoh, and dwelt in the land of Midian: and he sat down by a well.

Some at present, are elite in Christendom but are half spiritual dead. Like Saul, they had been raised up as a Pharisee in the synagogue of Satan and are exceedingly zealous of the traditions of their spiritual fathers.
