They will persecute their own brothers ignorantly out of Self-Righteousness, until being confronted by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, and told of their source of origin. These will also end up in the wilderness of deep searching until they are convicted that their righteousness is counted as dung to Us. These also will be willing to be reconciled with their brothers who are in Christ like Saul who became Paul. (Gal 1:12- 2:2)

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, shall gather them. Their calling are hidden from the knowledge of most people except for those who are wise and fear Us. These sons of Adam are the hidden ones in Psalms 83:3 whom Satan in the last days will deliberate crafty counsel against them with the nations that are confederated with her. They will try to cut them off from the nation to prevent them from ruling with Me in the age to come. But these nations that united under the Antichrist will be overcame by Us through Shekinaih and you, with our glorified hidden ones in the day of THE YAHWEH.

Psa 83:1 A Song or Psalm of Asaph (H623 "asaph" gatherer). Keep not thou silence, O THE ELOHIM: hold not thy peace, and be not still, O THE EL. Psa 83:2 For, lo, thine haters (H341 "oyeb") make a tumult: and they that hate thee have lifted up the head. Psa 83:3 They have taken crafty counsel against thy people, and consulted against thy hidden ones. Psa 83:4 They have said, Come, and let us cut them off from the nation; that the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance. Psa 83:5 For they have consulted together with one consent: they are confederate against thee: Psa 83:6 The tabernacles of Edom, and the Ishmaelites; of Moab, and the Hagarenes; Psa 83:7 Gebal, and Ammon, and Amalek; the Philistines with the inhabitants of Tyre; Psa 83:8 Assur also is joined with them: they have holpen the children of Lot. Selah. Psa 83:9 Do unto them as unto the Midianites; as to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the brook of Kison: Psa 83:10 Which perished at Endor: they became as dung for the earth. Psa 83:11 Make their nobles like Oreb, and like Zeeb: yea, all their princes as Zebah, and as Zalmunna: Psa 83:12 Who said, Let us take to ourselves the houses of THE ELOHIM in possession. Psa 83:13 O my ELOHIM, make them like a wheel; as the stubble before the wind. Psa 83:14 As the fire burneth a wood, and as the flame setteth the mountains on fire; Psa 83:15 So persecute them with thy tempest, and make them afraid with thy storm. Psa 83:16 Fill their faces with shame; that they may seek thy name, O THE YAHWEH. Psa 83:17 Let them be confounded and troubled forever; yea, let them be put to shame, and perish: Psa 83:18 That men may know that thou, whose name alone is YAHWEH, art the most high over all the earth.
The nations mentioned in Psalms 83 have hybridized themselves.

The tabernacles of Edom, are the Arabs that are now ruling Mexico, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Africa, London, United States of America and Germany; and they report to the British Monarchy in Buckingham Palace.

The tabernacles of the Ishmaelite, are the Arabs that are ruling the Middle Eastern Mediterranean countries. The tabernacles of Moab are the Arabs ruling Jordan. The tabernacles of Hagarenes are the Cushite in the Muslim World. The tabernacles of Gebal are the Russians. The tabernacles of Ammon are the Arabs that are ruling Syria. The tabernacles of Amalek are the Arabs ruling in Sudan. The tabernacles of the Philistines and the inhabitants of Tyre are the false Jews in Germany; and Assur/Assyrian is the ruling Monarch in England and her tabernacles are the ruling power in Western and Eastern Europe.

title: Vision of the Queen

segments.text: Vision of the Queen
Shekinaih: I see a vision of two persons bowing down to a Queen sitting on a throne. I see the words, "The Western and Eastern European Countries taking instruction from Buckingham Palace".

JESUS: The Queen signifies The Woman, The Great City which reigns over the kings of the earth. The Ten Nations of Psalms 83 are the ten kings of Revelation 17. These nations who are in league with the Antichrist will be deceived by The Woman and will deliver over their power and authority to the Beast/Antichrist for a season and shall make war with THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE SHE/HE WHO WAS AND IS AND IS TO COME; and Our resurrected saints, but will be overcome by them. After their defeat, when the Great City is destroyed by earthquakes, these nations will hate the Great City and will invade the city, raping and burning her down.

Rev 17:12 And the ten horns which thou sawest are ten kings, which have received no kingdom as yet; but receive authority as kings one hour with the beast. Rev 17:13 These have one mind, and shall deliver over their power and authority unto the beast. Rev 17:14 These shall make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords, and King of kings: and they that are with him are called, and chosen, and faithful. Rev 17:15 And he saith unto me, The waters which thou sawest, where the whore sitteth, are peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues. Rev 17:16 And the ten horns which thou sawest upon the beast, these shall hate the whore, and shall make her desolate and naked, and shall eat her flesh, and burn her with fire. Rev 17:17 For THE ELOHIM hath put in their hearts to fulfil his will, and to agree, and give their kingdom unto the beast, until the words of THE ELOHIM shall be fulfilled. Rev 17:18 And the woman which thou sawest is that great city, which reigneth over the kings of the earth.

title: Vision of the Battle of Psalms 83

segments.text: Vision of the Battle of Psalms 83

Shekinaih: I see numerous uncountable angels descending with laser beam swords to oppose and resist the enemies that come against the hidden ones. Following, I see a Chinese youth about 17 years old standing in midst of heaven sprinkling powder on the enemies to cause total chaos and confusion in the enemies' camp. They ended up fighting and killing each other. He then shoots his laser gun to cut the earth causing earthquakes. Following, he poured a bucket of water on the earth to wash them away.

JESUS: The above vision is referring to the prophecy of Isaiah 10:1-34. After spiritual Zion (7000 Anointed Ones) and spiritual Jerusalem (144,000 Brides) had been approved by Me after they have come out of the great tribulation from the Antichrist (King of Assyria), My FATHER through the HOLY SPIRIT who is THE ADONAI YAHVIH SABAOTH represented by Shekinaih, will decree to you to co-execute to punish the Antichrist and all his high ones. I in you, as the mighty one, will hewn them down like trees of Lebanon and the burden and the yoke of the Antichrist will be taken off from the shoulder of My children because through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, Our Anointed, the yoke will be destroyed.

Isa 10:12 Wherefore it shall come to pass, that when THE ADONAI hath performed his whole work upon mount Zion and on Jerusalem, I will punish the fruit of the stout heart of the king of Assyria, and the glory of his high looks. …Isa 10:24 Therefore thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH SABAOTH, O my people that dwellest in Zion, be not afraid of the Assyrian: he shall smite thee with a rod, and shall lift up his staff against thee, after the manner of Egypt. Isa 10:25 For yet a very little while, and the indignation shall cease, and mine anger in their destruction. Isa 10:26 And THE YAHWEH SABAOTH shall stir up a scourge for him according to the slaughter of Midian at the rock of Oreb: and as his rod was upon the sea, so shall he lift it up after the manner of Egypt. Isa 10:27 And it shall come to pass in that day, that his burden shall be taken away from off thy shoulder, and his yoke from off thy neck, and the yoke shall be destroyed because of the oil (H8081 "shemen" olive). ….Isa 10:33 Behold, THE ADON, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, shall lop the bough with terror: and the high ones of stature shall be hewn down, and the haughty shall be humbled. Isa 10:34 And he shall cut down the thickets of the forest with iron, and Lebanon shall fall by a mighty one (H117 "addiyr" enlarged one).

The battle by the waters of Megiddo in Judges 5 will be again enacted in the battle of Armageddon in Revelation 17. The stars/angels descending from the heavenly stairway will again fight against the last days' 10 kings as they have fought Sisera's armies in Judges 5 and the Midianites with the Amalekites and all the children of the east in Judges 7. The Chinese boy is you; Metatron the youth. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih will through Me in you, the Angel of my Presence, cause confusion in the enemies' camp and destroyed them as We did to Sisera's armies in Judges 5 and the Midianites with the Amalekites and all the children of the east in Judges 7, by triggering earthquakes and tsunamis as THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih through Me in you, command the sun and the moon to effect a prolonged eclipse of the sun.

Jdg 5:1 Then sang Deborah and Barak the son of Abinoam on that day, saying, Jdg 5:2 Praise ye THE YAHWEH for the avenging of Israel, when the people willingly offered themselves. Jdg 5:3 Hear, O ye kings; give ear, O ye princes; I, even I, will sing unto THE YAHWEH; I will sing praise to THE YAHWEH ELOLIM of Israel. Jdg 5:4 THE YAHWEH, when thou wentest out of Seir, when thou marchedst out of the field of Edom, the earth trembled, and the heavens dropped, the clouds also dropped water. Jdg 5:5 The mountains melted from before THE YAHWEH, even that Sinai from before THE YAHWEH ELOHIM of Israel. …..Jdg 5:19 The kings came and fought, then fought the kings of Canaan in Taanach by the waters of Megiddo; they took no gain of money. Jdg 5:20 They fought from heaven; the stars in their courses fought against Sisera. Jdg 5:21 The river of Kishon swept them away, that ancient river, the river Kishon. O my soul, thou hast trodden down strength. Jdg 5:22 Then were the horsehoofs broken by the means of the pransings, the pransings of their mighty ones. Jdg 5:23 Curse ye Meroz, said the angel of THE YAHWEH, curse ye bitterly the inhabitants thereof; because they came not to the help of THE YAHWEH, to the help of THE YAHWEH against the mighty.

Jdg 7:12 And the Midianites and the Amalekites and all the children of the east lay along in the valley like grasshoppers for multitude; and their camels were without number, as the sand by the sea side for multitude. ……Jdg 7:19 So Gideon, and the hundred men that were with him, came unto the outside of the camp in the beginning of the middle watch; and they had but newly set the watch: and they blew the trumpets, and brake the pitchers that were in their hands. Jdg 7:20 And the three companies blew the trumpets, and brake the pitchers, and held the lamps in their left hands, and the trumpets in their right hands to blow withal: and they cried, The sword of THE YAHWEH, and of Gideon. Jdg 7:21 And they stood every man in his place round about the camp: and all the host ran, and cried, and fled. Jdg 7:22 And the three hundred blew the trumpets, and THE YAHWEH set every man's sword against his fellow, even throughout all the host: and the host fled to Bethshittah in Zererath, and to the border of Abelmeholah, unto Tabbath. Jdg 7:23 And the men of Israel gathered themselves together out of Naphtali, and out of Asher, and out of all Manasseh, and pursued after the Midianites. Jdg 7:24 And Gideon sent messengers throughout all mount Ephraim, saying, Come down against the Midianites, and take before them the waters unto Bethbarah and Jordan. Then all the men of Ephraim gathered themselves together, and took the waters unto Bethbarah and Jordan. Jdg 7:25 And they took two princes of the Midianites, Oreb and Zeeb; and they slew Oreb upon the rock Oreb, and Zeeb they slew at the winepress of Zeeb, and pursued Midian, and brought the heads of Oreb and Zeeb to Gideon on the other side Jordan.

title:
Chapter 3 
Servant Hood Kind of Character During Moulding

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Servant Hood Kind of Character During Moulding
Before My anointed are empowered with spiritual gifts and power to be put into ministry, they must be tested to be counted faithful.
1Ti 1:12 And I thank Christ Jesus our YAHWEH, who hath empower (G1743 "endunamoo") me, for that he counted me faithful, putting me into the ministry (G1248 "diakonia");
The word ministry G1249 "diakonos" means to run on errands like an attendant or a waiter.

My Anointed Ones that are approved by Us must has a servant hood character. They are not to be like some of the ministers of Christendom of today which are leavened with the spirit of hypocrisy; preaching what they do not practice; wearing religious robes to impress others that they are pure and holy but inwardly are unclean as corpse; loving to sit in the uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in every occasion and be greeted with honorifics and titles. (Mat 23:1-12)

On contrary, My true ministers are meek and lowly because their mind and heart had been renovated through the discipline of THE FATHER. Though they are given authority by Us over Our children, they do not lord over them but serve them in sincerity and truth. (Mar 10:42-45)

They take their calling seriously and is helped by Us. Through the discipline of THE FATHER, they have learned to be patient; in tribulations, in necessities, in distress, in stripes, in imprisonments, in tumults, in labors, in watchings and in fastings. They pursue to bear and maintain the fruits of the spirit of purity, longsuffering, kindness, love, and faithfulness. They are not moved when being honored or dishonored. They are not interested when being praised or being evil spoken of. They do not lose their peace when being slandered. Neither do they easily puffed up when being acknowledge and received as Apostles or Prophets. Whether they are famous or not, it does not matter to them anymore, for they have learned to crucify their emotions and lusts.

2Co 6:1 We then, as workers together with him, beseech you also that ye receive not the grace of THE ELOHIM in vain. 2Co 6:2 (For he saith, I have heard thee in a time accepted, and in the day of salvation have I succoured thee: behold, now is the accepted time; behold, now is the day of salvation.) 2Co 6:3 Giving no offence in anything, that the ministry be not blamed: 2Co 6:4 But in all things approving ourselves as the ministers of THE ELOHIM, in much patience, in afflictions, in necessities, in distresses, 2Co 6:5 In stripes, in imprisonments, in tumults, in labours, in watchings, in fastings; 2Co 6:6 By pureness, by knowledge, by longsuffering, by kindness, by the Holy Ghost, by love unfeigned, 2Co 6:7 By the word of truth, by the power of THE ELOHIM, by the armour of righteousness on the right hand and on the left, 2Co 6:8 By honour and dishonor, by evil report and good report: as deceivers, and yet true; 2Co 6:9 As unknown, and yet well known; as dying, and, behold, we live; as chastened, and not killed; 2Co 6:10 As sorrowful, yet I rejoicing; as poor, yet making many rich; as having nothing, and yet possessing all things

They knew that they are ministering spirits sent to earth by THE FATHER to minister to the heirs of salvation, and like Me, they will be subservient to THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, WE SWEAR.
Heb 1:14 Are they not all ministering spirits, sent forth to minister for them who shall be heirs of salvation?

title:
Chapter 4 
OrdinaRy People Least Expected Candidate

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
OrdinaRy People Least Expected Candidate
They are the ordinary people least expected to be My candidate.

Some of these perfected vessels are ordinary individual who have inferiority complex because of their speech impediment. Like Moses, they felt they are not capable to take the task as deliverer for the people of THE ELOHIM.

Exo 4:1 And Moses answered and said, But, behold, they will not believe me, nor hearken unto my voice: for they will say, THE YAHWEH hath not appeared unto thee. Exo 4:10 And Moses said unto THE YAHWEH, O my ADONAI, I am not eloquent, neither heretofore, nor since thou hast spoken unto thy servant: but I am slow of speech, and of a slow tongue.
Others has a sickly and unimpressive appearance and like Paul might be also tongue-tie and easily rejected and despised by the carnal minded.
2Co 10:10 For his letters, say they, are weighty and mighty (G2478 "ischuros"); but his bodily presence is weak, and his speech despised (G1848 "exoutheneo").

Gal 4:13 Ye know how through infirmity of the flesh I preached the gospel unto you at the first. Gal 4:14 And my temptation which was in my flesh ye despised (G1848 "exoutheneo") not, nor rejected; but received me as an angel of THE ELOHIM, even as Christ Jesus.
Like Me, they will be despised and mocked by the Assyrian/Antichrist and the spiritual Edomite who are in league with him in the last days.

Luk 23:11 And Herod with his men of war exceedingly (G1848) despised (G1848 "exoutheneo") him and mocked him, and arrayed him in a gorgeous robe, and sent him again to Pilate. Luk 23:12 And the same day Pilate and Herod were made friends together: for before they were at enmity between themselves.

As I was rejected and despised by the religious authority of My time, these little ones will be rejected and despised by the religious authorities and theologians in Christendom. They are the living stones of heavenly Jerusalem who are crying for their restoration to be My Brides so that in the age to come, they will rule the kingdoms of the world which are at present ruled by the false Jews/Synagogue of Satan.

Mat 21:15 And when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children crying in the temple, and saying, Hosanna ("ho-san-nah" Of Hebrew origin [H3467] and [H4994]; oh save!) to the Son of David; they were sore displeased, Mat 21:16 And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise? Mat 21:42 Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is THE YAHWEH's doing, and it is marvelous in our eyes? Mat 21:43 Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of THE ELOHIM shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof.

Luk 19:39 And some of the Pharisees from among the multitude said unto him, Master, rebuke thy disciples. Luk 19:40 And he answered and said unto them, I tell you that, if these should hold their peace, the stones would immediately cry out.
Act 4:11 This is the stone which was despised (G1848 "exoutheneo") of you builders, which is become the head of the corner.

They will be called, taught and vindicated by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE LATTER DAYS RAIN, THE LAST DAYS PROPHETIC WINE OF RESTORED LOST DOCTRINES OF THE EARLY CHURCH, and be sent to the rest of the Anointed One and Brides to announce the true gospel of the kingdom and to teach Our true way. These also will through the precept be made feeble, broken and taken to be captive and become servant in the four fold ministry of Our last days' army (Eph 4:8-16)

Isa 28:9 Whom shall he teach knowledge? And whom shall he make to understand announcement (H8052 "shemuah")? Them that are weaned from the milk, and drawn from the breasts. Isa 28:10 For precept must be upon precept, precept upon precept; line upon line, line upon line; here a little, and there a little: Isa 28:11 For with stammering (H3934 "laeg") lips and another tongue will he speak to this people. Isa 28:12 To whom he said, This is the rest wherewith ye may cause the weary to rest; and this is the refreshing: yet they would not hear. Isa 28:13 But the speech (H1697 "dabar") of THE YAHWEH was unto them precept upon precept, precept upon precept; line upon line, line upon line; here a little, and there a little; that they might walk, and be feeble hereafter, and be broken, and snared, and taken.

Those who are called and are not truthful will be afraid and surprised by these ordinary candidates whom We have chosen, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, who represent Us, THE TRINITY, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, WHO WAS AND IS AND IS TO COME. The elect who are righteous, upright, pure and not covetous shall be exalted and established and given spiritual understanding to perceive Me, their king and Our Heavenly Kingdom. Their hearts shall be filled with dread as they realized that it is not the Professor of Theology (Scribe) who professed to know Our way, or the Religious Authorities who decide (he who weighs) who is qualify to be a minister, or the Institutional Religious Organizations that decide who to be given a pulpit to preach, are highly regarded by Us. They will no more regard the bold and profound speech of these people, but will listen attentively to those who are not eloquent in their speech but are chosen by Us. They will no more be impressed and come aboard into the seemingly large apostolic ship whose strength are in the arm of flesh, but will jump aboard onto Our unimpressive Apostolic sailing ship that is driven by you, The Great East wind, The Angel of My Presence, The Admiral, with Shekinaih as The Admiral of the fleet.

Isa 33:13 Hear, ye that are far off, what I have done; and, ye that are near, acknowledge my might. Isa 33:14 The sinners in Zion are afraid; fearfulness hath surprised the hypocrites. Who among us shall dwell with the devouring fire? Who among us shall dwell with everlasting burnings? Isa 33:15 He that walketh righteously, and speaketh uprightly; he that despiseth the gain of oppressions, that shaketh his hands from holding of bribes, that stoppeth his ears from hearing of blood, and shutteth his eyes from seeing evil; Isa 33:16 He shall dwell on high: his place of defence shall be the munitions of rocks: bread shall be given him; his waters shall be sure. Isa 33:17 Thine eyes shall see the king in his beauty: they shall behold the land that is very far off. Isa 33:18 Thine heart shall meditate dread. Where is the scribe? Where is he that weighed (H8254 "shaqal")? Where is he that counted the pulpits (H4026 "migdal") Isa 33:19 Thou shalt not regard (H7200 "raah") a bold (H3267 "yaaz") people, a people of a profound speech from (H4480 "min") hearing those of a stammering (H3932 "laag") tongue, that thou canst not understand. Isa 33:20 Look upon Zion, the city of our solemnities: thine eyes shall see Jerusalem a quiet habitation, a tabernacle that shall not be taken down; not one of the stakes thereof shall ever be removed, neither shall any of the cords thereof be broken. Isa 33:21 But there the enlarged (H117 "addiyr") YAHWEH will be unto us a place of broad rivers and streams; wherein shall go no ship with oars, neither shall large (H117 "addiyr") ship pass thereby. Isa 33:22 For THE YAHWEH is our judge, THE YAHWEH is our lawgiver, THE YAHWEH is our king; he will save us. Isa 33:23 Thy tacklings are loosed; they could not well strengthen their mast, they could not spread the sail: then is the prey of a great spoil divided; the lame take the prey. Isa 33:24 And the inhabitant shall not say, I am weak (H2470 "ullnes"): the people that dwell therein shall be forgiven their iniquity.

title:
Chapter 4 
OrdinaRy People Least Expected Candidate (part 2)

segments.text: Paul reiterates Isaiah 33:13-22 in his own words when he wrote to the Corinthians.

It is through crucifying the flesh with the emotions and lusts are the Anointed Ones restored to glory and power. Contrary to popular belief; the wisdom of the Cosmoses, the power of the powerful and the wealth of the rich have nothing to do with the selection of the Anointed Ones by Us through the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, OUR LAST DAYS SWORD AND SABER TO THAT EFFECT.

We, THE TRINITY, purposely chose those ordinary folks who are foolish and straightforward to disgrace the wise. We chose the weak to disgrace the mighty, and the commoner who are despised, We choose them to disgrace those who are from nobility, so that all will not boast before THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE COMING MESSIAH ONCE AGAIN, THE COSMOS ULTIMATE JUDGE AND SUB JUDGE, THE YAHWEH WHOM YOU SEEK AND THE MESSENGER THAT WE SHALL SENT, THE LAST DAY MOSES AND THE AARON, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.

1Co 1:18 For the preaching of the cross is to them that perish foolishness; but unto us which are saved it is the power of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 1:19 For it is written, I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and will bring to nothing the understanding of the prudent. 1Co 1:20 Where is the wise? Where is the scribe? Where is the philosopher of this age? Hath not THE ELOHIM made foolish the wisdom of this Cosmos? 1Co 1:21 For after that in the wisdom of THE ELOHIM the Cosmos by wisdom knew not THE ELOHIM, it pleased THE ELOHIM by the foolishness of preaching to save them that believe. 1Co 1:22 For the Jews require a sign, and the Greeks seek after wisdom: 1Co 1:23 But we preach Christ crucified, unto the Jews a stumblingblock, and unto the Greeks foolishness; 1Co 1:24 But unto them which are called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ the power of THE ELOHIM, and the wisdom of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 1:25 Because the foolishness of THE ELOHIM is wiser than men; and the weakness of THE ELOHIM is stronger than men. 1Co 1:26 For ye see your calling, brethren, how that not many wise men after the flesh, not many powerful, not many noble, are called: 1Co 1:27 But THE ELOHIM hath chosen the foolish of the Cosmos to disgrace(G2617 "kataischuno") the wise; and THE ELOHIM hath chosen the weak of the Cosmos to disgrace(G2617 "kataischuno") the mighty (G2478 "ischuros"); 1Co 1:28 And base things of the Cosmos, and things which are despised, hath THE ELOHIM chosen, yea, and things which are not, to bring to nought things that are: 1Co 1:29 That no flesh should boast (G2744 "kauchaomai") in his presence. 1Co 1:30 But of him are ye in Christ Jesus, who of THE ELOHIM is made unto us wisdom, and righteousness, and sanctification, and redemption: 1Co 1:31 That, according as it is written, He that boasteth, let him boasteth in THE YAHWEH.
These are likened to Gideon and David, who are poor and lightly esteemed even by their family; but are chosen by Us.

Jdg 6:15 And he said unto him, Oh my ADONAI, wherewith shall I save Israel? Behold, my family is poor in Manasseh, and I am the least in my father's house. Jdg 6:16 And THE YAHWEH said unto him, Surely I will be with thee, and thou shalt smite the Midianites as one man.
These are like Saul who lightly esteemed themselves because of their humble background and yet are anointed to be king of Spiritual Israel.

1Sa 9:21 And Saul answered and said, Am not I a Benjamite, of the smallest of the tribes of Israel? And my family the least of all the families of the tribe of Benjamin? Wherefore then speakest thou so to me? 1Sa 15:17 And Samuel said, When thou wast little in thine own sight, wast thou not made the head of the tribes of Israel, and THE YAHWEH anointed thee king over Israel?
These will be like John and I, who were chosen by THE FATHER but are rejected by those who do not love the truth and are respecter of persons because they judge by appearance.

Isa 53:1 Who hath believed our report? And to whom is the arm of THE YAHWEH revealed? Isa 53:2 For he shall grow up before him as a tender plant, and as a root out of a dry ground: he hath no form nor comeliness; and when we shall see him, there is no beauty that we should desire him. Isa 53:3 He is despised and rejected of men; a man of sorrows, and acquainted with grief: and we hid as it were our faces from him; he was despised, and we esteemed him not.

Mat 11:7 And as they departed, Jesus began to say unto the multitudes concerning John, What went ye out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken with the wind? Mat 11:8 But what went ye out for to see? A man clothed in soft raiment? Behold, they that wear soft clothing are in kings' houses.

title:
Chapter 5 
Least Comeliness Endowed with Highest Honour Gifting

segments.text:
Chapter 5 
Least Comeliness Endowed with Highest Honour Gifting
In order to disgrace those who are wise in their own eyes because of the wisdom they receive from the world, we have chosen the uncomely who are subservient, to be bestowed superabundant honor.

Our way is hard to grasp for those who are still in the captivity of their rational mind because of their reasoning and wisdom they received from the world. They may in their long Thesis, discourse about the Theos (G2316 "Theos" god) but they hardly knew Us, THE ELOHIM (H430 "Elohim") intimately or fear Us. Men conferred titles and medals based on education, accomplishments and merits; but My FATHER, THE MAJOR YAHWEH, endows His highest honor on those who are lowly and are not wise in their own eyes; but love mercy, righteousness, and justice; and are circumcised in their hearts through the spirit, to love, trust and obey Him.

Jer 17:5 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; Cursed be the man that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from THE YAHWEH. Jer 17:6 For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, in a salt land and not inhabited. Jer 17:7 Blessed is the man that trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and whose hope THE YAHWEH is. Jer 17:8 For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and that spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit. Jer 17:9 The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it? Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.

Jer 9:23 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, Let not the wise man glory in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man glory in his might, let not the rich man glory in his riches: Jer 9:24 But let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am THE YAHWEH which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight, saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 9:25 Behold, the days come, saith THE YAHWEH, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised; Jer 9:26 Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.

In Christendom, those who are endowed with highest honor gifting and recognized for their service to the Theos of the Church, human community and the Divinity School Alumni Association, are well received. But to a nobody who claims that We, THE YAHWEH have spoken to them and that they are sent to be his messenger, is indeed a hard thing to swallow. Most of them will be offended with him and treat him as nought.

Mat 13:54 And when he was come into his own country, he taught them in their synagogue, insomuch that they were amazed, and said, Whence hath this man this wisdom, and these mighty works? Mat 13:55 Is not this the carpenter's son? Is not his mother called Mary? And his brethren, James, and Joses, and Simon, and Judas? Mat 13:56 And his sisters, are they not all with us? Whence then hath this man all these things? Mat 13:57 And they were offended in him. But Jesus said unto them, A prophet is not without value (G820 "atimos"), save in his own country, and in his own house. Mat 13:58 And he did not many mighty works there because of their unbelief.

Samuel was given the highest honour to be girded with a linen ephod at the age of 13 years old. He was not even a Levite. He was chosen because he has been consecrated by Us, THE YAHWEH, before his birth.
1Sa 2:18 But Samuel ministered before THE YAHWEH, being a child, girded with a linen ephod.

David was 17 years old when he was bypassed by his father to be the likely candidate to be Our anointed. Even Samuel was misled by his eyes that the tall and mighty Eliab is the likely candidate. But to everyone's astonishment, We chose David instead and endowed him with the highest honor to be anointed as a king despite his uncomely stature and might; We see his singleness towards Us. Samuel also have to learn this truth that We, THE YAHWEH searches the heart and try the rein of a person and reward everyone according to his way and the fruit of his doing.

1Sa 16:1 And THE YAHWEH said unto Samuel, How long wilt thou mourn for Saul, seeing I have rejected him from reigning over Israel? Fill thine horn with oil, and go, I will send thee to Jesse the Bethlehemite: for I have provided me a king among his sons. 1Sa 16:2 And Samuel said, How can I go? If Saul hear it, he will kill me. And THE YAHWEH said, Take an heifer with thee, and say, I am come to sacrifice to THE YAHWEH. 1Sa 16:3 And call Jesse to the sacrifice, and I will shew thee what thou shalt do: and thou shalt anoint unto me him whom I name unto thee. 1Sa 16:4 And Samuel did that which THE YAHWEH spake, and came to Bethlehem. And the elders of the town trembled at his coming, and said, Comest thou peaceably? 1Sa 16:5 And he said, Peaceably: I am come to sacrifice unto THE YAHWEH: sanctify yourselves, and come with me to the sacrifice. And he sanctified Jesse and his sons, and called them to the sacrifice. 1Sa 16:6 And it came to pass, when they were come, that he looked on Eliab, and said, Surely THE YAHWEH'S anointed is before him. 1Sa 16:7 But THE YAHWEH said unto Samuel, Look not on his countenance, or on the height of his stature; because I have refused him: for THE YAHWEH seeth not as man seeth; for man looketh on the outward appearance, but THE YAHWEH looketh on the heart. 1Sa 16:8 Then Jesse called Abinadab, and made him pass before Samuel. And he said, Neither hath THE YAHWEH chosen this. 1Sa 16:9 Then Jesse made Shammah to pass by. And he said, Neither hath THE YAHWEH chosen this. 1Sa 16:10 Again, Jesse made seven of his sons to pass before Samuel. And Samuel said unto Jesse, THE YAHWEH hath not chosen these. 1Sa 16:11 And Samuel said unto Jesse, Are here all thy children? And he said, There remaineth yet the youngest, and, behold, he keepeth the sheep. And Samuel said unto Jesse, Send and fetch him: for we will not sit down till he come hither. 1Sa 16:12 And he sent, and brought him in. Now he was ruddy, and withal of a beautiful countenance, and goodly to look to. And THE YAHWEH said, Arise, anoint him: for this is he. 1Sa 16:13 Then Samuel took the horn of oil, and anointed him in the midst of his brethren: and the Spirit of THE YAHWEH came upon David from that day forward. So Samuel rose up, and went to Ramah.

Elisha was another uncomely individual, a peasant who was called by Us and given the highest gift. The spirit and power of Elijah came upon him because he has forsaken everything to serve and follow Us, THE YAHWEH through Elijah wherever he went. He fully understood the meaning of his name as the deliverer of THE EL and is zealous of his calling. ("Elisha" mean "THE EL deliver"). THE YAHWEH searches and tried his heart and gave him according to his way.

1Ki 19:16 And Jehu the son of Nimshi shalt thou anoint to be king over Israel: and Elisha (H477 "eliysha") the son of Shaphat of Abelmeholah shalt thou anoint to be prophet in thy room…. 1Ki 19:19 So he departed thence, and found Elisha the son of Shaphat, who was plowing with twelve yoke of oxen before him, and he with the twelfth: and Elijah passed by him, and cast his mantle upon him. 1Ki 19:20 And he left the oxen, and ran after Elijah, and said, Let me, I pray thee, kiss My father and my mother, and then I will follow thee. And he said unto him, Go back again: for what have I done to thee? 1Ki 19:21 And he returned back from him, and took a yoke of oxen, and slew them, and boiled their flesh with the instruments of the oxen, and gave unto the people, and they did eat. Then he arose, and went after Elijah, and ministered unto him.

According to 2Ki 2:19-24, Elisha is someone whom many will despise and mock because of his appearance for he was bald headed. Most people do not understand the significant of this incident; the boys that despised and mocked Elisha signify the children of Belial in the last days. Elisha signifies the last days' mini-elijah who will do greater works because of their numbers. The baldness signifies their uncomely appearance. The children of Belial who despised and mocked Our last days' Elisha because of their uncomely appearance will be cursed and destroyed by Shekinaih and you, through Our Name, "THE SHADDAI", THE DESTROYER.

2Ki 2:23 And he went up from thence unto Bethel: and as he was going up by the way, there came forth young (H6996 "qatan") boys (H5288 "naar") out of the city, and mocked him, and said unto him, Go up, thou bald head; go up, thou bald head. 2Ki 2:24 And he turned back, and looked on them, and cursed them in the name of THE YAHWEH. And there came forth two she bears out of the wood, and tare forty and two boys (H3206 "yeled") of them.

Shekinaih and you, as THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, will endow more super abundant value, honor, and giftings, to the meek and lowly who are accounted as just ordinary people and appear as uncomely in manner, as far as the body of Christ is concerned; so that many may be humbled and learned not to despise one another, but to love and care for each another. And those who are zealous to be candidate for this highest gifting of mighty rulership must start to walk in love.

1Co 12:23 And those body, which we accounted (G1380 "dokeo") to be no value (G820 "atimos"), upon these was set around (G4060 "peritithemi") more superabundant value (G5092 "time"); and of us (G2257 "hemon") the uncomely have more superabundant honour (G2157 "euschemosune"). 1Co 12:24 For of us the honorable have no lack: but THE ELOHIM hath commingled the body together, having given more superabundant value to that which are inferior (G5302 "hustereo": 1Co 12:25 That there should be no schism in the body; but that the members should be anxious for one to another. 1Co 12:26 And whether one member suffer, all the members suffer with it; or one member be glorified, all the members congratulate with it. 1Co 12:27 Now ye are the body of Christ, and members in part. 1Co 12:28 And THE ELOHIM hath set some in the church, first apostles, secondarily prophets, thirdly teachers, after that miracles, then gifts of healings, helps, governments, diversities of tongues. 1Co 12:29 Are all apostles? Are all prophets? Are all teachers? Are all workers of miracles? 1Co 12:30 Have all the gifts of healing? Do all speak with tongues? Do all interpret? 1Co 12:31 But be zealous over the mighty rulership (G2909 "kreitton") gifts: and yet shew I unto you a more excellent way.

title:
Chapter 6 
Vessel of Honour Selection As I am Pleased

segments.text:
Chapter 6 
Vessel of Honour Selection As I am Pleased
I am the potter and you are the clay. I choose which vessel for honour and which for dishonour as I please.

Before the conception of the Cosmoses, THE FATHER had proposed to THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, certain numbers of people to be sealed by Her through you, those that are predestined and chosen to be adopted as His sons through My blood for the forgiveness of their sins. Being energized by THE HOLY SPIRIT, they will cleanse themselves from all filthiness of the flesh and spirit, and perfect holiness in the fear of Our Name, THE YAHWEH, by loving one another to the end, so that they might receive the commendation of the robe of glory. These are vessels that are prepared to receive Our honour.

Eph 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM and Father of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings in heavenly places in Christ: Eph 1:4 According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the Cosmos, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love: Eph 1:5 Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will, Eph 1:6 To the commendation of the glory of his grace (spirit of grace/ HOLY SPIRIT), wherein he hath made us accepted in the beloved. Eph 1:7 In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace; Eph 1:8 Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence; Eph 1:9 Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath proposed (G4388 "protithemai") in himself: Eph 1:10 That in the dispensation of the fullness of times he might gather together in one all that in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; even in him: Eph 1:11 In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the proposal (G4286 "prothesis") of him who is energizing (G1754 "energeo") all after the counsel of his own will: Eph 1:12 That we should be to the commendation of his glory, who first trusted in Christ. Eph 1:13 In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed of that holy Spirit of announcement (G1680 "epaggelia"), Eph 1:14 Which is the pledge (G728 "arrhabon") of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the commendation of his glory.

They are to walk worthy of their vocation with all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love, endeavoring to keep the unity of the spirit in the bond of peace and not grieve THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, who had sealed them unto the day they are redeemed with a glorified body in the last day.
Eph 4:30 And grieve not the holy Spirit of THE ELOHIM, in who ye are sealed unto the day of redemption.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE REINCARNATION OF THE TRINITY, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, THE ANGEL ASCENDING FROM THE EAST, shall seal Our 144,000 Spiritual Israel.

Rev 7:1 And after these things I saw four angels standing on the four corners of the earth, holding the four winds of the earth, that the wind should not blow on the earth, nor on the sea, nor on any tree. Rev 7:2 And I saw another angel ascending from the east, having the seal of the living ELOHIM: and he cried with a loud voice to the four angels, to whom it was given to hurt the earth and the sea, Rev 7:3 Saying, Hurt not the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, till we have sealed the servants of our ELOHIM in their foreheads. Rev 7:4 And I heard the number of them which were sealed: and there were sealed an hundred and forty and four thousand of all the tribes of the children of Israel.

Out of this 144,000 Brides, 7,000 of them shall suffer like Me and be glorified like me. In their weakness, they will be helped by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, and I in you; as both of you, who represent THE TRINITY shall make intercession for them so that they can be justified and glorified. Being rooted and grounded in the love of THE FATHER through Me, they shall be willing to go through the tribulation, distress, persecution, famine, nakedness, peril and sword so as to be filled with Our fullness.

Rom 8:15 For ye have not received the spirit of bondage again to fear; but ye have received the Spirit of adoption, whereby we cry, Abba, Father. Rom 8:16 The Spirit itself beareth witness with our spirit, that we are the children of THE ELOHIM: Rom 8:17 And if children, then heirs; heirs of THE ELOHIM, and joint-heirs with Christ; if so be that we suffer with him, that we may be also glorified together. Rom 8:18 For I reckon that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed in us. Rom 8:19 For the earnest expectation of the creature waiteth for the manifestation of the sons of THE ELOHIM.

These are the seed, the children whom The Angel had announced to Abraham who are to be manifested in the last days; and the multitude of stars in heaven shown to Abraham signify them. These are chosen because of the mercy and compassion of THE FATHER according to His good pleasure.

Rom 9:6 Not as though the word of THE ELOHIM hath taken none effect. For they are not all Israel, which are of Israel: Rom 9:7 Neither, because they are the seed of Abraham, are they all children: but, In Isaac shall thy seed be called. Rom 9:8 That is, They which are the children of the flesh, these are not the children of THE ELOHIM: but the children of the announcement (G1860 "epaggelia") are counted for the seed. Rom 9:9 For this is the word of announcement (G1860 "epaggelia"), At this time will I come, and Sara shall have a son. Rom 9:10 And not only this; but when Rebecca also had conceived by one, even by our father Isaac; Rom 9:11 (For the children being not yet born, neither having done any good or evil, that the proposal(G4286 "prosthesis") of THE ELOHIM according to election might stand, not of works, but of him that calleth;)

These shall be sealed with the name "Christ" in their foreheads. They shall be vessels of honor after they have purged themselves from ungodliness and remain holy to be deemed useful to Us ready into every good work.

2Ti 2:19 Nevertheless the foundation of THE ELOHIM standeth sure, having this seal, THE YAHWEH knoweth them that are his. And, Let everyone that nameth the name of Christ depart from iniquity. 2Ti 2:20 But in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of earth; and some to honour, and some to dishonour. 2Ti 2:21 If a man therefore purge himself from these, he shall be a vessel unto honour, sanctified, and useful (G2173 "euchrestos") to the master and made ready (G2090 "hetoimazo") unto every good work.

title:
Chapter 7 
Like Shepherd Like Sheep Kind of Training During Infancy

segments.text:
Chapter 7 
Like Shepherd Like Sheep Kind of Training During Infancy

These chosen vessels are proposed by THE FATHER to receive honor and blessings of the first born and are called Joseph. They are the bridal warriors, the daughter of Jerusalem that will march over the wall of Baal/Satan. Though Baal's archers cause bitterness in their life through their opposition and persecutions by throwing arrows of accusation and defamation, they are able to remain steadfast because of the spiritual light fed by My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih through Me in you, their shepherd, who bears Our Name, THE MINOR EL; and blessed by Shekinaih, who bears Our Name, THE SHADDAI.

Gen 49:22 Joseph (H3130 "yoseph" increase) is a fruitful (H6509 "parah") son (H1121 "ben"), even a fruitful (H6509 "parah") son (H1121 "ben"), with (H5921 "al") the resemblance (H5869 "ayin") of daughter (H1323 "bath") that run over the wall: Gen 49:23 Baal's (H1167 "baal") archers (H2671 "chets") have embitter (H4843 "marar") him, and shot at him, and oppose (H7852 "satam") him: Gen 49:24 But his bow abode in strength, and the arms of his hands were made strong by the hands of THE MIGHTY ONE (H46 "abiyr") of Jacob; (from thence is the shepherd, the stone of Israel. Gen 49:25 Even from (H4480 "min") THE EL (H410) of thy father, who shall help thee; and of THE SHADDAI, who shall bless thee with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that lieth under, blessings of the breasts, and of the womb: Gen 49:26 The blessings of thy father have prevailed above the blessings of my progenitors unto the utmost bound of the everlasting hills: they shall be on the head of Joseph, and on the crown of the head of him that was separate from his brethren.

The blessings from heaven are the blessings mentioned in Psalms 103. Their iniquities are forgiven and all their sickness healed. Their bodies will not be corrupted as they will receive transfiguration body to sit in their respective throne if they continue to fear Him, keep His covenant and obey His commands.

The blessing from the deep that lies under refers to them having the wealth and riches of the world which will leads to power, authority, rulership and status. These anointed will be given the kingdoms of the world when they are glorified.
The blessing of the breast and the womb refers to them having children that are among the best of the best.

Psa 103:1 A Psalm of David. Bless THE YAHWEH, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name. Psa 103:2 Bless THE YAHWEH, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits: Psa 103:3 Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases; Psa 103:4 Who redeemeth thy life from corruption (H7845 "shachath"); who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies; Psa 103:5 Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle's. Psa 103:6 THE YAHWEH executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed. Psa 103:7 He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel. Psa 103:8 THE YAHWEH is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy. Psa 103:9 He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger forever. Psa 103:10 He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities. Psa 103:11 For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him. Psa 103:12 As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us. Psa 103:13 Like as a father pitieth his children, so THE YAHWEH pitieth them that fear him.

These are Our sheep which We have appointed you to feed and comfort with My word of life as they go through the depression of the Antichrist (who is made in the image of his father, the Diabolos who has the might of death as stated in Heb 2:14)). They will be anointed as wealthy kings and dwell in Our house forever with his goodness and mercy forever in the age to come.

Psa 23:1 A Psalm of David. THE YAHWEH is my shepherd; I shall not want. Psa 23:2 He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters. Psa 23:3 He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake. Psa 23:4 Yea, though I walk through the valley (a depression) of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me. Psa 23:5 Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over. Psa 23:6 Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life: and I will dwell in the house of THE YAHWEH forever.

These are lilies witnesses who will be gathered and delivered by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE REINCARNATION OF THE TRINITY ON THE EARTH, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, their overseer and shepherd. With My light of truth, Shekinaih and you shall open their eyes from their spiritual blindness and guide their feet into the way of peace towards their restoration to glory.

Psa 80:1 To the overseer (H5329 "natsach" overseer) upon Shoshannimeduth (H7802 "shoshannı̂ym eduth" lilies of witness"), A Psalm of Asaph (H623 "asaph"). Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, thou that leadest Joseph like a flock; thou that dwellest upon the cherubims, shine forth. Psa 80:2 Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh stir up thy strength, and come and save us. Psa 80:3 Turn us again, O THE ELOHIM, and cause thy presence to give light (H215 "or"); and we shall be delivered (H3467 "yasha").

As My brother, the uncle of My Lilies Bride, I have put the zeal for My house in your heart to gather and shepherd My lilies Bride with Shekinaih; and equip them to be My comely and terrible heavenly warrior Brides/Anointed Ones.

Son 6:1 Whither is thy beloved (H1730 "dod" boiled with love, uncle) gone, O thou fairest among women? Whither is thy beloved turned aside? That we may seek him with thee. Son 6:2 My beloved is gone down into his garden, to the terraces (H6170 "arugah") of spices (H1314 "besem"), to feed (H7462 "raah" to pasture a flock)) in the gardens, and to gather lilies. Son 6:3 I am my beloved's, and my beloved is mine: he feedeth among the lilies. Son 6:4 Thou art beautiful, O my love, as Tirzah (H8656 "tirtsah" delightsomeness), comely as Jerusalem, terrible as an army with banners. Son 6:5 Turn away thine eyes from me, for they have overcome me: thy hair is as a flock of goats that appear from Gilead. Son 6:6 Thy teeth are as a flock of sheep which go up from the washing, whereof every one beareth twins, and there is not one barren among them. Son 6:7 As a piece of a pomegranate are thy temples within thy locks. Son 6:8 There are threescore queens, and fourscore concubines, and virgins without number. Son 6:9 My dove, my undefiled is but one; she is the only one of her mother, she is the choice one of her that bare her. The daughters saw her, and blessed her; yea, the queens and the concubines, and they praised her. Son 6:10 Who is she that looketh forth as the morning, fair as the moon, clear as the sun, and terrible as an army with banners? Son 6:11 I went down into the garden of nuts to see the fruits of the valley, and to see whether the vine flourished, and the pomegranates budded. Son 6:12 Or ever I was aware, my soul made me like the chariots of Amminadib. Son 6:13 Return, return, O Shulamite; return, return, that we may look upon thee. What will ye see in the Shulamite? As it were the company of two armies.

As the Shepherd of shepherds over My assemblies, My FATHER shall confront and convict Our others shepherds to believe and submit to the authority and the word of wisdom from Shekinaih and you; and they shall fear My FATHER in Shekinaih and keep her command. THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH AND THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOSTS RESPECTIVELY, shall bring every of their works into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil.

Ecc 12:11 The words of the wise are as goads, and as nails fastened by the master of assemblies, which are given from one shepherd Ecc 12:12 And further, by these, my son, be admonished: of making many books there is no end; and much study is a weariness of the flesh. Ecc 12:13 Let us hear the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear THE ELOHIM, and keep his commandments: for this is the whole duty of Adam. Ecc 12:14 For THE ELOHIM shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil.

My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih through Me in you, in the power and the spirit of Elijah, shall purify and cleanse My Anointed Ones/Brides that they may offer an offering of righteousness unto THE FATHER through faith.

Mal 3:1 Behold, I will send my messenger, and he shall prepare the way before me: and THE YAHWEH, whom ye seek, shall suddenly come to his temple, even the messenger of the covenant, whom ye delight in: behold, he shall come, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 3:2 But who may abide the day of his coming? And who shall stand when he appeareth? For he is like a refiner's fire, and like fullers' soap: Mal 3:3 And he shall sit as a refiner and purifier of silver: and he shall purify the sons of Levi, and purge them as gold and silver, that they may offer unto THE YAHWEH an offering in righteousness. Mal 3:4 Then shall the offering of Judah and Jerusalem be pleasant unto THE YAHWEH, as in the days of old, and as in former years. Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.

As a chip off the old block after Me, in exercising mercy, righteousness and justice, the sheep that follow you, will also be like you. They will all be like you circumcised in the spirit to totally obey the will of THE FATHER.

Jer 9:23 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, Let not the wise man glory in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man glory in his might, let not the rich man glory in his riches: Jer 9:24 But let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am THE YAHWEH which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight, saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 9:25 Behold, the days come, saith THE YAHWEH, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised; Jer 9:26 Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.

title:
Chapter 8 
Total Obedience/Yieldedness Prerequisite, No Other Option

segments.text:
Chapter 8 
Total Obedience/Yieldedness Prerequisite, No Other Option
According to THE FATHER, totally yielding to THE FATHER's will is a prerequisite for those who are called to be a Christ who is living in all nations. And there is no other option.

Rom 1:1 Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, separated unto the gospel of THE ELOHIM, Rom 1:2 (Which he had promised afore by his prophets in the holy scriptures,) Rom 1:3 Concerning his Son Jesus Christ our YAHWEH, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh; Rom 1:4 And declared to be the Son of THE ELOHIM with power, according to the spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead: Rom 1:5 By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith in (G1722 "en") all nations, for his name: Rom 1:6 Among whom are ye also the called of Jesus Christ: Rom 1:7 To all that be in Rome, beloved of THE ELOHIM, called to be saints: Grace to you and peace from THE ELOHIM our Father, and The Lord Jesus Christ.

Adam and Eve because of self will and being wise in their own eyes, have disobeyed the command of THE FATHER and had lost their glory and surrender the Cosmoses to Satan to reign with the might of death. The only way to regain the glory and the rulership is through lowliness of mind and sincere repentance by totally obeying THE FATHER'S will even unto death like Me; so that eternal life is reinstated.

This, I did, and became the leader and completer of those who are called into this hope. Only by following My example in taking up the cross in crucifying the flesh with its emotions and lusts can one enter into Our Kingdom.
Mat 19:21 Jesus said unto him, If thou wilt be perfect (G5046 "teleios" complete), go and sell that thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come and follow me.

Mar 10:21 Then Jesus beholding him loved him, and said unto him, One thing thou lackest: go thy way, sell whatsoever thou hast, and give to the poor (G4434 "ptochos" lowly), and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come, take up the cross, and follow me. Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But Jesus answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM!

1Jn 2:15 Love not the Cosmos, neither the things that are in the Cosmos. If any man love the Cosmos, the love of the Father is not in him. 1Jn 2:16 For all that is in the Cosmos, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the Cosmos. 1Jn 2:17 And the Cosmos passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of THE ELOHIM abideth forever.
It is not only by grace but also by choice, one can either choose to die in sin by yielding to the lust of our flesh in sin or live in glory as a Christ by yielding to the spirit in holiness.

Rom 6:16 Know ye not, that to whom ye yield yourselves servants to obey, his servants ye are to whom ye obey; whether of sin unto death, or of obedience unto righteousness? Rom 6:17 But THE ELOHIM be thanked, that ye were the servants of sin, but ye have obeyed from the heart that form of doctrine which was delivered you. Rom 6:18 Being then made free from sin, ye became the servants of righteousness. Rom 6:19 I speak after the manner of men because of the infirmity of your flesh: for as ye have yielded your members servants to uncleanness and to iniquity unto iniquity; even so now yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness.

That is why We, THE YAHWEH is sending you to Our servants to turn Our children to Our way so that they can be made righteous by trusting and yielding to the FATHER. But yielding takes faith and without hearing Our oracle, they will never be energized to totally obey Us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, Our spokesman. Therefore, all who are called by Us, will be restored if they hardened not their heart and take heed of the acceptable day when Our voice is heard, through Shekinaih and you.

Rom 10:11 For the scripture saith, Whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed. Rom 10:12 For there is no difference between the Jew and the Greek: for the same YAHWEH over all is rich unto all that call upon him. Rom 10:13 For whosoever shall call upon the name of THE YAHWEH shall be saved. Rom 10:14 How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? And how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? And how shall they hear without a preacher? Rom 10:15 And how shall they preach, except they be sent? As it is written, How beautiful are the feet of them that preach the gospel of peace, and bring glad tidings of good things! Rom 10:16 But they have not all obeyed the gospel. For Esaias saith, THE YAHWEH who hath believed our report? Rom 10:17 So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word (spokesman) of THE ELOHIM.

Before My children can obey Us totally, the greatest stronghold that Satan had fortified in their minds must be pulled down. Again, it involved them making a choice whether to have their mind renewed and renovated by both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, The Angel of His Presence, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH or disobey the true gospel and bear the judgment.

2Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through THE ELOHIM to the pulling down of strong holds;) 2Co 10:5 Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of THE ELOHIM, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of Christ; 2Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.

Those who chose to disobey the true gospel of a Christ and persecute THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, THE PURGING FIRE OF THE TRINITY, THE CONSUMING FIRE, THE COSMOS ULTIMATE JUDGE AND SUB JUDGE, shall be punished with everlasting destruction when My FATHER and Me shall in the Angel of Our Presence, come with might.

2Th 1:4 So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of THE ELOHIM for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure: 2Th 1:5 Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, for which ye also suffer: 2Th 1:6 Seeing it is a righteous thing with THE ELOHIM to recompense tribulation to them that trouble you; 2Th 1:7 And to you who are troubled rest with us, when the Lord Jesus shall be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels, 2Th 1:8 In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not THE ELOHIM, and that obey not the gospel of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ: 2Th 1:9 Who shall be punished with everlasting destruction from the presence of THE YAHWEH, and from the glory of his might; 2Th 1:10 When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our testimony among you was believed) in that day. 2Th 1:11 Wherefore also we pray always for you, that our ELOHIM would count you worthy of this calling, and fulfil all the good pleasure of his goodness, and the work of faith with power: 2Th 1:12 That the name of our Jesus Christ may be glorified in you, and ye in him, according to the grace of our THE ELOHIM and the YAHWEH Jesus Christ.
But to the rest who totally obeyed THE FATHER even unto death through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, they will be counted worthy and placed in the order of Melchisedec to rule the Cosmoses.

Heb 5:8 Though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience by the things which he suffered; Heb 5:9 And being made perfect, he became the author of eternal salvation unto all them that obey him; Heb 5:10 Called of THE ELOHIM an high priest after the order of Melchisedec.

Part of total obedience involved obeying Our command to love Our sons sincerely with a pure heart. This can only come through Our regeneration of their spirit man by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH; if my children will to continue to listen to the oracle spoken by Us through Our Two Representaives. This is how they will come into the obedience of faith.

1Pe 1:22 Seeing ye have purified your souls in obeying the truth through the Spirit unto unfeigned love of the brethren, see that ye love one another with a pure heart fervently: 1Pe 1:23 Being born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, by the oracle (G3056 "logos") of THE ELOHIM, which liveth and abideth forever. 1Pe 1:24 For all flesh is as grass, and all the glory of man as the flower of grass. The grass withereth, and the flower thereof falleth away: 1Pe 1:25 But the speech (G4487 "rhema") of THE YAHWEH endureth forever. And this is the speech (G4487 "rhema") which by the gospel is preached unto you.

title:
Chapter 9
Final Selection Criterias

segments.text:
Chapter 9
Final Selection Criterias

title: Be Perfect

segments.text: Be Perfect
Many are called but few are chosen. THE FATHER demands 100% from Us, whether in truth, righteousness or uprightness.
Deu 32:4 He is the Rock, his work is perfect (H8549 "tamiym" complete): for all his ways are judgment: THE EL of truth and without iniquity, righteous and upright is he.
One must entirely stand perfect and complete in all Our will.

Col 4:12 Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, saluteth you, always labouring fervently for you in prayers, that ye may stand perfect (G5046 "teleios") and complete (GG4137 "pleroo") in all the will of THE ELOHIM.

Like the burnt offering, peace offering, sin offering and trespass offering, We must love Him with all our heart, mind, soul and body. The work and the ways of My FATHER through His Name, THE YAHWEH, is perfect in justice, truth, righteousness and uprightness.

Deu 32:1 Give ear, O ye heavens, and I will speak; and hear, O earth, the words of my mouth. Deu 32:2 My doctrine shall drop as the rain, my speech shall distil as the dew, as the small rain upon the tender herb, and as the showers upon the grass: Deu 32:3 Because I will publish the name of THE YAHWEH: ascribe ye greatness unto our ELOHIM. Deu 32:4 He is the Rock, his work is perfect: for all his ways are judgment: THE EL of truth and without iniquity, righteous and upright is he.
The Hebrew word perfect H8549 "tamiym" is from H8552 "tamam" meaning to be entire (literally, figuratively or morally)
It means "whole" in Joshua 10:13 and "sincerity" in Joshua 24:14,

Jos 10:13 And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed, until the people had avenged themselves upon their enemies. Is not this written in the book of Jasher? So the sun stood still in the midst of heaven, and hasted not to go down about a whole (H8549 "tamiym") day.

Jos 24:14 Now therefore fear THE YAHWEH, and serve him in sincerity (H8549 "tamiym") and in truth: and put away the gods which your fathers served on the other side of the flood, and in Egypt; and serve ye THE YAHWEH.

It is also translated as "without blemish" in Leviticus 1:3 involving all the burnt offerings, peace offerings, sin offerings and trespass offerings always involved a male or female that must be without blemish (H8549 "tamiym").

Lev 1:3 If his offering be a burnt sacrifice of the herd, let him offer a male without blemish (H8549 "tamiym") he shall offer it of his own voluntary will at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before THE YAHWEH.
Lev 3:1 And if his oblation be a sacrifice of peace offering, if he offer it of the herd; whether it be a male or female, he shall offer it without blemish (H8549 "tamiym") before THE YAHWEH.

Lev 4:3 If the priest that is anointed do sin according to the sin of the people; then let him bring for his sin, which he hath sinned, a young bullock without blemish (H8549 "tamiym") unto THE YAHWEH for a sin offering.

Lev 5:15 If a soul commit a trespass, and sin through ignorance, in the holy things of THE YAHWEH; then he shall bring for his trespass unto THE YAHWEH a ram without blemish (H8549 "tamiym")out of the flocks, with thy estimation by shekels of silver, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for a trespass offering:

THE FATHER: Noah in his generation is an example of one who is perfect (H8549 "tamiym"). He walks, communicate with Us; and is upright before our eyes; highly regarded by Us; We reveal ourselves to him and commune with him personally instructing him step by step what to do to save himself, his family members and all those animals We instruct him to save in order to refill the earth once again after We destroyed it.

Gen 6:8 But Noah found grace in the eyes of THE YAHWEH. Gen 6:9 These are the generations of Noah: Noah was a just man and perfect (H8549 "tamiym") in his generations, and Noah walked with THE ELOHIM.

Our definition of being perfect, is one must attain the full marks of 10/10 in each of the following character tests that We will put each one through. The tests comprises all these ten character traits that We will test each one ten times in each of these character traits. One must score 10/10 in all the ten times We tested them, in order to pass and move on. If one fails in any of these ten tests for each of these character traits test paper, one must repeat the whole ten tests all over again for that particular character traits test.
Thereby, one must score 100/100 which made up of the summation of 10/10 marks for each of these 10 character traits tests.

The reason one needs to retake the ten tests all over again if one fails any of each character traits in the ten tests seating in a row is they are yet to be steady in maintaining these character traits in them and must retake these tests all over again till they are able to overcome all the works of the flesh in this area of their character.
However, one must pass each of these character tests which each consists of ten tests papers within a specific time given, before the cut-off time.

If one fail to pass before the cut-off time, We will strike off his/her name from our list consisting of fifteen candidates for each heavenly throne and skip that person and will thereby move on to the next person on Our lists.
The ten character traits test are:
1) Single Mindedness
2) Be Completely Truthful in THE ELOHIM
3) Be Yielded 100%
4) Be Lowly Zero Self
5) Be Completely Sincere Before THE ELOHIM and Men
6) Meekness of Love
7) Be Patient
8) To be Circumcised in Heart
9) Obedience unto Death
10) Be Entirely toward Him

title: The Ten Areas of Perfection

segments.text: The Ten Areas of Perfection

title: i) Single Mindedness

segments.text: i) Single Mindedness
Single mindedness equal you have only one thing in your mind and heart to fulfil, that is, your great destiny in Me (Us). Everything else is secondary to none.

Mat 6:19 Lay not up for yourselves treasures upon earth, where moth and rust doth corrupt, and where thieves break through and steal: Mat 6:20 But lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust doth corrupt, and where thieves do not break through nor steal: Mat 6:21 For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also. Mat 6:22 The light of the body is the eye: if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body shall be full of light. Mat 6:23 But if thine eye be evil, thy whole body shall be full of darkness. If therefore the light that is in thee be darkness, how great is that darkness! Mat 6:24 No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve THE ELOHIM and mammon.

title: ii) Be Completely Truthful in THE ELOHIM

segments.text: ii) Be Completely Truthful in THE ELOHIM

It means you only live for truth, the ultimate truth in Me (Us). My truth abides in you and My truth has set you free from being deceived; thereby from being taken captive by the Diabolos with his many deceitful schemes which await those who have no truth in them but their hearts are preoccupied by many idols which springs out of disillusion of oneself and are thereby being easily taken by their captor.

Heb 10:26 For if we sin wilfully after that we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remaineth no more sacrifice for sins, Heb 10:27 But a certain fearful looking for of judgment and fiery indignation, which shall devour the adversaries.

title: iii) Be Yielded 100%

segments.text: iii) Be Yielded 100%

It means you are quick to prompt to submerge thyself into My ideology, My instruction without second thought even if it contradict your own set of beliefs, principles or even your own style or ways; or your own paradigm which is your own ways of seeing things and how it should be.

JESUS: In the last days, We, THE TRINITY will send Shekinaih and you as Moses and Elijah respectively to My called ones, as the Messenger of the Covenant. We will put Our words in both your mouths, and ye shall speak unto them all that ye are commanded to speak. They are to yield to both of you 100% as unto THE TRINITY. And it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not yield to your words which We shall speak through both of you, We, THE YAHWEH will pursue it personally as We did to Miriam who did not yield to Moses by bringing leprosy to her.

Deu 18:18 I will raise them up a Prophet from among their brethren, like unto thee, and will put my words in his mouth; and he shall speak unto them all that I shall command him. Deu 18:19 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not hearken unto my words which he shall speak in my name, I will require it of him.

Like the burnt offerings, peace offerings, sin offerings and trespass offerings which must be without blemish (H8549 "tamiym" perfect), all the children whom We have given both of you, who represent THE TRINITY must yield their bodies 100% as a living sacrifice, holy and agreeable to Us by yielding to Shekinaih and you who will renovate their minds to yield and complied to our complete will and not according to the way of this evil age.

Rom 12:1 I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of THE ELOHIM, that ye yield (G3936 "paristemi") your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto THE ELOHIM, which is your reasonable service. Rom 12:2 And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is that good, and acceptable, and perfect (G5046 "teleios"), will of THE ELOHIM.

title: iv) Be Lowly Zero Self

segments.text: iv) Be Lowly Zero Self

It means to take up the cross, deny oneself, and let Me crucify the flesh with all the affections and lusts. Except a corn of wheat fall into the ground and die, it abideth alone: but if it die, it bringeth forth much fruit. Thereby abide in Me and let My words ( THE TRINTY spoken through Shekinaih and JESUS spoken through Aaron K David) abide in you that My life may flow in and through you; for apart from Me you can do nothing.

Mat 16:24 Then said Jesus unto his disciples, If any man will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me. Mat 16:25 For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for my sake shall find it.

Gal 2:20 I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the faith of the Son of THE ELOHIM, who loved me, and gave himself for me.

Joh 12:24 Verily, verily, I say unto you, Except a corn of wheat fall into the ground and die, it abideth alone: but if it die, it bringeth forth much fruit. Joh 12:25 He that loveth his life shall lose it; and he that hateth his life in this world shall keep it unto life eternal. Joh 12:26 If any man serve me, let him follow me; and where I am, there shall also my servant be: if any man serve me, him will my Father honour.

Joh 15:4 Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me. Joh 15:5 I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing. Joh 15:6 If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast them into the fire, and they are burned. Joh 15:7 If ye abide in me, and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done unto you. Joh 15:8 Herein is my Father glorified, that ye bear much fruit; so shall ye be my disciples.

title: v) Be Completely Sincere Before THE ELOHIM and Men

segments.text: v) Be Completely Sincere Before THE ELOHIM and Men

It means to be without guile found in you and no ulterior motive or hidden agenda in your heart when you speak or do things for one another. Only those who are like My SON JESUS who is without guile are eligible to be part of My 144,000 Brides/Anointed Ones to enter Heavenly Mount Zion.
1Co 5:8 Therefore let us keep the feast, not with old leaven, neither with the leaven of malice and wickedness; but with the unleavened bread of sincerity and truth.

2Co 1:12 For our rejoicing is this, the testimony of our conscience, that in sincerity and godly purity, not with fleshly wisdom, but by the grace of THE ELOHIM, We have had our conversation in the world, and more abundantly to you-ward.
2Co 2:17 For we are not as many, which corrupt the word of THE ELOHIM: but as of sincerity, but as of THE ELOHIM, in the sight of THE ELOHIM speak we in Christ.
