1Pe 2:21 For even hereunto were ye called: because Christ also suffered for us, leaving us an example, that ye should follow his steps: 1Pe 2:22 Who did no sin, neither was guile found in his mouth: 1Pe 2:23 Who, when he was reviled, reviled not again; when he suffered, he threatened not; but committed himself to him that judgeth righteously:

1Pe 3:10 For he that will love life, and see good days, let him refrain his tongue from evil, and his lips that they speak no guile: 1Pe 3:11 Let him eschew evil, and do good; let him seek peace, and ensue it.

Rev 14:4 These are they which were not defiled with women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were redeemed from among men, being the firstfruits unto THE ELOHIM and to the Lamb. Rev 14:5 And in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before the throne of THE ELOHIM.

title: vi) Meekness of Love

segments.text: vi) Meekness of Love

This means you have to walk with lowliness of mind to love each other unconditionally by being gentle and humble in your endeavor with one another. You are to in meekness of love restore those who are overtaken in a fault, endeavoring to keep the unity of the spirit in the bond of peace. Only then, are you be counted worthy to be anointed by us as a Christ with power of the Kingdom.

1Co 4:19 But I will come to you shortly, if the Lord will, and will know, not the speech of them which are puffed up, but the power. 1Co 4:20 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not in word, but in power. 1Co 4:21 What will ye? shall I come unto you with a rod, or in love, and in the spirit of meekness?
2Co 10:1 Now I Paul myself beseech you by the meekness and gentleness of Christ, who in presence am base among you, but being absent am bold toward you:

Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
Gal 6:1 Brethren, if a man be overtaken in a fault, ye which are spiritual, restore such an one in the spirit of meekness; considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted.

Eph 4:1 I therefore, the prisoner of the Lord, beseech you that ye walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called, Eph 4:2 With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love; Eph 4:3 Endeavouring to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.

Col 3:12 Put on therefore, as the elect of THE ELOHIM, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering; Col 3:13 Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye. Col 3:14 And above all these things put on charity, which is the bond of perfectness.
To be perfect in love is to love one another so that THE ELOHIM (who is love) will make His dwelling in Us.
1Jn 4:12 No man hath seen THE ELOHIM at any time. If we love one another, THE ELOHIM dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.

title: vii) Be Patient

segments.text: vii) Be Patient

This means the fruit of patience is of pivotal necessity in fulfilling My perfection criteria for all Mankind. Without patience, We swear no one, absolutely none will inherit ALL promises and inheritance spoken over their lives by Us. Patience is required in the upward ascension to each higher level to Heavenly Mount Zion/ Jerusalem.

Jas 1:1 James, a servant of THE ELOHIM and of THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST, to the twelve tribes which are scattered abroad, greeting Jas 1:2 My brethren, count it all joy when ye fall into divers temptations; Jas 1:3 knowing this, that the trying of your faith accomplisheth patience. Jas 1:4 but let patience have her perfect (G5046 "teleios") work, that ye may be perfect (G5046 "teleios") and entire (G3648 "holokleros"), wanting nothing.

title: viii) To be Circumcised in Heart

segments.text: viii) To be Circumcised in Heart

This means one has to lose himself/herself in me (Us) and has come to realize all their good works are like filthy rags before my eyes unless, it is done according to Our will given to them step by step following Our instruction, and not out of compulsion, led by the working of the flesh through being wise in their own eyes and/or human emotion that is not from Us.
Php 3:3 For we are the circumcision, which worship THE ELOHIM in the spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh.

title: ix) Obedience Unto Death

segments.text: ix) Obedience Unto Death
This means you must be willing to lay down your life for Me, to love Me more than your own life. When you reach this state, you will have unquestionable obedience to yield and obey ALL
I instruct and command you to say or do with 100% faith even though by doing so you may even risk your own life for Me.

Heb 5:7 Who in the days of his flesh, when he had offered up prayers and supplications with strong crying and tears unto him that was able to save him from death, and was heard in that he feared; Heb 5:8 Though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience by the things which he suffered; Heb 5:9 And being made perfect (G5046 "teleios"), he became the author of eternal salvation unto all them that obey him;

title: x) Be Entirely Toward Him

segments.text: x) Be Entirely Toward Him

This means you are fully sold for Me without reservation or second thought that your life exists solely for the purpose of fulfilling you destiny in Me (Us). You will share the same feeling as the Apostle Paul who said, "According to My earnest expectation and My hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but that with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be magnified in My body, whether it be by life, or by death. For to Me to live is Christ, and to die is gain" (Php 1:20-21).

Mat 19:21 JESUS said unto him, If thou wilt be perfect (G5046 "teleios"), go and sell that thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come and follow me. Mat 19:22 But when the young man heard that saying, he went away sorrowful: for he had great possessions. Mat 19:23 Then said JESUS unto his disciples, Verily I say unto you, That a rich man shall hardly enter into the Kingdom of Heaven. Mat 19:24 And again I say unto you, It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

Therefore, hearken to fulfil Our perfecting tests to metamorphose you into the highly sought after coveted glorious mighty archangel with their respective gold throne reserved in the third Heaven which will qualify them to reign and rule with Us to replace the fallen angels in governing of Our heavenly bodies including the galaxies with its planetary system and stars.
Thereby, ascribe yourself in fulfilling these character traits as also shown in the Verses below to affirm you, to quicken you, to polish you and to make you ready.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, THE VENGEANCE OF THE TRINITY, MY REWARDS ARE WITH Us THROUGH THEM, TO RECOMPENSATE EVERYONE IN ACCORDANCE TO HIS/HER WORKS AND PURITY OF HEARTS, are pre-ordained to test, to approve, to select those who are qualified and to put them in different heavenly position as per they are made up (predestined genes); to fit them perfectly in their predestined role in My (Our) heavenly army.
For Shekinaih and you, are THE WORD OF THE YAHWEH, THE ELOAH, who through Our Name, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR EL, will gird Our army with strength and makes their way perfect.

Psa 18:30 As for THE EL, his way is perfect (H8549 "tamiym"): the word of THE YAHWEH is tried: he is a buckler to all those that trust in him. Psa 18:31 For who is THE ELOAH save THE YAHWEH? or who is a rock save our ELOHIM? Psa 18:32 It is THE EL that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way perfect (H8549 "tamiym").

title: Benefits of Those Whose Walk is Perfect

segments.text: Benefits of Those Whose Walk is Perfect
The inheritance of Our perfect shall be forever. They shall not be ashamed in the evil time, and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.

Psa 37:18 THE YAHWEH knoweth the days of the perfect (H8549 "tamiym"). and their inheritance shall be for ever. Psa 37:19 They shall not be ashamed in the evil time: and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.
They shall receive grace and glory, and no good thing will be withheld from them.

Psa 84:11 For THE YAHWEH ELOHIM is a sun and shield: THE YAHWEH will give grace and glory: no good thing will he withhold from them that walk perfectly (H8549 "tamiym"). Psa 84:12 O THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.

They shall be taught by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, Our hidden mystery (the deep things) which are ordained before the world unto their glory.

1Co 2:6 Howbeit we speak wisdom among them that are perfect (G5046 "teleios"): yet not the wisdom of this world, nor of the princes of this world, that come to nought: 1Co 2:7 But we speak the wisdom of THE ELOHIM in a mystery, even the hidden wisdom, which THE ELOHIM ordained before the world unto our glory:

title:
Chapter 10 
Vigorous Army like Disciplinary Training

segments.text:
Chapter 10 
Vigorous Army like Disciplinary Training

Those who are selected by Us, are marked for vigorous army like disciplinary like training through tough military disciplinary trainings. This is to prepare them for the coming war they have to go through while preaching the true gospel. The vigorous discipline will cause them to hang in there when the going is hard and accomplish those things that would overwhelm the ordinary person.

Psa 120:1 A Song of degrees. In my distress I cried unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me. Psa 120:2 Deliver my soul, O THE YAHWEH, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue. Psa 120:3 What shall be given unto thee? Or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue? Psa 120:4 Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper. Psa 120:5 Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, that I dwell in the tents of Kedar! Psa 120:6 My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace. Psa 120:7 I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.

In the last day, the Antichrist and the nations that serve her shall make war against them and in their tribulations and patience; many will die as martyrs or thrown into prison and being tortured for not denying THE YAHWEH JESUS.
Rev 11:7 And when they shall have finished their testimony, the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them, and shall overcome them, and kill them.
Rev 12:17 And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of THE ELOHIM, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.
Rev 13:7 And it was given unto him to make war with the saints, and to overcome them: and power was given him over all kindreds, and tongues, and nations.
Despite all the wisdom and counsel of the Antichrist, these anointed are trained against the day of battle and will be delivered by Us from perdition as they endure to the end.
Pro 21:30 There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against THE YAHWEH. Pro 21:31 The horse is prepared against the day of battle: but deliverance is of THE YAHWEH.

They are liken to horses arrayed as mighty man and are called sons of thunder. Because of the training, they are fearless and are ready to die for the Name of a Christ. They are greatly feared by the adversaries.

Job 39:19 Hast thou given the horse strength? Hast thou clothed his neck with thunder? Job 39:20 Canst thou make him afraid as a grasshopper? The glory of his nostrils is terrible. Job 39:21 He paweth in the valley, and rejoiceth in his strength: he goeth on to meet the armed men. Job 39:22 He mocketh at fear, and is not affrighted; neither turneth he back from the sword. Job 39:23 The quiver rattleth against him, the glittering spear and the shield. Job 39:24 He swalloweth the ground with fierceness and rage: neither believeth he that it is the sound of the trumpet. Job 39:25 He saith among the trumpets, Ha, ha; and he smelleth the battle afar off, the thunder of the captains, and the shouting.

The troops in Joel refer to them. They will not break ranks nor strive with one another as every one of them is contented with their calling. They are fearless and will hold on to their post. Despite being persecuted, they are found to be everywhere preaching the true gospel of Christ. They shall prophesy woes that is coming to the earth. They are the camp of the day of THE YAHWEH and is great and very terrible.

Joe 2:4 The appearance of them is as the appearance of horses; and as horsemen, so shall they run. Joe 2:5 Like the noise of chariots on the tops of mountains shall they leap, like the noise of a flame of fire that devoureth the stubble, as a strong people set in battle array. Joe 2:6 Before their face the people shall be much pained: all faces shall gather blackness. Joe 2:7 They shall run like mighty men; they shall climb the wall like men of war; and they shall march everyone on his ways, and they shall not break their ranks: Joe 2:8 Neither shall one thrust another; they shall walk everyone in his path: and when they fall upon the sword, they shall not be break off. Joe 2:9 They shall run to and fro in the city; they shall run upon the wall, they shall climb up upon the houses; they shall enter in at the windows like a thief. Joe 2:10 The earth shall quake before them; the heavens shall tremble: the sun and the moon shall be dark, and the stars shall withdraw their shining: Joe 2:11 And THE YAHWEH shall utter his voice before his army: for his camp is very great: for he is strong that executeth his word: for the day of THE YAHWEH is great and very terrible; and who can abide it?

title: Military Order and Discipline

segments.text: Military Order and Discipline

These shall be trained to have self-discipline, group discipline and task discipline through various exercises and activities I scripted for them in order they learn total obedience by following Our rules, regulations and instructions without questioning why they must do so; if not, Our determination will be thwarted.

We will train them to overcome evil with good, and loving not their lives unto death; through suffering humiliation, hunger, thirst, nakedness, being buffeted, being homeless, laboring, being reviled, persecuted or defamed, yet maintaining the peace in THE FATHER in resigning their lives to His hand, as fools to be counted worthy to be a Christ/ Anointed one.

2Ti 2:3 Thou therefore endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ. 2Ti 2:4 No man that warreth entangleth himself with the affairs of this life; that he may please him who hath chosen him to be a soldier. 2Ti 2:5 And if a man also strive for masteries, yet is he not crowned, except he strive lawfully.

1Co 4:9 For I think that God hath set forth us the apostles last, as it were appointed to death: for we are made a spectacle unto the world, and to angels, and to men. 1Co 4:10 We are fools for Christ's sake, but ye are wise in Christ; we are weak, but ye are strong; ye are honourable, but we are despised. 1Co 4:11 Even unto this present hour we both hunger, and thirst, and are naked, and are buffeted, and have no certain dwellingplace; 1Co 4:12 And labour, working with our own hands: being reviled, we bless; being persecuted, we suffer it: 1Co 4:13 Being defamed, we intreat: we are made as the filth of the world, and are the offscouring of all things unto this day.

title: Vigorous Army like Disciplinary Training

segments.text: Vigorous Army like Disciplinary Training
Like the discipline imposed by the Military in every countries, We also have Our disciplinary training requirements as dictated by Shekinaih.

title: 1) Be Timely In Co-Executing My Orders with Precision Details and Be Careful Not To Miss Out Anything

segments.text: 1) Be Timely In Co-Executing My Orders with Precision Details and Be Careful Not To Miss Out Anything

If one were to study most of the battles that the Israelites have fought and won, they will notice that it is because they had follow the instruction of The Angel of THE YAHWEH according to the timely and precise details.

Joshua was commanded by the captain of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH to place seven priests with rams' horns to lead his men of war to go round the city of Jericho once for six days and on the seven day; they are to encompass it seven times. And the priests shall blow with the trumpets and it shall come to pass, all the people shall shout with a great shout; and the wall of the city shall fall flat, and the people shall ascend up every man straight before him. When they followed according to the time and precise details, We, THE YAHWEH fulfilled Our promises and made it come to pass. (Jos 5:13-6:5)

Gideon also understood this principle to victory as can be seen when he obey Our instruction; through THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY. Following Our instruction, he divided the three hundred men into three companies, and putting a trumpet in every man's hand, with empty pitchers, and lamps within the pitchers, he instructed them to do what he will do when outside the enemies' camp. As they imitate Gideon by blowing their trumpet and breaking their pitcher and shouting, "THE SWORD OF THE YAHWEH and of Gideon", THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, and his hosts fought against the enemies from heaven and brought confusion to them and they fought and slaughter one another. (Jdg 7:15-22)

David also understood this principle of victory. As instructed by the Angel of THE YAHWEH, he set an ambush under the mulberry trees and when he heard marching sound of angels in the tops of the mulberry trees, he and his men attack the Philistines and the Angel of THE YAHWEH and the hosts smote the enemies' host with them. (1 Ch 14:14-16)

title: Vision of Lights Colliding

segments.text: Vision of Lights Colliding
I demand obedience and not sacrifices. Timely is equal to Kairos time. A particular time has been pre-selected for every pre-planned event.

Shekinaih: I see many points of light coming towards one another at a common destination and colliding together. It exploded into a bright light and I see the word "Kairos Time" was superimposed on it.
David: LORD JESUS, can you enlighten me on what Shekinaih saw?

JESUS: If the individual light are one minute earlier or one minute late in meeting together, they will have missed the perfect collision. The collision signifies "Kairos Time". There is a kairos time for Us to overturn every event and have the last laugh through Our Name, THE ADONAI.

The purpose of the Large Hadron Collider built beneath the Franco-Swiss border near Geneva, Switzerland by European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN) is to open the portal for Lucifer and Baal to come down to earth. The explosion from the collision at a kairos time, create a portal where beings from another dimension can enter into your dimension but they will not succeed until we permit it to happen at Our Kairos time.

For as the tower of Babel which was built to communicate with beings in other planets was destroyed by lightning and earthquake, so will be the facilities for the Large Hadron Collider be partly destroyed. Lucifer and Baal will indeed come down to earth but it will be according to THE FATHER's agenda. It will be after their defeat by the archangel Michael and after their stronghold in Venus and Mars are destroyed and the Large Hadron Collider is rebuilt. Then THE FATHER will release the key to open the bottomless pit through Shekinaih to you, and you shall open it and throw them into the earth so that they may fulfil the prophecy in the Book of Isaiah 14:4-27, Ezekiel 28:1-20 and Revelation 9:1-11, 12:7-9.

THE EL who has the final say in every event that is to happen in the Cosmoses, still decides how and when Lucifer and Baal with their angels will be thrown down to earth as scripted by THE FATHER, THE EHYEH who is the Mastermind and the Script Writer of the event of the Cosmoses.

title: 2) Great Attitude

segments.text: 2) Great Attitude
Those who are enlisted in My army, will be trained to have a great attitude in going through Our Disciplinary Trainings and not grumble so that they be not defeated in the Battle cry.

We requires Our troops to be in high morale of faith and be joyful in their battle cry. There should not be discontentment in Our camp for it is an evil spirit which will defile the armies and cause THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, and the holy angels to leave them.

Num 23:21 He hath not beheld iniquity in Jacob, neither hath he seen perverseness in Israel: THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM is with him, and the shout (H8643 "teruah" acclamation of battle cry, or joy) of a king is among them.

The wall of Jericho came down flat because the people shouted a great shout. During the shout, light came out of the mouth of Our warriors and form a giant ball of white light above the wall and a portal is opened for Our angels come out to demolish the wall.

Jos 6:20 So the people shouted when the priests blew with the trumpets: and it came to pass, when the people heard the sound of the trumpet, and the people shouted with a great shout (H8643 "teruah"), that the wall fell down flat, so that the people went up into the city, every man straight before him, and they took the city.

WE, through Our Name, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH dwell upon the Two Cherubim which represent Our glory. The 4 priests which carry the Ark signify the 4 camps of the heavenly hosts. Together with Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, they made up Our hosts. As above so below, Moses and Aaron are the counterpart of the Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, and physical Israel have their counterpart angels in heaven. So when Israel shout, light came out of their mouth to form giant ball of light where their counterpart angels will descend to fight for them. So when the Philistines make the remark that the gods that smote the Egyptians is come into their camp, they are referring to The Two Cherubim and the four camps of angels corresponding to Moses, Aaron and the Twelve Tribes of Israel.

1Sa 4:4 So the people sent to Shiloh, that they might bring from thence the ark of the covenant of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, which dwelleth upon the cherubims: and the two sons of Eli, Hophni and Phinehas, were there with the ark of the covenant of THE ELOHIM. 1Sa 4:5 And when the ark of the covenant of THE YAHWEH came into the camp, all Israel shouted with a great shout (H8643 "teruah"), so that the earth rang again. 1Sa 4:6 And when the Philistines heard the noise of the shout, they said, What meaneth the noise of this great shout (H8643 "teruah") in the camp of the Hebrews? And they understood that the ark of THE YAHWEH was come into the camp. 1Sa 4:7 And the Philistines were afraid, for they said, THE ELOHIM is come into the camp. And they said, Woe unto us! For there hath not been such a thing heretofore. 1Sa 4:8 Woe unto us! Who shall deliver us out of the hand of these mighty gods? These are the gods that smote the Egyptians with all the plagues in the wilderness.

The shout "teruah" is the voice or sound of triumph. When Israel shouts, they are exalting Us, THE YAHWEH ELOHIM, as the great King over all the earth. Therefore, you must train my army in singing praises to Us with this understanding. As they do this, your counterpart angel shall subdue the enemies under their feet.

Psa 47:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm for the sons of Korah. O clap your hands, all ye people; shout unto THE ELOHM with the voice (H6963 "qol") of triumph. Psa 47:2 For THE YAHWEH most high is terrible; he is a great King over all the earth. Psa 47:3 He shall subdue the people under us, and the nations under our feet. Psa 47:4 He shall choose our inheritance for us, the excellency of Jacob whom he loved. Selah. Psa 47:5 THE ELOHIM is gone up with a shout (H8643 "teruah"), THE YAHWEH with the sound of a trumpet. Psa 47:6 Sing praises to THE ELOHIM, sing praises: sing praises unto our King, sing praises. Psa 47:7 For THE ELOHIM is the King of all the earth: sing ye praises with understanding.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE VEHEMENT INTENSE FIRE OF PURGING OF THE TRINITY, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, IS OUR MIGHTY ARM AND STRONG HAND. Blessed are My people who knew the revelation of the joyful shout for they shall walk in the brightness glory of the Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, your counterpart angels and be protected and exalted.

Psa 89:13 Thou hast a mighty arm: strong is thy hand, and high is thy right hand. Psa 89:14 Justice and judgment are the habitation of thy throne: mercy and truth shall go before thy face. Psa 89:15 Blessed is the people that know the joyful shout (H8643 "teruah"): they shall walk, O YAHWEH, in the light of thy presence. Psa 89:16 In thy name shall they rejoice all the day: and in thy righteousness shall they be exalted. Psa 89:17 For thou art the glory of their strength: and in thy favour our horn shall be exalted. Psa 89:18 For THE YAHWEH is our defence; and the Holy One of Israel is our king.

Thereby, David, let the high praise of Our Name, THE EL, The Almighty, be in your mouth and in your worshippers; to execute vengeance and punishments upon My enemies; this honor have We given to all Our holy ones who follow both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.
THE YAHWEH through him will beautify the children of Zion with restoration of glory so that they may execute vengeance and punishment on the Kings and nobles of Antichrist who reign the nations.

Psa 149:1 Praise ye THE YAH. Sing unto THE YAHWEH a new song, and his praise in the congregation of saints. Psa 149:2 Let Israel rejoice in him that made him: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King. Psa 149:3 Let them praise his name in the dance: let them sing praises unto him with the timbrel and harp. Psa 149:4 For THE YAHWEH taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation. Psa 149:5 Let the saints be joyful in glory: let them sing aloud upon their beds. Psa 149:6 Let the exaltation (H7318 "romam" high praises) of THE EL be in their mouth, and a twoedged sword in their hand; Psa 149:7 To execute vengeance upon the heathen, and punishments upon the people; Psa 149:8 To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron; Psa 149:9 To execute upon them the judgment written: this honour have all his saints. Praise ye THE YAH

title: 3) Be Joyful

segments.text: 3) Be Joyful
My army must be joyful in undertaking all Our commands as this is the precedent towards Victory.
Joy is the fruit of THE HOLY SPIRIT and is holy. That is the reason why David who was a man after Our heart offered sacrifices of joy as he sang praises unto Us. (Ps 27:6)
Joy has energizes his Spirit man and made him holy and shortened the time for his progression to holiness and glory.

Holiness is the basic training discipline for those who are to be selected to fight Our battle; for the Angel of Our Presence, with their hosts walks in the midst of Our camp to fight for them and if the camp is defiled, the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, and the holy angels will not be with them. That is why those who are unclean are to be taken out of the camp until they are clean so as not to defile the camp. Therefore, heed our warnings, my children.

Deu 23:9 When the host goeth forth against thine enemies, then keep thee from every wicked thing. Deu 23:10 If there be among you any man, that is not clean by reason of uncleanness that chanceth him by night, then shall he go abroad out of the camp, he shall not come within the camp: Deu 23:11 But it shall be, when evening cometh on, he shall wash himself with water: and when the sun is down, he shall come into the camp again. Deu 23:12 Thou shalt have a place also without the camp, whither thou shalt go forth abroad: Deu 23:13 And thou shalt have a paddle upon thy weapon; and it shall be, when thou wilt ease thyself abroad, thou shalt dig therewith, and shalt turn back and cover that which cometh from thee: Deu 23:14 For THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM walketh in the midst of thy camp, to deliver thee, and to give up thine enemies before thee; therefore shall thy camp be holy: that he see no unclean thing in thee, and turn away from thee.

During training, if anyone continues to permit the unclean spirit of insubordination to defile them with bitterness and causes them to grudgingly undertake commands from Our Representatives without joy; they will also be taken out of the camp until they cleanse themselves of the uncleanness by joyful subordination to Our authorized representative.

But if they do not repent and be in subordination to the ordained authority, they will be casted out into outer darkness and shall weep and gnash their teeth with regrets for being rejected by Us and forfeiting their throne.

Therefore, it is important for their survival to keep themselves undefiled, else the devourer will devour them and drag them to TARTARUS to the point of no return, if they have unbelief and doubt and submit not to our representatives for this is THE PROTOCOL OF HEAVEN WRITTEN by Us FOR OUR LAST DAYS ARMY, SWEAR THE TRINITY.

Mat 8:5 And when Jesus was entered into Capernaum, there came unto him a centurion, beseeching him, Mat 8:6 And saying, THE YAHWEH, my servant lieth at home sick of the palsy, grievously tormented. Mat 8:7 And Jesus saith unto him, I will come and heal him. Mat 8:8 The centurion answered and said, THE YAHWEH, I am not worthy that thou shouldest come under my roof: but speak the word only, and my servant shall be healed. Mat 8:9 For I am a man under authority, having soldiers under me: and I say to this man, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth it. Mat 8:10 When Jesus heard it, he marvelled, and said to them that followed, Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel. Mat 8:11 And I say unto you, That many shall come from the east and west, and shall sit down with Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob, in the kingdom of heaven. Mat 8:12 But the children of the kingdom shall be cast out into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

title: 4) Walk in Line

segments.text: 4) Walk in Line
Our army must be trained to walk in line and never be out of orders but follow their ranking.
Shekinaih: I see a vision of army officers wearing white top marching on a parade in perfect coordination and saluting with outmost respect to the President.

JESUS: In the coming battle between light and darkness, My army must be discipline not to break rank. Those who are fearful and faint hearted will not be selected so that they will not affect the rest of the soldiers. Only those who are committed to serve Us whole heartedly and willing to die for their brothers, shall be made captains of the armies to lead the people. Those who are still anxious of houses, vineyard and wife will be disqualified from their calling.

Deu 20:1 When thou goest out to battle against thine enemies, and seest horses, and chariots, and a people more than thou, be not afraid of them: for THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM is with thee, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt. Deu 20:2 And it shall be, when ye are come nigh unto the battle, that the priest shall approach and speak unto the people, Deu 20:3 And shall say unto them, Hear, O Israel, ye approach this day unto battle against your enemies: let not your hearts faint, fear not, and do not tremble, neither be ye terrified because of them; Deu 20:4 For THE YAHWEH your ELOHIM is he that goeth with you, to fight for you against your enemies, to save you. Deu 20:5 And the officers shall speak unto the people, saying, What man is there that hath built a new house, and hath not dedicated it? Let him go and return to his house, lest he die in the battle, and another man dedicate it. Deu 20:6 And what man is he that hath planted a vineyard, and hath not yet eaten of it? Let him also go and return unto his house, lest he die in the battle, and another man eat of it. Deu 20:7 And what man is there that hath betrothed a wife, and hath not taken her? Let him go and return unto his house, lest he die in the battle, and another man take her. Deu 20:8 And the officers shall speak further unto the people, and they shall say, What man is there that is fearful and fainthearted? Let him go and return unto his house, lest his brethren's heart faint as well as his heart. Deu 20:9 And it shall be, when the officers have made an end of speaking unto the people, that they shall make captains of the armies to lead the people.

Only those who are short sighted and are not willing to undergo hardship and discipline to prepare themselves to be a good soldier of Jesus Christ shall be counted among the first born of the dead to be resurrected with eternal glory.

2Ti 2:3 Thou therefore endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ. 2Ti 2:4 No man that warreth entangleth himself with the affairs of this life; that he may please him who hath chosen him to be a soldier. 2Ti 2:5 And if a man also strive for masteries, yet is he not crowned, except he strive lawfully. 2Ti 2:6 The husbandman that laboureth must be first partaker of the fruits. 2Ti 2:7 Consider what I say; and THE YAHWEH give thee understanding in all things 2Ti 2:8 Remember that Jesus Christ of the seed of David was raised from the dead according to my gospel: 2Ti 2:9 Wherein I suffer trouble, as an evil doer, even unto bonds; but the word of THE ELOHIM is not bound. 2Ti 2:10 Therefore I endure all things for the elect's sakes, that they may also obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.

title: 5) In All Your Ways, Acknowledge Me

segments.text: 5) In All Your Ways, Acknowledge Me

We demand that Our army be not wise in their own eyes but in all their ways acknowledge Us and We shall make their way straight. Those who are chosen by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, will be disciplined never to be presumptuous but to always inquire from Us in all things.

The children of Israel once went to war against the tribe of Benjamin who refuse to hand over some inhabitants of Gibeah who raped and cause the death of the concubine of a Levite. With 26,000 men and 700 inhabitants of Gibeah, the Benjamites defeated the 400,000 men of Israel twice. In the first battle, they slaughter 22,000 of the men of Israel.

Jdg 20:18 And the children of Israel arose, and went up to the house of THE ELOHIM, and asked counsel of THE ELOHIM, and said, Which of us shall go up first to the battle against the children of Benjamin? And THE YAHWEH said, Judah shall go up first.

In the second battle, they slaughter 18,000 men of Israel. Each time the children of Israel inquire of Us, We told them to fight but they were defeated. Only in the third battle, did they won the war.

Jdg 20:22 And the people the men of Israel encouraged themselves, and set their battle again in array in the place where they put themselves in array the first day. Jdg 20:23 And the children of Israel went up and wept before THE YAHWEH until even, and asked counsel of THE YAHWEH, saying, Shall I go up again to battle against the children of Benjamin my brother? And THE YAHWEH said, Go up against him. Jdg 20:24 And the children of Israel came near against the children of Benjamin the second day. Jdg 20:25 And Benjamin went forth against them out of Gibeah the second day, and destroyed down to the ground of the children of Israel again eighteen thousand men; all these drew the sword.
David: LORD JESUS, why are they defeated in the first two battles even though you gave them the counsel to fight.

JESUS: The children of Israel were wise in their own eyes and did not sanctify Us when they gathered the men of war without inquiring from Us first whether they should fight the Benjamites or not. They reacted out of emotional outburst to retaliate for their rights being violated. It was only during the third time when they humble themselves through fasting and offered burnt offering and peace offerings that We did approve the battle and gave them victory.

Do not be presumptuous but always check with Us for the underlying reasons for any happening before taking things into your own hands. This is the better strategy instead of being emotionally Self-Righteous or Presumptuous.
This is the prerequisite training that are taught to all who are called to be in the army of THE YAHWEH.

Jdg 20:26 Then all the children of Israel, and all the people, went up, and came unto Bethel, and wept, and sat there before THE YAHWEH, and fasted that day until even, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before THE YAHWEH. Jdg 20:27 And the children of Israel enquired of THE YAHWEH, (for the ark of the covenant of THE ELOHIM was there in those days, Jdg 20:28 And Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron, stood before it in those days,) saying, Shall I yet again go out to battle against the children of Benjamin my brother, or shall I cease? And THE YAHWEH said, Go up; for tomorrow I will deliver them into thine hand.

title: 6) Walk In 100% Yieldedness And Faith.

segments.text: 6) Walk In 100% Yieldedness And Faith.
Shekinaih: I see a person holding a pole to balance himself as he walked upwards on a tight rope from a lower peak to a higher one.

The lower peak has the word "THEIR CURRENT SITUATION" and the higher peak have the word "NEW BREAKTHROUGH" written on it. The name written of the tight rope is written "100% FAITH PLUS YIELDEDNESS". The rope are supported by two hands with the word "SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID" written on it.
David: LORD JESUS, can you enlighten us further?

JESUS: To walk on a tight rope is not the feat of ordinary people and to walk on a sloped one is an impossible task. Only through 100% faith and yieldedness to Me through My Representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David, can one receives the seemly impossible new breakthrough as I had spoken, "With men it is not possible, but with THE ELOHIM, all things are possible to those who believe" Therefore those who are selected by Me through My Representatives will be disciplined to walk in 100% faith and yieldedness to them. Do not grieve the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, OUR TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY.

Psa 78:40 How oft did they provoke him in the wilderness, and grieve him in the desert! Psa 78:41 Yea, they turned back and tempted THE EL, and limited the Holy One of Israel. Psa 78:42 They remembered not his hand, nor the day when he delivered them from the enemy. Psa 78:43 How he had wrought his signs in Egypt, and his wonders in the field of Zoan:

title: 7) The 7 Squeezes of THE ADONAI as the Basic trainings.

segments.text: 7) The 7 Squeezes of THE ADONAI as the Basic trainings.
Those who are selected for the discipline training will be squeezed in the following area:
1) Financially
2) Physically
3) Mentally
4) Emotionally
5) Ridiculous
6) Impossible
7) Completely out of this world.
They will be disciplined to renew their mind to submit to Our thoughts and ways.

THE FATHER: In the last days, everyone that is thirsty for Our wine of prophetic teaching and the sincere milk of My HOLY SPIRIT, will have to incline their ear to the discipline of My last days' David, whom I have appointed to be a leader and commander of My people. We through him, will make an everlasting covenant even the sure mercies of David with the children We have given Shekinaih and him. This are My thoughts and My ways and surely I shall accomplish it through David, My SON'S Representative.

According to My chastening through Shekinaih, My children will be disciplined to give while they are financially tight, serve when they are physically exhausted, work while they are already mentally drained, make certain decisions which will emotionally grieve them, do certain acts that will made them look ridiculous, take on a task that is impossible to complete and speak of things that are completely out of the world. (For a detail study of these seven squeezes, please refer to Book 3 "Behold! My Messenger! Behold! My Names")

Isa 55:1 Ho, every one that thirsteth, come ye to the waters, and he that hath no money; come ye, buy, and eat; yea, come, buy wine and milk without money and without price. Isa 55:2 Wherefore do ye spend money for that which is not bread? and your labour for that which satisfieth not? hearken diligently unto me, and eat ye that which is good, and let your soul delight itself in fatness. Isa 55:3 Incline your ear, and come unto me: hear, and your soul shall live; and I will make an everlasting covenant with you, even the sure mercies of David. Isa 55:4 Behold, I have given him for a witness to the people, a leader and commander to the people. Isa 55:5 Behold, thou shalt call a nation that thou knowest not, and nations that knew not thee shall run unto thee because of THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, and for the Holy One of Israel; for he hath glorified thee. Isa 55:6 Seek ye THE YAHWEH while he may be found, call ye upon him while he is near: Isa 55:7 Let the wicked forsake his way, and the unrighteous man his thoughts: and let him return unto THE YAHWEH, and he will have mercy upon him; and to our ELOHIM, for he will abundantly pardon. Isa 55:8 For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways, saith THE YAHWEH. Isa 55:9 For as the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways, and my thoughts than your thoughts. Isa 55:10 For as the rain cometh down, and the snow from heaven, and returneth not thither, but watereth the earth, and maketh it bring forth and bud, that it may give seed to the sower, and bread to the eater: Isa 55:11 So shall my word be that goeth forth out of my mouth: it shall not return unto me void, but it shall accomplish that which I please, and it shall prosper in the thing whereto I sent it. Isa 55:12 For ye shall go out with joy, and be led forth with peace: the mountains and the hills shall break forth before you into singing, and all the trees of the field shall clap their hands. Isa 55:13 Instead of the thorn shall come up the fir tree, and instead of the brier shall come up the myrtle tree: and it shall be to THE YAHWEH for a name, for an everlasting sign that shall not be cut off.

title: 8) Total 100% Yieldedness

segments.text: 8) Total 100% Yieldedness

Shekinaih: I see the vision of the tight rope walker again, the pole that the person use for BALANCING has the word "YIELD" written on one end of the pole and on the other end is the word "FAITH" written.

JESUS: In order for My army to receive their seemly impossible new breakthrough, they must be discipline to balance their walk focusing on 100% yieldedness and 100% faith in order that they will not fall. Those who are chosen to be captain of our army, they must know and be responsible for what they do for it will affect those that are under them. When the leader is defeated, all those below him will also be defeated.
In 1Ch 21:1, Satan stood against Israel and provoked David to number Israel. Because of his pride, 70,000 were killed in a pestilence. (2Sam24:1-15)

Those who will be chosen to be manifested as sons of THE ELOHIM and to be used as vessels of honor are to discipline themselves and not fall into the wiles of the Diabolos/ Accuser which will cause the defeat of the armies as well.

title: 9) Maturity Training

segments.text: 9) Maturity Training

Everyone that is selected must be discipline to bear full responsibility of their thoughts and actions. They must be instructed in this basic truth that, every city or house divided against itself shall not stand.

Mat 12:25 And Jesus knew their thoughts, and said unto them, Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation; and every city or house divided against itself shall not stand: Mat 12:26 And if Satan cast out Satan, he is divided against himself; how shall then his kingdom stand?
Envying, strife and seditions are the works of the flesh and are energized by demons. Those who continue in them shall not be chosen to be manifested as sons of THE ELOHIM to rule in His Kingdom.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

Jas 3:14 But if ye have bitter envying and strife in your hearts, glory not, and lie not against the truth. Jas 3:15 This wisdom descendeth not from above, but is earthly, sensual, demonic. Jas 3:16 For where envying and strife is, there is confusion and every evil work.

Therefore, through discipline, the babes in Christ that are easily overcome by the spirit of envying, strife and division will be trained to grow into maturity in not setting their affection on exploits of their leaders but on Us who are their reward.

1Co 3:1 And I, brethren, could not speak unto you as unto spiritual, but as unto carnal, even as unto babes in Christ. 1Co 3:2 I have fed you with milk, and not with meat: for hitherto ye were not able to bear it, neither yet now are ye able. 1Co 3:3 For ye are yet carnal: for whereas there is among you envying, and strife, and divisions, are ye not carnal, and walk as men? 1Co 3:4 For while one saith, I am of Paul; and another, I am of Apollos; are ye not carnal? 1Co 3:5 Who then is Paul, and who is Apollos, but ministers by whom ye believed, even as THE YAHWEH gave to every man? 1Co 3:6 I have planted, Apollos watered; but THE ELOHIM gave the increase. 1Co 3:7 So then neither is he that planteth anything, neither he that watereth; but THE ELOHM that giveth the increase. 1Co 3:8 Now he that planteth and he that watereth are one: and every man shall receive his own reward according to his own labour.

The member of body of Christ (those who are called to be anointed) must be disciplined to care for one another because like the body of a human, if one member suffers, all the members will have to suffer with it. Therefore, babes who are training to be a Christ must grow up to maturity, to be responsible for their actions and to keep the unity in the bond of love.

1Co 12:23 And those members of the body, which we think to be less honourable, upon these we bestow more abundant honour; and our uncomely parts have more abundant comeliness. 1Co 12:24 For our comely parts have no need: but THE ELOHIM hath tempered the body together, having given more abundant honour to that part which lacked: 1Co 12:25 That there should be no schism in the body; but that the members should have the same care one for another. 1Co 12:26 And whether one member suffer, all the members suffer with it; or one member be honoured, all the members rejoice with it. 1Co 12:27 Now ye are the body of Christ, and members in particular.
In army profession, a soldier's exploits will lead him to promotion, merit and honor. But in Our discipline, walking in love is the best way to be promoted with empowering gifts and authority.

1Co 12:31 But covet earnestly the best gifts: and yet shew I unto you a more excellent way....1Co 13:3 And though I bestow all my goods to feed the poor, and though I give my body to be burned, and have not charity, it profiteth me nothing.

These after successfully disciplined THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, Our children shall be ordained with strength to still the adversary and haters.

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O THE YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth! Who hast set thy glory above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger.

title:

Perilous Time/
Uncoming Appearance Unexpected

segments.text:
Section B
