title:
ACT 2 SCENE 1 
The Awestruck

segments.text:
ACT 2 SCENE 1 
The Awestruck
Time Frame: Approximately 30 Years Plus or Minus, From Year 2018
Location: Worldwide Event(s)
The atmosphere that day was gloomy with abnormal weather phenomena with a polar shift which has just occurred.
Crops, worldwide were being affected by the strange abnormal weather causing a shortage of food supply.
Pestilence were evident everywhere causing epidemic outbreak uncontrollable.
Great flood were witness in different parts of the earth arriving from the melt down of the ice block that surround the earth with many cities under the water for a prolong period of time.
Many lives were lost.
Many parts of the earth were destroyed by falling asteroids which wipe out the entire cities and its nearby towns.
Lo! And Behold! THE TRINITY hovering above the earth with Shekinaih and Aaron K David were looking down at the earth with its inhabitants for any repented souls, to give them a second chance.
Sadly, all the earth dwellers were angry and cursed their Creator days and nights.

THE FATHER then turned to his right to look at JESUS, then He turn to look at Shekinaih and David in front of Him, and lastly, turn to His left looking at THE HOLY SPIRIT. With thoughts synchronising with each other with one mind, all began to nod their heads and spoke in unison, "Let's proceed to the next phase……"

title:
ACT 2 SCENE 2 
The Unexpected Appearance (Flashback) of
The Dreadful One

segments.text:
ACT 2 SCENE 2 
The Unexpected Appearance (Flashback) of
The Dreadful One
Time Frame: Year 2018 and beyond
Location: Worldwide Churches, across the Earth

As the Sun rises from the east every morning, suddenly out of the blue from nowhere, appear a man and a woman in bizarre clothes making a grand entrance into an auditorium that was packed with a large crowd.
The crowd with their hair standing stare in shock at the bizarre couple who have just made an entrance walking pass them towards the stage.

The Pastor who was leading the worship, opened wide his eyes and mouth in great shock, dropped his microphone all of a sudden, as he witnessed the appearance of this couple in white nuclear shielding suit which made them look like astronauts in space.

The woman in the white nuclear shielding suit picked up the microphone that the pastor had dropped from the stage floor and passed the microphone to her companion in like suit who was standing on her right.
The man took the microphone from her and then stared sternly at the Congregation.
All of a sudden, he began to mourn with a loud wailing as he knelt on the stage floor. As he groaned uncontrollably, excessive mucous was running down and dripping from his nose.
By now, the Pastor and his Congregation were moved emotionally with his loud cry and all began to sob as well.

Subsequently, after regaining his composure, he addressed the large crowd of the woes that is coming to this city with its dwellers, exhorting the Congregation to turn their heart back to God and repent; and to come out of Babylon in order for the Angel of Death to bypass their home (by passing them and their loved ones); to come under the covering of the real TRINITY through their Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, who decree and execute the decree for the Entire World and Cosmoses.
Upon repentance, Shekinaih took the microphone from David and announce THE TRINITY'S verdict and their final decision concerning this city and its people.

THE TRINITY, suddenly appeared and stood on her right, with golden crowns, golden robes and white robes in their hands and passed to Shekinaih which she then hand over to David, to put on those appointed Brides in this city as per Shekinaih's instruction according to THE TRINITY'S determination.

title:
Chapter 1 
Sudden Appearance From No Where

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Sudden Appearance From No Where
THE TRINITY then appeared to Shekinaih in another setting while they were in the midst of another congregation.

THE TRINITY then stepped into Shekinaih while they were both on the pulpit releasing their teaching and directing the congregation scene by scene what they have to go through following the foot step of JESUS/Aaron K David to the cross to crucify their flesh.

Shekinaih: I see a vision of a hairy man with a long black curly bushy hair in white robe shod with a sandal walking in the desert with a woman standing behind him. Following, I see that man wearing a black business suit standing on a speaker platform in an auditorium with the same woman in a golden Empress robe standing behind him again. Then I see the same man now wearing a white robe lifting up his hand toward heaven to pray; with the woman behind him also lifting up her hand to pray. As he pray, fire came down from heaven to consume the offerings that were placed before many sepulchres. Then, I see the same man in white robe following a trail of footprint walking up a hill slope toward a large cross on the top of a hill. Following him behind are a group of people wearing white. I see the man stepped on a trail of footprint which have been left by someone. The man stepped on this footprints and walked to the top of the hill. I see the word "JESUS" written on the foot print. I see the people behind this man stepping on the same trail of footsteps as they followed him.

I saw these words were written on the body of the woman," THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih" and on the body of the man wearing white robe and black suit in the above vision, these words, "JESUS REPRESENTED BY AARON K DAVID."
(Shekinaih then passed the microphone to David and JESUS stepped into him and began to teach through his mouth…

JESUS through David: The man is The Elijah that is to come. He will be tempted by Satan for a season. During the testing in the spiritual wilderness, he will grew spiritually and wax strong in the way of THE YAHWEH. He shall be exhibited as the masterpiece of the workmanship of THE YAHWEH as a manifestation of His holiness and power in the last day unto spiritual Israel. The Father will make it come to pass by using Shekinaih as His representative to polish and perfect him.
Luk 1:80 And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.

His unexpected appearance will perplex many in Christendom as he speaks in an auditorium telling of the coming woe with THE HOLY SPIRIT behind him. Like Elijah, the Tishbite from Gilead who appeared to King Ahab proclaiming to him of the famine which THE YAHWEH ELOHIM had determined, the same will tell The Powers behind The Current Ruling Nations of the perilous time that are coming upon them.

In the midst of this troubled time, he will be taken care by THE YAHWEH by those who have been humbled by THE YAHWEH and have made covenant with Him to help His messenger. These helpers are signified by the ravens (H6158 "oreb" mingled people) that came to Elijah at the river Cherith (H 3747 "keriyth" covenant)

As the famine also affects these people, he will be helped by the HOLY SPIRIT Heavenly Jerusalem and her first born who are blessed by THE YAHWEH because they gave their last meal to Elijah. They are signified by the widow and his son from Zarephath (H6886 "tsarephath" refiner) of Zidon (H6721 "tsidoyn" fisherman). THE HOLY SPIRIT is the "tsarephath" the refiner and the son are those who are called to be fishers of Adam. The offerings that are placed next to the many sepulchres which are consumed by fire when Elijah prayed, signify their sacrifice. THE YAHWEH will also make him to be a voice of influence and he will turn Spiritual Judah and Jerusalem to the way of THE YAHWEH. They shall be purified and cleansed by the baptism of fire and water that come out of his mouth when he teaches them. He will intercede for those who lay down their life as a living sacrifice unto THE YAHWEH and they will be acceptable unto THE YAHWEH.

Mal 3:1 Behold, I will send my messenger, and he shall prepare the way before me: and THE ADON, whom ye seek, shall suddenly come to his temple, even the messenger of the covenant, whom ye delight in: behold, he shall come, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 3:2 But who may abide the day of his coming? And who shall stand when he appeareth? For he is like a refiner's fire, and like fullers' soap: Mal 3:3 And he shall sit as a refiner and purifier of silver: and he shall purify the sons of Levi, and purge them as gold and silver, that they may offer unto THE YAHWEH an offering in righteousness. Mal 3:4 Then shall the offering of Judah and Jerusalem be pleasant unto THE YAHWEH, as in the days of old, and as in former years. Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.

The son of the widow that died and later resurrected by Elijah are the group of people in white that followed his footstep to the cross. They will be crucified like Jesus and be resurrected by Elijah (THE SHE/HE) in the last day.
Following, he will judge the sorcerers, the spiritual adulterers, the false swearers, and the persecutors of the Bride and the Anointed Ones of THE YAHWEH.

This will happen in perilous time when most of the churches fall into apostasy as the leaders commit spiritual fornication with Mystery Babylon. This is also a time, when the spirit of lawlessness is seven times more evil than the day of Noah because of the scorpion like evil angels that are going to be unleashed from the bottomless pit in Revelation 9:1-11. These evil angels will make their dwelling in false prophets and they will be like Jannes and Jambres who withstood Moses. These will withstand the last days Elijah. These evil angels through the false prophets will seduce many Christians who do not love the truth that is preached by The Elijah. Through their impartation of evil power which they taught to be gifts of THE HOLY SPIRIT, the deceived will be stung by their enchantment and their conscience will be numbed and their spiritual perception blinded. These deceived Christians will be spiritually mutated and will become egoist, covetous, boasters, proud, blasphemers, unfilial, unthankful, unholy, without natural affection, hostile, false accusers, incontinent, fierce, hostile to virtue, traitors, impulsive, proud, voluptuous and ungodly. These will have a form of godliness but will deny the power of THE ELOHIM; that is in the messenger of THE YAHWEH. They will become more and more evil and deceiving while they continue to deceive and being deceived. (2Ti 3:1-13)

The Elijah will decree, seal and bring war, famines, pestilences, earthquake, tsunamis, falling stars in certain part of the earth and those who became his disciple are also sent by him to prophesy these woes. They shall be hated of all nations and will be persecuted, delivered up to be afflicted and killed for their prophecy and for preaching the true gospel of Christ.

Luk 21:7 And they asked him, saying, Master, but when shall these things be? And what sign will there be when these things shall come to pass? Luk 21:8 And he said, Take heed that ye be not deceived: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and the time draweth near: go ye not therefore after them. Luk 21:9 But when ye shall hear of wars and commotions, be not terrified: for these things must first come to pass; but the end is not by and by. Luk 21:10 Then said he unto them, Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: Luk 21:11 And great earthquakes shall be in divers places, and famines, and pestilences; and fearful sights and great signs shall there be from heaven. Luk 21:12 But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake. Luk 21:13 And it shall turn to you for a testimony. Luk 21:14 Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer: Luk 21:15 For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist. Luk 21:16 And ye shall be betrayed both by parents, and brethren, and kinsfolks, and friends; and some of you shall they cause to be put to death. Luk 21:17 And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake. Luk 21:18 But there shall not an hair of your head perish. Luk 21:19 In your patience possess ye your souls.

As Elijah paved the way for Elisha, so will the last days Elijah paved the way for the last days Elisha in manifesting the glory of THE YAHWEH. As John the Baptizer introduces Jesus as the Christ, the last days John will introduce the sons of THE ELOHIM who are called to be his anointed, a Christ. Because no one is aware of their coming, many will be astonished. TODAY, THIS SCRIPTURE IS FULFILLED IN YOUR MIDST.

title:
Chapter 2 
Irritate The Mainstream Churches

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Irritate The Mainstream Churches

The unexpected uncomely appearance of the above mentioned man and his disciples will irritate the mainstream churches because they have never heard of him and he seems to be preaching a new doctrine. Like John the baptizer, he appears from nowhere and is as eccentric as Elijah and John in the bible. Many of the modern Pharisees will be admonished by him to repent and to bring fruit mete for repentance before they be hewn down by THE FATHER and cast into the lake of fire to be burned. But this will fall into deaf ears. (Mat 3:1-9)
His uncomely speech will offend many self-righteous religious Christians and ministers.
He will expose the modern days Pharisees of their critical spirit in judging sinners without mercy. He will expose the self-righteous snake and the crocodile of pride that is influencing them.

Mat 9:11 And when the Pharisees saw it, they said unto his disciples, Why eateth your Master with publicans and sinners? Mat 9:12 But when Jesus heard that, he said unto them, They that be whole need not a physician, but they that are sick. Mat 9:13 But go ye and learn what that meaneth, I will have mercy, and not sacrifice: for I am not come to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.
THE YAHWEH JESUS in him will casts out demons from many that are afflicted, but it would be accounted that it is through the prince of demons rather than through the finger of THE ELOHIM.

Mat 9:32 As they went out, behold, they brought to him a dumb man possessed with a demon. Mat 9:33 And when the demon was cast out, the dumb spake: and the multitudes marvelled, saying, It was never so seen in Israel. Mat 9:34 But the Pharisees said, He casteth out demons through the prince of the demons.
Those who knew him will be offended because of the wisdom and the mighty works that THE YAHWWEH will do in him and he will be lightly esteemed by his own country, relatives and friends.

Mat 13:54 And when he was come into his own country, he taught them in their synagogue, insomuch that they were astonished, and said, Whence hath this man this wisdom, and these mighty works? Mat 13:55 Is not this the carpenter's son? Is not his mother called Mary? And his brethren, James, and Joses, and Simon, and Judas? Mat 13:56 And his sisters, are they not all with us? Whence then hath this man all these things? Mat 13:57 And they were offended in him. But Jesus said unto them, A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house. Mat 13:58 And he did not many mighty works there because of their unbelief.
Those who do not have the revelation that THE YAHWEH JESUS is coming through the Messenger of the Covenant will reject him even though THE YAHWEH JESUS in him made the blind to see.

Joh 9:29 We know that THE ELOHIM spake unto Moses: as for this fellow, we know not from whence he is. Joh 9:30 The man answered and said unto them, Why herein is a marvellous thing, that ye know not from whence he is, and yet he hath opened mine eyes. Joh 9:31 Now we know that THE ELOHIM heareth not sinners: but if any man be a worshipper of THE ELOHIM, and doeth his will, him he heareth. Joh 9:32 Since the world began was it not heard that any man opened the eyes of one that was born blind. Joh 9:33 If this man were not of THE ELOHIM, he could do nothing.
THE YAHWEH JESUS in him will expose the hypocrisy of the modern days Pharisees and their doctrines which is from the Commandments of men

Mat 15:9 But in vain they do worship me, teaching for doctrines the commandments of men. Mat 15:10 And he called the multitude, and said unto them, Hear, and understand: Mat 15:11 Not that which goeth into the mouth defileth a man; but that which cometh out of the mouth, this defileth a man. Mat 15:12 Then came his disciples, and said unto him, Knowest thou that the Pharisees were offended, after they heard this saying? Mat 15:13 But he answered and said, Every plant, which my heavenly Father hath not planted, shall be rooted up. Mat 15:14 Let them alone: they be blind leaders of the blind. And if the blind lead the blind, both shall fall into the ditch.
THE YAHWEH JESUS in him will warn the last days' bride to take heed of the leaven of the modern days Pharisees which is their wrong doctrine and hypocrisy.

Mat 16:6 Then Jesus said unto them, Take heed and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees……..Mat 16:12 Then understood they how that he bade them not beware of the leaven of bread, but of the doctrine of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees. Luk 12:1 In the mean time, when there were gathered together an innumerable multitude of people, insomuch that they trode one upon another, he began to say unto his disciples first of all, Beware ye of the leaven of the Pharisees, which is hypocrisy.

He will be challenged by the modern Pharisees concerning the doctrines of Christendom so as to make him an offender of the word spoken by him. As the Pharisees of old had done to JESUS, their offspring will do it to JESUS who will come in the Angel of his Presence.
Mat 19:3 The Pharisees also came unto him, tempting him, and saying unto him, Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife for every cause?

In that day, those who are led astrayed by the modern Pharisees shall hear and see the true doctrine from the messenger and shall increase in their joy for being set free from missing the mark. They will try to make the spiritual Adam an offender for a word, and lay a snare for him when being reproved by him.

Isa 29:18 And in that day shall the deaf hear the words of the book, and the eyes of the blind shall see out of obscurity, and out of darkness. Isa 29:19 The meek also shall increase their joy in THE YAHWEH, and the poor among men shall rejoice in the Holy One of Israel. Isa 29:20 For the terrible one is brought to nought, and the scorner is consumed, and all that watch for iniquity are cut off: Isa 29:21 That make an Adam (H120) an offender for a word, and lay a snare for him that reproveth in the gate, and turn aside the just for a thing of nought.
When their plan is thwarted, they will be furious and will seek to lay hands on him but will refrain from doing this for a season for fear of the believers who took him for a prophet.
Mat 21:46 But when they sought to lay hands on him, they feared the multitude, because they took him for a prophet.

There will be a lot of controversy between him and the modern Pharisees regarding the doctrine of Christendom. But they will not be able to stand against the wisdom and the spirit of JESUS that is in him.

Mat 22:15 Then went the Pharisees, and took counsel how they might entangle him in his talk. Mat 22:16 And they sent out unto him their disciples with the Herodians, saying, Master, we know that thou art true, and teachest the way of THE ELOHIM in truth, neither carest thou for any man: for thou regardest not the person of men. Mat 22:17 Tell us therefore, What thinkest thou? Is it lawful to give tribute unto Caesar, or not? Mat 22:18 But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, Why tempt ye me, ye hypocrites? Mat 22:19 Shew me the tribute money. And they brought unto him a penny. Mat 22:20 And he saith unto them, Whose is this image and superscription? Mat 22:21 They say unto him, Caesar's. Then saith he unto them, Render therefore unto Caesar the things which are Caesar's; and unto THE ELOHIM the things that are THE ELOHIM's. Mat 22:22 When they had heard these words, they marvelled, and left him, and went their way.

THE YAHWEH JESUS in him will put all the modern Pharisees to silence by his answer to their tricky questions. And by asking questions in return regarding the scripture that they are not able to answer, they will no more be bold to tempt him with any questions anymore.

Mat 22:34 But when the Pharisees had heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, they were gathered together. ….Mat 22:41 While the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them, Mat 22:42 Saying, What think ye of Christ? Whose son is he? They say unto him, The Son of David. Mat 22:43 He saith unto them, How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying, Mat 22:44 THE YAHWEH said unto my ADON, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool? Mat 22:45 If David then call him ADON, how is he his son? Mat 22:46 And no man was able to answer him a word, neither durst any man from that day forth ask him any more questions.

As the bitterness against him builds up, it will climax when THE YAHWEH in him cry out against the modern Pharisees regarding their hypocrisy and their damnable heresies brought in privily by the founder of their sect. Like Jesus, he will be killed but will be resurrected by THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih.

Mat 23:34 Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city: Mat 23:35 That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar. Mat 23:36 Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation. Mat 23:37 O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, thou that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and ye would not! Mat 23:38 Behold, your house is left unto you desolate. Mat 23:39 For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of THE YAHWEH

title:
Chapter 3 
New Doctrine in the Last Days

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
New Doctrine in the Last Days

There will be hostility against the messenger and those who believe and follow him. The underlying reason for this hostility is because the gospel that they preached is contrary to the gospel of traditional churches. In the eyes of the authorities of the mainstream churches, they are bringing a new doctrine and deceiving the children of THE ELOHIM. This is far from the truth.

In the Jewish world of JESUS and His disciples, identification with a group was normally established by behavior based on unity of belief. They believed that JESUS was the Messiah, emptied himself of his glory as THE YAHWEH, incarnated in sinful flesh, condemned sin in the flesh by total obedience unto THE FATHER unto death, was resurrected from the dead, being restored to his former glory and thus fulfilled the progressive announcement that the Angel of the Covenant have announced on behalf of THE ELOHIM, starting from Abraham which continue unto the prophets as stated in the scripture. JESUS was sent to call people to walk as He walked in order to fulfill all righteousness in walking according to the way of THE YAHWEH.

Part of the work of John the Baptizer was to turn Jerusalem to the way of THE YAHWEH. It involve the knowledge of true salvation (being made whole to the image of THE ELOHIM) through true repentance from all our dead works of the flesh and coming out of the authority of Satan by turning from darkness to light by going through the suffering of a Christ (being an anointed one) and be sanctified through maintaining our peace and faith in JESUS who is the first to be resurrected from the dead into incorruption and immortality. This way of THE YAHWEH which leads to salvation is called the Way of Peace.

Luk 1:76 And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of THE YAHWEH to prepare his ways; Luk 1:77 To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins, Luk 1:78 Through the tender mercy of our ELOHIM; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us, Luk 1:79 To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.

Like John, Paul is preaching the same message saying none other things than those which the prophets and Moses did say should come: "that Christ should suffer, and that he should be the first that should rise from the dead, and should shew light unto the people, and to the Gentiles that there shall be a resurrection of the dead who walked according to his way".

Act 26:18 To open their eyes, and to turn them from darkness to light, and from the authority of Satan unto THE ELOHIM, that they may receive forgiveness of sins, and inheritance among them which are sanctified by faith that is in me. …Act 26:22 Having therefore obtained help of THE ELOHIM, I continue unto this day, witnessing both to small and great, saying none other things than those which the prophets and Moses did say should come: Act 26:23 That Christ should suffer, and that he should be the first that should rise from the dead, and should shew light unto the people, and to the Gentiles.

The truth is that we must strive to enter through the strait gate of tribulation and the narrow way of testing which will lead to the way of salvation/restoration of eternal life. This can only be accomplished by complete obedience in doing the will of THE FATHER by going through the tribulations being set before us as our trial of faith to produce peaceable fruits of righteousness unto holiness. This requires complete trust in THE YAHWEH despite the forcible wind of trouble. False prophets are those who walk in the flesh and do not do the will of THE FATHER. They might prophesied, cast out demons and do many miracles in JESUS's Name but if they are not 100% doing what they are told by THE FATHER, in the last days they will be rejected by him if they do not repent and bring fruits mete for repentance.

Mat 7:13 Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in thereat: Mat 7:14 Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it. Mat 7:15 Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves. Mat 7:16 Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles? Mat 7:17 Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit. Mat 7:18 A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit. Mat 7:19 Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire. Mat 7:20 Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them. Mat 7:21 Not everyone that saith unto me, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out demons? And in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity. Mat 7:24 Therefore whosoever heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them, I will liken him unto a wise man, which built his house upon a rock: Mat 7:25 And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell not: for it was founded upon a rock. Mat 7:26 And every one that heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them not, shall be likened unto a foolish man, which built his house upon the sand: Mat 7:27 And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell: and great was the fall of it. Mat 7:28 And it came to pass, when JESUS had ended these sayings, the people were astonished at his doctrine:
Act 14:22 Confirming the souls of the disciples, and exhorting them to continue in the faith, and that we must through much tribulation enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
This way of THE YAHWEH called ways of life is about incorruption and immortality through complete faith and obedience in THE YAHWEH.

Act 2:25 For David speaketh concerning him, I foresaw THE YAHWEH always before my face, for he is on my right hand, that I should not be moved: Act 2:26 Therefore did my heart rejoice, and my tongue was glad; moreover also my flesh shall rest in hope: Act 2:27 Because thou wilt not leave my soul in hell, neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption. Act 2:28 Thou hast made known to me the ways of life; thou shalt make me full of joy with thy countenance.
The disciples who were destined to be saved in JESUS' time knew the way and were willing to give up everything and live in singleness of heart so as to enter in.

Act 2:45 And sold their possessions and goods, and parted them to all men, as every man had need. Act 2:46 And they, continuing daily with one accord in the temple, and breaking bread from house to house, did eat their meat with gladness and singleness of heart, Act 2:47 Praising THE ELOHIM, and having favour with all the people. And THE YAHWEH added to the church daily such as should be saved.")

title:
Chapter 3 
New Doctrine in the Last Days (part 2)

segments.text: The way of THE YAHWEH is through following Jesus' example in fulfilling all righteousness by going through the tribulations that was ordained by THE FATHER for our perfection.
Joh 16:33 These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the Cosmos ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the Cosmos.
Paul was always resisted when he tried to dispute and persuade the teaching of "The Way".

Act 19:8 And he went into the synagogue, and spake boldly for the space of three months, disputing and persuading the things concerning the kingdom of THE ELOHIM…... Act 19:23 And the same time there arose no small stir about that way.

Paul called "The Way" he received, the mysteries of THE ELOHIM. It is the way to riches, glory and honor as kings in the age to come and life eternal. But first, all who walk in the way are appointed to death like JESUS so as to be a Christ. The created beings, the angels and men in the Cosmoses will witness their crucifixion in weakness of their struggles against the flesh with its affections and lust, the breaking of their heart and spirit through reproaches, their suffering from tribulations and persecutions in hunger, thirst, nakedness, being beaten and being made homeless. Being scolded, they bless, being persecuted, they bear long. Being defamed, they comfort others even though they are being treated as the filth of the Cosmoses and the scum of all things. This is the way of THE YAHWEH which Paul called "my ways which be in Christ" which he taught everywhere in every church. In all these, he suffers long, never losing his peace with THE FATHER.

1Co 4:1 Let a man so account of us, as of the ministers of Christ, and stewards of the mysteries of THE ELOHIM…1Co 4:7 For who maketh thee to differ from another? And what hast thou that thou didst not receive? Now if thou didst receive it, why dost thou glory, as if thou hadst not received it? 1Co 4:8 Now ye are full, now ye are rich, ye have reigned as kings without us: and I would to THE ELOHIM ye did reign, that we also might reign with you. 1Co 4:9 For I think that THE ELOHIM hath set forth us the apostles last, as it were appointed to death: for we are made a spectacle unto the world, and to angels, and to men. 1Co 4:10 We are fools for Christ's sake, but ye are wise in Christ; we are weak, but ye are strong; ye are honourable, but we are despised. 1Co 4:11 Even unto this present hour we both hunger, and thirst, and are naked, and are buffeted, and have no certain dwellingplace; 1Co 4:12 And labour, working with our own hands: being reviled, we bless; being persecuted, we suffer it: 1Co 4:13 Being defamed, we intreat: we are made as the filth of the world, and are the offscouring of all things unto this day. 1Co 4:14 I write not these things to shame you, but as my beloved sons I warn you. 1Co 4:15 For though ye have ten thousand instructors in Christ, yet have ye not many fathers: for in Christ Jesus I have begotten you through the gospel. 1Co 4:16 Wherefore I beseech you, be ye followers of me. 1Co 4:17 For this cause have I sent unto you Timotheus, who is my beloved son, and faithful in THE YAHWEH, who shall bring you into remembrance of my ways which be in Christ, as I teach everywhere in every church.

This is the way of THE YAHWEH to being a Christ by following the footsteps of our Apostle and high priest of our profession whose house are we, if we hold fast the confidence and the rejoicing of the hope firm unto the end by not hardening our hearts and provoking not THE FATHER in the day of our temptation like the generation of Moses in the wilderness. They were bitter of the testing and lost their peace and erred in their heart regarding the way of THE YAHWEH and cannot enter into the rest of THE FATHER.

Heb 3:1 Wherefore, holy brethren, partakers of the heavenly calling, consider the Apostle and High Priest of our profession, Christ Jesus; Heb 3:2 Who was faithful to him that appointed him, as also Moses was faithful in all his house. Heb 3:3 For this man was counted worthy of more glory than Moses, inasmuch as he who hath builded the house hath more honour than the house. Heb 3:4 For every house is builded by some man; but he that built all things is THE ELOHIM. Heb 3:5 And Moses verily was faithful in all his house, as a servant, for a testimony of those things which were to be spoken after; Heb 3:6 But Christ as a son over his own house; whose house are we, if we hold fast the confidence and the rejoicing of the hope firm unto the end. Heb 3:7 Wherefore (as the Holy Ghost saith, To day if ye will hear his voice, Heb 3:8 Harden not your hearts, as in the provocation, in the day of temptation in the wilderness: Heb 3:9 When your fathers tempted me, proved me, and saw my works forty years. Heb 3:10 Wherefore I was grieved with that generation, and said, They do I err in their heart; and they have not known my ways. Heb 3:11 So I sware in my wrath, They shall not enter into my rest.) Heb 3:12 Take heed, brethren, lest there be in any of you an evil heart of unbelief, in departing from the living ELOHIM.

The way of THE YAHWEH is the way of holiness through keeping the law in our heart and writing it in our minds and through the redemption works of JESUS entering the holiest with a true heart in full assurance of faith, having our hearts sprinkled from an evil conscience and our bodies washed with the spoken word of THE ELOHIM.

Heb 10:14 For by one offering he hath perfected for ever them that are sanctified. Heb 10:15 Whereof the Holy Ghost also is a witness to us: for after that he had said before, Heb 10:16 This is the covenant that I will make with them after those days, saith THE YAHWEH, I will put my laws into their hearts, and in their minds will I write them; Heb 10:17 And their sins and iniquities will I remember no more. Heb 10:18 Now where remission of these is, there is no more offering for sin. Heb 10:19 Having therefore, brethren, boldness to enter into the holiest by the blood of Jesus, Heb 10:20 By a new and living way, which he hath consecrated for us, through the veil, that is to say, his flesh; Heb 10:21 And having an high priest over the house of THE ELOHIM; Heb 10:22 Let us draw near with a true heart in full assurance of faith, having our hearts sprinkled from an evil conscience, and our bodies washed with pure water. Heb 10:23 Let us hold fast the profession of our faith without wavering; (for he is faithful that promised;) Heb 10:24 And let us consider one another to provoke unto love and to good works:

title:

They Uproot Evil/False/Partial Incomplete Doctrines

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
They Uproot Evil/False/Partial Incomplete Doctrines

Being Our Last Days Messenger, Our True Doctrines given to them, will expose the evil deception of the enemy to deceive My children even the elects with their imcomplete, half truth doctrines which have kept My children from our true gospel of restoration; thereby, many are still in bondage and majority of them did not go to heaven but hell instead.
We will uproot and expose the enemy's poison through them and set My children free from missing the mark; pulling them out of hell through them to heaven, We swear, saith THE TRINITY.

Thereby, We will send our purging fire and our hands will uproot the nearly 2,000 years of "Fake Salvation In Disguise" since the institutionalized of Christianity in the Roman Empire as well as the recent teaching of "Once Saved, Always Saved Serpentine in its origin".

Nevertheless, we will challenge the false teachers, false pastors, false prophets, false evangelist and false apostles that deceived Our children even Our elects in the last days, through Our last day messenger(s).

Last but not least, THE ELIJAH that we will send must come to set things back to Our original way, path and order again. See that none of you miss them through your least expected candidate(s). They are Shekinaih and Aaron K David," our incarnate, reincarnate" and reincarnate respectively representing us, THE TRINITY.

title:
Chapter 5 
The True Gospel Established By Last Days Messenger

segments.text:
Chapter 5 
The True Gospel Established By Last Days Messenger
The controversy between the mainstream churches and the Last Days' Elijah and his disciples will result in the true gospel being established.

The Revelation of the true gospel of a Christ/Anointed one; Christ in them, the hope of glory/salvation, to be restored back to Our image which Adam has come short because of him missing the mark through an uncircumcised heart, will be made known by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, the last days Moses and Elijah respectively.

This message will be first ridiculed, then violently opposed and finally accepted as self-evident. As Satan had hidden this true gospel for almost two thousand years from the incarnate/reincarnate sons, he will not sit still but will strongly prevent it from being preach but will be in vain for THE TRINITY, through Their Name, THE EL, who has THE FINAL SAY; and through Their Name, THE ADONAI, who HOLD THE LAST CARD AND WILL HAS THE LAST LAUGH, will prevail over her.

2Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them who will go into perdition: 2Co 4:4 In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ (of being an anointed one), who is the image of THE ELOHIM, should shine unto them. 2Co 4:5 For we preach not ourselves, but Christ Jesus The Lord; and ourselves your servants for Jesus' sake. 2Co 4:6 For THE ELOHIM, who commanded the light to shine out of darkness, hath shined in our hearts, to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of THE ELOHIM in the presence (through the angel of his presence) of Jesus Christ.

The controversy will take place during the time when many will claim to be Apostles and Prophets send by THE YAHWEH. It will be a time when there are wars in many countries and rumors of wars in other places. The world economy will not be good because of famines, pestilences and earthquakes in many places. Many Christians will be offended because they felt that THE ELOHIM has forsaken them due to the lie being taught in the church that they will be raptured and spared from these tribulations. They will no more believe in Him and will accept the mark of the beast to protect their life and for survival's sake. Satan will made war with The Elijah and the children that We THE YAHWEH given to Shekinaih and Aaron K David; and will hinder the gospel of the Kingdom to be preached in the entire world for a witness, but he will fail.

Mat 24:5 For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many. …Mat 24:9 Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake. Mat 24:10 And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another. Mat 24:11 And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many. Mat 24:12 And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold. Mat 24:13 But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved. Mat 24:14 And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.

The everlasting gospel will be preached unto those that dwell on the earth who are called to be a Christ in every nation and they will fear THE ELOHIM and give glory to THE TRINITY. They will all labor to work out their salvation/restoration with fear and trembling because of the coming judgment that is coming upon the world.

Rev 14:6 And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people, Rev 14:7 Saying with a loud voice, Fear THE ELOHIM, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

title:
ACT 2 SCENE 3
Tornado(es)/Hurricanes

segments.text:
ACT 2 SCENE 3
Tornado(es)/Hurricanes
Time Frame: Year 2018 and beyond
Location: Most Part of The Earth

One stormy night, on a coastal area of Los Angeles, a sudden hurricane begin to develop in the midst of a storm as lightning continue striking the water of the sea. The fully developed hurricane then break off and spawn fifteen equal size hurricanes and begin to spin inward inland from the sea toward the coastal area heading towards the city with its mass population, flattening /eradicating/devastating everything along their path.
Panic and chaotic crowd were screaming as they try to flee from this unassuming hurricanes of destruction.

Meanwhile, in the center of this city, a woman was kneeling down clasping her hands praying. Two hurricanes twisting at high speed towards her house suddenly divert and by pass her house one to the left and to the other leaving her house intact while rampaging the city in utter ruin.

Suddenly, THE TRINITY represented by Shekinaih in Golden Empress robe, came out of the opened Book, Behold! My Messenger 3, Behold! My Names which was lying on a table, appeared and stood in front of this woman and said to her,

"Because you are faithful in obeying all My commands and obey to do My will for your life unpresumptuous, I will also be faithful towards you and your household. Rise up quickly to flee from this town as My earthquakes and tsunamis will follow thereafter.

THE TRINITY: Los Angeles is a city with a history of past fallen angels hiding underground in tunnels and in caves; a city with evil and wickedness which have reached its fullest state, thereby, they will be destroyed by My angels of destroyer, female/male at the near future not too far away.
However, those who are under Our covering through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Shekinaih and Aaron K David of Crowned Eagles Global will be protected.
Therefore, only those who have been taught in Our ways of holiness by them and have been sealed by them will be unscratched during the time of calamities.

Henceforth, it is compulsory for all humanity to read all the four books and beyond and be in contact with Us through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); to be saved.
However, one third of the 144,000 are pre destined to be martyred, one third martyred and resurrected, and the remaining one third will be raptured.
Therefore, fear not for We are the script writer of each of your life.

My children must heed our warnings above and pay attention to the significant of this incident. It is a sign to them. The main hurricane signifies My (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); which shall multiply itself into many. The fifteen hurricanes signify the triple purging fire of THE TRINITY'S holiness through Our army of holy angels.

title: Whirlwind

segments.text: Whirlwind
They are the chariots of fire and horses of fire corresponding to the chariot of Heavenly Israel and the horsemen.

2Ki 2:1 And it came to pass, when THE YAHWEH would take up Elijah into heaven by a whirlwind (H5591 "saar" tempest from H5590 "saar translated also as sore troubled), that Elijah went with Elisha from Gilgal. 2Ki 2:11 And it came to pass, as they still went on, and talked, that, behold, there appeared a chariot of fire, and horses of fire, and parted them both asunder; and Elijah went up by a whirlwind into heaven. 2Ki 2:12 And Elisha saw it, and he cried, My father, my father, the chariot of Israel, and the horsemen thereof. And he saw him no more: and he took hold of his own clothes, and rent them in two pieces.
Job 40:6 Then answered THE YAHWEH unto Job out of the whirlwind, and said,

Eze 1:4 And I looked, and, behold, a whirlwind (H5591 "saar" translated also as "storm, tempest"), came out of the north, a great cloud, and a fire infolding itself, and a brightness was about it, and out of the midst thereof as the colour of amber, out of the midst of the fire. Eze 1:5 Also out of the midst thereof came the likeness of four living creatures. And this was their appearance; they had the likeness of a man.

The whirlwind are Our last days' four fold ministers/sons, which will sorely trouble the False Prophets of Mystery Babylon, which the city of Los Angeles, the city of fallen angels, is one of the main.

We will rend their lies which they have made many to believe through false prophets and bring it down to the earth like a wall daubed with untempered mortar through Shekinaih and you, and Our "Saar" sons.

Eze 13:10 Because, even because they have seduced my people, saying, Peace; and there was no peace; and one built up a wall, and, lo, others daubed it with untempered morter: Eze 13:11 Say unto them which daub it with untempered morter, that it shall fall: there shall be an overflowing shower; and ye, O great hailstones, shall fall; and a stormy (H5591 "saar") wind shall rend it. Eze 13:12 Lo, when the wall is fallen, shall it not be said unto you, Where is the daubing wherewith ye have daubed it? Eze 13:13 Therefore thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH; I will even rend it with a stormy (H5591 "saar") wind in my fury; and there shall be an overflowing shower in mine anger, and great hailstones in my fury to consume it. Eze 13:14 So will I break down the wall that ye have daubed with untempered morter, and bring it down to the ground, so that the foundation thereof shall be discovered, and it shall fall, and ye shall be consumed in the midst thereof: and ye shall know that I am THE YAHWEH. Eze 13:15 Thus will I accomplish my wrath upon the wall, and upon them that have daubed it with untempered morter, and will say unto you, The wall is no more, neither they that daubed it; Eze 13:16 To wit, the prophets of Israel which prophesy concerning Jerusalem, and which see visions of peace for her, and there is no peace, saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH.
