title:
Act 2 Scene 4 
The Rejects

segments.text:
Act 2 Scene 4 
The Rejects
Time Frame: Year 2018 onwards
Location: Worldwide in the Heavenly Planet(s)

Lo! And Behold! There is a commotion outside Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue. Many Pastors and Teachers gather to visit Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS; and those under them. Hearing the doorbell ring, Esther then walks out to the main gate to open the door to welcome them in.
Upon arriving at the main hall of the Meeting Venue, they begin to scrutinize the articles at the main altar of THE TRINITY and their opinions begin to form.
Shortly, Shekinaih and Aaron K David walk to the hall to greet them and invite them to be seated on the white chairs in the hall.
One by one begin to air their opinion from their carnal perspective regarding those articles they have just inspected forming a bias opinion.
Shekinaih and David remain silent throughout carefully listening to their every comment and wrote them down one by one.

After the last person stood up to air his bias opinion from their carnal perspective, THE TRINITY in white suddenly appear to Shekinaih to hand her a decree stating their answers to all their criticism. She then rises up from her seat and wrote them on the white board every one of their objections with the corresponding TRINITY'S answer. Upon completion, she passes the microphone to David to broadcast and articulate THE TRINITY'S ultimate wisdom written by her on the white board and David begin to expound them to the crowd who are staring at him with unblinking eyes while Shekinaih was praying to remove the blindfold and the carnal strongholds from them.
Upon finishing his last line, David asks the crowd, "Anybody got further dispute from THE TRINTY'S reply to you?" as he looks intently into the eyes of each of these Pastors and Teachers.
All eyes are wide open; with wide open mouth they begin to kneel down, regretting from being wise in their own eyes, seeking forgiveness from THE TRINITY baring their hearts out in transparency.
David begin to take his guitar to strum upon receiving a signal from Shekinaih representing THE TRINITY; making seven rounds around them to demolish , "The wall of Jericho" in them.

Behold! Heaven begin to open with many angels descending upon the place to surround these Pastors and Teachers, bringing the rewards for these Pastors and Teachers for their sincere repentance. Shekinaih begin to pass the robes of righteousness, the gold crowns for the overcomers and breakthroughs, for David to clothe, crown and to reward these Pastors with their long awaited breakthrough.

"And so it shall be for those who genuinely repented before Us through Shekinaih and Aaron K David, Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, in Crowned Eagles Global, Our Last Day Ministry" , THE TRINITY exclaimed.

Thereafter, after the meeting is over, while Shekinaih and Aaron K David are praying and thanking THE TRINITY for their faithfulness and mercy, THE TRINITY suddenly appears and said to them in unison voice, "This will be the norm, in this Last Days Ministry We have called both of you to be in!"

title:
Chapter 1 
Rejected by the Intellectual Christians

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Rejected by the Intellectual Christians

As Shekinaih and you, and the children whom THE FATHER have given you, are not so intellectual and are uncomely ordinary people who are not eloquent in speech, you all will be rejected by most of the intellectual Christians. The people in this age flock to men of wisdom who has Charisma and Excellency of speech. Most people judge by appearance and not according to what a person really is in heart. They do not know that We, THE YAHWEH reveals Our deep things to those who love Us and not to the wise, mighty and rich. So, they will disapprove and reject Shekinaih and you, and Our little ones without a second thought because they are repulsive to them. Though these intellects were exposed of their spiritual bankruptcy through the true gospel preached by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR), THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE LAST DAYS MOSES AND ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, that are based on precept upon precept and line upon line from the Bible, they will still reject, despise, loathe and disdain all of you. They will continue to treat all of you as vile persons. They may marvel at your doctrines seeing that all of you are unlearned, but they will still reject all of you because you are not from any reputable Theological Institution or recognized by any legitimate Christian Organization.

1Co 2:1 And I, brethren, when I came to you, came not with excellency of speech or of wisdom, declaring unto you the testimony of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 2:2 For I determined not to know anything among you, save Jesus Christ, and him crucified. 1Co 2:3 And I was with you in weakness, and in fear, and in much trembling. 1Co 2:4 And my speech and my preaching was not with enticing words of man's wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power: 1Co 2:5 That your faith should not stand in the wisdom of men, but in the power of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 2:6 Howbeit we speak wisdom among them that are perfect: yet not the wisdom of this age (G165 "aion"), nor of the princes of this age, that come to nought: 1Co 2:7 But we speak the wisdom of THE ELOHIM in a mystery, even the hidden wisdom, which THE ELOHIM ordained before the age unto our glory: 1Co 2:8 Which none of the princes of this age knew: for had they known it, they would not have crucified THE YAHWEH of glory. 1Co 2:9 But as it is written, Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which THE ELOHIM hath prepared for them that love him. 1Co 2:10 But THE ELOHIM hath revealed them unto us by his Spirit: for the Spirit searcheth all things, yea, the deep things of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 2:11 For what man knoweth the things of a man, save the spirit of man which is in him? Even so the things of THE ELOHIM knoweth no man, but the Spirit of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 2:12 Now we have received, not the spirit of the Cosmos (G2889 "kosmos"), but the spirit which is of THE ELOHIM; that we might know the things that are freely given to us of THE ELOHIM. 1Co 2:13 Which things also we speak, not in the words which man's wisdom teacheth, but which the Holy Ghost teacheth; comparing spiritual with spiritual. 1Co 2:14 But the natural man receiveth not the things of the Spirit of THE ELOHIM: for they are foolishness unto him: neither can he know them, because they are spiritually discerned. 1Co 2:15 But he that is spiritual judgeth all things, yet he himself is judged of no man. 1Co 2:16 For who hath known the mind (G3563 "nous" intellect, understanding) of THE YAHWEH, that he may be walk with (G4822 "sumbibazo" from (G4862 "sun" with or together, G939 "basis" feet) him? But we have the mind of a Christ.

title:
Chapter 2 
Rejected By Those Who Seek the Easy Way

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Rejected By Those Who Seek the Easy Way

Many Christians are heading into perdition because of their lack of knowledge of Our way. Athough THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, with Our children, continue to proclaim the true gospel to these Christians. But these Christians with a seared conscience will not accept your message but preferred to choose the broad gate of unsanctified grace, to live in sin without remorse, believing that when they die, they will still enter heaven.

These will contest that it is by grace that they are saved and not by works and that I, JESUS, have forgiven their sin on the cross and had made them righteous once and for all and there remains nothing they need to do except to believe. This is half-truth, and if only they are willing to listen without prejudice and search the scriptures like the Bereans to see whether what you taught were true or not, We would have given them more grace to be converted and not perish and end up in Perdition in the day of judgment. (Act 17:10-11)

The truth is, they are not saved (made whole and restored to glory) until through my grace and through their faith, they are willing to carry the cross and walk the path in crucifying the flesh of the affections and lusts. This is what has been ordained for them to walk in order to have eternal life.

Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye made whole (G4982 "sozo") through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained ( G4282 "proetoimazo" fit up in advance) that we should walk in them.

It is not solely by grace but through obedience of faith are one made righteous, sanctified and redeemed; provided one yield to the chastening of THE FATHER so as to yield the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto holiness to enter heaven to see Him.

1Co 1:30 But of him are ye in Christ Jesus, who of THE ELOHIM is made unto us wisdom, and righteousness, and sanctification, and redemption: 1Co 1:31 That, according as it is written, He that boasteth, let him boast in THE YAHWEH.

Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby.

Therefore, the truth is they are far from being redeemed. It is only if they abide in my word spoken through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, who is THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, shall they be My disciple indeed and the truth shall set them free from sin/missing our mark of holiness. If not they are still a slave under bondage, coming short of Our glory.

Joh 8:31 Then said Jesus to those Jews which believed on him, If ye continue in my word, then are ye my disciples indeed; Joh 8:32 And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free. Joh 8:33 They answered him, We be Abraham's seed, and were never in bondage to any man: how sayest thou, Ye shall be made free? Joh 8:34 Jesus answered them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whosoever committeth sin is the slave (G1410 "doulos") of sin. Joh 8:35 And the slave abideth not in the house for ever: but the Son abideth ever.

It is a fact that many are still in bondage to the prince of the authority of the air (Eph 2:1-3) if they are still walking in the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes and in the pride of life. As they are still captive to them on earth, they will be dragged by them into hell and remain captive to them there. This is what is written, "They which do such things (the works of the flesh) shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM" (Gal 5:19-21)

In the last days only those who are overcomers shall inherit those things that are promised to them by us through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David. Many have to overcome from being deceived by false Apostles and from their damnable heresies and to return to their first love in feeding and keeping My sheep with the true gospel taught by My Elijah and his disciples so that they can enter paradise to eat from The Tree of Life. (Acts 19:28-32, Joh 21:15-17)

Rev 2:1 Unto the angel of the church of Ephesus write; These things saith he that holdeth the seven stars in his right hand, who walketh in the midst of the seven golden candlesticks; Rev 2:2 I know thy works, and thy labour, and thy patience, and how thou canst not bear them which are evil: and thou hast tried them which say they are apostles, and are not, and hast found them liars: Rev 2:3 And hast borne, and hast patience, and for my name's sake hast laboured, and hast not fainted. Rev 2:4 Nevertheless I have somewhat against thee, because thou hast left thy first love. Rev 2:5 Remember therefore from whence thou art fallen, and repent, and do the first works; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will remove thy candlestick out of his place, except thou repent. Rev 2:6 But this thou hast, that thou hatest the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate. Rev 2:7 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of THE ELOHIM.
Many have to overcome much tribulation and defamation and be thrown into prison and to remain faithful unto death so that they will not be hurt in the second death.

Rev 2:8 And unto the angel of the church in Smyrna write; These things saith the first and the last, which was dead, and is alive; Rev 2:9 I know thy works, and tribulation, and poverty, (but thou art rich) and I know the blasphemy of them which say they are Jews, and are not, but are the synagogue of Satan. Rev 2:10 Fear none of those things which thou shalt suffer: behold, the devil shall cast some of you into prison, that ye may be tried; and ye shall have tribulation ten days: be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life. Rev 2:11 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; He that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.

Many have to overcome fear of death as they hold fast and not deny THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, who bear Our Name, but willing to die as a martyr, and not be bribed by the Antichrist to commit spiritual fornication with the Mystery Babylon, so that they can eat of the hidden manna of present truth, and be given a white stone with a new name written, which no man knows except themselves.

Rev 2:12 And to the angel of the church in Pergamos write; These things saith he which hath the sharp sword with two edges; Rev 2:13 I know thy works, and where thou dwellest, even where Satan's seat is: and thou holdest fast my name, and hast not denied my faith, even in those days wherein Antipas was my faithful martyr, who was slain among you, where Satan dwelleth. Rev 2:14 But I have a few things against thee, because thou hast there them that hold the doctrine of Balaam, who taught Balac to cast a stumblingblock before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed unto idols, and to commit fornication. Rev 2:15 So hast thou also them that hold the doctrine of the Nicolaitans, which thing I hate. Rev 2:16 Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the sword of my mouth. Rev 2:17 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the hidden manna, and will give him a white stone, and in the stone a new name written, which no man knoweth saving he that receiveth it.

Many have to stop relying in the wisdom and might of men in order to expand their ministry through their compromise with spiritual Babylon, and not to permit the spirit of Jezebel to seduce and defile them as they come under the leadership of some movement under the guise of church unity. Unless they overcome this seduction, they will forfeit their authority over the nations in the age to come.

title:
Chapter 2 
Rejected By Those Who Seek the Easy Way (part 2)

segments.text: Rev 2:18 And unto the angel of the church in Thyatira write; These things saith the Son of the ELOHIM, who hath his eyes like unto a flame of fire, and his feet are like fine brass; Rev 2:19 I know thy works, and charity, and service, and faith, and thy patience, and thy works; and the last to be more than the first. Rev 2:20 Notwithstanding I have a few things against thee, because thou sufferest that woman Jezebel, which calleth herself a prophetess, to teach and to seduce my servants to commit fornication, and to eat things sacrificed unto idols. Rev 2:21 And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented not. Rev 2:22 Behold, I will cast her into a bed, and them that commit adultery with her into great tribulation, except they repent of their deeds. Rev 2:23 And I will kill her children with death; and all the churches shall know that I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts: and I will give unto every one of you according to your works. Rev 2:24 But unto you I say, and unto the rest in Thyatira, as many as have not this doctrine, and which have not known the depths of Satan, as they speak; I will put upon you none other burden. Rev 2:25 But that which ye have already hold fast till I come. Rev 2:26 And he that overcometh, and keepeth my works unto the end, to him will I give power over the nations: Rev 2:27 And he shall rule them with a rod of iron; as the vessels of a potter shall they be broken to shivers: even as I received of my Father. Rev 2:28 And I will give him the morning star. Rev 2:29 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.
Many have to overcome their insincerity and walk in purity of heart so as to be truly called a Christ in order that their name is not blotted out from the book of life.

Rev 3:1 And unto the angel of the church in Sardis write; These things saith he that hath the seven Spirits of God, and the seven stars; I know thy works, that thou hast a name that thou livest, and art dead. Rev 3:2 Be watchful, and strengthen the things which remain, that are ready to die: for I have not found thy works perfect before God. Rev 3:3 Remember therefore how thou hast received and heard, and hold fast, and repent. If therefore thou shalt not watch, I will come on thee as a thief, and thou shalt not know what hour I will come upon thee. Rev 3:4 Thou hast a few names even in Sardis which have not defiled their garments; and they shall walk with me in white: for they are worthy. Rev 3:5 He that overcometh, the same shall be clothed in white raiment; and I will not blot out his name out of the book of life, but I will confess his name before my Father, and before his angels. Rev 3:6 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

Many have to overcome the persecutions by the synagogue of Satan and the testing that shall come upon all the world to try them. They have to guard the oracle given by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE LAST DAYS MOSES AND AARON, THE LAST DAYS ELIJAH WHO CAME TO RESTORE ALL, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, who bear Our Name and not deny Us in Shekinaih and you, so that they will receive the crown and be a pillar in the temple and be counted as the Bride of THE YAHWEH, the Heavenly Jerusalem.

Rev 3:7 And to the angel of the church in Philadelphia write; These things saith he that is holy, he that is true, he that hath the key of David, he that openeth, and no man shutteth; and shutteth, and no man openeth; Rev 3:8 I know thy works: behold, I have set before thee an open door, and no man can shut it: for thou hast a little power, and hast guard my oracle (G3056 "logos"), and hast not denied my name. Rev 3:9 Behold, I will make them of the synagogue of Satan, which say they are Jews, and are not, but do lie; behold, I will make them to come and worship before thy feet, and to know that I have loved thee. Rev 3:10 Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth. Rev 3:11 Behold, I come quickly: which cometh down out of heaven from my ELOHIM: and I will write upon him my new name. Rev 3:13 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches. Rev 3:12 Him that overcometh will I make a pillar in the temple of my ELOHIM, and he shall go no more out: and I will write upon him the name of my ELOHIM, and the name of the city of my ELOHIM, which is new Jerusalem, which cometh down out of heaven from my ELOHIM: and I will write upon him my new name.

Many have to overcome their lack of passion in their works toward Us, THE YAHWEH because of their riches and assets. They will have to be anointed to see their spiritual nakedness so that they will be willing to go through the tribulations in order to be approved and to be clothed with glory to sit with JESUS in His throne.

Rev 3:14 And unto the angel of the church of the Laodiceans write; These things saith the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the beginning of the creation of THE ELOHIM; Rev 3:15 I know thy works, that thou art neither cold nor hot: I would thou wert cold or hot. Rev 3:16 So then because thou art lukewarm, and neither cold nor hot, I will spue thee out of my mouth. Rev 3:17 Because thou sayest, I am rich, and increased with goods, and have need of nothing; and knowest not that thou art wretched, and miserable, and poor, and blind, and naked: Rev 3:18 I counsel thee to buy of me gold tried in the fire, that thou mayest be rich; and white raiment, that thou mayest be clothed, and that the shame of thy nakedness do not appear; and anoint thine eyes with eyesalve, that thou mayest see. Rev 3:19 As many as I love, I rebuke and chasten: be zealous therefore, and repent. Rev 3:20 Behold, I stand at the door, and knock: if any man hear my voice, and open the door, I will come in to him, and will sup with him, and he with me. Rev 3:21 To him that overcometh will I grant to sit with me in my throne, even as I also overcame, and am set down with my Father in his throne. Rev 3:22 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

Only the overcomers shall inherit what was promised to them and be called a son of THE ELOHIM. But the fearful or unfaithful who betray Shekinaih and David, the proud who despised and rejected them, the liars that accuse them, those who devised wicked imaginations and whose feet that be swift in running to mischief to harm them, those who bear false witness against and sow discord among them, those who hated them, those who commit spiritual adultery with the world, those who deceive others by spiritual sorcery, and those who are covetous and liars shall be burned with fire and brimstone.

Rev 21:7 He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his ELOHIM, and he shall be my son. Rev 21:8 But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.

Pro 6:16 These six things doth THE YAHWEH hate: yea, seven are an abomination unto him: Pro 6:17 A proud look, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood, Pro 6:18 An heart that deviseth wicked imaginations, feet that be swift in running to mischief, Pro 6:19 A false witness that speaketh lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.

Therefore, those who are still entering through the broad gate should be wary of the warning given above. Beware of the false prophets of Jezebel. It is not by the fruits of how big or famous or recognized is their organization or institution but by how abiding are they in the truth of the gospel and how obedient are they in the faith doing the will of THE FATHER are they judged whether they are my true ministers or not.

title:
Chapter 2 
Rejected By Those Who Seek the Easy Way (part 3)

segments.text: Mat 7:13 Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad (G2149 "euruchoros" spacious) is the way, that leadeth to perdition (G684 "apoleia"), and many there be which go in thereat: Mat 7:14 Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it. Mat 7:15 Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves. Mat 7:16 Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles? Mat 7:17 Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit. Mat 7:18 A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit. Mat 7:19 Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire. Mat 7:20 Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them. Mat 7:21 Not everyone that saith unto me, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out devils? And in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity.
Do not fall into the sins of not loving the truth and with a seared conscience said in your heart, "the old doctrine is easy".

Luk 5:36 And he spake also a parable unto them; No man putteth a piece of a new garment upon an old; if otherwise, then both the new maketh a rent, and the piece that was taken out of the new agreeth not with the old. Luk 5:37 And no man putteth new wine into old bottles; else the new wine will burst the bottles, and be spilled, and the bottles shall perish. Luk 5:38 But new wine must be put into new bottles; and both are preserved. Luk 5:39 No man also having drunk old wine straightway desireth new: for he saith, The old is easy (G5543 "chrestos").

Let everyone who read this book meditate in their beds that the beloved shepherd boy is not to be found in the broad ways. Let them also be aware that the false prophets of Jezebel will not tell you that he is in the straits gate where persecutions and tribulations awaits. If you wanted to be chosen among the valiant of Spiritual Israel, let him hear what THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH have to say unto the churches.

Son 3:1 By night on my bed I sought him whom my soul loveth: I sought him, but I found him not. Son 3:2 I will rise now, and go about the city in the streets, and in the broad ways I will seek him whom my soul loveth: I sought him, but I found him not. Son 3:3 The watchmen that go about the city found me: to whom I said, Saw ye him whom my soul loveth? Son 3:4 It was but a little that I passed from them, but I found him whom my soul loveth: I held him, and would not let him go, until I had brought him into my mother's house, and into the chamber of her that conceived me. Son 3:5 I charge you, O ye daughters of Jerusalem, by the roes, and by the hinds of the field, that ye stir not up, nor awake my love, till he please. Son 3:6 Who is this that cometh out of the wilderness like pillars of smoke, perfumed with myrrh and frankincense, with all powders of the merchant? Son 3:7 Behold his bed, which is Solomon's; threescore valiant men are about it, of the valiant of Israel. Son 3:8 They all hold swords, being expert in war: every man hath his sword upon his thigh because of fear in the night. Son 3:9 King Solomon made himself a chariot of the wood of Lebanon. Son 3:10 He made the pillars thereof of silver, the bottom thereof of gold, the covering of it of purple, the midst thereof being paved with love, for the daughters of Jerusalem. Son 3:11 Go forth, O ye daughters of Zion, and behold king Solomon with the crown wherewith his mother crowned him in the day of his espousals, and in the day of the gladness of his heart.

Those who insist to walk in the broad ways will not be able to find anyone there that executes justice and seeks truth. There, you will find the stiff necked who stubbornly refused to repent and turn back from their duplicity even though We, THE YAHWEH have disciplined and corrected them. There you will find the great men who refuse to neither acknowledge the way of THE YAHWEH nor submit to the discipline of Our messenger, Shekinaih and you, Our Two Representatives. There you will find increasing number of lawless and the backsliders. There you will find the spiritual adulterers and foolish people without understanding who in self-deception believe that no evil will happen to them for rejecting and scoffing the judgment of THE YAHWEH. There you will find a revolting and a rebellious people who do not fear THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, that teaches Our righteousness and the coming judgment. There you will find wicked ministers that set a trap to catch the soul of men who are deceitful themselves. There you will find the great and the rich who rejected and despised THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR EL WHO HAD THE FINAL SAY IN ALL EVENTS, but will speak well of the false prophets that prophesy falsely. There you will find the priests that bear rule by their means and there you will find multitudes who love to have it so.

Jer 5:1 Run ye to and fro through the streets of Jerusalem, and see now, and know, and seek in the broad places thereof, if ye can find a man, if there be any that executeth judgment, that seeketh the truth; and I will pardon it. Jer 5:2 And though they say, THE YAHWEH liveth; surely they swear falsely. Jer 5:3 O THE YAHWEH, are not thine eyes upon the truth? Thou hast stricken them, but they have not grieved; thou hast consumed them, but they have refused to receive correction: they have made their faces harder than a rock; they have refused to return. Jer 5:4 Therefore I said, Surely these are poor; they are foolish: for they know not the way of THE YAHWEH, nor the judgment of their THE ELOHIM. Jer 5:5 I will get me unto the great men, and will speak unto them; for they have known the way of THE YAHWEH, and the judgment of their THE ELOHIM: but these have altogether broken the yoke, and burst the bonds.

Paul saw the last day's apostasy and wrote in many of his epistles about Christians in the last days that will not hold up to sound doctrine but after their own lusts shall pile up to themselves teachers whose doctrine and teaching pleases or amuse them.

2Ti 4:1 I charge thee therefore before THE ELOHIM, and the Lord Jesus Christ, who shall judge the quick and the dead at his appearing and his kingdom; 2Ti 4:2 Preach the word; be instant in season, out of season; reprove, rebuke, exhort with all longsuffering and doctrine. 2Ti 4:3 For the time will come when they will not hold up (G430 "anechomai") sound doctrine; but after their own lusts shall they pile up (G2002 "episoreuo" accumulate) to themselves teachers, having itching (G2833 "knetho" desiring to hear something pleasant") ears; 2Ti 4:4 And they shall turn away their ears from the truth, and shall be turned unto fables.

This is a fact and a reality; as many of my shepherds everywhere are de-emphasizing Biblical truth while relying on popular culture and other ear tickling devices to fill their auditorium. The congregations of today are embracing a diversity of views and tolerance for a range of lifestyles and practices while strongly being unfriendly to those who preach holiness.
Being ignorant of Our way of holiness, many are willing to embrace or close their eyes on sinful behaviors within the body of Christ.

Immoral lifestyles are compromised in the false pretext of not judging others. The success of their ministry is proudly made public in terms of church attendance, campus size or wealth of a church rather than the Christlikeness and holiness of the congregation.

title:
Chapter 3 
Rejected By Those Who Seek Approval/Honour from Men

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Rejected By Those Who Seek Approval/Honour from Men

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE UNCOMELY MESSENGER, THE AVENGER OF THE TRINITY, will be rejected by those who seek honour from men rather than seeking to glorify Us. Though I do healings through your hand and the children We have given Shekinaih and you, yet, they will not accept this is from Us; neither will they acknowledge the truth that was preached by you even though it is self-evident. This is because they have never love THE FATHER or His truth, so neither will they love his sons or the truth they preach.

Joh 5:34 But I receive not testimony from man: but these things I say, that ye might be saved. Joh 5:35 He was a burning and a shining light: and ye were willing for a season to rejoice in his light. Joh 5:36 But I have greater witness than that of John: for the works which the Father hath given me to finish, the same works that I do, bear witness of me, that the Father hath sent me. Joh 5:37 And the Father himself, which hath sent me, hath borne witness of me. Ye have neither heard his voice at any time, nor seen his shape. Joh 5:38 And ye have not his word abiding in you: for whom he hath sent, him ye believe not. Joh 5:39 Search the scriptures; for in them ye think ye have eternal life: and they are they which testify of me. Joh 5:40 And ye will not come to me, that ye might have life. Joh 5:41 I receive not honour from men. Joh 5:42 But I know you, that ye have not the love of THE ELOHIM in you. Joh 5:43 I am come in my Father's name, and ye receive me not: if another shall come in his own name, him ye will receive. Joh 5:44 How can ye believe, which receive honour one of another, and seek not the honour that cometh from THE ELOHIM only?

They will marvel at the revelation of Shekinaih and you, but will not accept that they are true because they seek glory from men. They will not know the doctrine and be converted because their heart is uncircumcised to surrender their will to do the will of THE FATHER.

Joh 7:15 And the Jews marvelled, saying, How knoweth this man letters, having never learned? Joh 7:16 Jesus answered them, and said, My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me. Joh 7:17 If any man will do his will, he shall know of the doctrine, whether it be of THE ELOHIM, or whether I speak of myself. Joh 7:18 He that speaketh of himself seeketh his own glory: but he that seeketh his glory that sent him, the same is true, and no unrighteousness is in him.

Like the Pharisees who are the children of the Diabolos, they do not love the truth but are liars. Because of this, even though the doctrine is self-evident, THE HOLY SPIRIT will block the oracle spoken by you from entering into their ears and also deprive them of understanding of it though they might continue to hear and see.

Joh 8:43 Why do ye not understand my speech? Even because ye are not empowered (G1410 "dunamai")to hear my word. Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the Diabolos, and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it. Joh 8:45 And because I tell you the truth, ye believe me not. Joh 8:46 Which of you convinceth me of sin? And if I say the truth, why do ye not believe me? Joh 8:47 He that is of THE ELOHIM heareth THE ELOHIM's words: ye therefore hear them not, because ye are not of THE ELOHIM.

Therefore, you and the children whom We have given you, will be shamefully entreated and you shall speak the true gospel with much contention from them. Preach the gospel in its fullness without pleasing men but only seeking to please THE FATHER like Me.

1Th 2:1 For yourselves, brethren, know our entrance in unto you, that it was not in vain: 1Th 2:2 But even after that we had suffered before, and were shamefully entreated, as ye know, at Philippi, we were bold in our ELOHIM to speak unto you the gospel of THE ELOHIM with much contention. 1Th 2:3 For our exhortation was not of deceit, nor of uncleanness, nor in guile: 1Th 2:4 But as we were approved of THE ELOHIM to be put in trust with the gospel, even so we speak; not as pleasing men, but THE ELOHIM, which trieth our hearts.

title:
Chapter 4 
Rejected by the Occult Circle

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
Rejected by the Occult Circle

Occult practices, like magic, alchemy, extra-sensory perception, astrology, spiritualism, and divination, have their source of their revelation and their supernatural power and manifestation from disembodied evil spirits that originated from the Nephilim during Enoch time. Those who practise these arts are deceived by them for the evil spirits disguise themselves as spirit guides and angels revealing to them the secret of the spirit world and how to affect the things in the Cosmoses.

In the Book of Enoch, the Watchers taught women the rejected mysteries of the heavenly mysteries of "sorcery and spells, methods of divination by observance of heavenly/earthly phenomena and consulting familiar spirits. These are an abomination unto Us, THE YAHWEH. (Deu 18:9-15)
Only Enoch was given the true secrets of heaven from the revealing angels when he ascended to heaven alive. He became Metatron the scribe whom We, THE YAHWEH later sent to teach Moses the law.

Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE FEMALE AND MALE METATRON, THE COSMOS ULTIMATE JUDGE AND SUB JUDGE, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will again, teach the remnants the Kingdom of heaven of righteousness, peace and joy that comes with power. The remnants that will not take heed to your discipline, We, THE YAHWEH as an enemy will pursue the matter personally with them. (Rom 14:17, 1Cor 4:20)

Deu 18:16 According to all that thou desiredst of THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM in Horeb in the day of the assembly, saying, Let me not hear again the voice of THE YAHWEH my ELOHIM, neither let me see this great fire any more, that I die not. Deu 18:17 And THE YAHWEH said unto me, They have well-spoken that which they have spoken. Deu 18:18 I will raise them up a Prophet from among their brethren, like unto thee, and will put my words in his mouth; and he shall speak unto them all that I shall command him. Deu 18:19 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not hearken unto my words which he shall speak in my name, I will require it of him.
WE through both of you, shall appear to my people; and those who reject both of you making excuse to avoid both of you will be removed from the Kingdom for you acts in Our name as a consuming fire.

Heb 12:25 See that ye refuse not him that speaketh. For if they escaped not who refused him that spake on earth, much more shall not we escape, if we turn away from him that speaketh from heaven: Heb 12:26 Whose voice then shook the earth: but now he hath promised, saying, Yet once more I shake not the earth only, but also heaven. Heb 12:27 And this word, Yet once more, signifieth the removing of those things that are shaken, as of things that are made, that those things which cannot be shaken may remain. Heb 12:28 Wherefore we receiving a kingdom which cannot be moved, let us have grace, whereby we may serve THE ELOHIM acceptably with reverence and godly fear: Heb 12:29 For Our ELOHIM is a consuming fire.
2Ki 9:22 And it came to pass, when Joram saw Jehu, that he said, Is it peace, Jehu? And he answered, What peace, so long as the whoredoms of thy mother Jezebel and her witchcrafts are so many?

Jezebel was a Phoenician princess, the daughter of Ethbaal, king of Tyre. The king of Tyre signifies Satan (Eze 28:12-20). Jezebel made King Ahab to make her religion the national religion of Israel. She had 450 prophets of Baal, and 400 prophets of Ashtoreth. She had the real prophets of Israel slaughtered but Obadiah the overseer of Ahab's house rescued one hundred of these hiding them and secretly fed them in a cave. She seem to be a priestess of Ashtoreth and has an active role in temple as well in palace relations.

Elijah confronted Ahab and charged him with the following sin. He had two altars set up at Carmel, one dedicated to Baal, one to Yahweh, and a bull sacrificed upon each altar. The supporters of Baal called upon their god to send fire to consume the sacrifice, but nothing happened. When Elijah called on THE YAHWEH, fire came down from heaven immediately and consumed the offering. Elijah ordered the people to seize the prophets of Baal, and they were all slaughtered. The superiority of Elijah and of his God in the test at Carmel, and the slaughter of the 450 prophets of Baal, fired the vengeance of Jezebel. Elijah fled for his life to the wilderness.

Ahab wishing to acquire Naboth's vineyard so as to expand his own gardens offer to buy or exchange a better plot was turned down because it was an ancestral land. When Jezebel saw that her husband was depressed by this, she arranged for the elders to falsely accuse Naboth of blasphemy and stoned him to death. When Ahab took possession of Naboth's vineyard, he was again confronted by Elijah, who prophesied that, owing to the way Ahab and Jezebel had plotted to have Naboth killed, Ahab would die, his royal line obliterated, and Jezebel would be eaten by dogs.

Three years later, Ahab died in battle and his son Ahaziah inherited the throne. He too died due to an accident and he was succeeded by his brother Joram. Elisha anointed Jehu, commander of Joram's army as king, in order that he might destroy Ahab's descendants as a punishment for the way Jezebel had treated prophets of THE YAHWEH. Jehu killed Joram and next went to the royal palace at Jezreel, to finish her.

Knowing that he was coming, Jezebel put on make-up and a formal wig with adornments and looked out from a window. Jehu ordered her servants to throw her from the window. Her blood splashed on the wall and horses, and Jehu's horse trampled over her corpse. He entered the palace where, after he ate and drank, he ordered Jezebel's body to be taken for burial. His servants discovered only her skull, her feet and the palms of her hands for her flesh had been eaten by stray dogs, just as the prophet Elijah had prophesied. (2 Ki 9:1-37)

As stated in the Part 1, Section A, Chapter 1, what happened and prophesied in the Old Testament, New Testament and the Book of Revelation will be enacted in a new way by the chosen people of the last days.
Jezebel signifies the woman, MYSTERY BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH. Like Jezebel, she had killed many holy Prophets and Apostles beginning with Abel.

Rev 17:1 And there came one of the seven angels which had the seven vials, and talked with me, saying unto me, Come hither; I will shew unto thee the judgment of the great whore that sitteth upon many waters: Rev 17:2 With whom the kings of the earth have committed fornication, and the inhabitants of the earth have been made drunk with the wine of her fornication. Rev 17:3 So he carried me away in the spirit into the wilderness: and I saw a woman sit upon a scarlet coloured beast, full of names of blasphemy, having seven heads and ten horns. Rev 17:4 And the woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet colour, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having a golden cup in her hand full of abominations and filthiness of her fornication: Rev 17:5 And upon her forehead was a name written, MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH. Rev 17:6 And I saw the woman drunken with the blood of the saints, and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus: and when I saw her, I wondered with great admiration.
Jezebel signifies the prince of the Cosmoses. She is the authority of the air, her spirit energizes the children of disobedience to walk according to the desires of the flesh and the carnal mind.

Eph 2:1 And you hath he quickened, who were dead in trespasses and sins; Eph 2:2 Wherein in time past ye walked according to the age of this Cosmos, according to the prince of the authority of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience: Eph 2:3 Among whom also we all had Our conversation in times past in the lusts of Our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others.
This spirit is the spirit of Antichrist. She energises one to love the Cosmoses and the things that are in it and resist THE HOLY SPIRIT.

1Jn 2:15 Love not the Cosmos, neither the things that are in the Cosmos. If any man love the Cosmos, the love of the Father is not in him. 1Jn 2:16 For all that is in the Cosmos, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the Cosmos. 1Jn 2:17 And the Cosmos passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of THE ELOHIM abideth forever. 1Jn 2:18 Little children, it is the last time: and as ye have heard that antichrist shall come, even now are there many antichrists; whereby we know that it is the last time. 1Jn 2:19 They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would no doubt have continued with us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of us.

title:
Chapter 4 
Rejected by the Occult Circle (part 2)

segments.text: It is a spirit of error that is energizing many false prophets who are easily seduced by her wealth, power, and signs and lying wonders because they do not love the truth.

1Jn 4:1 Beloved, believe not every spirit, but try the spirits whether they are of THE ELOHIM: because many false prophets are gone out into the Cosmos. 1Jn 4:2 Hereby know ye the Spirit of THE ELOHIM: Every spirit that confesseth that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is of THE ELOHIM: 1Jn 4:3 And every spirit that confesseth not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is not of THE ELOHIM: and this is that spirit of antichrist, whereof ye have heard that it should come; and even now already is it in the Cosmos. 1Jn 4:4 Ye are of THE ELOHIM, little children, and have overcome them: because greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the Cosmos. 1Jn 4:5 They are of the Cosmos: therefore speak they of the Cosmos, and the Cosmos heareth them. 1Jn 4:6 We are of THE ELOHIM: he that knoweth THE ELOHIM heareth us; he that is not of THE ELOHIM heareth not us. Hereby know we the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error.

This Jezebel spirit who led King Ahab in apostasy will in the last days teach and seduce many servants of THE ELOHIM and their spiritual children into errors to commit spiritual fornication with Mystery Babylon. Those who follow her will go through the great tribulations and be killed.

Rev 2:18 And unto the angel of the church in Thyatira write; These things saith the Son of THE ELOHIM, who hath his eyes like unto a flame of fire, and his feet are like fine brass; Rev 2:19 I know thy works, and charity, and service, and faith, and thy patience, and thy works; and the last to be more than the first. Rev 2:20 Notwithstanding I have a few things against thee, because thou sufferest that woman Jezebel, which calleth herself a prophetess, to teach and to seduce my servants to commit fornication, and to eat things sacrificed unto idols. Rev 2:21 And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented not. Rev 2:22 Behold, I will cast her into a bed, and them that commit adultery with her into great tribulation, except they repent of their deeds. Rev 2:23 And I will kill her children with death; and all the churches shall know that I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts: and I will give unto every one of you according to your works. Rev 2:24 But unto you I say, and unto the rest in Thyatira, as many as have not this doctrine, and which have not known the depths of Satan, as they speak; I will put upon you none other burden.
What was prophesied in Revelation 2:18-24 was already prophesied in Isaiah 47:7-9.
In a moment in a day, she will lose her children when the Angel of THE YAHWEH came to execute judgment on her and her children.

Isa 47:7 And thou saidst, I shall be a lady for ever: so that thou didst not lay these things to thy heart, neither didst remember the latter end of it. Isa 47:8 Therefore hear now this, thou that art given to pleasures, that dwellest carelessly, that sayest in thine heart, I am, and none else beside me; I shall not sit as a widow, neither shall I know the loss of children: Isa 47:9 But these two things shall come to thee in a moment in one day, the loss of children, and widowhood: they shall come upon thee in their perfection for the multitude of thy sorceries, and for the great abundance of thine enchantments.
They are referred to as sorcerers, adulterers, false swearers, oppressors and misleaders of the children of THE ELOHIM by Malachi.

Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.

Like the magicians of Egypt, they will imitate some of the signs and miracles which THE YAHWEH will perform through the last days Moses and Aaron. Whether it be turning the rod to serpents, or turning the water into blood, and causing frogs to come upon the land of Egypt, they are able to imitate the signs to a certain extent. But when they could not bring lices upon the land like Moses and Aaron, they at last will acknowledge that THE ELOHIM is greater than their god. (Exo 7:10-14, 20-22, 8:5-7, 17-19)
Like Jannes and Jambres who withstood Moses, they will resist the truth preach by the last days Moses and Aaron. They will claim to be the two witnesses so as to confuse the elect.

2Ti 3:8 Now as Jannes and Jambres withstood Moses, so do these also resist the truth: men of corrupt minds, reprobate concerning the faith. 2Ti 3:9 But they shall proceed no further: for their folly shall be manifest unto all men, as theirs also was.

The spirit of Simon Magus will be upon some of them to use sorcery to bewitch the children of THE ELOHIM and some will claim to be the Angel of THE YAHWEH and confuse many so that the true Angel of THE YAHWEH will be shunned because of fear of being deceived.

Act 8:9 But there was a certain man, called Simon, which beforetime in the same city used sorcery, and bewitched the people of Samaria, giving out that himself was some great one: Act 8:10 To whom they all gave heed, from the least to the greatest, saying, This man is the great power of THE ELOHIM.
The spirit of Barjesus, the sorcerer, a false prophet; will be upon many of them and they will profess that they are My sons to confuse and discredit Our true sons from preaching Our right ways.

Act 13:6 And when they had gone through the isle unto Paphos, they found a certain sorcerer, a false prophet, a Jew, whose name was Barjesus (G919 "bariesous" son of Jesus): Act 13:7 Which was with the deputy of the country, Sergius Paulus, a prudent man; who called for Barnabas and Saul, and desired to hear the word of God. Act 13:8 But Elymas the sorcerer (for so is his name by interpretation) withstood them, seeking to turn away the deputy from the faith. Act 13:9 Then Saul, (who also is called Paul,) filled with the Holy Ghost, set his eyes on him, Act 13:10 And said, O full of all subtilty and all mischief, thou child of the Diabolos, thou enemy of all righteousness, wilt thou not cease to pervert the right ways of THE YAHWEH? Act 13:11 And now, behold, the hand of THE YAHWEH is upon thee, and thou shalt be blind, not seeing the sun for a season. And immediately there fell on him a mist and a darkness; and he went about seeking some to lead him by the hand. Act 13:12 Then the deputy, when he saw what was done, believed, being astonished at the doctrine of THE YAHWEH.
Those from the occult circle will reject Shekinaih and you, for their Messiah that is coming is not the Christ that you preach.

I live like an ordinary person and none took notice of Me. No doubt My wisdom and understanding and in depth knowledge of the scripture marvelled many who knew Me, I led a quiet and peaceful life with My appointed family. (Luk 2:42-52) Nevertheless being mocked by other kids and adults calling Me a bastard, had led Me into a place of solitude by Myself most of My growing up years. (Joh 8:41) During those solitude moment up in the mountain, My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT (THE YAHWEH) represented by Shekinaih before her reincarnation as Shekinaih, was always with me revealing My FATHER's message to me, teaching me many times, revealing to me, my calling and destiny and preparing me for my ministry on earth (Luk 6:12). And at times, THE ANGEL OF THE YAHWEH also, visited Me. Both, also taught Me many things about the scripture as THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR EL.

title:
Chapter 5 
Rejected by the Ruling Spiritual and Religious Leaders

segments.text:
Chapter 5 
Rejected by the Ruling Spiritual and Religious Leaders

History is going to repeat itself exactly like those days when I was on earth. As My FATHER and Me were rejected by the so called official church of that time, likewise, Shekinaih and you, Our Two Representatives (incarnated and reincarnated), will be rejected by the modern day's official religious body when We send both of you to expose the great deception/Jezebel spirit, the spirit of the world that had taken My church under captive through their deception. Shekinaih and you, shall be hated by the synagogue of Satan. Those who have ears let them hear what the spirit is speaking to My last days' churches as in the Book of Revelation.

Mar 8:31 And he began to teach them, that the Son of Adam must suffer many things, and be rejected of the elders, and of the chief priests, and scribes, and be killed, and after three days rise again.

Jeremiah's calling was to reveal the sins of the people and to explain the reason for the impending destruction by the Babylonian army. He was attacked by his own brothers, beaten and put into the stocks by a priest and false prophet, imprisoned by the king, threatened with death, thrown into a cistern by Judah's officials, and opposed by a false prophet.
The spirit of Jeremiah will be upon some of the children whom We have given Shekinaih and you and they will be send to warn the last days' churches of Our coming judgment.

The spiritual condition of most of today's churches resembles the Israelites during Jeremiah's time. We, THE YAHWEH is not present among these ministers because they hardly knew Us, Our Name, THE YAHWEH, and Our Ways.(Mat 15:8-9) In most so called Apostolic and Prophetic churches, they prophesied by Baal but thought it was THE HOLY SPIRIT. Being a novice, they are easily puffed up by power, miracles and lying signs. They have no idea that holiness and power are inseparable. Despite their unsanctified life, they thought they had become a host for the HOLY SPIRIT but in reality, seductive spirits lurk and dwell in them, energizing the power, miracles and lying signs; like they lurk in Simon Magus (Act 8:9), Bar Jesus Elymas (Act 13:6-8), and the damsel possessed with the spirit of divination.

Jer 2:8 The priests said not, Where is THE YAHWEH? and they that handle the law knew me not: the pastors also transgressed against me, and the prophets prophesied by Baal, and walked after things that do not profit. Jer 2:9 Wherefore I will yet plead with you, saith THE YAHWEH, and with your children's children will I plead. ….Jer 2:13 For my people have committed two evils; they have forsaken me the fountain of living waters, and hewed them out cisterns, broken cisterns, that can hold no water…Jer 2:18 And now what hast thou to do in the way of Egypt, to drink the waters of Sihor? Or what hast thou to do in the way of Assyria, to drink the waters of the river? Jer 2:19 Thine own wickedness shall correct thee, and thy backslidings shall reprove thee: know therefore and see that it is an evil thing and bitter, that thou hast forsaken THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, and that my fear is not in thee, saith THE YAHWEH ELOHIM SABAOTH.

When confronted with the truth, many who followed them, shall refuse to return or repent due to their conscience being seared with hot iron, or stunned/made numb by scorpion spirits in these sorcerors they believed. Being wise in their own eyes, they shall reject Shekinaih and you, the word of THE YAHWEH, and Our last days spiritual Jeremiah whom we will send to warn them because My apostate are not able to discern the time and the judgment of Us, THE YAHWEH.

Jer 8:5 Why then is this people of Jerusalem slidden back by a perpetual backsliding? They hold fast deceit, they refuse to return. Jer 8:6 I hearkened and heard, but they spake not aright: no man repented him of his wickedness, saying, What have I done? Everyone turned to his course, as the horse rusheth into the battle. Jer 8:7 Yea, the stork in the heaven knoweth her appointed times; and the turtle and the crane and the swallow observe the time of their coming; but my people know not the judgment of THE YAHWEH. Jer 8:8 How do ye say, We are wise, and the law of THE YAHWEH is with us? Lo, certainly in vain made he it; the pen of the scribes is in vain. Jer 8:9 The wise men are ashamed, they are dismayed and taken: lo, they have rejected the word of THE YAHWEH; and what wisdom is in them?

These are the trees that My FATHER have not planted. They will despise the warning of THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, and shall be slaughtered by My sabre/ the spokesman of THE YAHWEH when We start to execute Our judgment through Shekinaih and you.

Eze 21:8 Again the word of THE YAHWEH came unto me, saying, Eze 21:9 Son of man, prophesy, and say, Thus saith THE YAHWEH; Say, A sword, a sword is sharpened, and also furbished: Eze 21:10 It is sharpened to make a sore slaughter; it is furbished that it may glitter: should we then make mirth? It contemneth the rod of my son, as every tree. Eze 21:11 And he hath given it to be furbished, that it may be handled: this sword is sharpened, and it is furbished, to give it into the hand of the slayer.

They are the modern day's chief priests and scribes who shall be sore displeased when the children whom We have given Shekinaih and you, the babes and sucklings, bless THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR THE MESSENGER WHOM I WILL SENT, that cometh in the Name of THE YAHWEH. These are the unfruitful fig trees that will be cursed by Us, THE YAHWEH through Our spokesman, THE ELIJAH.

Mat 21:15 And when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children crying in the temple, and saying, Hosanna to the Son of David; they were sore displeased, Mat 21:16 And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?....Mat 21:18 Now in the morning as he returned into the city, he hungered. Mat 21:19 And when he saw a fig tree in the way, he came to it, and found nothing thereon, but leaves only, and said unto it, Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward forever. And presently the fig tree withered away. Mat 21:20 And when the disciples saw it, they marvelled, saying, How soon is the fig tree withered away! Mat 21:21 Jesus answered and said unto them, Verily I say unto you, If ye have faith, and doubt not, ye shall not only do this which is done to the fig tree, but also if ye shall say unto this mountain, Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea; it shall be done. Mat 21:22 And all things, whatsoever ye shall ask in prayer, believing, ye shall receive.

As they are respecter of persons and will only accept those who are the authority in Christendom, they will challenge Shekinaih and you, and Our children, about your authority in releasing Our message like the religious authority in My time and in the time of My disciples who question My authority in teaching what I teach.

Mat 21:23 And when he was come into the temple, the chief priests and the elders of the people came unto him as he was teaching, and said, By what authority doest thou these things? and who gave thee this authority? Mat 21:24 And Jesus answered and said unto them, I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things. Mat 21:25 The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men? And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say unto us, Why did ye not then believe him? Mat 21:26 But if we shall say, Of men; we fear the people; for all hold John as a prophet. Mat 21:27 And they answered Jesus, and said, We cannot tell. And he said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.
Like the high priests and the scribe during My time, they will reject Shekinaih; and you, the last days' Elijah who come to them in the way of righteousness.

Mat 21:32 For John came unto you in the way of righteousness, and ye believed him not: but the publicans and the harlots believed him: and ye, when ye had seen it, repented not afterward, that ye might believe him.

They are like the wicked husbandmen that refused to surrender the fruits of the harvest to the householder. When demanded by Us, THE YAHWEH, through Our prophets, they will reject them and question their authority. Some they will beat up, some they will kill, and some they will stone. They will kill you, THE MINOR ELIJAH who cometh in the Name of THE YAHWEH but will be powdered and destroyed by you when you are glorified.

Mat 21:33 Hear another parable: There was a certain householder, which planted a vineyard, and hedged it round about, and digged a winepress in it, and built a tower, and let it out to husbandmen, and went into a far country: Mat 21:34 And when the time of the fruit drew near, he sent his servants to the husbandmen, that they might receive the fruits of it. Mat 21:35 And the husbandmen took his servants, and beat one, and killed another, and stoned another. Mat 21:36 Again, he sent other servants more than the first: and they did unto them likewise. Mat 21:37 But last of all he sent unto them his son, saying, They will reverence my son. Mat 21:38 But when the husbandmen saw the son, they said among themselves, This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and let us seize on his inheritance. Mat 21:39 And they caught him, and cast him out of the vineyard, and slew him. Mat 21:40 When the lord therefore of the vineyard cometh, what will he do unto those husbandmen? Mat 21:41 They say unto him, He will miserably destroy those wicked men, and will let out his vineyard unto other husbandmen, which shall render him the fruits in their seasons. Mat 21:42 Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected (G593 "apodokimazo' disapproved, the same is become the head of the corner: this is THE YAHWEH's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes? Mat 21:43 Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of THE ELOHIM shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof. Mat 21:44 And whosoever shall fall on this stone shall be broken: but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder. Mat 21:45 And when the chief priests and Pharisees had heard his parables, they perceived that he spake of them. Mat 21:46 But when they sought to lay hands on him, they feared the multitude, because they took him for a prophet.

THE YAHWEH will reject them as His priests and shall destroy them with those who followed their ways because they have chosen to reject to know the ways and judgment of THE YAHWEH. They shall be impoverished during the great tribulation which shall come upon the earth.

Hos 4:6 My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge: because thou hast rejected knowledge, I will also reject thee, that thou shalt be no priest to me: seeing thou hast forgotten the law of thy God, I will also forget thy children. Hos 4:7 As they were increased, so they sinned against me: therefore will I change their glory into shame. Hos 4:8 They eat up the sin of my people, and they set their heart on their iniquity. Hos 4:9 And there shall be, like people, like priest: and I will punish them for their ways, and reward them their doings. Hos 4:10 For they shall eat, and not have enough: they shall commit whoredom, and shall not increase: because they have left off to take heed THE YAHWEH.

title:
Chapter 6 
Rejected by the Mainstream Churches

segments.text:
Chapter 6 
Rejected by the Mainstream Churches

Bravo! Bravo! Bravo! I have waited for this moment for almost two thousand earth years. Finally, the moment has arrived for My final truth to be revealed. Finally the children whom My FATHER has given Shekinaih and you, are receiving gold blocks from Us directly through Our Two Representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David, Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY.

Shekinaih: I see JESUS distributing gold block to people. I saw gold bar came out of my mouth and your mouth as We speak to a group of Theology students in a classroom setting. The gold bar has these words written on it,

"The pure and unadulterated truth of THE TRINITY; regarding the mysteries of the Kingdom of heaven, the Cosmoses, all its inhabitants and the destiny of every life forms in the Cosmoses, including the children who will be reading Our book; whom My FATHER has given to Shekinaih and Aaron K David".

JESUS: The cunning Red Dragon, the lying Ancient dragon, the deceiving adversary, has been repeating half-truth as the ultimate truth have deceived the world and will continue to deceive the world until he be burned in the lake of fire forever.

Her persistence and repeating accusation of My teaching based on half-truth, or based on certain portion of the law, and the creed she had officially endorsed by the Edomite Emperor Constantine as the ultimate truth based on certain point, have blinded My people from the truth which I and My messenger are sent to preach.

Gen 3:1 Now the serpent was more subtil (H6175 "arum" cunning, crafty) than any beast of the field which THE YAHWEH ELOHIM had made. And he said unto the woman, Yea, hath God said, Ye shall not eat of every tree of the garden? Gen 3:2 And the woman said unto the serpent, We may eat of the fruit of the trees of the garden: Gen 3:3 But of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden, God hath said, Ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die. Gen 3:4 And the serpent said unto the woman, Ye shall not surely die: Gen 3:5 For God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as gods, knowing good and evil.

Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the Accuser (G1228 "diabolos"), and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it.

Rev 12:9 And the great dragon was cast out, that old serpent, called the Accuser, and Adversary/Satan, which deceiveth the whole world: he was cast out into the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.
David: LORD JESUS, what is the truth?

Joh 18:37 Pilate therefore said unto him, Art thou a king then? Jesus answered, Thou sayest that I am a king. To this end was I born, and for this cause came I into the world, that I should bear witness unto the truth. Every one that is of the truth heareth my voice. Joh 18:38 Pilate saith unto him, What is truth? And when he had said this, he went out again unto the Jews, and saith unto them, I find in him no fault at all.

JESUS: The truth is that I was sent to My brothers who are incarnated into this world to be an example to them in suffering for righteousness' sake so as to be crowned with glory, honor and power by THE FATHER. But the Accuser, the Adversary/ the deceiver/liar has made My truth into a heresy by his big lie/half Truth in the Nicene Creed denying that I come in the flesh; that I am God/Man at the same time when I was incarnated into this world.

My brothers/sisters who believe in her big lie, have forsaken their inheritance will not be able claim their sonship/daughtership if they believe that I am the only begotten son and they are not the children whom My FATHER have given Me to redeem as their kinsman redeemer.

Heb 2:5 For unto the angels hath he not put in subjection the world to come, whereof we speak. Heb 2:6 But one in a certain place testified, saying, What is man, that thou art mindful of him? or the son of man, that thou visitest him? Heb 2:7 Thou madest him a little lower than the angels; thou crownedst him with glory and honour, and didst set him over the works of thy hands: Heb 2:8 Thou hast put all things in subjection under his feet. For in that he put all in subjection under him, he left nothing that is not put under him. But now we see not yet all things put under him. Heb 2:9 But we see Jesus, who was made a little lower than the angels for the suffering of death, crowned with glory and honour; that he by the grace of God should taste death for every man. Heb 2:10 For it became him, for whom are all things, and by whom are all things, in bringing many sons unto glory, to make the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings. Heb 2:11 For both he that sanctifieth and they who are sanctified are all of one: for which cause he is not ashamed to call them brethren, Heb 2:12 Saying, I will declare thy name unto my brethren, in the midst of the church will I sing praise unto thee. Heb 2:13 And again, I will put my trust in him. And again, Behold I and the children which God hath given me. Heb 2:14 Forasmuch then as the children are partakers of flesh and blood, he also himself likewise took part of the same; that through death he might destroy him that had the power of death, that is, the devil; Heb 2:15 And deliver them who through fear of death were all their lifetime subject to bondage.

The concept of Christian orthodoxy did not become fully established until after the Council of Nicaea in 325 when Constantine sealed the evolution of the church as a spirit-driven underground movement which are persecuted by the Imperial, to become the official religion of the Roman Empire. The light of the knowledge of the glorious gospel of a Christ, who is the image of THE ELOHIM is thus hidden.

2Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: 2Co 4:4 In whom THE ELOHIM of this age hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of a Christ, who is the image of THE ELOHIM, should shine unto them. 2Co 4:5 For we preach not ourselves, but THE YAHWEH Christ Jesus; and ourselves your servants for Jesus' sake. 2Co 4:6 For THE ELOHIM, who commanded the light to shine out of darkness, hath shined in our hearts, to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of THE ELOHIM in the face of Jesus Christ.

When Constantine ordered his bishops to convene a great council at Nicaea for the purpose of producing Christendom's most important oath call the Nicene Creed, he changed the definition of what it means to be a Christ. Christians were no longer 'Sojourners", they were citizen of an earthly Kingdom. Once devoted to me and walking in the way of THE YAHWEH, My FATHER in following My footstep, they are now conformist to the theological teaching which is far from the way I taught.

The pastors and bishops became wealthy and are slaves to the Political and Military Power instead of forsaking all for the kingdom. Christianity had never recovered from this depravity but became worse as this leaven continue to spread like new cancer cells that mutated themselves bringing every wind of doctrines. These apostates together with the false prophets of Mystery Babylon through their sleight of hand, and their cunning craftiness lie in wait to deceive those who love to live in the flesh.

My FATHER, THE YAHWEH, has permitted heresies among His churches so that they which are approved by Him may be made manifest. The time is come, that these preordained cursed reincarnated false Prophets and Teachers receive their swift destruction for hindering My way of truth to be known. Mystery Babylon is destined to fall as Satan had already been judged.

1Co 11:18 For first of all, when ye come together in the church, I hear that there be divisions among you; and I partly believe it. 1Co 11:19 For there must be also heresies (G139 "hairesis") among you, that they which are approved may be made manifest among you.

2Pe 2:1 But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who privily shall bring in damnable heresies, even denying the Lord that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift destruction. 2Pe 2:2 And many shall follow their pernicious ways; by reason of whom the way of truth shall be evil spoken of. 2Pe 2:3 And through covetousness shall they with feigned words make merchandise of you: whose judgment now of a long time lingereth not, and their damnation slumbereth not.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, WILL SURELY COME SWIFTLY TO AVENGE THE BLOOD OF OUR SERVANTS FROM THE BLOOD OF ABEL UNTO THE BLOOD OF OUR LAST DAYS' TWO WITNESSES, on these murderers, sorcerers, adulterers, and false swearers of Satan.

Mat 23:31 Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets. Mat 23:32 Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers. Mat 23:33 Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell? Mat 23:34 Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city: Mat 23:35 That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar. Mat 23:36 Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation.

Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the devil, and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it.
1Jn 3:15 Whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no murderer hath eternal life abiding in him

Rev 21:8 But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.

title:
Chapter 7 
All Camps will be Against Their Unrecognized Doctrines

segments.text:
Chapter 7 
All Camps will be Against Their Unrecognized Doctrines
Shekinaih: I see many ministers from different denominations and religious group pointing their finger at you and me with all the children.

JESUS: Verily I say unto all these ministers, except they be converted, and become like the Youth, Metatron, they shall not enter into the kingdom of Heaven. Whosoever therefore shall humble himself as the Youth, Metatron, the same is greatest in the kingdom of heaven. And whoso shall receive the Youth, Metatron, who come in My name receiveth me. But whoso shall offend the little ones/ My brothers/sisters whom My FATHER have given Shekinaih and you, which believe in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, it were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and that he were drowned in the depth of the sea. Woe unto the world because of offences! for it must needs be that offences come; but woe to that man by whom the offence cometh! Wherefore if their hand or their foot offend them, cut them off, and cast them from them: it is better for them to enter into life halt or maimed, rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into everlasting fire. And if their eye offend them, pluck it out, and cast it from them: it is better for them to enter into life with one eye, rather than having two eyes to be cast into Gehenna fire. Take heed that they despise not one of these little ones whom My FATHER have given Shekinaih and you; for I say unto them, That in heaven their counterpart angels do always behold the face of My FATHER which is in heaven. For I come in sinful flesh emptying My divinity as the Son of Adam is come to save that which was lost by condemning sin in the flesh. How think ye? if a man have an hundred sheep, and one of them be gone astray, doth he not leave the ninety and nine, and goeth into the mountains, and seeketh that which is gone astray? And if so be that he find it, verily I say unto you, he rejoiceth more of that sheep, than of the ninety and nine which went not astray. Even so it is not the will of My FATHER which is in heaven, that one of these little ones which is My brothers and sisters should perish (Matt 18:1-18).

Time Frame: Year 2018 and beyond
