title: Vision of a Giant Egg

segments.text: Vision of a Giant Egg
David: LORD JESUS, could you enlighten us how the controversy against us in the future is like?

Shekinaih: I see a vision of many people from many denominations tightly hugging and kissing a giant egg by the name of Nicaea doctrine. Some of them looked like black skeleton wearing black hooded robe. Some are half human wearing white robes and half black skeleton wearing black hooded robes. Some are 1/3 black skeleton wearing black hooded robe and 2/3 human being wearing white robes. Some are 2/3 black skeleton wearing black hooded robes and 1/3 human wearing white robes. Only a bare minimum of saints wearing white robes are standing among them looking at the egg. They have these exclamation mark "???" written on their foreheads and the words "still searching for the Ultimate Truth" written at the back of their heads. Inside this giant egg was a giant snake with the word "Deception" written on its forehead. Superimposed on this giant snake is the beast with seven heads and ten horns of Revelation 13.

I see a vision of myself in a golden Empress' robe with the word "THE FATHER/ HOLY SPIRIT" written on my forehead arising from the seat of THE FATHER's heavenly throne. I then see you in golden Emperor Robe with the word "JESUS CHRIST" written on your forehead arising from JESUS's throne in heaven. We both appear before these people who were holding the Nicaea egg. The TRINITY in both of us were like giant and these people were like tiny grasshoppers. When they all saw our appearance, horror and shock were written on their faces.

Then I saw Moses carrying two luminous tablets which entered into us. I saw these words, "My sincere new last days doctrines are now revealed to Mankind through Shekinaih and Aaron K David, Our Representatives" written on the two tablets.

I then see me holding the two tablets and when they saw me, they with one hand together supporting the Nicaea egg, with the other hand they started to throw stones, black snakes of curses, hurling insults, throwing dart arrows of accusations and shits at us. As they are doing those acts, white light beams out of the two tablets that I was holding and cracked the Nicaea egg they are supporting. As it cracked, the snake with the beast superimposed on it stood up in the midst of them.
As the light beam on this people, the word "Awaken" is written on their foreheads and most of them repented except those from the Synagogue of Satan.
David: LORD JESUS, can you enlighten me concerning this vision?

JESUS: Denomination is the work of the flesh and is equivalent to heresies, for the word "heresy" is from G139 "hairesis" which means "to take to oneself, that is preferred or choose. Each denomination have chosen to discriminate itself by choosing their own beliefs and practice some of which is not taught in the scripture but are from the commandments of men.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies (G139 "hairesis" which means "to take to oneself, that is preferred or choose)., Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

Some had become legalistically subverted and are addicted to debate and controversy defending the traditions of their father like the Pharisee Paul once was. In the Day of Judgment, many will be shocked when they find out that they shall not inherit the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM as stated in Gal 5:19-21.

Tit 3:9 But avoid foolish questions, and genealogies, and contentions, and strivings about the law; for they are unprofitable and vain. Tit 3:10 A man that is an heretick after the first and second admonition reject; Tit 3:11 Knowing that he that is such is subverted, and sinneth, being condemned of himself.

Those black skeleton wearing black hooded robe are the synagogues of Satan. Those who are half skeleton and half human are Christians that had surrendered ½ of their soul to Satan as they sit under the covering of their respective denominations which are under the synagogues of Satan. Those who are 1/3 skeleton and 2/3 human are those that had surrendered 1/3 of their soul to their respective denominations which are under the synagogues of Satan. These have been deceived by the doctrine of the snake who controls the world through the beast with seven heads and ten horns. Those saints wearing white robe and standing among them looking at the egg are Christians in independent Congregations which are not under the control of the synagogues of Satan. These found the doctrine of Nicaea questionable and still searching for the ultimate truth.

As THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih and I in you spoke to these people regarding the sincere new last days' doctrine, some will be filled with horror and shock. But many will be offended and will condemn, curse, insult, accuse and despise Us. But the light of the truth will crack the deception egg and the snake with the beast superimposed on it will be revealed before their eyes. Most will be awakened from the delusion and will repent except those which are from the synagogue of Satan.
As My true disciples are being evil spoken of, so will be Shekinaih and you, Our last days' true messengers.
Act 28:22 But we desire to hear of thee what thou thinkest: for as concerning this sect, we know that everywhere it is spoken against.

As My real disciples are hated of all men for bearing the Name of a Christ, THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will be hated; for the disciples is not greater than their master. Only be patient in the persecution and tribulation and We will restore all of you into glory.

Mat 10:22 And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake: but he that endureth to the end shall be saved. Mat 10:23 But when they persecute you in this city, flee ye into another: for verily I say unto you, Ye shall not have gone over the cities of Israel, till the Son of man be come. Mat 10:24 The disciple is not above his master, nor the servant above his lord. Mat 10:25 It is enough for the disciple that he be as his master, and the servant as his lord. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebub, how much more shall they call them of his household?

title:
Chapter 1
The Blessed Life

segments.text:
Chapter 1
The Blessed Life
(JESUS then drew the above diagram and said to Shekinaih and David:

The above picture depicts a well-balanced perfected being which is the exact resemblance of the image of THE ELOHIM before Adam fell. The elects, once tested and perfected, will have all the compartments in their minds which tally with the corresponding parts of the organs within the body, fully lighten up respectively. These perfected saints will enjoy heaven like capacity on earth like Adam before the fall.

1Ch 29:10 Wherefore David blessed THE YAHWEH before all the congregation: and David said, Blessed be thou, THE YAHWEH ELOHIM of Israel our father, for ever and ever. 1Ch 29:11 Thine, O THE YAHWEH, is the greatness (H1420 "gedulah"), and the might (H1369 "geburah" power and authority), and the beauty (H8597 "tipharah" majesty ), and the victory (H5331 "netsach" enduring, and the glory (H1935 "hod" ): for all that is in the heaven and in the earth is thine; thine is the kingdom, O THE YAHWEH, and thou art exalted as head above all. 1Ch 29:12 Both riches (H6239 "osher") and glory H3519) come from your presence (H6440 "paniym"), and thou reignest over all; and in thine hand is power (H3581 "koach") and might (H1369 "geburah"); and in thine hand it is to make great (H1431 "gadal"), and to give strength(H2388 "chazaq") unto all.
Wisdom and understanding, greatness, might in authority and power over all creation, beauty in holiness and majesty, victory in perpetuity, and glory which belong Us, THE YAHWEH, will be theirs.

I once emptied Myself of My divinity and all these to fulfil all righteousness by going through the suffering and death of the cross but was reinstated with the power, riches, wisdom, might, honour, glory and blessing in the end.

Rev 5:11 And I beheld, and I heard the voice of many angels round about the throne and the beasts and the elders: and the number of them was ten thousand times ten thousand, and thousands of thousands; Rev 5:12 Saying with a loud voice, Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power, and riches, and wisdom, and might, and honour, and glory, and blessing.

Thus I became the leader and completer of those who are called to be a partaker of the fellowship of My suffering and death so that they also will be crowned with glory and honour and to have dominion over the three realms.

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O THE YAHWEH our ADON, how enlarged (H117 "addiyr") is thy name in all the earth! Who hast set thy glory (H1935 "hod") above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength (H5797 "oz") because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger. Psa 8:3 When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained; Psa 8:4 What is man, that thou art mindful of him? And the son of man, that thou visitest him? Psa 8:5 For thou hast made him a little lower than THE ELOHIM, and hast crowned him with glory (H1935) and honour (H1926 "hadar"). Psa 8:6 Thou madest him to have dominion over the works of thy hands; thou hast put all things under his feet: Psa 8:7 All sheep and oxen, yea, and the beasts of the field; Psa 8:8 The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea, and whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas. Psa 8:9 O THE YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

Psalms 21 depicts Our blessing of salvation/restoration on the children whom We have given who rejoice in Shekinaih and you, the strength of THE YAHWEH. They shall receive wisdom and understanding and nothing shall be withholding from them and blessings of goodness anticipated them. They shall live in perpetuity with glory and honor rejoicing with Us manifested in Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, who will destroy those who come against them.

Psa 21:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David. The king shall joy in thy strength (H5795 "oz"), O YAHWEH; and in thy salvation how greatly shall he rejoice! Psa 21:2 Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and hast not withholden the request of his lips. Selah. Psa 21:3 For thou preventest him with the blessings of goodness: thou settest a crown of pure gold on his head. Psa 21:4 He asked life of thee, and thou gavest it him, even length of days for ever and ever. Psa 21:5 His glory is great in thy salvation: glory (H1935 "hod") and honour (H1926 "hadar" hast thou laid upon him. Psa 21:6 For thou hast made him most blessed for ever: thou hast made him exceeding glad with thy countenance. Psa 21:7 For the king trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and through the mercy of the most High he shall not be moved. Psa 21:8 Thine hand shall find out all thine enemies: thy right hand shall find out those that hate thee. Psa 21:9 Thou shalt make them as a fiery oven in the time of thine anger: THE YAHWEH shall swallow them up in his wrath, and the fire shall devour them. Psa 21:10 Their fruit shalt thou destroy from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men. Psa 21:11 For they intended evil against thee: they imagined a mischievous device, which they are not able to perform. Psa 21:12 Therefore shalt thou make them turn their back, when thou shalt make ready thine arrows upon thy strings against the face of them. Psa 21:13 Be thou exalted, THE YAHWEH, in thine own strength: so will we sing and praise thy power.

In Isaiah 61:1, the meek refers to My brothers/sisters who are incarnated to be brought low. The good tidings (gospel of the Kingdom) is for them. After being perfected unto righteousness, peace and joy in the HOLY GHOST through suffering, they now inherit the Kingdom of heaven with power.

Isa 61:1 The Spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH is upon me; because THE YAHWEH hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek (H6035 "anav"); he hath sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to them that are bound; Isa 61:2 To proclaim the acceptable year of THE YAHWEH, and the day of vengeance of our ELOHIM; to comfort all that mourn; Isa 61:3 To appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness, the planting of THE YAHWEH, that he might be glorified.
Mat 5:3 Blessed are the poor (G4434 "ptochos") in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
Rom 14:17 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.
Their suffering have resulted in them bearing the spirit of meekness of love which come with power.

1Co 4:19 But I will come to you shortly, if THE YAHWEH will, and will know, not the speech of them which are puffed up, but the power. 1Co 4:20 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not in word, but in power. 1Co 4:21 What will ye? Shall I come unto you with a rod, or in love, and in the spirit of meekness?

They are now comforted because they have been crowned with glory and anointed with the oil of joy like Me. They are now the ministers of righteousness and will be used by THE FATHER to manifest His glory.
Mat 5:4 Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.
Heb 1:9 Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore THE ELOHIM, even thy ELOHIM, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows (G3353 "metochos" partaker).

After the Kingdoms of the antichrist have been destroyed by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, they shall inherit the earth as kings because of their meekness as a Christ.
Mat 5:5 Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.

In the age to come, Shekinaih and you, together with the children We have given Shekinaih and you, shall revamp the fallen cities and create a futuristic cities beyond comparison of any age. The technology will be instant like real heaven. Everything will be created using brain power. It will be very different from what the Antichrist through her futuristic scientists who are pursuing their vision of "Singularity" through their technologies like computers, genetics, nanotechnology, robotics and artificial intelligence. On contrary, the real creative power of a little Elohim will be in Shekinaih and you, and Our circumcised children that follow both of you faithfully. They will be using the thought wavelength to create about anything. So far none have witness it in this age or even the coming age. It will be awesome, just like a mini heaven of its own. This is but a small gleam of the power of the age to come. The people of the nations shall serve them and they shall eat the riches of the world and live like elites and royalty. At last for all their shame, I shall reward them double; and their confusion they shall rejoice in their portion: therefore in the delightful land they shall possess the double: everlasting joy shall be unto them.

title:
Chapter 1
The Blessed Life (part 2)

segments.text: Mat 6:28 And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin: Mat 6:29 And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these. …..Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you

They are the vessel of mercy whom I have chosen. (Rom 9:21-23) They shall ascend and descend to earth from their thrones in the heavens as they determined. They shall be directed by Us in truth perpetually and their descendants shall be acknowledged by the inhabitants of the world as the blessed of Us. Everything they need will be instantly placed before them in a blinking of an eye. In this realm, all needs are fulfilled. They shall suffer no lack. It is a perfect state of awareness and of divine health. The old shall look young. They shall be in their perfect state constantly because My light radiates upon them and became their fountain of youth and divinity life form.

Isa 65:13 Therefore thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH, Behold, my servants shall eat, but ye shall be hungry: behold, my servants shall drink, but ye shall be thirsty: behold, my servants shall rejoice, but ye shall be ashamed: Isa 65:14 Behold, my servants shall sing for joy of heart, but ye shall cry for sorrow of heart, and shall howl for vexation of spirit. Isa 65:15 And ye shall leave yOur Name for a curse unto my chosen: for THE ADONAI YAHVIH shall slay thee, and call his servants by another name: Isa 65:16 That he who blesseth himself in the earth shall bless himself in THE ELOHIM of truth; and he that sweareth in the earth shall swear by THE ELOHIM of truth; because the former troubles are forgotten, and because they are hid from mine eyes. Isa 65:17 For, behold, I create new heavens and a new earth: and the former shall not be remembered, nor come into mind. Isa 65:18 But be ye glad and rejoice for ever in that which I create: for, behold, I create Jerusalem a rejoicing, and her people a joy. Isa 65:19 And I will rejoice in Jerusalem, and joy in my people: and the voice of weeping shall be no more heard in her, nor the voice of crying. Isa 65:20 There shall be no more thence an infant of days, nor an old man that hath not filled his days: for the child shall die an hundred years old; but the sinner being an hundred years old shall be accursed. Isa 65:21 And they shall build houses, and inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, and eat the fruit of them. Isa 65:22 They shall not build, and another inhabit; they shall not plant, and another eat: for as the days of a tree are the days of my people, and mine elect shall long enjoy the work of their hands. Isa 65:23 They shall not labour in vain, nor bring forth for trouble; for they are the seed of the blessed of THE YAHWEH, and their offspring with them. Isa 65:24 And it shall come to pass, that before they call, I will answer; and while they are yet speaking, I will hear. Isa 65:25 The wolf and the lamb shall feed together, and the lion shall eat straw like the bullock: and dust shall be the serpent's meat. They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain, saith THE YAHWEH.

These are the children who believe that Shekinaih and you are The Angel of Our Presence, who bears Our Names and have receive both of you, who represent THE TRINITY and thus perfected and given spiritual authority to become Our legitimate sons.

Joh 1:11 He came unto his own, and his own received him not. Joh 1:12 But as many as received him, to them gave he authority (G1849 "exousia") to become the sons of THE ELOHIM, even to them that believe on his name: Joh 1:13 Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of THE ELOHIM.
Having loved Us and following My footsteps in My suffering through persecutions and death, they are now conformed to Our image and are given spiritual power according to the spirit of holiness.

Rom 1:1 Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, separated unto the gospel of THE ELOHIM, Rom 1:2 (Which he had promised afore by his prophets in the holy scriptures,) Rom 1:3 Concerning his Son Jesus Christ our YAHWEH, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh; Rom 1:4 And declared to be the Son of THE ELOHIM with power (G1411 "dunamis"), according to the spirit of holiness (G42 "hagiasune"), by the resurrection from the dead: Rom 1:5 By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name: Rom 1:6 Among whom are ye also the called of Jesus Christ:
Because they have forsaken all, We shall reward them with the riches, honour, glory and power.

Mar 10:28 Then Peter began to say unto him, Lo, we have left all, and have followed thee. Mar 10:29 And Jesus answered and said, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my sake, and the gospel's, Mar 10:30 But he shall receive an hundredfold now in this time, houses, and brethren, and sisters, and mothers, and children, and lands, with persecutions; and in the world to come eternal life. Mar 10:31 But many that are first shall be last; and the last first.

We own the entire Cosmoses and all the wealth within. When they yielded 100% unto Us through Shekinaih and you, Our Two Representatives, We will grant them a new heart, a new mind and a new spirit like Ours. Our thoughts and heart's desire become theirs. They shall think and feel alike. They will begin to do serious business with Us. All Our resources are unlimited to back them up as they do Our will all the days of their lives. They shall be abundantly taken care of. All We have are theirs. All they have are also ours. We are one.

1Co 3:21 Therefore let no man boast in men. For all things are yours; 1Co 3:22 Whether Paul, or Apollos, or Cephas, or the Cosmos, or life, or death, or things present, or things to come; all are yours; 1Co 3:23 And ye are Christ; and Christ is of THE ELOHIM.

Yielding 100% to Shekinaih and you, Our Representatives, is to yield to the way of THE YAHWEH by going through the depression of weeping and be made lowly in mind. As they abide in Our teachings through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, We will fill up their blessings in which they will go from strength to strength, everyone appearing before Me in the Heavenly Mount Zion. We will not withhold any good thing from them.

Psa 84:5 Blessed is the Adam whose strength (H5795 "oz") is in thee; in whose heart are the ways of them. Psa 84:6 Who passing through the valley of weeping (H1056 "Baca") make it a well; the teaching (H4175 "moreh") also filleth the blessing (H1293 "berakah"). Psa 84:7 They go from strength (H2428 "chayil") to strength, every one of them in Zion appeareth before THE ELOHIM. Psa 84:8 O YAHWEH ELOHIM SABAOTH, hear my prayer: give ear, O ELOHIM of Jacob. Selah. Psa 84:9 Behold, O ELOHIM our shield, and look upon the face of thine anointed. Psa 84:10 For a day in thy courts is better than a thousand. I had rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my ELOHIM, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness. Psa 84:11 For THE YAHWEH ELOHIM is a sun and shield: THE YAHWEH will give grace and glory: no good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly. Psa 84:12 O YAHWEH SABAOTH, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.
The word "strength" H2428 "chayil" mean wealth, forces and power. Therefore they shall have unlimited wealth, forces and power from Us.

During perilous time when darkness cover the earth, we through our Representatives will appear to Our elects with the true gospel. All flesh shall see Our glory through them. Many people and kings from many nations shall be drawn to them. Many potential Brides and Anointed Ones will also be gathered and fed by them with the sincere milk of the last days' doctrine. The wealth of Our sons from the Arab and Africa nations shall be converted to them as they join forces with them because of Our glory in them. Our sons among the wealthy men of United Kingdom (Isles) and European Union (ships of Tarshish) shall be gathered by them. They shall come with their silver and their gold and place at their feet because We, THE YAHWEH, have fulfilled Our words and revealed our glory through Shekinaih and you, Our Representatives with Our children who pay their allegiance to both of you, who represent Us, THE TRINITY.

title:
Chapter 1
The Blessed Life (part 3)

segments.text: After Mystery Babylon's kingdom had been destroyed, the people of the nations and their kings shall serve Shekinaih and you, and Our perfected children. The gate of heavenly Jerusalem shall be opened continually so that the resources and wealth (H2428 "chayil") of the people and kings may be brought in. For the nation and kingdom that will not serve Shekinaih and you and Our perfected children shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted. My Anointed Ones/ the glory of Lebanon shall come unto them to beautify and be part of Our temple and the feet (infantry) shall be glorious. The sons of Satan that despised and afflicted them shall come bending unto them at the soles of their feet and acknowledge that they are the Heavenly Zion of the Holy One of Israel. Whereas once they have been forsaken and hated, We will make them live in majesty in many generations. The people and kings of the nations shall bring their resources to them. They shall be overseers of peace and taskmasters of righteousness. Violence shall no more be heard in their land nor robbery and invasion within their borders for they are all righteous deliverers and shall inherit the land for ever. We will radiate Our light on them and they shall be in their perfect state constantly in divinity life form. They shall multiply and become a powerful nation.

Isa 60:1 Arise, shine; for thy light is come, and the glory of THE YAHWEH is risen upon thee. Isa 60:2 For, behold, the darkness shall cover the earth, and gross darkness the people: but THE YAHWEH shall arise upon thee, and his glory shall be seen upon thee. Isa 60:3 And the Gentiles shall come to thy light, and kings to the brightness of thy rising. Isa 60:4 Lift up thine eyes round about, and see: all they gather themselves together, they come to thee: thy sons shall come from far, and thy daughters shall be nursed at thy side. Isa 60:5 Then thou shalt see, and flow together, and thine heart shall fear, and be enlarged; because the abundance of the sea shall be converted unto thee, the forces (H2428 "chayil") of the Gentiles shall come unto thee. Isa 60:6 The multitude of camels shall cover thee, the dromedaries of Midian and Ephah; all they from Sheba shall come: they shall bring gold and incense; and they shall shew forth the praises of THE YAHWEH. Isa 60:7 All the flocks of Kedar shall be gathered together unto thee, the rams of Nebaioth shall minister unto thee: they shall come up with acceptance on mine altar, and I will glorify the house of my glory. Isa 60:8 Who are these that fly as a cloud, and as the doves to their windows? Isa 60:9 Surely the isles shall wait for me, and the ships of Tarshish first, to bring thy sons from far, their silver and their gold with them, unto the name of THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, and to the Holy One of Israel, because he hath glorified thee. Isa 60:10 And the sons of strangers shall build up thy walls, and their kings shall minister unto thee: for in my wrath I smote thee, but in my favour have I had mercy on thee. Isa 60:11 Therefore thy gates shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night; that men may bring unto thee the forces of the Gentiles, and that their kings may be brought. Isa 60:12 For the nation and kingdom that will not serve thee shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted. Isa 60:13 The glory of Lebanon shall come unto thee, the fir tree, the pine tree, and the box together, to beautify the place of my sanctuary; and I will make the place of my feet glorious. Isa 60:14 The sons also of them that afflicted thee shall come bending unto thee; and all they that despised thee shall bow themselves down at the soles of thy feet; and they shall call thee, The city of THE YAHWEH, The Zion of the Holy One of Israel. Isa 60:15 Whereas thou hast been forsaken and hated, so that no man went through thee, I will make thee an eternal excellency, a joy of many generations. Isa 60:16 Thou shalt also suck the milk of the Gentiles, and shalt suck the breast of kings: and thou shalt know that I THE YAHWEH am thy Saviour and thy Redeemer, the mighty One of Jacob. Isa 60:17 For brass I will bring gold, and for iron I will bring silver, and for wood brass, and for stones iron: I will also make thy officers peace, and thine exactors righteousness. Isa 60:18 Violence shall no more be heard in thy land, wasting nor destruction within thy borders; but thou shalt call thy walls Salvation, and thy gates Praise. Isa 60:19 The sun shall be no more thy light by day; neither for brightness shall the moon give light unto thee: but THE YAHWEH shall be unto thee an everlasting light, and thy ELOHIM thy glory. Isa 60:20 Thy sun shall no more go down; neither shall thy moon withdraw itself: for THE YAHWEH shall be thine everlasting light, and the days of thy mourning shall be ended. Isa 60:21 Thy people also shall be all righteous: they shall inherit the land for ever, the branch of my planting, the work of my hands, that I may be glorified. Isa 60:22 A little one shall become a thousand, and a small one a strong nation: I THE YAHWEH will hasten it in his time.

In wisdom and understanding, there are non-equal to Shekinaih and you and Our perfected children under both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. All of you, shall be the cream of the crop. As they have set themselves apart unto Us to be holy, like Daniel, We will fill them with the Spirit of Wisdom and Understanding and will place them in potential leadership position of tomorrow. They will lead a steady lives without the Diabolos/ Accuser opposing them for they are overcomers in Us.

We change the times and the seasons. We remove kings and set up kings. We give wisdom unto the wise and knowledge to them that know understanding. We reveal the deep and secret things. We know what is in the darkness and the light dwells with Us. We will give wisdom and might and made known to them what We have determine in the universe. They are Our greater Jonah, Our last days' signs and wonders to the principalities and authorities. They are Our Solomon whose wisdom are greater than the Solomon in the bible.

Mat 12:38 Then certain of the scribes and of the Pharisees answered, saying, Master, we would see a sign from thee. Mat 12:39 But he answered and said unto them, An evil and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given to it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas: Mat 12:40 For as Jonas was three days and three nights in the whale's belly; so shall the Son of man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth. Mat 12:41 The men of Nineveh shall rise in judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: because they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here. Mat 12:42 The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for she came from the uttermost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here.

Through them, we will manifest Our manifold wisdom to the principalities and authorities in the universe. This is Our eternal purpose for those whom are called to take part in the fellowship of My suffering and conformity to My death to be a Christ/Anointed one.

Eph 3:8 Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ; Eph 3:9 And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in THE ELOHIM, who created all things by Jesus Christ: Eph 3:10 To the intent that now unto the principalities and authorities in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of THE ELOHIM, Eph 3:11 According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:

title:
Chapter 2 
All Will Enter Heaven Gates

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
All Will Enter Heaven Gates

All Our perfected children who are overcomers will enter into heaven gates for they are the exceptional ones. They will sit on the last days' throne which have been prepared for them by Us. (Rev 20:4) They have squeezed through the narrow gate between two white rocks, Shekinaih and you, Our rock of offence, while climbing Mount Zion, and had been consistent in keeping their faith despite Our chastisement through many tribulations by Us through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY. They have allowed Us to prune them through the sharp edges of the two white rocks where different parts of their flesh and bones are being cut off so that when they reach the top of the mountain, what is left of them is a pure spirit without the flesh and bones (1 Cor 15:50). These have been faithful in keeping My word and walk out their preordained path of faith with fear and trembling. These are My last days' Paul, Peter. Moses, Aaron etc.

title: Vision of the Heavenly Saints

segments.text: Vision of the Heavenly Saints

Shekinaih: I see a vision of saints like Apostle Paul, Peter, and Moses. Aaron etc. in colorful robes in heaven, all standing up to let the last days' saints sit on their thrones. Following that, they went into the last days' saints who sat on their thrones.

Psa 9:1 To the chief Musician concerning (H5921 "al") Muthlabben (H4192 "to die for the son"), A Psalm of David. I will praise thee, O THE YAHWEH, with my whole heart; I will shew forth all thy marvellous works. Psa 9:2 I will be glad and rejoice in thee: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou most High. Psa 9:3 When mine enemies are recompense (H7725 "shub") in the time to come (H268 " achor"), they shall fall and perish at thy presence. Psa 9:4 For thou hast maintained my right and my cause; thou satest in the throne judging right. Psa 9:5 Thou hast rebuked the heathen, thou hast destroyed the wicked, thou hast put out their name for ever and ever. Psa 9:6 O thou enemy, destructions are come to a perpetual end: and thou hast destroyed cities; their memorial is perished with them. Psa 9:7 But THE YAHWEH shall endure for ever: he hath prepared his throne for judgment. Psa 9:8 And he shall judge the world in righteousness, he shall minister judgment to the people in uprightness. Psa 9:9 THE YAHWEH also will be a refuge for the oppressed, a refuge in times of trouble. Psa 9:10 And they that know thy name will put their trust in thee: for thou, THE YAHWEH, hast not forsaken them that seek thee. Psa 9:11 Sing praises to THE YAHWEH, which dwelleth in Zion: declare among the people his doings. Psa 9:12 When he maketh inquisition for blood, he remembereth them: he forgetteth not the cry of the humble. Psa 9:13 Have mercy upon me, O THE YAHWEH; consider my trouble which I suffer of them that hate me, thou that liftest me up from the gates of death: Psa 9:14 That I may shew forth all thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion: I will rejoice in thy salvation.

JESUS: Psalms 9 is a prophecy about them. They are called Muthlabben because they will be martyred because of Me, THE SON. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, will recompense and destroy those who shed their blood when he arises to judge the nations in the times of trouble. But they that knew the Angel of Our Presence, Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, and take refuge in Us through HER/HIM shall be delivered from the gates of death and enter into the gates of Zion with praises.

Psa 24:1 A Psalm of David. The earth is THE YAHWEH'S, and the fullness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein. Psa 24:2 For he hath founded it upon the seas, and established it upon the floods. Psa 24:3 Who shall ascend into the mountain of THE YAHWEH? or who shall stand in his holy place? Psa 24:4 He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart; who hath not lifted up his soul unto vanity, nor sworn deceitfully. Psa 24:5 He shall receive the blessing from THE YAHWEH, and righteousness from THE ELOHIM of his salvation. Psa 24:6 This is the generation of them that seek him, that seek thy presence (H6440 "paniym"), O Jacob. Selah. Psa 24:7 Lift up your heads, O ye gates; and be ye lift up, ye everlasting doors; and the King of glory shall come in. Psa 24:8 Who is this King of glory? THE YAHWEH strong and mighty, THE YAHWEH mighty in battle. Psa 24:9 Lift up your heads, O ye gates; even lift them up, ye everlasting doors; and the King of glory shall come in. Psa 24:10 Who is this King of glory? THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, he is the King of glory. Selah.

They are the exceptional ones who have ascended into the gate of Heavenly Mount Zion because their works towards Me are done out of a pure and truthful heart. This is the last generation of leaders of the twelve tribes of Spiritual Israel (Rev 21:12) that seek Us, THE YAHWEH, who will be coming united in one spirit with the Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, as the king of glory.

Psa 87:1 A Psalm or Song for the sons of Korah (H7141 "qorach" ice). His foundation is in the holy mountains. Psa 87:2 THE YAHWEH loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob. Psa 87:3 Glorious things are spoken of thee, O city of THE ELOHIM. Selah. Psa 87:4 I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to them that know me: behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this man was born there. Psa 87:5 And of Zion it shall be said, This and that man was born in her: and the highest himself shall establish her. Psa 87:6 THE YAHWEH shall count, when he writeth up the people, that this man was born there. Selah. Psa 87:7 As well the singers as the players on instruments shall be there: all my springs are in thee.

Our perfected children are the sons of Ice/korah that had gotten the victory over the beast, and over his image, and over his mark, and over the number of his name. They now stand on the sea of glass/ice having the harps of THE FATHER praising Him. They have been reinstated and given the authority to be His sons and restored to their former glory. They are now the foundation/gates of Heavenly Zion. They have returned to the Mount Zion, the Garden of Eden where Lucifer once was at the beginning before her fall.

Psa 118:10 All nations compassed me about: but in the name of THE YAHWEH will I destroy them. Psa 118:11 They compassed me about; yea, they compassed me about: but in the name of THE YAHWEH I will destroy them. Psa 118:12 They compassed me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of THE YAHWEH I will destroy them. Psa 118:13 Thou hast thrust sore at me that I might fall: but THE YAHWEH helped me. Psa 118: THE YAHWEH is my strength and song, and is become my salvation. Psa 118:15 The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tabernacles of the righteous: the right hand of THE YAHWEH doeth valiantly. Psa 118:16 The right hand of THE YAHWEH is exalted: the right hand of THE YAHWEH doeth valiantly. Psa 118:17 I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of THE YAHWEH. Psa 118:18 THE YAHWEH hath chastened me sore: but he hath not given me over unto death. Psa 118:19 Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise THE YAHWEH: Psa 118:20 This gate of THE YAHWEH, into which the righteous shall enter. Psa 118:21 I will praise thee: for thou hast heard me, and art become my salvation. Psa 118:22 The stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner. Psa 118:23 This is THE YAHWEH'S doing; it is marvelous in our eyes. Psa 118:24 This is the day which THE YAHWEH hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it. Psa 118:25 Save now, I beseech thee, O THE YAHWEH: O THE YAHWEH, I beseech thee, send now breakthrough (H6743 "tsalach"). Psa 118:26 Blessed be he that cometh in the name of THE YAHWEH: we have blessed you out of the house of THE YAHWEH.

These have come out of the great persecutions from Antichrist and all nations through the upholding hand of the Angel of Our Presence, The SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, who is Our right hand man. These have hold on to their faith and patience in going through the chastening of THE YAHWEH. Though being killed, they are resurrected by the Angel of Our Presence, and had entered the gate of Zion. At last they have their breakthrough.

title:
Chapter 3 
Given The Authority and Power To Rule In The Three Realms As They Obey/Yield 100% To Our Representatives

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Given The Authority and Power To Rule In The Three Realms As They Obey/Yield 100% To Our Representatives

Hannah also prophesied of them. Like Me, THE FATHER will have them martyred and be brought to Hades for 3 days and after that, resurrect them. He will make them to inherit the throne of glory to rule as princes in the three realms, (heavens, earth and beneath earth) according to their respective calling as they obeyed and yielded 100% to Us to prove their circumcision of their hearts to the Angel of Our Presence, Shekinaih and you, Our Representatives.

1Sa 2:6 THE YAHWEH killeth, and maketh alive: he bringeth down to the grave, and bringeth up. 1Sa 2:7 THE YAHWEH maketh poor, and maketh rich: he bringeth low, and lifteth up. 1Sa 2:8 He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth up the beggar from the dunghill, to set them among princes, and to make them inherit the throne of glory: for the pillars of the earth are THE YAHWEH'S, and he hath set the world upon them.

At that time, they will be fully touched by THE FATHER'S love and will not forget all His benefits. At last they have become immortal and incorruptible and have all their iniquities forgiven and all their diseases healed. They no more age and their youth had been rejuvenated. They had been compensated for all their oppression with the knowledge of Our ways. They are grateful to Us through THE SHE/HE, for Our mercy through them. They have kept the covenant and obeyed and yielded to Our command through Our spokesman/Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, with fear and trembling and are now seated on their thrones in the heavens/universe ruling certain parts of the three realms

Psa 103:1 A Psalm of David. Bless THE YAHWEH, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name. Psa 103:2 Bless THE YAHWEH, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits: Psa 103:3 Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases; Psa 103:4 Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies; Psa 103:5 Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle's. Psa 103:6 THE YAHWEH executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed. Psa 103:7 He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel. Psa 103:8 THE YAHWEH is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy. Psa 103:9 He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever. Psa 103:10 He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities. Psa 103:11 For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him. Psa 103:12 As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us. Psa 103:13 Like as a father pitieth his children, so THE YAHWEH pitieth them that fear him. Psa 103:14 For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust. Psa 103:15 As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth. Psa 103:16 For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more. Psa 103:17 But the mercy of THE YAHWEH is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children's children; Psa 103:18 To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them. Psa 103:19 THE YAHWEH hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all. Psa 103:20 Bless THE YAHWEH, ye his angels that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his speech (H1697 "dabar"). Psa 103:21 Bless ye THE YAHWEH, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure. Psa 103:22 Bless THE YAHWEH, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless THE YAHWEH, O my soul.

At last they had ascended to Heavenly Mountain Zion and allotted their respective throne. In that time, they shall be thankful and grateful to Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, for announcing to them the true gospel of the Kingdom and how to enter it.

Psa 122:1 A Song of degrees (H4609 "maalah" ascent) of David. I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of THE YAHWEH. Psa 122:2 Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem. Psa 122:3 Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together: Psa 122:4 Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of THE YAHWEH, unto the testimony of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of THE YAHWEH. Psa 122:5 For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David.
Like the disciples of JESUS and the twenty four elders, they too are appointed to a kingdom and seated on a throne.

Luk 22:28 Ye are they which have continued with me in my temptations. Luk 22:29 And I appoint unto you a kingdom, as my Father hath appointed unto me; Luk 22:30 That ye may eat and drink at my table in my kingdom, and sit on thrones judging the twelve tribes of Israel.

At last, righteous judgment have been given them by Us through The Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR, and each are allotted their thrones and reign with Christ for a thousand years.

Rev 20:4 And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of THE ELOHIM, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years. Rev 20:5 But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection. Rev 20:6 Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.

title:
Chapter 4 
No Request Will Be Withheld From Them

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
No Request Will Be Withheld From Them

They have become a Christ, an anointed king. No request will be withhold from them for we have put our heart beat in their hearts respectively, they only delight to do Our good pleasure. They have become One with Us , THE YAHWEH, doing Our will only.
Pro 21:1 The king's heart is in the hand of THE YAHWEH, as the rivers of water: he turneth it whithersoever he will.

They are now truly born again and become the heavenly child that is born of THE HOLY SPIRIT made in the image of THE ELOHIM with Our DNA. In that day, whatever they ask from Shekinaih and you, who represent Our Names, THE FATHER will give it to them because they share our heart beats in their requests.

Joh 16:21 A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the world. Joh 16:22 And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man etaketh from you. Joh 16:23 And in that day ye shall ask me nothing. Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall ask the Father in my name, he will give it you. Joh 16:24 Hitherto have ye asked nothing in my name: ask, and ye shall receive, that your joy may be full.

All the blessings of goodness shall be laid before them, whether it be kingship, eternal life, glory and honor etc. because they have walked in completeness to Us and have partake of Our divine nature.

Psa 21:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David. The king shall joy in thy strength, O YAHWEH; and in thy salvation how greatly shall he rejoice! Psa 21:2 Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and hast not withholden the request of his lips. Selah. Psa 21:3 For thou preventest him with the blessings of goodness: thou settest a crown of pure gold on his head. Psa 21:4 He asked life of thee, and thou gavest it him, even length of days for ever and ever. Psa 21:5 His glory is great in thy salvation: glory and honour hast thou laid upon him. Psa 21:6 For thou hast made him most blessed for ever: thou hast made him exceeding glad with thy countenance.

Psa 84:11 For THE YAHWEH ELOHIM is a sun and shield: THE YAHWEH will give grace and glory: no good thing will he withhold from them that walk in completeness. Psa 84:12 O YAHWEH SABAOTH, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.

title:
Act 3 Scene 1 
The Restoration

segments.text:
Act 3 Scene 1 
The Restoration
Time Frame: Year 2018 and Beyond
Location: Everywhere, Worldwide

One sunny afternoon, in the bustling city of Singapore, all of a sudden a giant Red Dragon begin to come out of the Macritchie Reservoir in a spiral upward motion, going undetected as most of the people in this city their eyes were blind folded with a black cloth covering their eyes.

It then fly to hover over The Istana and turned into an owl and stood to look inside The Istana in close proximity to where it stand hypnotizing those inside the office to do her bidding and influencing them in their decision making.
Lo! And Behold! Suddenly, a great lightning struck that bird and the Red Dragon instantly ducked out of that owl and crept into a key man in that office to have direct control over him.
On one post National Day of this country, this undetected Red Dragon inside this man begin to cause a deterioration in his health while he was making a speech to a live audience of that Nation.
THE TRINITY then appeared to Shekinaih and Aaron K David to request them to intercede to prolong the life of this key leader.

THE FATHER then said to Shekinaih and David, "Lo! And Behold! The ruler of this age and beyond is ruling from the carnal fallen state of Mankind with The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil instead of The Tree of Life when I first created them".
Shekinaih then turned and said to David…….

Shekinaih: I see a vision of THE TREE OF LIFE and inside this tree, I saw the Golden Robe Empress with my face, with these words written on her forehead, "HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER" written on her forehead. The tree of life is an olive tree with seven branches which represent the 7 lampstands/Menorah. I see the word, "IMPOSSIBLE BECOME POSSIBLE" written on its foliage and the word, "IMPOSSIBLE REALM AND HEAVEN BOUND" written on the ground it is rooted.

I see Lucifer the red dragon hiding inside THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL. And I see the word, "PRACTICAL, RATIONAL" written on the foliage and the word "PRACTICAL REALM EARTH BOUND", written on the ground it was planted.
David: LORD JESUS, can you enlighten me regarding these vision Shekinaih saw?

JESUS: The fallen nature of Adam was due to his disobedience by eating the forbidden fruit of The Tree Of Knowledge of Good and Evil where Lucifer dwells. She governs human through mind control when human ate from the fruit of this tree. This tree became the stronghold in all human minds on earth. The knowledge from this tree is the exact opposite of The Tree Of Life from heaven which originated from THE TRINITY. The Tree Of Knowledge of Good and Evil forms the rational mind and the practical mind. These are the exact opposite qualities from the Tree of Life where the impossible becomes possible. THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL IS EARTHLY BOUND and OPERATE IN 0.1 % OF THE POTENTIAL ABILITY of Adam. The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil which resulted in the RATIONAL AND PRACTICAL MIND is a high things that exalt itself against our counsel.

2Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through THE ELOHIM to the pulling down of strong holds;) 2Co 10:5 Casting down rationalism (G3053 "logismos"), and every high thing (G5313 "hupsoma") that exalteth itself against the knowledge of THE ELOHIM, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of a Christ; 2Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled. 2Co 10:7 Do ye look on things after the outward appearance? If any man trust to himself that he is Christ, let him of himself think this again, that, as he is Christ, even so are we Christ.

Whereas, THE TREE OF LIFE is HEAVENLY BOUND and operate in the UNLIMITED ABILITY of THE ELOHIM. As far as heaven is above the earth so are Our thoughts higher than your thoughts and Our ways higher than your ways.

title: The Vision of the Tree of Life and the White Whale

segments.text: The Vision of the Tree of Life and the White Whale

Shekinaih: I see again this tree. I see the word, "David 70% and Jose 30% written on the bark, and the word, "144,000" written on the branches. Then I see myself inside superimposed on a white whale but the skin of the physical whale is you.
David: LORD JESUS, Please enlighten me regarding these two visions?

JESUS: Shekinaih represents THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER, who signifies as THE VERY ESSENCE OF THE TREE OF LIFE, RELEASING THE COUNSEL OF THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED BY HER. Coupled with, as THE YAHWEH SABAOTH whom she represents to lead THE TRINITY'S LAST DAYS ARMY. Our decree through her prayer, will tear down the structure of the stronghold of THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL from our children and impart Tree Bark of THE TREE OF LIFE into to wrap Jose and you and the branches of THE TREE OF LIFE into all our children and establish you and them.
The tree bark signifies you as the chief warrior and Jose is the sub chief warrior of THE TRINITY'S LAST DAYS ARMY. And all the branches are part of Our 144,000 warrior Brides.
Gen 41:32 And for that the dream was doubled unto Pharaoh twice; it is because the thing is established by God, and God will shortly bring it to pass.

Shekinaih represents Our Olive Tree of Life as well as the white fish in the spirit, and you represent the physical manifestation. Together, Shekinaih and you, are My two anointed Cherubim, Our flaming sword who will turn back every future Adam, to take heed and to observe the way of My tree of life.

Gen 3:24 So he drove out Adam; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubim, and a flaming sword which turned back ( H2015 "haphak" ) everyone, to keep (H8104 "shamar" take heed, observe) the way of the tree of life.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, shall discipline and correct the children of the Kingdom as a father to a son in whom I delight. Those who strengthen and sustain themselves by abiding in Shekinaih and you, shall be rewarded by Us with eternal life, riches and honor, pleasantness and peace. The fish in Mat 17:27 refers to both of you.

Mat 17:24 And when they were come to Capernaum, they that received tribute money came to Peter, and said, Doth not your master pay tribute? Mat 17:25 He saith, Yes. And when he was come into the house, Jesus prevented him, saying, What thinkest thou, Simon? of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers? Mat 17:26 Peter saith unto him, Of strangers. Jesus saith unto him, Then are the children free. Mat 17:27 Notwithstanding, lest we should offend them, go thou to the sea, and cast an hook, and take up the fish that first cometh up; and when thou hast opened his mouth, thou shalt find a piece of money: that take, and give unto them for me and thee.
Shekinaih and you represent THE FATHER and Me as the King of kings over Our children to provide riches to Our perfected sons/daughters.

Pro 3:11 My son, despise not the chastening of THE YAHWEH; neither be weary of his correction: Pro 3:12 For whom THE YAHWEH loveth he correcteth; even as a father the son in whom he delighteth. Pro 3:13 Happy is the Adam that findeth wisdom, and the Adam that getteth understanding. Pro 3:14 For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, and the gain thereof than fine gold. Pro 3:15 She is more precious than rubies: and all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her. Pro 3:16 Length of days is in her right hand; and in her left hand riches and honour. Pro 3:17 Her ways are ways of pleasantness, and all her paths are peace. Pro 3:18 She is a tree of life to them that are strengthen (H 2388 "chazaq" fortify, made courageous) of her: and happy is every one that sustain (H8551 "tamak") of her. Pro 3:19 THE YAHWH by wisdom hath founded the earth; by understanding hath he established the heavens. Pro 3:20 By his knowledge the depths are broken up, and the clouds drop down the dew.

Those who continuously take heed, observe and are 100% yielded to THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will We attach them as a branch to be a part of My tree of life and concerning their hope and their desire, I shall not defer it any longer but shall reward them by hastening its fulfillment.

Pro 13:12 Hope deferred maketh the heart sick: but when the desire cometh, it is a tree of life. Pro 13:13 Whoso despiseth the word shall be destroyed: but he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.

If any of My children who had become part of Shekinaih and you, do not continue to be 100% obedience to Our instruction and correction through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, even if it is 1% or less in disobedience, to us it is perverseness and I will permit the Diabolos/Accuser to chop them off and will hurl them into Gehenna's fire to be burned if they do not truly repent.
My children is to take heed of My Definition of "Doubt":
"Doubt is equal to unbelief; is equal to no faith; is equal to lose of reward; is equal to curses; is equal to gnashing of teeth eternally; is equal to being skipped over/replaced".
Behold! Therefore My goodness and severity: on them who fell, severity; but toward them, goodness, if they continue in My goodness: otherwise they also shalt be cut off. (Rom 11:22)

Therefore, My children, must take heed that none of this doubt is in them which will result in them blaspheming Shekinaih, who represent THE HOLY SPIRIT, the very essence of The Tree of Life and you whom represent me as the main part of this tree bark of The Tree of Life, and together, whom are Our 2 CHERUBIM OF GLORY.

My children, do not be a fool, do not despise My instruction through Our representative and do not disregard their correction. Bridle your tongue so that your spirit will not be breached; and endeavor be part of My tree of life by having a curative tongue by going through My chastening through offences and tests and be accepted by them to be a part of My tree of life in the age to come so that you can be a healing for the nations.

Pro 15:4 A curative (H4831 "marpe") tongue is a tree of life: but perverseness (H5558 "seleph" distortion) therein is a breach in the spirit. Pro 15:5 A fool despiseth his father's instruction: but he that regardeth reproof (H8433 "tokechah" chastisement, correction) is prudent.

Rev 22:2 In the midst of the street of it, and on either side of the river, was there the tree of life, which bare twelve manner of fruits, and yielded her fruit every month: and the leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.

Shekinaih: I see the tree in the Garden of Eden in the Heavenly Mount Zion where the thrones of the glorified saints are seated. In their ascent to the Holy Mount Zion, part of their testing before glorification, are ten fiery beams that shoot out in all direction which signify the ten test of perfection of character. The FATHER through his representative Shekinaih will test the children through her seven offences.

THE FATHER: Shekinaih represents THE HOLY SPIRIT as The Tree of Life; Our source of life. Through her, Our children shall be attached to Us again. However, before My spirit through her can bring My children to be part of this tree, I will have to firstly demolish The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil which is the prevailing stronghold in all humanity since the fall of Adam in the Garden of Eden. Therefore, We through her will use:

The seven offences of THE ADONAI to test them whether they will forgo or let go of their rational stronghold, logical stronghold, practical stronghold, financial stronghold, physical stronghold, mental stronghold, theological stronghold, etc. and to embrace My thoughts and My ways which are much higher than their thoughts and their ways, for as heaven are higher than the earth, so are My thoughts higher than their thoughts and My ways are higher than their ways.
I will use her to distribute the ten tests paper of perfection to test My potential last days' army. The ten tests are:
1) To be completely truthful in Us through them (Shekinaih and Aaron K David)
2) To be 100% yielded to Our instruction through them
3) Be lowly equal to zero self
4) Be completely sincere before men and THE ELOHIM
5) Meekness of love
6) Be patient
7) Be 100% circumcised in heart
8) Obedient unto death
9) Be entirely
10) Be single-minded

I will personally through Shekinaih, My representative and Aaron K David, My SON's representative, uproot the evil Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil that are planted by Lucifer out of My last days' army when they submit to My chastisement and perfection through them. I will through Shekinaih which represents Me and the HOLY SPIRIT, breathes the branch of The Tree of Life into their spirit man so that they will be attached to Me like a branch that are supposed to be attached to the vine in order to bear much fruit, for apart from Me, they can do nothing by themselves.

I have also breathed 70% of the bark of The Tree of Life into David and 30% of the bark of The Tree of Life into Jose through Shekinaih's mouth. All My children need to be part of this tree by attaching themselves to this tree through them. Otherwise, they will end up in the place where there shall be gnashing of teeth.

That is the reason why I am using Shekinaih and you to reveal the strongholds in My people and demolish them so that those who are thirsty for the water from the fountain of life (Rev 21:6), may draw water out from the wells of salvation (Isa 12:3) and drink the sincere milk (1 Pet 2:2) of the knowledge of Our ways from the breast of the HOLY SPIRIT in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, based on precept upon precept; line upon line; here a little, there a little (Isa 28:9-10).

title:
Chapter 1 
The Breaking

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
The Breaking

title: Broken Spirit Is Equal to Unfathomable Power

segments.text: Broken Spirit Is Equal to Unfathomable Power

Shekinaih: I see a vision of THE TRINITY represented by me hammering a white pillar with all kinds of black snakes engraved on it. I broke it into many small broken pieces and put them on a table. I then used a rolling pin to powder the broken pieces and then swept them into a pan with a broom. I then put the pan into a furnace to refine them. I see spirits of all the snakes in the white pillar were consumed and liquid gold flowed out into a human mould which is attached to it. I see a human being in the form of white light came out of the mold and went into a transparent wine glass which I then put inside a magnifying glass. I see the human being in the form of light became a light bulb and it was linked to my heart (which was inside THE FATHER'S heart) and your heart with wire in the form of white light. I then see the light of the light bulb was magnified billions of times in brightness.
David: ABBA FATHER, what is the interpretation of this vision?

JESUS: The pillar signifies the true congregation of the living THE ELOHIM that supports the truth who are incarnated in the flesh. The black snakes signifies the evil spirits which at present energize the sins of their flesh, their bad habits inherited from the fallen nature of men.

1Ti 3:15 But if I tarry long, that thou mayest know how thou oughtest to behave thyself in the house of THE ELOHIM, which is the church of THE ELOHIM, the pillar and ground of the truth. 1Ti 3:16 And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: THE ELOHIM was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed on in the world, received up into glory.
I will through the hammer of Our SEVEN OFFENCES, through the Squeezing or Stretching:
1) Financially,
2) Physically,
3) Mentally,
4) Emotionally,
5) Ridiculously/Absurdly,
6) Impossibly/Logically/Rationally,
7) Completely Out of This World
of Our Name, THE ADONAI, use Shekinaih to demolish all the spirits that are assimilated inside them.

title:
Chapter 2 
Powder and Refine

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Powder and Refine

After breaking down their stronghold, We will powder them and put them in the fining pot to burn away all their dross. But if they continue to be in this carnal minded state, they will die without knowledge because We shall not be pleased with them for they have made themselves an enemy to Us. Those who are earth bounded, mind anything that are sensual in the gratification of the flesh and its ability. They easily become prey to the demons in the three common temptation: sex, glory and wealth. These resulted in jealousy, envy, covetousness, greed, lusts, fornication, adultery, deceitfulness, robbery, hatred, anger, provocation, lies, dissension, evil speaking, murder, scheming, treachery, idolatry, power hunger, pride, and desire to be lifted just like Lucifer which cause her downfall.(Rom 8:5-8)

Mat 21:41 They say unto him, He will miserably destroy those wicked men, and will let out his vineyard unto other husbandmen, which shall render him the fruits in their seasons. Mat 21:42 Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is THE YAHWEH's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes? Mat 21:43 Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of THE ELOHIM shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof. Mat 21:44 And whosoever shall fall on this stone shall be broken: but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder.
We will orchestrate troubles to break and powder them so as to draw them back to Us. When they are at wits end, they shall all learn to take refuge in Us again

Psa 34:17 The righteous cry, and THE YAHWEH heareth, and delivereth them out of all their troubles. Psa 34:18 THE YAHWEH is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit. Psa 34:19 Many are the afflictions of the righteous: but THE YAHWEH delivereth him out of them all.

When they are truly remorseful and take Our commands through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY in fear and trembling, We shall let them inherit My Holy Mountain and make Our dwelling in them after all their stronghold which is their stumbling blocks are taken away.
Psa 90:3 Thou turnest man to powder H1793 "dakka" pounded, crush to pieces); and sayest, Return, ye sons of Adam.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? Isa 66:2 For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith THE YAHWEH: but to this man will I look, even to him that is poor and of a contrite spirit, and trembleth at my word.

Isa 57:13 When thou criest, let thy companies deliver thee; but the wind shall carry them all away; vanity shall take them: but he that putteth take refuge in me shall possess the land, and shall inherit my holy mountain; Isa 57:14 And shall say, Cast ye up, cast ye up, turn( H6437 "panah")ye the way, take up the stumblingblock out of the way of my people. Isa 57:15 For thus saith the high and lofty One that inhabiteth eternity, whose name is Holy; I dwell in the high and holy place, with him also that is of a contrite and humble spirit, to revive the spirit of the humble, and to revive the heart of the contrite ones. Isa 57:16 For I will not contend for ever, neither will I be always wroth: for the spirit should fail before me, and the souls which I have made.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, as a refining fire will try them (Exo 3:2) and refined my 144,000 Brides as silver and My 7,000 Anointed one as gold according to their fear and love toward both of you, who represent THE TRINITY as unto Us.
Pro 17:3 The fining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold: but THE YAHWEH trieth the hearts.
Pro 27:21 As the fining pot for silver, and the furnace for gold; so is a man to his praise.

title:
Chapter 3 
The Purification

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
The Purification

These purified souls are the pure souls that were first formed before they were corrupted by the spirits of this evil age and torn and split into many deluded personalities. The transparent wine glasses of Our glory garment are to cloth or contain the purified souls, the pure/red (H2561 "chemer") wine which signifies the spiritual Israel/glorious Brides of Our SON JESUS who had been sanctified to be holy and without blemish by Our speech through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. (Eph 5:27).
Isa 5:7 For the vineyard of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH is the house of Israel, and the men of Judah his pleasant plant: and he looked for judgment, but behold oppression; for righteousness, but behold a cry.
Isa 27:2 In that day sing ye unto her, A vineyard of red (H2561 "chemer") wine. Isa 27:3 I THE YAHWEH do keep it; I will water it every moment: lest any hurt it, I will keep it night and day.

As We have torn them, We shall also heal them. As We have smitten them, We shall also bind them up. In Our acceptable day, We will revive them and in the third day, We shall raise them up and they shall be turned into the best wine as they are nourished by the prophetic rain from the mouth of THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH THAT ARE TO COME, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.

Hos 6:1 Come, and let us return unto THE YAHWEH: for he hath torn, and he will heal us; he hath smitten, and he will bind us up. Hos 6:2 From (H4480 "min") the day (H3117 "yom") will he revive us: in the third day he will raise us up, and we shall live in his sight. Hos 6:3 Then shall we know, if we follow on to know THE YAHWEH: his going forth is prepared as the morning; and he shall come unto us as the rain, as the latter and former rain unto the earth.

This is the mystery of Me turning the water into the good wine on the third day. I address My mother as "Woman" to signify the woman of Revelation 12:1-2 who is the HOLY SPIRIT. The hour of turning Our children from all nations (water signifies nations, Rev 17:15) into good red pure wine is near.

Joh 2:1 And the third day there was a marriage in Cana of Galilee; and the mother of Jesus was there: Joh 2:2 And both Jesus was called, and his disciples, to the marriage. Joh 2:3 And when they wanted wine, the mother of Jesus saith unto him, They have no wine. Joh 2:4 Jesus saith unto her, Woman, what have I to do with thee? Mine hour is not yet come. Joh 2:5 His mother saith unto the servants, Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it. Joh 2:6 And there were set there six waterpots of stone, after the manner of the purifying of the Jews, containing two or three firkins apiece. Joh 2:7 Jesus saith unto them, Fill the waterpots with water. And they filled them up to the brim. Joh 2:8 And he saith unto them, Draw out now, and bear unto the governor of the feast. And they bare it. Joh 2:9 When the ruler of the feast had tasted the water that was made wine, and knew not whence it was: (but the servants which drew the water knew;) the governor of the feast called the bridegroom, Joh 2:10 And saith unto him, Every man at the beginning doth set forth good wine; and when men have well drunk, then that which is worse: but thou hast kept the good wine until now. Joh 2:11 This beginning of miracles did Jesus in Cana of Galilee, and manifested forth his glory; and his disciples believed on him.
We will preserve them and they shall not be hurt in the time of Jacob's troubles.

Rev 6:5 And when he had opened the third seal, I heard the third beast say, Come and see. And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand. Rev 6:6 And I heard a voice in the midst of the four beasts say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and see thou hurt not the oil and the wine.

title:
Chapter 4 
The Glory Garment/The Light Bulb

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
The Glory Garment/The Light Bulb

The transparent wine glass is Our Divine character, which is the 9 fruits of THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE TEN PERFECT CHARACTER OF THE FATHER, is which Our GLORY GARMENT for the untattered purified souls which is the light bulb.

They have become good pure red wine due to their 100% allegiance to Us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. They no more put their trust in riches nor are anxious of their daily need. They faithfully serve Us trusting in Our providence. They have girded their mind and kept their spirit burning with the anointed oil of truth from Us through the living testimony of both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. Every day, they are looking forward for the wedding day of the lamb. (Mat 6:21-34)

These having good and honest heart, have heard and kept Our words spoken through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY and have brought forth fruit of peace with patience. They are now ready to be entrusted to proclaim My message to the whole world without fear of persecutions from their family. (Luk 12:33 -12:49-53)

Luk 8:15 But that on the good ground are they, which in an honest and good heart, having heard the word, keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience. Luk 8:16 No man, when he hath lighted a lamp, covereth it with a vessel, or putteth it under a bed; but setteth it on a lamp, that they which enter in may see the light. Luk 8:17 For nothing is secret, that shall not be made manifest; neither any thing hid, that shall not be known and come abroad. Luk 8:18 Take heed therefore how ye hear: for whosoever hath, to him shall be given; and whosoever hath not, from him shall be taken even that which he seemeth to have.
They are the Jonas and the Solomon who will be sent as the children of light to call those who walk in the light, and to judge those who loved darkness.

Luk 11:29 And when the people were gathered thick together, he began to say, This is an evil generation: they seek a sign; and there shall no sign be given it, but the sign of Jonas the prophet. Luk 11:30 For as Jonas was a sign unto the Ninevites, so shall also the Son of man be to this generation. Luk 11:31 The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with the men of this generation, and condemn them: for she came from the utmost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here. Luk 11:32 The men of Nineve shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here. Luk 11:33 No man, when he hath lighted a lamp, putteth it in a secret place, neither under a bushel, but on a candlestick, that they which come in may see the light.

The parable of the woman who lose one piece of silver signifies the HOLY SPIRIT who will light the lamp which signifies the last days' saints who will be used to seek diligently for the prodigal sons who was lost. At present these are being misled by the deceitfulness of riches and fame in this Dark Age.

Luk 15:8 Either what woman having ten pieces of silver, if she lose one piece, doth not light a lamp, and sweep the house, and seek diligently till she find it? Luk 15:9 And when she hath found it, she calleth her friends and her neighbours together, saying, Rejoice with me; for I have found the piece which I had lost. Luk 15:10 Likewise, I say unto you, there is joy in the presence of the angels of THE ELOHIM over one sinner that repenteth.

title:
Chapter 5 
The Source of Power of the Light Bulb

segments.text:
Chapter 5 
The Source of Power of the Light Bulb

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT's heart, represented by Shekinaih's heart, is the source of the power to light up their light bulb through the red power wire to link to THE FATHER'S heart in Shekinaih, insulated by the blue outer cable insulation called "FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH" and I, represented by Aaron K David, is the green earth life wire to link their life in me in THE FATHER. Together, Our Two Anointed will light up and protect Our last days' seven lampstands.

The light bulb of their spirit man, once lighted up when connected to THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S heart in Shekinaih and protected through the green earth wire that link their life in me in THE FATHER through you, being cloth with Our divine character of the transparent wine glass which is our glory in them will be magnified billions of times in the cosmoses through the magnifying glass awarded by THE FATHER, once they are being perfected and can now be used to be our Vessel of Honor whom we will magnify our glory which is our character in them in the Cosmoses.

Zec 4:1 And the angel that talked with me came again, and waked me, as a man that is wakened out of his sleep, Zec 4:2 And said unto me, What seest thou? And I said, I have looked, and behold a lampstand all of gold, with a bowl upon the top of it, and his seven lamps thereon, and seven pipes to the seven lamps, which are upon the top thereof: Zec 4:3 And two olive trees by it, one upon the right side of the bowl, and the other upon the left side thereof. Zec 4:4 So I answered and spake to the angel that talked with me, saying, What are these, my ADON? Zec 4:5 Then the angel that talked with me answered and said unto me, Knowest thou not what these be? And I said, No, my ADON. Zec 4:6 Then he answered and spake unto me, saying, This is the word of THE YAHWEH unto Zerubbabel, saying, Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Zec 4:7 Who art thou, O great mountain? Before Zerubbabel thou shalt become a plain: and he shall bring forth the headstone thereof with shoutings, crying, Grace, grace unto it.
