Zec 4:8 Moreover the word of THE YAHWEH came unto me, saying, Zec 4:9 The hands of Zerubbabel have laid the foundation of this house; his hands shall also finish it; and thou shalt know that THE YAHWEH SABAOTH hath sent me unto you. Zec 4:10 For who hath despised the day of small things? For they shall rejoice, and shall see the plummet in the hand of Zerubbabel with those seven; they are the eyes of THE YAHWEH, which run to and fro through the whole earth. Zec 4:11 Then answered I, and said unto him, What are these two olive trees upon the right side of the candlestick and upon the left side thereof? Zec 4:12 And I answered again, and said unto him, What be these two olive branches which through the two golden pipes empty the golden oil out of themselves? Zec 4:13 And he answered me and said, Knowest thou not what these be? And I said, No, my lord. Zec 4:14 Then said he, These are the two anointed ones, that stand by THE ADON of the whole earth.

Through THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, as long as they put their faith in THE TRINITY in Shekinaih and walk the life of a Christ by crucifying the flesh with the affection and lusts, We will enlighten their darkness and empower them to be the last days' warrior Brides. As Our spokesman, both of you shall test their completeness in heart towards Us.

Psa 18:28 For thou wilt light my lamp: THE YAHWEH my ELOHIM will enlighten my darkness. Psa 18:29 For by thee I have run through a troop; and by my ELOHIM have I leaped over a wall. Psa 18:30 As for THE EL, his way is perfect: the spokesman of THE YAHWEH is tried: he is a buckler to all those that trust in him. Psa 18:31 For who is THE ELOAH save THE YAHWEH? or who is a rock save our ELOHIM?

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE PURGING FIRE OF ELIJAH, will put our holy spirit in these perfected souls. We will also filled them with the spirit of wisdom and understanding and they will never be deceived again by the wiles of the Adversary.
Pro 20:27 The spirit (H5397 "neshamah") of Adam is the lamp of THE YAHWEH, searching all the inward parts of the belly.
They will partake of the great supper as guest to punish the elites of Mystery Babylon.

Zep 1:7 Hold thy peace at the presence of THE ADONAI YAHVIH: for the day of THE YAHWEH is at hand: for THE YAHWEH hath prepared a sacrifice, he hath bid his guests. Zep 1:8 And it shall come to pass in the day of THE YAHWEH'S sacrifice, that I will punish the princes, and the king's children, and all such as are clothed with strange apparel. Zep 1:9 In the same day also will I punish all those that leap on the threshold, which fill their masters' houses with violence and deceit. Zep 1:10 And it shall come to pass in that day, saith THE YAHWEH, that there shall be the noise of a cry from the fish gate, and an howling from the second, and a great crashing from the hills. Zep 1:11 Howl, ye inhabitants of Maktesh, for all the merchant people are cut down; all they that bear silver are cut off.

As lamps, We will use them to search out and confront the unrepentant Christians who betrayed Us due to their trust in riches. The apostates shall be offended with them and further filled up their transgression by persecuting them so that I will make a speedy riddance of all these reprobates.

Zep 1:12 And it shall come to pass at that time, that I will search Jerusalem with lamps, and punish the men that are settled on their lees: that say in their heart, THE YAHWEH will not do good, neither will he do evil. Zep 1:13 Therefore their goods shall become a booty, and their houses a desolation: they shall also build houses, but not inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, but not drink the wine thereof. Zep 1:14 The great day of THE YAHWEH is near, it is near, and hasteth greatly, even the voice of the day of THE YAHWEH: the mighty man shall cry there bitterly. Zep 1:15 That day is a day of wrath, a day of trouble and distress, a day of wasteness and desolation, a day of darkness and gloominess, a day of clouds and thick darkness, Zep 1:16 A day of the trumpet and alarm against the fenced cities, and against the high towers. Zep 1:17 And I will bring distress upon men that they shall walk like blind men, because they have sinned against THE YAHWEH: and their blood shall be poured out as dust, and their flesh as the dung. Zep 1:18 Neither their silver nor their gold shall be able to deliver them in the day of THE YAHWEH'S wrath; but the whole land shall be devoured by the fire of his jealousy: for he shall make even a speedy riddance of all them that dwell in the land.

title: Gradually Magnified Without as Stars in the Universe

segments.text: Gradually Magnified Without as Stars in the Universe

As the bondages of My elects had been fully demolished, powdered and purified seven times through fire, their spirit man shall be relatively purer to reflect our light as their pure spirit continue to be connected to the heart of THE TRINITY through Our Representatives. We can now begin to release/download unlimited impartation/ breakthroughs, gifting, grace, enablement, wealth, impartation to attract resources, businesses, connections, divine appointment, supernatural linking, superhuman ability and gradually recovery of pre-fall Adamic glory. All these will usher them into their pre-appointed destiny when they continue to link their spirit which is the light bulb linking to the heart of THE TRINITY through Our Representatives on earth. We have appointed them to represent The Tree of Life which all the purified soul are to continue as part of the branch of this tree which Our Representatives represent. They can only bear much fruits if they continue to be attached to this tree.

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth! Who hast set thy glory above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger. Psa 8:3 When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained; Psa 8:4 What is man, that thou art mindful of him? And the son of Adam, that thou visitest him? Psa 8:5 For thou hast made him a little lower than THE ELOHIM, and hast crowned him with glory and honour. Psa 8:6 Thou madest him to have dominion over the works of thy hands; thou hast put all things under his feet: Psa 8:7 All sheep and oxen, yea, and the beasts of the field; Psa 8:8 The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea, and whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas. Psa 8:9 O YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

As they remains in The Tree of Life, We will magnify their light and restore the glory of Adam before the fall. They shall be given authority over the three realms signify by the fowl of the air, beasts of the earth and fish of the sea.

Job 38:4 Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth? Declare, if thou hast understanding. Job 38:5 Who hath laid the measures thereof, if thou knowest? Or who hath stretched the line upon it? Job 38:6 Whereupon are the foundations thereof fastened? Or who laid the corner stone thereof; Job 38:7 When the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of THE ELOHIM shouted for joy?

Gradually, as they are further weighted out by Us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, We shall further magnify their light and made they a little lower than Us to be The Morning Stars who are with Us when We laid the foundation of the earth.

Psa 147:1 Praise ye THE YAH: for it is good to sing praises unto our ELOHIM; for it is pleasant; and praise is comely. Psa 147:2 THE YAHWEH doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel. Psa 147:3 He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds. Psa 147:4 He weighs out (H4487 "manah") the number of the stars; he calleth them all by their names. Psa 147:5 Great is our ADON, and of great power: his understanding is infinite. Psa 147:6 THE YAHWEH lifteth up the meek: he casteth the wicked down to the ground.

1Co 15:40 There are also celestial bodies, and bodies terrestrial: but the glory of the celestial is one, and the glory of the terrestrial is another. 1Co 15:41 There is one glory of the sun, and another glory of the moon, and another glory of the stars: for one star differeth from another star in glory. 1Co 15:42 So also is the resurrection of the dead. It is sown in corruption; it is raised in incorruption: 1Co 15:43 It is sown in dishonour; it is raised in glory: it is sown in weakness; it is raised in power: 1Co 15:44 It is sown a natural body; it is raised a spiritual body. There is a natural body, and there is a spiritual body. 1Co 15:45 And so it is written, The first man Adam was made a living soul; the last Adam was made a quickening spirit.
Those approved by Us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY shall be a quickening spirit and be allotted with the glory according to their works and calling.

Dan 12:2 And many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt. Dan 12:3 And they that be wise shall shine as the brightness of the firmament; and they that turn many to righteousness as the stars for ever and ever. Dan 12:4 But thou, O Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book, even to the time of the end: many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall be increased.
They shall be as the stars forever in the universe with light magnified without limit because of the source which is from Us through Shekinaih and you.

My FATHER has set his heart through Shekinaih and you to oversee them every morning and try them every moment and if they will to put their faith in THE TRINITY in Shekinaih and follow My walk in you, both of you who represent Our Seven Names in different proportion. We will magnify them as brilliant lights that are billion times brighter in the Cosmoses.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE LAST DAYS MOSES AND THE LAST DAYS ELIJAH, are Our forerunner for all My potential Brides/Anointed Ones, unless you are broken, you will NEVER, NEVER, NEVER, NEVER, NEVER experience My comfort, My Presence, My power, and My glory within you. Brokenness is equal to the unfathomable power of THE FATHER unleashed in an untattered soul. While you were in your mother's womb, your soul was already tattered due to the defilement of Adam and Eve by the serpent. This defilement will continue to solidify and imprint in you as you live under the influence of the Diabolos and his evil spirits in this evil age. I have to tear you down completely and rebuild you again into a supernatural soul. This is what I meant by a new creation. When you reach this state, all My heart's desire will be imprinted in your heart, and all your desires are flowed from THE FATHER'S heart and they shall be fulfilled. Yes, all of them.

Therefore, the process of perfection is completed. Let's begin the serious business whereby I will promote you to be My real partner. You will live a full blessed life. I will give you all the desires of your heart without you opening your mouth because it is I who put the desires in your heart and I will fulfil it. You will reach a supernatural state of living heaven on earth. When you look back, all the suffering THE FATHER put you through is nothing in comparison with this blessedness. You will walk in the glory realm with me always beside you.

Therefore, take your eyes away from this natural world and focus on the supernatural which is the real world because I have never destined you to be earthbound but to float like a feather like birds that fly in the heavenly realm, and through Our representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, you will be given the power and authority to be Our Archangels in different spiritual realms which We, through Our Representatives will assign you, where your throne is located.

David, Satan has asked for you, that he may sift you but I have petition to THE FATHER for you that your faith cease not in trusting THE TRINITY in Shekinaih; and when you are converted, establish the children whom THE FATHER has given Shekinaih and you concerning the faith with Our true gospel, spiritual gifts, My teaching of walk of love unto holiness, and their appointed suffering unto perfection.

Luk 22:31 And the Lord said, Simon, Simon, behold, Satan hath desired to have you, that he may sift you as wheat: Luk 22:32 But I have prayed for thee, that thy faith fail not: and when thou art converted, establish (G4741 "sterizo") thy brethren.

1Th 3:12 And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish (G4741 "sterizo") your hearts unblameable in holiness before THE ELOHIM, even our Father, at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his saints.

1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world. 1Pe 5:10 But the THE ELOHIM of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish (G4741 "sterizo"), strengthen, settle you.

title:
Section B 
Advance Training

segments.text:
Section B 
Advance Training

title:
Chapter 1 
Unmoved Anymore By Earthly Relations/Attachments

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Unmoved Anymore By Earthly Relations/Attachments

JESUS: For the children's full potential, We will put you and the children through advance training to be molded to be unmoved anymore by any earthly relations or attachments until you only feel My heart and your only desire is to please THE FATHER and do My will.

Col 3:1 If ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above, where Christ sitteth on the right hand of THE ELOHIM. Col 3:2 Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth. Col 3:3 For ye are dead, and your life is hid with Christ in THE ELOHIM. Col 3:4 When Christ, who is our life, shall appear, then shall ye also appear with him in glory. Col 3:5 Mortify therefore your members which are upon the earth; fornication, uncleanness, inordinate affection, evil concupiscence, and covetousness, which is idolatry: Col 3:6 For which things' sake the wrath of THE ELOHIM cometh on the children of disobedience: Col 3:7 In the which ye also walked some time, when ye lived in them.

Once a person is crucified on the cross of their earthly emotion which is controlled mainly by the enemy, We will come in and dwell in him/her and take over their minds and hearts. They will be heaven bound instead of earth bound. They will pursue eternal things instead of temporal earthly ties. This is important in order for them to be free from Satan's hold on their life.

Mat 4:18 And Jesus, walking by the sea of Galilee, saw two brethren, Simon called Peter, and Andrew his brother, casting a net into the sea: for they were fishers. Mat 4:19 And he saith unto them, Follow me, and I will make you fishers of men. Mat 4:20 And they straightway forsake (G863 "aphiemi") their nets, and followed him. Mat 4:21 And going on from thence, he saw other two brethren, James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother, in a ship with Zebedee their father, mending their nets; and he called them. Mat 4:22 And they immediately left the ship and their father, and followed him.

They will be trained to forsake all earthly relations and attachments (loved ones and belongings) and be like Peter and Andrew who left their net and James and John who left their ship and their father, so as to follow Us in singleness.

They will learn to forsake their self-righteousness by turning the other cheek and forsook their coat and cloke in not resisting evil. They will be taught to forsake their pride and ego by loving those who cursed them, doing good to those who hated them, praying for those who debased and persecuted them, so as to show their complete surrender to Us without reservation..

Mat 5:39 But I say unto you, That ye resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also. Mat 5:40 And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him forsake (G863 "aphiemi") the cloke also. Mat 5:41 And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain. Mat 5:42 Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away. Mat 5:43 Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy. Mat 5:44 But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which abuse you, and persecute you; Mat 5:45 That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust. Mat 5:46 For if ye love them which love you, what reward have ye? Do not even the publicans the same? Mat 5:47 And if ye salute your brethren only, what do ye more than others? Do not even the publicans so? Mat 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
They will be trained to forsake their judgmental and critical spirit so that the Diabolos/Accuser will not be able to condemn them in this area.

Mat 7:1 Judge not, that ye be not judged. Mat 7:2 For with what judgment ye judge, ye shall be judged: and with what measure ye mete, it shall be measured to you again. Mat 7:3 And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but considerest not the beam that is in thine own eye? Mat 7:4 Or how wilt thou say to thy brother, forsake (G863 "aphiemi") and pull out the mote out of thine eye; and, behold, a beam is in thine own eye? Mat 7:5 Thou hypocrite, first cast out the beam out of thine own eye; and then shalt thou see clearly to cast out the mote out of thy brother's eye.

They will learn to see from Our perspectives and not be emotional, by making a difference between the dead and the living so that they will able to follow Us all the way without being hindered by the emotional manipulations of the Diabolos.

Mat 8:21 And another of his disciples said unto him, THE YAHWEH, suffer me first to go and bury my father. Mat 8:22 But Jesus said unto him, Follow me; and forsake (G863 "aphiemi") the dead to bury their dead.

We will put them through many troubles, betrayals and rejections so that they will learn no more to take refuge in men or riches. They will be made fatherless or widows in the spiritual sense and end up in solitude. We will then manifest ourselves to them and they shall be comforted and learn only to take refuge in Us through Our Representatives and no more take refuge in the arm of the flesh. (Jer 17:5-10)

Mar 10:21 Then Jesus beholding him loved him, and said unto him, One thing thou lackest: go thy way, sell whatsoever thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come, take up the cross, and follow me. Mar 10:22 And he was sad at that saying, and went away grieved: for he had great possessions. Mar 10:23 And Jesus looked round about, and saith unto his disciples, How hardly shall they that have riches enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But Jesus answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:25 It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Mar 10:26 And they were astonished out of measure, saying among themselves, Who then can be saved? Mar 10:27 And Jesus looking upon them saith, With men it is impossible, but not with THE ELOHIM: for with THE ELOHIM all things are possible. Mar 10:28 Then Peter began to say unto him, Lo, we have forsake (G863 "aphiemi") all, and have followed thee. Mar 10:29 And Jesus answered and said, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my sake, and the gospel's, Mar 10:30 But he shall receive an hundredfold now in this time, houses, and brethren, and sisters, and mothers, and children, and lands, with persecutions; and in the world to come eternal life. Mar 10:31 But many that are first shall be last; and the last first.

Ye shall be My Two witnesses to testify of Me. (Joh 15:26) As an advocate, ye shall remain with them forever and intercede for them. Ye shall teach and remind them of all things that My Son spoke to them. Ye shall guide them into all truth and show them things to come. (John 14:16, 26, 16:13)

Psa 68:5 A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, is THE ELOHIM in his holy habitation. Psa 68:6 THE ELOHIM setteth the solitary in families: he bringeth out those which are bound with chains: but the rebellious dwell in a dry land.

Joh 14:16 And I will pray the Father, and he shall give you another advocate (G3875 "parakletos"), that he may abide with you for ever; Joh 14:17 Even the Spirit of truth; whom the world cannot receive, because it seeth him not, neither knoweth him: but ye know him; for he dwelleth with you, and shall be in you. Joh 14:18 I will not leave you fatherless (G3737 "orphanos"): I will come to you. Joh 14:19 Yet a little while, and the world seeth me no more; but ye see me: because I live, ye shall live also. Joh 14:20 At that day ye shall know that I am in my Father, and ye in me, and I in you. Joh 14:21 He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him.

title:
Chapter 2 
Well-Seasoned Warriors

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Well-Seasoned Warriors

We will train them to be well seasoned warriors in THE TRINITY in the knowledge of the ways of Diabolos and its tricks. They shall no longer be taken captive easily by her through her emotional manipulation, and ways that target on a person's weaknesses. As the Diabolos uses devices like the strategies of "The Art of War" which she inspired Sun Tzi, which originated from The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil to war against My holy ones, My elects shall study the book well and learn all the methods of the enemy so that they will not be a victim of it.

2Co 2:9 For to this end also did I write, that I might know the proof of you, whether ye be obedient in all things. 2Co 2:10 To whom ye forgive any thing, I forgive also: for if I forgave any thing, to whom I forgave it, for your sakes forgave I it in the person of a Christ; 2Co 2:11 Lest Satan should get an advantage of us: for we are not ignorant of his devices (G3540 "noema" perception).
They shall learn to walk in the law of liberty by showing mercy and forgiveness so that they will not be condemned by the Diabolos. (Jas 2:12-13)

Jas 2:11 For he that said, Do not commit adultery, said also, Do not kill. Now if thou commit no adultery, yet if thou kill, thou art become a transgressor of the law. Jas 2:12 So speak ye, and so do, as they that shall be judged by the law of liberty. Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.

We shall take away the veil of the law that is upon their heart which blind their perception which is based on the knowledge of what is good and evil against what really brings life. They shall learn the way of THE YAHWEH and shall be free to progress from glory to glory as they behold Our reflected glory in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

2Co 3:11 For if that which is done away was glorious, much more that which remaineth is glorious. 2Co 3:12 Seeing then that we have such hope, we use great plainness of speech: 2Co 3:13 And not as Moses, which put a vail over his face, that the children of Israel could not stedfastly look to the end of that which is abolished: 2Co 3:14 But their minds (G3540 "noema" perception) were blinded: for until this day remaineth the same vail untaken away in the reading of the old testament; which vail is done away in Christ. 2Co 3:15 But even unto this day, when Moses is read, the vail is upon their heart. 2Co 3:16 Nevertheless when it shall turn to THE YAHWEH, the vail shall be taken away. 2Co 3:17 Now THE YAHWEH is that Spirit: and where the Spirit of THE YAHWEH is, there is liberty. 2Co 3:18 But we all, with open face beholding as in a glass the glory of THE YAHWEH, are changed into the same image from glory to glory, even as by the Spirit of THE YAHWEH.
Ye shall open their eyes to perceive the light of the glorious gospel of a Christ which is to be restored to the image of THE ELOHIM.

2Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: 2Co 4:4 In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds (G3540 "noema" perception) of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of a Christ, who is the image of THE ELOHIM, should shine unto them.

They shall learn to promptly yield and obey Our commands by casting down their spiritual stronghold of logic and philosophy through genuine repentance and taking authority over the spirits commanding them to leave. They shall be trained as a Christ and learn total obedience to us, even if we ask the Isaac of their life.

2Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through THE ELOHIM to the pulling down of strong holds;) 2Co 10:5 Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of THE ELOHIM, and bringing into captivity every thought (G3540 "noema" perception) to the obedience of a Christ; 2Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.

title:
Chapter 3 
Insider Information

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Insider Information

They shall learn to abide like a branch in My Tree of Life and receive daily counsel from My HOLY SPIRIT through My Two Representatives so as not to fall easy prey to the enemy's snares. Through My counsel, they shall be able to perceive the thoughts of their Adversary and their enemies who are controlled by Satan. They shall not fall easily into the pits that were dug for them. They shall learn not to be wise in their own eyes but to acknowledge Us by seeking daily counsel from THE HOLY SPIRIT regarding the devices of the enemy over their life by updating Our Two Representatives, Shekinaih and you, on all their happenings. THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will expose the enemy's schemes to keep them safe.

Pro 1:32 For the turning away of the simple shall slay them, and the prosperity of fools shall destroy them. Pro 1:33 But whoso hearkeneth unto me shall dwell safely, and shall be quiet from fear of evil.

As long they remain faithful to Us through as branches attaching to Our Tree of life, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, Shekinaih and you, We will guide them into all truth and bring them to the maturity of a Christ through the true four fold ministry that We will raise through Shekinaih and you; and My children shall no more be tricked by the methods of the Diabolos and be tossed to and fro and carried about by her every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men and cunning craftiness; for Shekinaih and you, shall shew and exposed the Diabolos/Accuser's plans against them so that they be not caught off guard.

Joh 15:1 I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman. Joh 15:2 Every branch in me that beareth not fruit he taketh away: and every branch that beareth fruit, he purgeth it, that it may bring forth more fruit. Joh 15:3 Now ye are clean through the oracle (G3056 "logos") which I have spoken unto you. Joh 15:4 Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me. Joh 15:5 I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing….Joh 15:26 But when the Advocate (G3875 "parakletos") is come, whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of truth, which proceedeth from the Father, he shall testify of me: Joh 15:27 And ye also shall bear witness, because ye have been with me from the beginning….Joh 16:12 I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now. Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come. Joh 16:14 He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:15 All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
They shall learn the methods of the Diabolos and be empowered by My Two Representatives who are our right and left hand man, representing the dominion of Our might by the Name of THE EL.

Eph 4:12 For the perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ: Eph 4:13 Till we all come in the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of THE ELOHIM, unto a perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fullness of a Christ: Eph 4:14 That we henceforth be no more children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men, and cunning craftiness, whereby are methods (G3180 "methodeia") to lead to err (G4106 "plane");

They shall be equipped with the full armor of the word of truth so that they are able to withstand against the wiles of the Diabolos. Shekinaih and you, shall reveal to them regarding the principalities, authorities, rulers of darkness of this age and the spiritual wickedness in the high places that they are to wrestle.

Eph 6:10 Finally, my brethren, be enpowered (G1743 "endunamoo") in THE YAHWEH, and in the dominion (G2904 ""kratos") of his might (G2479 "ischus"). Eph 6:11 Put on the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to stand against the methods (G3180 "methodeia") of the Diabolos.
(JESUS then drew the below diagram and continue to expound to Shekinaih and David as he point to the diagram….)

At the very top of the pyramid of hierarchy is the principalities. They are wizards and witches who control the global world affair, making decisions in all global matters through their Satanic Annual Meetings. They receive instructions from Lucifer through her Representatives: be it aliens, fallen angels, spirit guides from the new age movements etc. They then delegate to the authorities who are the world key persons to carry out the works on a global level. These authorities will then instruct the rulers of the darkness of this age who rule the 7 Major world continents to execute Satan's plan. They then instruct the spiritual wickedness in the high places, the spirits of individual countries to execute the plans of Satan in their countries

Eph 6:12 For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against authorities, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual wickedness in high places. Eph 6:13 Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand. Eph 6:14 Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness; Eph 6:15 And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace; Eph 6:16 Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked. Eph 6:17 And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of THE ELOHIM: Eph 6:18 Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints; Eph 6:19 And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel, Eph 6:20 For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.

Lucifer had been energizing all lawlessness since she fell but was permitted until now till you, Our last days' Enoch/Elijah be taken up to Us and to your throne (Rev 12:5). At the appointed time, We will send you down and the Antichrist and his false apostles and false prophets will be revealed; in whom We shall consume through Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, whom We have put Our Names in.

2Th 2:7 For the mystery of lawlessness (G458 "anomia") doth already energized (G1754 "energeo"): only he who now letteth will let, until he be taken out of the way. 2Th 2:8 And then shall that Wicked be revealed, whom THE YAHWEH shall consume with the spirit of his mouth, and shall destroy with the brightness of his presence (G3952 "parousia"): 2Th 2:9 Even him, whose coming is after the energizing (G1753 "energeo") of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders, 2Th 2:10 And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; because they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved. 2Th 2:11 And for this cause THE ELOHIM shall send them power delusion, that they should believe a lie: 2Th 2:12 That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

Shekinaih and you, the spirit of Our mouth, Our spokesman, the two edged sword, shall quicken, energize and made clear to Our children, exposing Lucifer/Satan and all their deliberations and intents; and Our perfected children shall no more fall into unbelief but will be fully convicted of their transgression and humble themselves before Shekinaih and you as they themselves are confronted and exposed of their secret sins by both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

Heb 4:12 For the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) of THE ELOHIM is quickening (G2198 "zao" made alive), and energizing (G1756 "energes"), and comprehensive (G5114 "tomoteros") than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the deliberations (G1761 "enthumesis") and intents of the heart. Heb 4:13 Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his presence: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have to do.

title:
Chapter 4 
Unquestionable Submission To our Representatives

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
Unquestionable Submission To our Representatives
We will give grace to Our children to have unquestionable ability to submit to Us through Shekinaih and you, Our Representatives, who are preordained by Us before the foundation of the heavens.
This is so important to My Children whom We have given Shekinaih and you in order for them not to be easily snared by the Diabolos.

Insubordination is equals to Rebellion, and Lucifer is behind it; because rebellion originates from Lucifer. Lucifer equals rebellious which leads to her downfall. Therefore My children, must not imitate Luicifer's rebellion which will cause their insubordination to My Representatives whom We speak through. This will cause their downfall from their thrones whom We, through Our Representatives have put them there and fall from grace and will lead them into level 2 of Hell/Perdition and to Gehenna, Tartarus.
Only by unquestionable subjection to Us through Our Representatives, will they increase in meekness of wisdom of a Christ. Only by unquestionable subjection, will they find favour in Us and man.

Luk 2:51 And he went down with them, and came to Nazareth, and was subject unto them: but his mother kept all these sayings in her heart. Luk 2:52 And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with THE ELOHIM and man.
They shall learn how to be spiritually minded so that they be not condemned by the Diabolos because of their inability to submit to Us through Our Two Representatives due to their carnal mind.

Rom 8:1 There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ Jesus, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:2 For the law of the Spirit of life in Christ Jesus hath made me free from the law of sin and death. Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, THE ELOHIM sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:5 For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit. Rom 8:6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace. Rom 8:7 Because the carnal mind is enmity against THE ELOHIM: for it is not subject to the law of THE ELOHIM, neither indeed can be. Rom 8:8 So then they that are in the flesh cannot please THE ELOHIM.

Unless they forsake their own righteousness and submit to the righteousness of Our SON JESUS who, we will send Our Angel of Our Presence who shall come as the Name of THE YAHWEH in the last days to call the remnants to salvation, no one shall be restored to Our image.

Rom 10:3 For they being ignorant of THE ELOHIM's righteousness, and going about to establish their own righteousness, have not submitted themselves unto the righteousness of THE ELOHIM. Rom 10:4 For Christ is the end of the law for righteousness to every one that believeth. Rom 10:5 For Moses describeth the righteousness which is of the law, That the man which doeth those things shall live by them. Rom 10:6 But the righteousness which is of faith speaketh on this wise, Say not in thine heart, Who shall ascend into heaven? (that is, to bring Christ down from above) Rom 10:7 Or, Who shall descend into the deep? (that is, to bring up Christ again from the dead.) Rom 10:8 But what saith it? The word is nigh thee, even in thy mouth, and in thy heart: that is, the word of faith, which we preach; Rom 10:9 That if thou shalt confess with thy mouth the Lord Jesus, and shalt believe in thine heart that THE ELOHIM hath raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved. Rom 10:10 For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation. Rom 10:11 For the scripture saith, Whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed. Rom 10:12 For there is no difference between the Jew and the Greek: for the same YAHWEH over all is rich unto all that call upon him. Rom 10:13 For whosoever shall call upon the name of THE YAHWEH shall be saved. Rom 10:14 How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? And how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? And how shall they hear without a preacher? Rom 10:15 And how shall they preach, except they be sent? As it is written, How beautiful are the feet of them that preach the gospel of peace, and bring glad tidings of good things!

Those who resist and refuse to submit to My Representatives because of self-righteousness, ego and pride shall receive condemnation from Us. Not submitting to them is the same as not submitting to Us and the spirits behind this act is the spirit of bitterness and rebellion which is an abomination to Us.

Joe 2:28 And it shall come to pass afterward, that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams, your young men shall see visions: Joe 2:29 And also upon the servants and upon the handmaids in those days will I pour out my spirit. Joe 2:30 And I will shew wonders in the heavens and in the earth, blood, and fire, and pillars of smoke. Joe 2:31 The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before the great and the terrible day of THE YAHWEH come. Joe 2:32 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of THE YAHWEH shall be delivered: for in mount Zion and in Jerusalem shall be deliverance, as THE YAHWEH hath said, and in the remnant whom THE YAHWEH shall call.

We will discipline and correct them through My Two Representatives so that they will learn unquestionable submission to Us by overcoming their grief and bitterness and learn to be at peace so that We will impart holiness to them.

They shall learn humility and be in subjection to Shekinaih and you, Our Representatives, The Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, the Spirit of Grace; by resisting all the accusations of the Diabolos and not fall into bitterness because of Our discipline and training unto holiness; and We shall lift them up in due time.

Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears.

Jas 4:7 Submit (H5293 "hupotasso") yourselves therefore to THE ELOHIM. Resist the Diabolos, and he will flee from you. Jas 4:8 Draw nigh to THE ELOHIM, and he will draw nigh to you. Cleanse your hands, ye sinners; and purify your hearts, ye double minded. Jas 4:9 Be afflicted, and mourn, and weep: let your laughter be turned to mourning, and your joy to heaviness. Jas 4:10 Humble yourselves in the presence of THE YAHWEH, and he shall lift you up.

They shall learn not be anxious of their needs or in their trials, but trust Us that we care for them so that the Adversary/Diabolos cannot swallow them up in their unbelief. As they humble themselves under Our mighty hand, Shekinaih and you, they shall indeed be exalted in due time and be completely restored, establish, and empowered with spiritual knowledge and power.

1Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the Diabolos, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world. 1Pe 5:10 But THE ELOHIM of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you.

title:
Chapter 5 
Unbroken Rank

segments.text:
Chapter 5 
Unbroken Rank

They shall be trained not to break rank but walk in unison so that We, through Our earthly Representatives, Shekinaih and you, the Advocate whom My FATHER sent to represent Us will unleash Our full power on them as long as they remain 100% faithful to Us through Our Representatives.

My FATHER, THE YAHWEH, through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih have travail you, the man-child, My reincarnate and have put His zeal for His house in you to go forth on behalf of Us as a mighty man of war to rebuke the Cosmoses of their sin and their incontinence and judge the prince of this Cosmoses. Shekinaih and you, being Our Advocate, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH shall indeed guide Our children into Our unknown path and lighten their path and straighten them who are crooked and lead them into all truth.

Isa 42:13 THE YAHWEH shall go forth as a mighty man, he shall stir up jealousy like a man of war: he shall cry, yea, roar; he shall prevail against his enemies. Isa 42:14 I have long time holden my peace; I have been still, and refrained myself: now will I cry like a travailing woman; I will destroy and devour at once. Isa 42:15 I will make waste mountains and hills, and dry up all their herbs; and I will make the rivers islands, and I will dry up the pools. Isa 42:16 And I will bring the blind by a way that they knew not; I will lead them in paths that they have not known: I will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight. These things will I do unto them, and not forsake them.

Joh 16:7 Nevertheless I tell you the truth; It is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Advocate will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you. Joh 16:8 And when he is come, he will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment: Joh 16:9 Of sin, because they believe not on me; Joh 16:10 Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more; Joh 16:11 Of judgment, because the prince of this Cosmos is judged. Joh 16:12 I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now. Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come. Joh 16:14 He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:15 All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:16 A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me, because I go to the Father. Joh 16:17 Then said some of his disciples among themselves, What is this that he saith unto us, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me: and, Because I go to the Father? Joh 16:18 They said therefore, What is this that he saith, A little while? We cannot tell what he saith. Joh 16:19 Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them, Do ye enquire among yourselves of that I said, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me? Joh 16:20 Verily, verily, I say unto you, That ye shall weep and lament, but the world shall rejoice: and ye shall be sorrowful, but your sorrow shall be turned into joy. Joh 16:21 A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the Cosmos. Joh 16:22 And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man taketh from you. ..

Therefore, My children, do not break My commandments and submit to Our Representatives. Do not break ranks for this will leads to disunity, chaos, distrust, backstabbing and making yourselves easy prey to the Diabolos; and shall fall from a great height and plunge unto destruction.
Gal 5:15 But if ye bite and devour one another, take heed that ye be not consumed one of another.

Therefore, My children, stay united with one vision and love by submitting to Our Advocate whom We had appointed over you; so that ye be upheld and guided in your preordained path to fulfil your destiny and be part of Our end time army with Shekinaih and Aaron K David, the Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, for great and terrible are Our invincible army: and who can stand when My FATHER and Me come in Our Two Cherubim of Our Glory with Our resurrected holy ones to judge the Cosmoses and their inhabitants as We descend from Our respective thrones.

Joe 2:1 Blow ye the trumpet in Zion, and sound an alarm in my holy mountain: let all the inhabitants of the land tremble: for the day of THE YAHWEH cometh, for it is nigh at hand; Joe 2:2 A day of darkness and of gloominess, a day of clouds and of thick darkness, as the morning spread upon the mountains: a great people and a strong; there hath not been ever the like, neither shall be any more after it, even to the years of many generations. Joe 2:3 A fire devoureth before them; and behind them a flame burneth: the land is as the garden of Eden before them, and behind them a desolate wilderness; yea, and nothing shall escape them. Joe 2:4 The appearance of them is as the appearance of horses; and as horsemen, so shall they run. Joe 2:5 Like the noise of chariots on the tops of mountains shall they leap, like the noise of a flame of fire that devoureth the stubble, as a strong people set in battle array. Joe 2:6 Before their face the people shall be much pained: all faces shall gather blackness. Joe 2:7 They shall run like mighty men; they shall climb the wall like men of war; and they shall march every one on his ways, and they shall not break their ranks: Joe 2:8 Neither shall one thrust another; they shall walk every one in his path: and when they fall upon the sword, they shall not break off (H1214 "batsa"). Joe 2:9 They shall run to and fro in the city; they shall run upon the wall, they shall climb up upon the houses; they shall enter in at the windows like a thief. Joe 2:10 The earth shall quake before them; the heavens shall tremble: the sun and the moon shall be dark, and the stars shall withdraw their shining: Joe 2:11 And THE YAHWEH shall utter his voice before his army: for his camp is very great: for he is strong that executeth his word: for the day of THE YAHWEH is great and very terrible; and who can abide it?

title:
Part 3
GLORIOUS FUTURE OF AN ANOINTED/A BRIDE

segments.text:
Part 3
GLORIOUS FUTURE OF AN ANOINTED/A BRIDE

title:
Section A 
Thrones For Those Who Pass The Test

segments.text:
Section A 
Thrones For Those Who Pass The Test

title:
Chapter 1 
Higher Heaven

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Higher Heaven

title: From Real 7 Dimension Perspective

segments.text: From Real 7 Dimension Perspective
David: LORD JESUS, please enlighten Us regarding the thrones in Heaven.
(JESUS upon seeing David's excitement, drew a diagram and said to him as he point to the diagram….)

JESUS: Heaven is made up of higher heaven and lower heaven. Higher heaven is made up of three planes. The FATHER who only hath immortality, dwelling in the light which no man can approach, sits on his throne in the highest plane in the higher heaven and manifests himself through Shekinaih, His incarnation, The Angel of His Presence in this plane. On the lower plane of higher heaven is the throne of THE HOLY SPIRIT who manifests herself through Shekinaih, her reincarnate, The Angel of His Presence. On the lowest plane of higher heaven is My throne and I manifests Myself through you, Aaron K David, The Angel of My Presence.

1Ti 6:13 I give thee charge in the presence (G1799 "enopion") of THE ELOHIM (THE HOLY SPIRIT), who quickeneth all things, and before Christ Jesus, who before Pontius Pilate witnessed a good confession; 1Ti 6:14 That thou keep this commandment without spot, unrebukeable, until the appearing of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ: 1Ti 6:15 Which in his times he shall shew, who (THE FATHER) is the blessed and only Potentate, the King of kings, and Lord of lords; 1Ti 6:16 Who only hath immortality, dwelling in the light which no man can approach unto; whom no man hath seen, nor can see: to whom be honour and power everlasting. Amen.

title:
Chapter 2 
Lower Heaven

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Lower Heaven

Outside the higher heaven is a golden gate which is guarded by Jose who sits on his throne like the Jade Emperor of Chinese Mythology ruling over the three realms, namely heavens/Cosmoses, earth and beneath earth/hell. The highest plane in Lower heaven is Heavenly Jerusalem and it is also known as the Kingdom of heaven. In this plane, are thrones of Our resurrected holy ones/ four living creatures/the four fold ministries/Christ/Anointed Ones; ruling the plane below the Kingdom of heaven which are thrones in the earth, thrones in different galaxies and constellations of stars /angels.
I, the LESSER YAHWEH, through you, the Angel of My Presence sits on the throne of every level of the lower heaven ruling over them.

1Co 6:1 Dare any of you, having a matter against another, go to law before the unjust, and not before the saints? 1Co 6:2 Do ye not know that the saints shall judge the world? and if the world shall be judged by you, are ye unworthy to judge the smallest matters? 1Co 6:3 Know ye not that we shall judge angels? how much more things that pertain to this life? 1Co 6:4 If then ye have judgments of things pertaining to this life, set them to judge who are least esteemed in the church.

Those whose thrones are in the highest plane of Lower heaven are the vessels of mercy whom I show more goodness as I please. They are the last days' eleventh hour labourers who shall be first in the kingdom of heaven. These in their patience ascended to Heavenly Jerusalem, have been betrayed and condemned to death by the modern day's chief priests and scribes and delivered to the nations to be mocked, scourged, and crucified; and were resurrected by THE HOLY SPIRIT through you, The Angel of My Presence in the last day. These are the last days' James and John, the sons of Zebedee which signify the children of dowry, My Anointed Brides.

Mat 20:1 For the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that is an householder, which went out early in the morning to hire labourers into his vineyard. Mat 20:2 And when he had agreed with the labourers for a penny a day, he sent them into his vineyard. Mat 20:3 And he went out about the third hour, and saw others standing idle in the marketplace, Mat 20:4 And said unto them; Go ye also into the vineyard, and whatsoever is right I will give you. And they went their way. Mat 20:5 Again he went out about the sixth and ninth hour, and did likewise. Mat 20:6 And about the eleventh hour he went out, and found others standing idle, and saith unto them, Why stand ye here all the day idle? Mat 20:7 They say unto him, Because no man hath hired us. He saith unto them, Go ye also into the vineyard; and whatsoever is right, that shall ye receive. Mat 20:8 So when even was come, the lord of the vineyard saith unto his steward, Call the labourers, and give them their hire, beginning from the last unto the first. Mat 20:9 And when they came that were hired about the eleventh hour, they received every man a penny. Mat 20:10 But when the first came, they supposed that they should have received more; and they likewise received every man a penny. Mat 20:11 And when they had received it, they murmured against the goodman of the house, Mat 20:12 Saying, These last have wrought but one hour, and thou hast made them equal unto us, which have borne the burden and heat of the day. Mat 20:13 But he answered one of them, and said, Friend, I do thee no wrong: didst not thou agree with me for a penny? Mat 20:14 Take that thine is, and go thy way: I will give unto this last, even as unto thee. Mat 20:15 Is it not lawful for me to do what I will with mine own? Is thine eye evil, because I am good? Mat 20:16 So the last shall be first, and the first last: for many be called, but few chosen. Mat 20:17 And Jesus going up to Jerusalem took the twelve disciples apart in the way, and said unto them, Mat 20:18 Behold, we go up to Jerusalem; and the Son of man shall be betrayed unto the chief priests and unto the scribes, and they shall condemn him to death, Mat 20:19 And shall deliver him to the Gentiles to mock, and to scourge, and to crucify him: and the third day he shall rise again. Mat 20:20 Then came to him the mother of Zebedee's (G2199 from H2065 "dowry") children with her sons, worshipping him, and desiring a certain thing of him. Mat 20:21 And he said unto her, What wilt thou? She saith unto him, Grant that these my two sons may sit, the one on thy right hand, and the other on the left, in thy kingdom (In Mar 10:37 written as in thy glory). Mat 20:22 But Jesus answered and said, Ye know not what ye ask. Are ye able to drink of the cup that I shall drink of, and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with? They say unto him, We are able. Mat 20:23 And he saith unto them, Ye shall drink indeed of my cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with: but to sit on my right hand, and on my left, is not mine to give, but it shall be given to them for whom it is prepared of my Father. Mat 20:24 And when the ten heard it, they were moved with indignation against the two brethren. Mat 20:25 But Jesus called them unto him, and said, Ye know that the princes of the Gentiles exercise dominion over them, and they that are great exercise authority upon them. Mat 20:26 But it shall not be so among you: but whosoever will be great among you, let him be your minister; Mat 20:27 And whosoever will be chief among you, let him be your servant: Mat 20:28 Even as the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.
These faithful martyrs shall be kings and priests unto me and seated on the left and right of My throne seated by you, The Angel of My Presence, representing Me in the Lower heaven in Mount Zion.

Rev 1:5 And from Jesus Christ, who is the faithful martyr/witness (G3144 "martus"), and the first begotten of the dead, and the prince of the kings of the earth. Unto him that loved us, and washed us from our sins in his own blood, Rev 1:6 And hath made us kings and priests unto THE ELOHIM and his Father; to him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.
Most of them are from the last days' four fold ministry of Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists and Pastors/teachers. The four beasts signify them. Some shall be kings in different countries in the earth.

Rev 5:8 And when he had taken the book, the four beasts and four and twenty elders fell down before the Lamb, having every one of them harps, and golden vials full of odours, which are the prayers of saints. Rev 5:9 And they sung a new song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to THE ELOHIM by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation; Rev 5:10 And hast made us unto our ELOHIM kings and priests: and we shall reign on the earth.
Some shall have their thrones in different parts of the Cosmoses ruling on behalf of Me.

Rev 11:11 And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from THE ELOHIM entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them. Rev 11:12 And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them. Rev 11:13 And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to THE ELOHIM of heaven. Rev 11:14 The second woe is past; and, behold, the third woe cometh quickly. Rev 11:15 And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this Cosmoses (G2889 "Kosmos") are become the kingdoms of our YAHWEH, and of his Christ (anointed ones); and he shall reign for ever and ever.
This will happen after you, upon receiving My FATHER'S decree from Shekinaih bound Satan for a thousand years in the bottomless pit.

Then shall you through the decree of THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih execute the judgment and allot the thrones to the souls of them that were beheaded as My witness, and for Our oracles spoken by you, the Angel of My Presence, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither have received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they shall live and reign with you, the Angel of My Presence, in Mount Zion for a thousand years.

Rev 20:1 And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand. Rev 20:2 And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Diabolos, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years, Rev 20:3 And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season. Rev 20:4 And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the oracle of the ELOHIM, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years. Rev 20:5 But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection. Rev 20:6 Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no authority, but they shall be priests of THE ELOHIM and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.

title:
Chapter 3 
Thrones Prepared Before the Foundation of the Earth

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Thrones Prepared Before the Foundation of the Earth

Revelation 20:1-6 was prophesied by David in Psalms 16 around a thousand years ago before the Book of Revelation was written. I through you, Our last days' David shall fight the beast and the false prophet and his armies in the battle of Armaggeddon.

Zec 12:8 In that day shall THE YAHWEH defend the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and he that is feeble among them at that day shall be as David's house. David shall be as THE ELOHIM, as the angel of THE YAHWEH before them.

The children who are sealed by Shekinaih and you shall take refuge in Us; THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih as THE MAJOR EL and I, represent you as THE MINOR EL, with Shekinaih representing THE ADONAI, the event overturner who has the last laugh, shall resurrect Our holy ones and excellent ones and reward them with allotted regions in the Cosmoses as their inheritance.

As Our Delightful Victory who delights in Our holy Anointed Ones and excellent Brides, with the keys of Hades and Death, you shall swallow up death (Cor15:51-54) and not leave the children who have made a covenant unto death with Us in Sheol, but will lift them up to everlasting life and filled my faithful servants with fullness of joy before Me.

Psa 16:1 Michtam (H4387 "miktam" sealed) of David. Preserve me, O THE EL: for in thee do I take refuge. Psa 16:2 O my soul, thou hast said unto THE YAHWEH, Thou art my ADONAI (H136): my goodness extendeth not to thee; Psa 16:3 But to the holy ones that are in the earth, and to the excellent, in whom is all my delight. Psa 16:4 Their idols (H6094 "atstsebeth" shall be multiplied that hasten after another god: their drink offerings of blood will I not offer, nor take up their names into my lips. Psa 16:5 THE YAHWEH is the allotter (H4521 "menath") of mine inheritance and of my cup: thou maintainest my lot. Psa 16:6 The regions (H2256 "chebel") are fallen unto me in pleasant places; yea, I have a goodly heritage. Psa 16:7 I will bless THE YAHWEH, who hath given me counsel: my reins also instruct me in the night seasons. Psa 16:8 I have set THE YAHWEH always before me: because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved. Psa 16:9 Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth: my flesh also shall rest in hope. Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in Sheol; neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy presence is fullness of joy; at thy right hand is The Delightful (H5273 "naiym") Victory (H5331 "netsach").

We have shown Hannah the vision of their thrones of glory which she prophesy of their death and resurrection to glory. They are Our afflicted Anointed Ones and needy Brides. Their glorification and thrones have been predestinated and ordained before the beginning of the age.

1Sa 2:1 And Hannah prayed, and said, My heart rejoiceth in THE YAHWEH, mine horn is exalted in THE YAHWEH: my mouth is enlarged over mine enemies; because I rejoice in thy salvation. 1Sa 2:2 There is none holy as THE YAHWEH: for there is none beside thee: neither is there any rock like our ELOHIM. 1Sa 2:3 Talk no more so exceeding proudly; let not arrogancy come out of your mouth: for THE YAHWEH is THE EL of knowledge, and by him actions are weighed. 1Sa 2:4 The bows of the mighty men are broken, and they that stumbled are girded with strength. 1Sa 2:5 They that were full have hired out themselves for bread; and they that were hungry ceased: so that the barren hath born seven; and she that hath many children is waxed feeble. 1Sa 2:6 THE YAHWEH killeth, and maketh alive: he bringeth down to the grave, and bringeth up. 1Sa 2:7 THE YAHWEH maketh poor, and maketh rich: he bringeth low, and lifteth up. 1Sa 2:8 He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth up the needy from the dunghill, to set them among princes, and to make them inherit the throne of glory: for the pillars of the earth are THE YAHWEH'S, and he hath set the world upon them. 1Sa 2:9 He will keep the feet of his saints, and the wicked shall be silent in darkness; for by strength shall no man prevail. 1Sa 2:10 The adversaries of THE YAHWEH shall be broken to pieces; out of heaven shall he thunder upon them: THE YAHWEH shall judge the ends of the earth; and he shall give strength unto his king, and exalt the horn of his anointed.
Paul also understand this mystery, the hidden wisdom which were ordained for them before the age unto their glory.

Rom 8:28 And we know that all things work together for good to them that love THE ELOHIM, to them who are the called according to his purpose. Rom 8:29 For whom he did foreknow, he also did predestinate to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brethren. Rom 8:30 Moreover whom he did predestinate, them he also called: and whom he called, them he also justified: and whom he justified, them he also glorified.
1Co 2:7 But we speak the wisdom of THE ELOHIM in a mystery, even the hidden wisdom, which THE ELOHIM ordained before the age unto our glory:

title:
Chapter 4 
The Commendation

segments.text:
Chapter 4 
The Commendation

1Co 4:5 Therefore judge nothing before the time, until THE YAHWEH come, who both will bring to light the hidden things of darkness, and will make manifest the counsels of the hearts: and then shall every man have commendation (G1868 "epainos") of THE ELOHIM.

Upon successfully climbing THE STRAITS or NARROW SHARP EDGED ROCK UP MOUNTAIN ZION without grumbling and complaining, and after reaching the mountain top, the commendation unto glory and allotment of thrones will be done by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, OUR ORACLE, OUR SPOKESMAN, who will discern every deliberations and knew the intents of every heart and nothing shall be hidden from both of you.
We, through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, will grant them the certificate, "THE RIGHT TO SIT ON THEIR RESPECTIVE PRE-ORDAINED THRONES" as they have walked their pre-ordained path of faith till the end.

Heb 4:12 For the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) of THE ELOHIM is quickening (G2198 "zao" made alive), and energizing (G3956 "energes"), and comprehensive (G5114 "tomoteros") than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the deliberations (G1761 "enthumesis") and intents of the heart. Heb 4:13 Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his presence: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have discourse (G3056 "logos").

Shekinaih and you, shall weigh the candidates for glory based on whether they are walking in love, in holiness and are blameless, and both of you, who represent THE TRINITY shall allot thrones to them and they shall rule over the principality, authority, power and rulers of this age and the age to come. Most, if not all are given territory to rule on behalf of THE TRINITY delegated by THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih who decree, seal, execute and co-execute by Me through David, to them if they do not cease to yield and obey Us, THE TRINITY'S instruction through them 100%.
All the three realms shall tremble before them for their names are written in heaven. (Luk 10:20).

Eph 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM and Father of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings in heavenly places in Christ: Eph 1:4 According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love: Eph 1:5 Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will, Eph 1:6 To the commendation(G1868 "epainos") of the glory of his grace, wherein he hath made us accepted in the beloved. Eph 1:7 In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace; Eph 1:8 Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence; Eph 1:9 Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself: Eph 1:10 That in the dispensation of the fullness of times he might gather together in one all things in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; even in him: Eph 1:11 In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the purpose of him who worketh all things after the counsel of his own will: Eph 1:12 That we should be to the commendation(G1868 "epainos") of his glory, who first trusted in Christ. Eph 1:13 In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that holy Spirit of promise, Eph 1:14 Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the commendation (G1868 "epainos") of his glory. Eph 1:15 Wherefore I also, after I heard of your faith in the Lord Jesus, and love unto all the saints, Eph 1:16 Cease not to give thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers; Eph 1:17 That THE ELOHIM of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give unto you the spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him: Eph 1:18 The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints, Eph 1:19 And what is the exceeding greatness of his power to us-ward who believe, according to the energizing of his strength (G2904 "kratos") of might (G2479 "ischus" Angel of His Presence by the name of THE EL), Eph 1:20 Which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set him at his own right hand in the heavenly places, Eph 1:21 Far above all principality, and authority (G1849 "exousia"), and power ( G1411 "dunamis"), and dominion (G2963 "kuriotes" rulers), and every name that is named, not only in this age (G165 "aion"), but also in that which is to come: Eph 1:22 And hath put all things under his feet, and gave him to be the head over all things to the church, Eph 1:23 Which is his body, the fullness of him that filleth all in all.

Their restoration to glory is also dependent on their obedience in walking out the preordained path of faith in ascending through the strait gate to Heavenly Mount Zion. Only those who had crucified their flesh with the affections and lusts by bearing the peace and joy, meekness of love, lowliness of mind and who are prompt to yield and putting complete trust in THE TRINITY in Shekinaih and have walk out the crucified life, are commended unto glory by Us through her whereby she will release the decree for you to co-execute as she executes and allotted a throne in heavenly places (the Cosmoses) by My Father through Shekinaih to you, the Angel of My Presence. (Please refer to "Behold My Messenger1, Behold My Glory" for a detail study)

Eph 2:1 And you hath he quickened, who were dead in trespasses and sins; Eph 2:2 Wherein in time past ye walked according to the age of this Cosmos, according to the prince of the authority of the air, the spirit that now energizing (H1754 "energeo") in the children of disobedience: Eph 2:3 Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others. Eph 2:4 But THE ELOHIM, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us, Eph 2:5 Even when we were dead in sins, hath quickened us together with Christ, (by grace ye are saved ;) Eph 2:6 And hath raised us up together, and made us sit together in heavenly places in Christ Jesus: Eph 2:7 That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus. Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye made whole (G4982 "sozo") through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

The ascent to Heavenly Mount Zion must be without grumbling or complaining because of unbelief (Heb 3:7-19). But with sincerity in loving THE FATHER through His Representatives out of a pure heart, and a good conscience and of faith unfeigned so as to bear the fruits of righteousness unto glory and commendation for their thrones.
1Ti 1:5 Now the end of the commandment is love out of a pure heart, and of a good conscience, and of faith unfeigned:

Php 1:9 And this I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and in all judgment; Php 1:10 That ye may approve things that are excellent; that ye may be sincere and without offence till the day of Christ; Php 1:11 Being filled with the fruits of righteousness, which are by Jesus Christ, unto the glory and commendation (G1868 "epainos") of THE ELOHIM).
David: LORD JESUS, when will this take place, the commendation of glory?

title:

Perilous Crucial Times in My Calendar

title:
Chapter 1 
Kairos Time, Pre-Ordained, 
Predestined Times

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
Kairos Time, Pre-Ordained, 
Predestined Times
(JESUS again drew another diagram and explain to Shekinaih and David as He pointed to the above diagram,)

JESUS: THE TRINITY working in unison will decree and proclaim their decree through Shekinaih to you, the Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY; whereby she will release THE FATHER's decree, sealing and execution and co-executed by you representing me, of the verdict.

1Jn 5:6 This is he that came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not by water only, but by water and blood. And it is the Spirit that beareth witness, because the Spirit is truth. 1Jn 5:7 For there are three that bear record in heaven, the Father, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one. 1Jn 5:8 And there are three that bear witness in earth, the Spirit, and the water, and the blood: and these three agree in one.

We will give three chances of warnings through Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT to you to proclaim to the inhabitants of the earth before the door of the kingdom of heaven be shut and there remains no place of repentance but a certain fearful looking of Our judgment and fiery indignation which We through both of you who shall bring upon the earth with fiery meteorites to devour the world. The three warnings are the three woes which THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, shall warn the inhabitants of the earth before We through both of you smite the earth with utter destruction.

Rev 8:13 And I beheld, and heard an angel flying through the midst of heaven, saying with a loud voice, Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth by reason of the other voices of the trumpet of the three angels, which are yet to sound!

Mal 4:5 Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and dreadful day of THE YAHWEH: Mal 4:6 And he shall turn the heart of the fathers to the children, and the heart of the children to their fathers, lest I come and smite the earth with a utter destruction (H2764 "cherem").

The first woe is the spread of deadly flu epidemic from genetically mutated mosquitoes upon the idols worshippers and it will start from Spain and will spread to the rest of the world. Those who are infected will have five tormenting months to repent of their idolatry. Many will die but many who survive the torment will still hold on to the worship of demons rather to worship Us, THE YAHWEH.

Rev 9:1 And the fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star fall from heaven unto the earth: and to him was given the key of the bottomless pit. Rev 9:2 And he opened the bottomless pit; and there arose a smoke out of the pit, as the smoke of a great furnace; and the sun and the air were darkened by reason of the smoke of the pit. Rev 9:3 And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power. Rev 9:4 And it was commanded them that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree; but only those men which have not the seal of God in their foreheads. Rev 9:5 And to them it was given that they should not kill them, but that they should be tormented five months: and their torment was as the torment of a scorpion, when he striketh a man. Rev 9:6 And in those days shall men seek death, and shall not find it; and shall desire to die, and death shall flee from them. Rev 9:7 And the shapes of the locusts were like unto horses prepared unto battle; and on their heads were as it were crowns like gold, and their faces were as the faces of men. Rev 9:8 And they had hair as the hair of women, and their teeth were as the teeth of lions. Rev 9:9 And they had breastplates, as it were breastplates of iron; and the sound of their wings was as the sound of chariots of many horses running to battle. Rev 9:10 And they had tails like unto scorpions, and there were stings in their tails: and their power was to hurt men five months. Rev 9:11 And they had a king over them, which is the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in the Hebrew tongue is Abaddon, but in the Greek tongue hath his name Apollyon.
