Rev 9:12 One woe is past; and, behold, there come two woes more hereafter.
The second woe is, I will bring a great earthquake to Mexico that will destroy many of the idol worshippers and devil worshippers who are living there.

Rev 11:13 And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to the God of heaven. Rev 11:14 The second woe is past; and, behold, the third woe cometh quickly.

The final woe is, after Satan is defeated by angel Michael and cast down into the earth. He will persecute Shekinaih and you (her that with a child, her that give suck), with the children whom We have given Shekinaih and you. These have kept Our commandments and My testimony; and have not worship the beast, or receive his mark, or the name of the beast, or the number of his name. For then shall be great tribulation, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be. And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for Shekinaih and the children We have given her, those days shall be shortened.

Rev 12:7 And there was war in heaven: Michael and his angels fought against the dragon; and the dragon fought and his angels, Rev 12:8 And prevailed not; neither was their place found any more in heaven. Rev 12:9 And the great dragon was cast out, that old serpent, called the Devil, and Satan, which deceiveth the whole world: he was cast out into the earth, and his angels were cast out with him. Rev 12:10 And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and strength, and the kingdom of our God, and the power of his Christ: for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our God day and night. Rev 12:11 And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the death. Rev 12:12 Therefore rejoice, ye heavens, and ye that dwell in them. Woe to the inhabiters of the earth and of the sea! for the devil is come down unto you, having great wrath, because he knoweth that he hath but a short time. Rev 12:13 And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he persecuted the woman which brought forth the man child. Rev 12:14 And to the woman were given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness, into her place, where she is nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent. Rev 12:15 And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood. Rev 12:16 And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth. Rev 12:17 And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of God, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ. -

title:
Chapter 1 
Kairos Time, Pre-Ordained, 
Predestined Times (part 2)

segments.text: Mat 24:15 When ye therefore shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, stand in the holy place, (whoso readeth, let him understand) Mat 24:16 Then let them which be in Judaea flee into the mountains: Mat 24:17 Let him which is on the housetop not come down to take any thing out of his house: Mat 24:18 Neither let him which is in the field return back to take his clothes. Mat 24:19 And woe unto her that are with child (The woman and the man-child), and to her that give suck in those days! Mat 24:20 But pray ye that your flight be not in the winter, neither on the sabbath day: Mat 24:21 For then shall be great tribulation, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be. Mat 24:22 And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for the elect's sake those days shall be shortened.

Rev 13:15 And he had power to give life unto the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak, and cause that as many as would not worship the image of the beast should be killed. Rev 13:16 And he causeth all, both small and great, rich and poor, free and bond, to receive a mark in their right hand, or in their foreheads: Rev 13:17 And that no man might buy or sell, save he that had the mark, or the name of the beast, or the number of his name.
This third warning/ woe will stir up Our wrath for the apocalypse.

Human factors are the main factors which will affect the earth forces that governed the natural law. These human factors are the conditions of the heart of a particular person, or a group of people, or territory or nation. The purer the heart of the human, group of people, territory or nation, the brighter the light of the same and the stronger are their influences on the earth forces for an event. This is the spiritual principle for where the blessing and Our judgment are to be fulfilled. The energizing prayer of the righteous saints avail much in influencing the outcome of My decision in certain event. Righteous is equal to a sanctified heart. Therefore Our blessing and judgment can be delayed or hastened depending on the condition of the heart of Our holy ones.
David, you as THE MINOR ELIJAH must live a sanctified life so that you energize the children whom We have given Shekinaih and you, to be perfected to be gathered into Our storehouse.

Jas 5:16 Confess your faults one to another, and pray one for another, that ye may be healed. The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much. Jas 5:17 Elias was a man subject to like passions as we are, and he prayed earnestly that it might not rain: and it rained not on the earth by the space of three years and six months. Jas 5:18 And he prayed again, and the heaven gave rain, and the earth brought forth her fruit.

Lucifer, the Red Dragon and Molech, her counterpart, and all the dark evil forces which are under their authority will subserviently obey and execute Our command through Shekinaih and you, for Our Names are in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY and are written in Heaven and broadcast already in the three Realms.

My Kairos timing is My most perfect timing where the realms of the heavens, the earth and beneath the earth will act in unison as according to My decree or pre-written script. The heavens workings refers to the archangels, angels, saints etc. which have been preordained to fulfil certain roles and to act in their respective roles. When My FATHER releases My decree from My throne to Shekinaih who represents THE FATHER, she will then release the decree and authorize you representing Me, to broadcast and summon the angels to act according to what have been written in it. When this happen, the heaven will open and the light of THE TRINITY through the angels' descents on the earth will subdue the principalities in the air that are governing over a particular person, circumstances, group of people or nation. These spirits of the air will be temporarily bound and rendered powerless so that they are not able to performing their pre-approved function in the three realms. The spirits on the earth will be made to respond in My perfect timing, and the underworld will be made to release their hostages (which are the soul held under captive by them whose conversation are still energized by the prince of the air of the Cosmoses in the lusts of the flesh and mind. Eph 2:1-3) or return the blessing that they had either stolen, robbed or blocked from particular person, group of people, territory, nation, etc.

My Name, "THE EL", in Shekinaih, with the activation of My decree of My final say, and My Name, "THE ADONAI", in Shekinaih, through you, the Angel of THE YAHWEH, will overturn the event concerning them. The combination of the three forces which flow from heaven, from the earth and beneath the earth will create a great and mighty explosion of light which will result in event being overturned.
This spiritual principal of how event are unfold, applies to individual as well as things of the universe.

Therefore if My elect can pass all the ten test of My refining pot in the first five sittings which have been pre-scripted by Me for their perfection, they shall enter into My rest at My perfect Kairos time, and the word of THE EL for them will never drop to the ground without accomplishing the word that were sent forth, and Our Name, THE ADONAI, will definitely overturn the event for them.

title:
Chapter 2 
Delay In Time

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
Delay In Time
The Kairos time of Our pre-ordained event of promises for an individual can be delayed if he do not meet Our proofing requirement and time period.

For example, if that individual under My proofing, managed only to pass My ten tests within ten sittings, there will be a delay of the fulfillment of My promises by 10% delay in time. The same applies to him when he only managed to pass the ten tests within twenty sittings, thirty sittings, forty sittings and fifity sittings. The timing of the co-operation of the three realms to activate promises will be misaligned by 20%, 30%, 40 % and 50 % in time respectively

And as the result of this delay, most of the time, confusion may arise on this person due to his/her ignorance of My prerequisite foundation in their character which must first be laid firmly before the real event can be manifested from promises to fulfillment.

title: Butterfly Effect

segments.text: Butterfly Effect

The delay in passing the tests of a particular leader can affects the promises of individuals who are under his spiritual covering to be delayed, even if he himself have passed his testing. There is a butterfly effect in the spiritual realm upon those who are under his spiritual covering.

So it is only after the leader had passed their testing and the individual had passed theirs, will We, through Our Name, THE EL, who has the final say, and through Our Name, THE ADONAI, who is the event over turner, can make good Our promises to them.
The maximum permitted time of My delay is 55% in time if the earthly vessel only manage to pass the ten sets of test within fifty five sittings.

Thereafter, no more delays is allowed. The door of heaven will be shut at its appointed time and The Diabolos/Accuser, will ask for the promises to be forfeited. This is due to the person's heart which is very hard-willed and his refusal to let Me crucify him/her on the cross. Their promised thrones and their callings will be given to someone else for My spirit will not contend with Adam forever. I will bypass him as I have bypassed Esau.

Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears.

title:
Section C 
The Coming of the Son of Adam

segments.text:
Section C 
The Coming of the Son of Adam

title:
Act 3 Scene 2 
The Hour of Our Great Appearance

segments.text:
Act 3 Scene 2 
The Hour of Our Great Appearance
Time Frame: Approximately 30+/- years from Year 2018
Location: Worldwide in the Heavenly Realms
A great tumultuous noise with the sound of trumpet was heard in the sky within the Cosmoses.

Suddenly, the curtain of Heaven begin to split open into two pieces. Great piercing brilliant light radiate out of the sky worldwide simultaneously. Shekinaih, the female Metatron in her purple warrior robe representing THE TRINITY, and David in his blue male Metatron warrior robe representing JESUS, riding on white horses charge with lightning speed towards the earth from heaven.
Following close behind them are 144,000 warrior Brides in warrior clothes riding on white horses.
Nevertheless, many eyes Worldwide can witness the white light from the sky but only a handful can hear this heavenly sound.
Suddenly, a great lightning and thunder strike the centre of the earth in the Middle East, resulting in a massive unforeseen thereby unprepared major earthquake.

Shockingly, the whole earth begin to crack right through the center: from top to bottom, and from left to right, with massive volcanoes explosion Worldwide from land and beneath the sea, causing massive tsunamis overturning the city (ies) upside down.

All of a sudden, a continuous epic of display of lightning with loud thunders are seen and heard across the sky Worldwide and the inhabitants of the earth saw the words "PAYBACK TIME IN FULL" suddenly appearing in the sky.

All the inhabitants of the earth begin to shake and tremble as they saw the message on the sky. Some were falling on their knees praying and pleading for mercy and forgiveness, while the rest of them flee at once looking for safety places to hide with great panic.
A white decree then fell from heaven and land into Shekinaih's right hand which she immediately open up to read.
"The hour is now. We tarry no longer", she reads. After that, she hands it to David to release the Seven Vials of the Book of Revelation concurrently
There came six mighty saints/archangels kneeling before David to receive order from him to sub-execute the decrees.
Suddenly, asteroids begin falling onto the earth as David throws them into the earth like a giant throwing small marbles in his palm. Then the six angels take turn to pour their vials upon the earth.

Rev 16:1 And I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways, and pour out the vials of the wrath of God upon the earth. Rev 16:2 And the first went, and poured out his vial upon the earth; and there fell a noisome and grievous sore upon the men which had the mark of the beast, and upon them which worshipped his image. Rev 16:3 And the second angel poured out his vial upon the sea; and it became as the blood of a dead man: and every living soul died in the sea. Rev 16:4 And the third angel poured out his vial upon the rivers and fountains of waters; and they became blood. Rev 16:5 And I heard the angel of the waters say, Thou art righteous, O Lord, which art, and wast, and shalt be, because thou hast judged thus. Rev 16:6 For they have shed the blood of saints and prophets, and thou hast given them blood to drink; for they are worthy. Rev 16:7 And I heard another out of the altar say, Even so, Lord God Almighty, true and righteous are thy judgments. Rev 16:8 And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and power was given unto him to scorch men with fire. Rev 16:9 And men were scorched with great heat, and blasphemed the name of God, which hath power over these plagues: and they repented not to give him glory. Rev 16:10 And the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of darkness; and they gnawed their tongues for pain, Rev 16:11 And blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores, and repented not of their deeds. Rev 16:12 And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared. Rev 16:13 And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet. Rev 16:14 For they are the spirits of devils, working miracles, which go forth unto the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the battle of that great day of God Almighty. Rev 16:15 Behold, I come as a thief. Blessed is he that watcheth, and keepeth his garments, lest he walk naked, and they see his shame. Rev 16:16 And he gathered them together into a place called in the Hebrew tongue Armageddon. Rev 16:17 And the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air; and there came a great voice out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, It is done. Rev 16:18 And there were voices, and thunders, and lightnings; and there was a great earthquake, such as was not since men were upon the earth, so mighty an earthquake, and so great. Rev 16:19 And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great Babylon came in remembrance before God, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath. Rev 16:20 And every island fled away, and the mountains were not found. Rev 16:21 And there fell upon men a great hail out of heaven, every stone about the weight of a talent: and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof was exceeding great.
Suddenly, a giant chain drop from the heaven from Shekinaih and land in front of David.
David then take the chain and bind the Devil/Ancient serpent and hurls it into the lake of fire to be locked up for a thousand years.

Many earth inhabitants fell into the earth core from the diverse massive earthquakes worldwide. Screaming helplessly, they landed in front of the great White Throne and were judged while many wicked ones fell straight to Gehenna and the lake of fire in Tartarus.
By this time, only ten percent of the World Population has survived.

JESUS then turned to Shekinaih and David and said to them, "What both of you have just witness, is going to happen without delay. Do not forget the vision We showed Jessie regarding the last day which you must put this in writing to remind yourselves and the children whom We have given Shekinaih and you that they do not forget our warning but to prepare for this day; for there shall be no more delay".
JESUS then open the Septuagint Version Bible and turn to the Book of Habakkuk and said to David…

title:
Chapter 1 
He Will Not Delay

segments.text:
Chapter 1 
He Will Not Delay

title: The Righteous One That Shall Come

segments.text: The Righteous One That Shall Come

JESUS: In the Chapter 1 of The Book of Habakkuk, the prophet Habakkuk saw a vision of the tyranny reign of terror of the Assyrian upon all nations in the last days. The Assyrian signifies the Antichrist. In Chapter 2 and 3, he saw a vision of the righteous one who will come in the glory of THE YAHWEH with the saints to war and destroy the Antichrist/Assyrian and her Arabs and African allies. Habakkuk was to write the vision on a tablet which become the Book of Habakkuk and at the appointed time, THE RIGHTEOUS ONE that is to come, will be born and when he read the prophecy, he will not delay/tarry to fulfill the vision according to heaven's time table.

Hab 2:1 I will stand upon my watch, and mount upon the rock, and watch to see what he will say by me, and what I shall answer when I am reproved. Hab 2:2 And THE YAHWEH answered me and said, Write the vision, and that plainly on a tablet, that he that reads it may run. Hab 2:3 For the vision is yet for a time, and it shall shoot forth at the end, and not in vain: though he should tarry, wait for him; for he will surely come, and will not tarry. Hab 2:4 If he should draw back, my soul has no pleasure in him: but THE RIGHTEOUS ONE shall live by my faith. (Septuagint)

The Hebrew version of Habakkuk 2:4, Verse 4 was tampered by the Synagogue of Satan to obscure the prophecy of the coming of this man by changing to: "though it tarry, wait for it; because it will surely come, it will not tarry. Behold, his soul which is lifted up is not upright in him: but the righteous shall live by his faith".

Hab 2:3 For the vision is yet for an appointed time, but at the end it shall speak, and not lie: though it tarry, wait for it; because it will surely come, it will not tarry. Hab 2:4 Behold, his soul which is lifted up is not upright in him: but the righteous shall live by his faith.

But blessed be the name of THE YAHWEH! The early Christian during My time and My disciples' time, are using the Septuagint as the scripture. Therefore Paul was quoting the Septuagint of Hab 2: 4 when he quote Heb 10:36-39 encouraging those who were called to be Apostle and high priest (Heb 3:1) to be patient and wait for THE RIGHTEOUS ONE that is to come, who will send the cloud of witnesses to descend into the last days chosen vessels and energize them to finish the unfinished works together and share the throne of glory (Heb 11: 39-40)

Heb 10:36 For ye have need of patience, that, after ye have done the will of THE ELOHIM, ye might receive the promise. Heb 10:37 For yet a little while, and he that shall come will come, and will not tarry. Heb 10:38 Now THE RIGHTEOUS ONE shall live by faith: but if he draw back (G5288 "hupostello"), my soul shall have no pleasure in him.

Hab 2:1 I will stand upon my watch, and mount upon the rock, and watch to see what he will say by me, and what I shall answer when I am reproved. Hab 2:2 And THE YAHWEH answered me and said, Write the vision, and that plainly on a tablet, that he that reads it may run. Hab 2:3 For the vision is yet for a time, and it shall shoot forth at the end, and not in vain: though he should tarry, wait for him; for he will surely come, and will not tarry. Hab 2:4 If he should draw back, my soul has no pleasure in him: but THE RIGHTEOUS ONE one shall live by my faith. (Septuagint)
David: Who is this righteous one that is to come?
JESUS: Shekinaih and you, David, are THE RIGHTEOUS ONE.

THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, will come quickly according to the time of Our script. Both of you shall conscientiously and dutifully execute and co-execute all the judgment that are scripted by My FATHER as the Book of Revelation are unfolded. When My FATHER shall exhibit both of you, who represent THE TRINITY (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR) to the elect and the righteous in the appointed time, We would have already crucified your flesh and you are no more in bondage to the flesh or to the element of the Cosmoses in your affections and lust (Gal2:19-20, 6:14, 2 Pe 2:9). Both of you, have become a Christ like me and live in holiness unto THE ELOHIM, My FATHER. Both of you live by My faith and will not commit yourselves to men for I will show you what is in men. (Joh 2:23-25, Jer 17:5-10)

Gal 2:19 For I through the law am dead to the law, that I might live unto THE ELOHIM. Gal 2:20 I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the faith of the Son of THE ELOHIM, who loved me, and gave himself for me.
The Righteous One shall lead My saints and shall manifest My glory and shall judge the Antichrist and the nations that are confederate with her in the appointed time as stated in Habakkuk 3.

Hab 3:1 A PRAYER OF THE PROPHET AMBACUM, WITH A SONG. Hab 3:2 O Lord, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon (H5921 "al") the two living creatures, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH shall come from Thaeman, and the saints from the dark shady mount Pharan. Pause. Hab 3:4 His excellence covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength. Hab 3:5 before his face shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth. Hab 3:7 Because of troubles I looked upon the tents of the Ethiopians: the tabernacles also of the land of Madiam shall be dismayed. Hab 3:8 Wast thou angry, O Lord, with the rivers? or was thy wrath against the rivers, or thine anger against the sea? for thou wilt mount on thine horses, and thy chariots are salvation. Hab 3:9 surely thou didst bend they bow at scepters, saith the Lord. Pause. The land of rivers shall be torn asunder. Hab 3:10 The nations shall see thee and be in pain, as thou dost divide the moving waters: the deep uttered her voice, and raised her form on high. Hab 3:11 The sun was exalted, and the moon stood still in her course: thy darts shall go forth at the light, at the brightness of the gleaming of thine arms. Hab 3:12 Thou wilt bring low the land with threatening, and in wrath thou wilt break down the nations. Hab 3:13 Thou wentest forth for the salvation of thy people, to save thine anointed: thou shalt bring death on the heads of transgressors; thou has brought bands upon their neck. Pause. (Septuagint version)

title: The Angel Who will come quickly

segments.text: The Angel Who will come quickly

The angel that was sent by Me, to signify Me and the things that are to come in the Book of Revelation is none other than THE FATHER AND THE HOLY SPIRIT REPRESENTED by Shekinaih, AND I, REPRESENTED by You, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR RESPECTIVELY, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME.

When John wanted to worship him thinking that he is Me, The Angel deters him and explained that he is also a prophet and My witness and is The Spirit of Prophecy. He then tell John that he is coming soon to fulfil all that is going to unfold in the Book of Revelation and will not delay but will come quickly to judge and reward every man according to their work representing Me.

Rev 22:8 And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things. Rev 22:9 Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship THE ELOHIM. Rev 22:10 And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand. Rev 22:11 He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still. Rev 22:12 And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.

Following that, I in him exclaimed that I have send My angel to testify to the churches the things that is/are to come. The angel who testified to John also affirmed with this statement: "Surely, I come quickly".

Rev 22:16 I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star. Rev 22:17 And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the water of life freely. Rev 22:18 For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall add unto these things, THE ELOHIM shall add unto him the plagues that are written in this book: Rev 22:19 And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, THE ELOHIM shall take away his part out of the book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book. Rev 22:20 He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus. Rev 22:21 The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.

This angel who signify Me, had promised that he will come quickly to do certain works in the Book of Revelation five times. Firstly, he will make sure that the congregation of Ephesus will come back to their first love.

Rev 2:1 Unto the angel of the church of Ephesus write; These things saith he that holdeth the seven stars in his right hand, who walketh in the midst of the seven golden candlesticks; Rev 2:2 I know thy works, and thy labour, and thy patience, and how thou canst not bear them which are evil: and thou hast tried them which say they are apostles, and are not, and hast found them liars: Rev 2:3 And hast borne, and hast patience, and for my name's sake hast laboured, and hast not fainted. Rev 2:4 Nevertheless I have somewhat against thee, because thou hast left thy first love. 2:5 Remember therefore from whence thou art fallen, and repent, and do the first works; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will remove thy candlestick out of his place, except thou repent.
All the things, people, angels, living creatures, places and time that are mentioned in the Book of Revelation are used to signify something in the last days.

Rev 1:1 The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which must shortly come to pass; and he sent and signified it by his angel unto his servant John: Rev 1:2 Who bare record of the word of God, and of the testimony of Jesus Christ, and of all things that he saw.

The Book of Revelation is about the last days. It is not what Satan, the father of all lies and deception, through her impressive, weighty, mighty false teachers in the Christendom taught; teaching that the letters to the seven churches as referring to the early churches of that time and teaching that it is not about My elects in the last days.

What is this first love? It is to truly love Me by feeding and keeping My sheep and lamb whom I have purchased with My own blood from wolves in sheep's clothing. Simon Peter learn the real meaning only after being asked three times by Me.

Joh 21:15 So when they had dined, Jesus saith to Simon Peter, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me more than these? He saith unto him, Yea, Lord; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my lambs. Joh 21:16 He saith to him again the second time, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me? He saith unto him, Yea, Lord; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my sheep. Joh 21:17 He saith unto him the third time, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me? Peter was grieved because he said unto him the third time, Lovest thou me? And he said unto him, Lord, thou knowest all things; thou knowest that I love thee. Jesus saith unto him, Feed my sheep.

This was what actually happened to the church of Ephesus whom Paul foreknown, that after he left, impressive (weighty and mighty) false apostles infiltrated among them and lord over the flock, Also among them were apostates who taught distorted doctrines and draw away disciples after them. This was the concern of Paul.

Act 20:28 Take heed therefore unto yourselves, and to all the flock, over the which the Holy Ghost hath made you overseers, to feed the church of THE ELOHIM, which he hath purchased with his own blood. Act 20:29 For I know this, that after my departing shall weighty (G926 "barus") wolves enter in among you, not sparing the flock. Act 20:30 Also of your own selves shall men arise, speaking perverse things, to draw away disciples after them. Act 20:31 Therefore watch, and remember, that by the space of three years I ceased not to warn every one night and day with tears.
This is also My concern for the last days' church which he prophesied that many will come in My Name and claimed that they are an Apostle/ Christ/ Anointed.

That is why the angel said he will come quickly without delay to make sure that they repent and return to their first love in feeding and keeping My lamb and sheep from false Apostles who are impressive with having titles, great credentials and greatly supported by some big Organization or Institution who are from the Synagogue of Satan.

The second time The Angel say he will come quickly is when he will make sure that the last days' spiritual Pergamos Congregation will repent for holding on to the Prosperity Doctrine (Spirit of Covetousness) of the modern day's Balaam, and of their spiritual fornication (compromise) with the Woman (Mystery Babylon/Lucifer), and the doctrine of the Nicolaitans (lord over the sheep) who are the modern's day false apostles. If they do not repent, I will send this angel as My sabre to fight against them.

Rev 2:12 And to the angel of the church in Pergamos (G4010 fortified, tower) write; These things saith he which hath the sharp sabre (G4501 "rhomphaia') with two edges; Rev 2:13 I know thy works, and where thou dwellest, even where Satan's seat is: and thou holdest fast my name, and hast not denied my faith, even in those days wherein Antipas (G493 in the place of the father) was my faithful martyr, who was slain among you, where Satan dwelleth. Rev 2:14 But I have a few things against thee, because thou hast there them that hold the doctrine of Balaam, who taught Balac to cast a stumblingblock before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed unto idols, and to commit fornication. Rev 2:15 So hast thou also them that hold the doctrine of the Nicolaitans (G3531 "nikolaites" victorious over the people), which thing I hate. Rev 2:16 Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the sabre (G4501 "rhomphaia") of my mouth. Rev 2:17 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

The third time The Angel say he will come quickly is when he will expose the false ministers in Christendom (Synagogue of Satan) who persecute the real sons of THE ELOHIM (who at present in the spirit are fatherless until they be manifest as sons of THE ELOHIM). He will humble them and made them to come and worship before the real sons of THE ELOHIM.

Rev 3:7 And to the angel of the church in Philadelphia (G5359 " philadepheia" love the brethren) write; These things saith he that is holy, he that is true, he that hath the key of David, he that openeth, and no man shutteth; and shutteth, and no man openeth; Rev 3:8 I know thy works: behold, I have set before thee an open door, and no man can shut it: for thou hast a little strength, and hast kept my word, and hast not denied my name. Rev 3:9 Behold, I will make them of the synagogue of Satan, which say they are Jews, and are not, but do lie; behold, I will make them to come and worship before thy feet, and to know that I have loved thee. Rev 3:10 Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth. Rev 3:11 Behold, I come quickly: hold that fast which thou hast, that no man take thy crown.
The fourth time The Angel say he will come is when he will judge everyone in the world according as his works.

Rev 22:8 And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things. Rev 22:9 Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship THE ELOHIM. Rev 22:10 And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand. Rev 22:11 He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still. Rev 22:12 And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.

title: The Angel Who will come quickly (part 2)

segments.text: And the fifth time, The Angel who testified all the things that is/are to come in the last days, say with a strong affirmation, "Surely I come quickly".

Rev 22:16 I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star. Rev 22:17 And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the water of life freely. Rev 22:18 For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall add unto these things, THE ELOHIM shall add unto him the plagues that are written in this book: Rev 22:19 And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, THE ELOHIM shall take away his part out of the book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book. Rev 22:20 He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus. Rev 22:21 The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
All these works that The Angel will come quickly (without delay, not tarry) to do is the same work as THE ELIJAH that is to come will do.

THE ELIJAH will not tarry or delay his coming. For he will come quickly in the last day when the ministers of the last days' churches had committed spiritual fornication with the woman Mystery Babylon, or have come under the spiritual covering of a Worldwide Institutional Christian Organization which are controlled by the Synagogue of Satan, or have become false witnesses and persecutors of the real sons of THE ELOHIM. He will challenge and expose the modern day's 450 prophets of Baal who are wolves in sheep clothing. Like THE ELIJAH of old, all spiritual Israel will be confronted by him and have to made a decision whether they will continue to worship Baal and all his false doctrines or repent and turn back to worship THE FATHER in spirit and in truth.
1Ki 18:21 And Elijah came unto all the people, and said, How long halt ye between two opinions? if the LORD be God, follow him: but if Baal, then follow him. And the people answered him not a word.

For those who turn back, he shall teach them how to walk in the Way of THE YAHWEH and the steps to righteousness unto holiness. He shall train them to go through the fiery trials of testing and come forth as gold and silver as they offer their total obedience of faith as an offering in righteousness.

Mal 2:1 And now, O ye priests, this commandment is for you. Mal 2:2 If ye will not hear, and if ye will not lay it to heart, to give glory unto my name, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. I will even send a curse upon you, and I will curse your blessings: yea, I have cursed them already, because ye do not lay it to heart. …..Mal 2:17 Ye have wearied THE YAHWEH with your words. Yet ye say, Wherein have we wearied him? When ye say, Every one that doeth evil is good in the sight of THE YAHWEH, and he delighteth in them; or, Where is THE ELOHIM of judgment? Mal 3:1 Behold, I will send my messenger, and he shall prepare the way before me: and THE ADON, whom ye seek, shall suddenly come to his temple, even the messenger of the covenant, whom ye delight in: behold, he shall come, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH. Mal 3:2 But who may abide the day of his coming? and who shall stand when he appeareth? for he is like a refiner's fire, and like fullers' soap: Mal 3:3 And he shall sit as a refiner and purifier of silver: and he shall purify the sons of Levi, and purge them as gold and silver, that they may offer unto THE YAHWEH an offering in righteousness. Mal 3:4 Then shall the offering of Judah and Jerusalem be pleasant unto THE YAHWEH, as in the days of old, and as in former years. Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH .

THE FATHER then look at Shekinaih and David and said to them, "Verily, verily I said to both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, Shekinaih, you are THE HOLY SPIRIT in Me and you represent Me, and David, you are THE ELIJAH who represent the coming of JESUS as well, and both of you, who represent THE TRINITY are The RIGHTEOUS ONE that is to come. Our counsel shall stand, I(We) will do all My(Our) pleasure; for I(We) have called both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, as the Eagle/ravenous bird from the East, My(Our) prized possession that will be unleashed with a great force UNEXPECTED BY ALL!!!

Isa 46:10 Declaring the end from the beginning, and from ancient times the things that are not yet done (THE LAST DAY), saying, My counsel shall stand, and I will do all my pleasure: Isa 46:11 Calling a ravenous bird from the east, the champion (H376 "ish" translated as champion in 1 Sam17:23, valiant man in 1 Sam 26:15, worthy in 1 Ki 2:26, great man in Isa 2:9, mighty man in Isa 5:15, Isa 31:8) that executeth my counsel from a far country: yea, I have spoken it, I will also bring it to pass; I have purposed it, I will also do it. Isa 46:12 Hearken unto me, ye stouthearted, that are far from righteousness: Isa 46:13 I bring near my righteousness (RIGHTEOUS ONE); it (SHE/HE) shall not be far off (AT HAND), and my salvation (DELIVERER) shall not tarry (DELAY): and I will place salvation (DELIVERER) in Zion for Israel, my glory (THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY).
Lo! And Behold! We have swore in Our holiness, that this day, We have proclaim to heaven, earth, and beneath earth, to make an IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT:
Shekinaih is the Woman, "THE HOLY SPIRIT",
Aaron K David is The Man-Child, "JESUS".
Therefore, We have come through them to;
To gather Our 144,000 virgin Brides
To train, equip, test, perfect, to select and choose among those who are called to reign with Us in the thrones We have prepared for them as well as to seal them for their
Martyrdom
Resurrection
Rapture
To make a covenant with those who are called/chosen so that they might be sealed with Our Names on their forehead.
To fulfil the prophecy of Isaiah 61 :1-7
The Spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH is upon me; because THE YAHWEH hath anointed Me to
preach good tidings unto the meek; he hath sent Me
to bind up the brokenhearted,
to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to them that are bound;
To proclaim the acceptable year of THE YAHWEH,
and the day of vengeance of Our ELOHIM;
to comfort all that mourn;

To appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness, the planting of THE YAHWEH, that he might be glorified.
And they shall build the old wastes, they shall raise up the former desolations, and they shall repair the waste cities, the desolations of many generations.

And strangers shall stand and feed your flocks, and the sons of the alien shall be your plowmen and your vinedressers. But ye shall be named the Priests of THE YAHWEH: men shall call you the Ministers of Our ELOHIM: ye shall eat the riches of the Gentiles, and in their glory shall ye boast yourselves. For your shame ye shall have double; and for confusion they shall rejoice in their portion: therefore in their land they shall possess the double: everlasting joy shall be unto them.
To bring to pass every incident in the Book of Revelation
To square off the story of the woman and the Man-child, versus the serpent and her seed
Lastly, to close this age and to usher in the New Millennium.

Rev 11:18 And the nations were angry, and thy wrath is come, and the time of the dead, that they should be judged, and that thou shouldest give reward unto thy servants the prophets, and to the saints, and them that fear thy name, small and great; and shouldest destroy them which destroy the earth. Rev 11:19 And the temple of God was opened in heaven, and there was seen in his temple the ark of his testament: and there were lightnings, and voices, and thunderings, and an earthquake, and great hail. Rev 12:1 And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars: Rev 12:2 And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered. Rev 12:3 And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads. Rev 12:4 And his tail drew the third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born. Rev 12:5 And she brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto God, and to his throne.

Go forth as the Seventh Thunder with your lightning sons (sons of Thunder) from the east to the west; and with Shekinaih as the Aointed One, with Our cloud of witnesses, gather Our elect from the four corners of the earth.

Mat 24:27 For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also the Presence of the Son of Adam be. Mat 24:28 For wheresoever the carcase is, there will the eagles be gathered together. Mat 24:29 Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken: Mat 24:30 And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory. Mat 24:31 And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.

title:
Chapter 2 
The Cloud of Witnesses

segments.text:
Chapter 2 
The Cloud of Witnesses
JESUS then drew a diagram and expound to Shekinaih and David how the cloud of witnesses are like.

JESUS: The name shown in the above diagram are only an example of the spirits of these saints that will go into the earthly prepared vessels by Us as the cloud of witnesses that will descend upon the earth in the last days.

Under the three realms, We have only authorized Shekinaih who represents THE FATHER to authorize these saints to descend on the earth on certain selected prepared vessels for the last days' works. Therefore, it is of absolute necessity that all those who are called, especially those in the four fold ministry, to be subjected through the FATHER's leading through her. She holds the golden key to open or shut heaven's door for every single life form in the Cosmoses. She has been preordained by Us to fulfil this role for which the purpose she was born. There is no bypassing Our selection criterion through her or sneaking through the back doors without her approval if anyone desire to have the mantles of these saints of old and to be used mightily by Us. Those who seemed to be great and mighty in Christendom are not excluded. To despise My warning, means early death for you; both in your spirit life as well as your physical form.
Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna (H1067 "geenna").

For this is the Protocols of Heaven for My last days' saints; for My appointed Brides/ Anointed Ones, to yield to the heavenly trumpet call of Our Two Representatives (Shekinaih in decreeing, sealing and executing of Our decree and Aaron K David in proclaiming and in co-execution of Our determination). Therefore you must cooperate and submit to them in order for you to enter into your destiny and to inherit your heavenly thrones prepared for you.

The saints of old will in the fullness of time come into some people and use them to complete the unfinished works they have not completed in their life time stewardship so as to be perfected to be an anointed one/Christ. This is Mystery of Our Will. In the fullness of time, We through Our Representatives will gather all the saints that are called to be a Christ/anointed one, in heaven and from the earth to be united with their counterpart in the stewardship unto perfection one and for all, and to be commended by Shekinaih and you, Our representative to be clothed with glory to manifest Our manifold wisdom to the principalities and authorities in the heavens/Cosmoses..

Eph 1:9 Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself: Eph 1:10 That in the stewardship (G3622 "oikonomia") of the fulness of times he might gather together in one all in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; in him: Eph 1:11 In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the purpose of him who worketh all after the counsel of his own will: Eph 1:12 That we should be to the commendation of his glory, who first trusted in Christ.

Eph 3:8 Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ; Eph 3:9 And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ: Eph 3:10 To the intent that now unto the principalities and authorities in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,

Some of these saints of old like Enoch, Noah, Elijah/King David/John The Baptist, Abraham, Sarah, Jacob, Isaac, Joseph, Moses, Aaron, Gideon, Barak, Samson, Samuel, Zechariah, Jonah, the prophets of old, Paul, the twelve apostles of Christ, Hannah, Esther, Jonah, etc., have died in faith and have obtained a good report from Us but have not received the promise of becoming a part of the Heavenly Jerusalem yet; but will be united with Our last days' chosen vessels to finish their unfinished works and be made perfect.

Heb 11:39 And these all, having obtained a good report through faith, received not the promise: Heb 11:40 THE ELOHIM having provided some better thing for us, that they without us should not be made perfect.

The spirit (mantle) of these saints shall rest on selected yielded vessels and they shall flow in their anointing and more works will be done through the last days' preordained earthly vessels to complete the unfinished works before the closing of the age. This last days saints will be awesome, beyond imagination.

The spirit of Moses will come upon some last days' earthly vessels and anyone who has evil imagination against them and speak evil of them, shall be judged personally by Us, THE YAHWEH, like We judged Miriam by smiting her with leprosy.

Num 12:1 And Miriam and Aaron spake against Moses because of the Ethiopian woman whom he had married: for he had married an Ethiopian woman. Num 12:2 And they said, Hath THE YAHWEH indeed spoken only by Moses? hath he not spoken also by us? And THE YAHWEH heard it. Num 12:3 (Now the man Moses was very meek, above all the men which were upon the face of the earth.) Num 12:4 And THE YAHWEH spake suddenly unto Moses, and unto Aaron, and unto Miriam, Come out ye three unto the tabernacle of the congregation. And they three came out. Num 12:5 And THE YAHWEH came down in the pillar of the cloud, and stood in the door of the tabernacle, and called Aaron and Miriam: and they both came forth. Num 12:6 And he said, Hear now my words: If there be a prophet among you, THE YAHWEH will make myself known unto him in a vision, and will speak unto him in a dream. Num 12:7 My servant Moses is not so, who is faithful in all mine house. Num 12:8 With him will I speak mouth to mouth, even apparently, and not in dark speeches; and the similitude of THE YAHWEH shall he behold: wherefore then were ye not afraid to speak against my servant Moses? Num 12:9 And the anger of THE YAHWEH was kindled against them; and he departed. Num 12:10 And the cloud departed from off the tabernacle; and, behold, Miriam became leprous, white as snow: and Aaron looked upon Miriam, and, behold, she was leprous.

title:
Chapter 2 
The Cloud of Witnesses (part 2)

segments.text: Deu 18:18 I will raise them up a Prophet from among their brethren, like unto thee, and will put my words in his mouth; and he shall speak unto them all that I shall command him. Deu 18:19 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever will not hearken unto my words which he shall speak in my name, I will require it of him.
The spirit of Elijah that rests upon Elisha in double portion shall rest on many last days' vessels and more signs and wonders shall be seen.

The Two witnesses in Revelation 11, are The Moses and Elijah Company; with Shekinaih as The Moses, and you, David, as The Elijah. The rest who follow you in that company are Minor Prophets/Prophetess, and Prophetic Intercessors, who will proclaim what both of you have already decreed and executed. They shall cry woe and turn Spiritual Israel to Our way before We, THE YAHWEH smite the earth with utter destruction by you, the Angel of My Presence.

Rev 11:3 And I will give power unto my two witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred and threescore days, clothed in sackcloth. Rev 11:4 These are the two olive trees, and the two candlesticks standing before THE ELOHIM of the earth. Rev 11:5 And if any man will hurt them, fire proceedeth out of their mouth, and devoureth their enemies: and if any man will hurt them, he must in this manner be killed. Rev 11:6 These have authority to shut heaven, that it rain not in the days of their prophecy: and have power over waters to turn them to blood, and to smite the earth with all plagues, as often as they will.
They shall turn waters into blood, bring drought and smite the earth with all plagues as often they will.

After they are martyred, they shall joined with the martyrs which were seen by John under the altars of THE ELOHIM and given white robes and told to rest for a little season until those who are appointed to be martyred are complete.

Rev 6:9 And when he had opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of them that were slain for the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) of THE ELOHIM, and for the testimony which they held: Rev 6:10 And they cried with a loud voice, saying, How long, O YAHWEH, holy and true, dost thou not judge and avenge our blood on them that dwell on the earth? Rev 6:11 And white robes were given unto every one of them; and it was said unto them, that they should rest yet for a little season, until their fellowservants also and their brethren, that should be killed as they were, should be fulfilled.

Once the gathering is complete, all these saints shall be arrayed in their white righteousness robes as armies in heaven upon white horses following Me, who is in united with you, the Angel of My Presence. And as fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, they shall come down from heaven to war against the beast and his armies and eat the flesh of the kings, captains, mighty men and all men that followed the beast in the Great Supper of the lamb.

Rev 19:6 And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for the Lord God omnipotent reigneth. Rev 19:7 Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the marriage of the Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready. Rev 19:8 And to her was granted that she should be arrayed in fine linen, clean and white: for the fine linen is the righteousness of saints. Rev 19:9 And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of THE ELOHIM. Rev 19:10 And I fell at his feet to worship him. And he said unto me, See thou do it not: I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren that have the testimony of Jesus: worship God: for the testimony of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy. Rev 19:11 And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war. Rev 19:12 His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself. Rev 19:13 And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) of THE ELOHIM. Rev 19:14 And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean. Rev 19:15 And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God. Rev 19:16 And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS. Rev 19:17 And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great EL; Rev 19:18 That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great. Rev 19:19 And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army. Rev 19:20 And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone. Rev 19:21 And the remnant were slain with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.

title:
Chapter 3 
Glorious Appearance in the Sky
in the last days

segments.text:
Chapter 3 
Glorious Appearance in the Sky
in the last days
David: LORD JESUS, can you describe to me how your glorious appearance in the sky will be like?
(JESUS seeing David's thirst for truth, drew another diagram and expounded to him)

JESUS: The Diagram demonstrates how My FATHER and Me as one. As seen in the spirit. Symbolically, We appears back to back, just like a Siamese twin which signifies We are united as one, not physically but in the spirit. Our Seven Names are always lighted up in THE HOLY SPIRIT who is the womb of THE FATHER. When THE FATHER wants to manifest any of His Name to execute His works, He will through THE HOLY SPIRIT release the power to light up the names in Me and I will executes His decree accordingly.

Joh 5:17 But Jesus answered them, My Father worketh hitherto, and I work. Joh 5:18 Therefore the Jews sought the more to kill him, because he not only had broken the sabbath, but said also that THE ELOHIM was his Father, making himself equal with THE ELOHIM. Joh 5:19 Then answered Jesus and said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do: for what things soever he doeth, these also doeth the Son likewise. Joh 5:20 For the Father loveth the Son, and sheweth him all things that himself doeth: and he will shew him greater works than these that ye may marvel.

While I was on earth, I always did His will and We work as a team. He through THE HOLY SPIRIT in decreeing, sealing and executing and I in the co-execution of His decree. Through vision, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih will instruct Me what to speak and what to do and I will obey accordingly.
That is why I said, "As long my FATHER works, I work".
Joh 5:17 But Jesus answered them, My Father worketh hitherto, and I work.
Joh 10:29 My Father, which gave them me, is greater than all; and no man is able to pluck them out of my Father's hand. Joh 10:30 I and my Father are one.

Though We are one in the spirit, THE FATHER is greater than I. So is THE HOLY SPIRIT. That is the reason for Our difference in size in the diagram. THE FATHER in Me through the power of THE HOLY SPIRIT is the one who do all the mighty works. Whether in speech or action, I just imitated what I see and heard THE FATHER did.

Joh 14:8 Philip saith unto him, Lord, shew us the Father, and it sufficeth us. Joh 14:9 Jesus saith unto him, Have I been so long time with you, and yet hast thou not known me, Philip? he that hath seen me hath seen the Father; and how sayest thou then, Shew us the Father? Joh 14:10 Believest thou not that I am in the Father, and the Father in me? the words that I speak unto you I speak not of myself: but the Father that dwelleth in me, he doeth the works.
Now that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT is incarnated / reincarnated in Shekinaih and I reincarnated in you, follow Our Protocol and do likewise.

Be subservient to Shekinaih as I am subservient to THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE FATHER and nothing shall touch you and Lucifer and Satan shall have to submit to you as if submitting to Us, THE TRINITY through Shekinaih..
This is the mystery of Our manifestation in the last days which will be unfolded to My saints through this book.
(JESUS drew another diagram and continued to enlighten David as he point to the Two Cherubim in the diagram. JESUS said to David)

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, is The Ark of the Covenant, The Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY that will manifest the Glory of THE TRINITY by Our Name, "YAHWEH SABAOTH".

2Sa 6:2 And David arose, and went with all the people that were with him from Baale of Judah, to bring up from thence the ark of THE ELOHIM, whose name is called by the name of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH that dwelleth upon (H5921 "al") the cherubim.

We, THE TRINITY work in unison. Our Feminine characteristic in THE HOLY SPIRIT is manifested through the female Cherub, Shekinaih. Our Masculine characteristic in JESUS is manifested through you, the Masculine Cherub.

I am always subservient to THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER with an obedient and dutiful attitude. You must follow My example to obey and be dutiful to Shekinaih as unto Us with a subservient posture as shown above. For she is the covering Cherub over you.

Together with the last days' messengers/angels, THE FATHER and Me will through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY judge the world. The glorious appearance of THE TRINITY in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY in the sky will be awesome and beyond imagination. THE FATHER in His Glory in Shekinaih, The Angel of His Presence; I in My Glory in you, the Angel of My Presence; and the resurrected holy ones, in their glory.

Luk 9:26 For whosoever shall be ashamed of me and of my words, of him shall the Son of man be ashamed, when he shall come in his own glory, and in his Father's, and of the holy angels. Luk 9:27 But I tell you of a truth, there be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
JESUS then took out a Septuagint Version Bible and started reading Habakkuk Chapter 3:1-19.

Hab 3:1 A PRAYER OF THE PROPHET AMBACUM, WITH A SONG. Hab 3:2 O YAHWEH, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon the two living creatures, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH shall come from Thaeman, and the Holy One from the dark shady mount Pharan. Pause. Hab 3:4 His glory covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength. Hab 3:5 Before his face (presence) shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth. Hab 3:7 Because of troubles I looked upon the tents of the Ethiopians: the tabernacles also of the land of Madiam shall be dismayed. Hab 3:8 Wast thou angry, O YAHWEH, with the rivers? or was thy wrath against the rivers, or thine anger against the sea? for thou wilt mount on thine horses, and thy chariots are salvation. Hab 3:9 Surely thou didst bend they bow at scepters, saith THE YAHWEH. Pause. The land of rivers shall be torn asunder. Hab 3:10 The nations shall see thee and be in pain, as thou dost divide the moving waters: the deep uttered her voice, and raised her form on high. Hab 3:11 The sun was exalted, and the moon stood still in her course: thy darts shall go forth at the light, at the brightness of the gleaming of thine arms. Hab 3:12 Thou wilt bring low the land with threatening, and in wrath thou wilt break down the nations. Hab 3:13 Thou wentest forth for the salvation of thy people, to save thine anointed: thou shalt bring death on the heads of transgressors; thou has brought bands upon their neck. Pause. Hab 3:14 Thou didst cut asunder the heads of princes with amazement, they shall tremble in it; they shall burst their bridles, they shall be as a poor man devouring in secret. Hab 3:15 And thou dost cause thine horses to enter the sea, disturbing much water. Hab 3:16 I watched, and my belly trembled at the sound of the prayer of my lips, and trembling entered into my bones, and my frame was troubled within me; I will rest in the day of affliction, from going up to the people of my sojourning. Hab 3:17 For though the fig-tree shall bear no fruit, and there shall be no produce on the vines; the labour of the olive shall fail, and the fields shall produce no food: the sheep have failed from the pasture, and there are no oxen at the cribs; Hab 3:18 yet I will exult in THE YAHWEH, I will joy in THE ELOHIM my Saviour. Hab 3:19 THE YAHWEH ADONAI is my strength, and he will perfectly strengthen my feet; he mounts me upon high places, that I may conquer by his song. (Septuagint version)

title:
Chapter 3 
Glorious Appearance in the Sky
in the last days (part 2)

segments.text: JESUS then said to David,
In Hab 3:1-19, Habakkuk saw Our glorious appearance in the last days which was later shown to John in Rev 19:11-21.

Hab 3:2 O YAHWEH, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon the two living creatures, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 THE ELOAH shall come from Thaeman, and the Holy One from the dark shady mount Pharan.

My FATHER and Me shall manifest ourselves through The Two living Creatures/CHERUBIM OF GLORY represented by Shekinaih and Aaron K David. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, are THE ELOAH who shall come with Our saints and shall slay the nations who are gathered to make war against you all.
Hab 3:4 His glory covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength
Our glorious appearance in Shekinaih and you, the Angel of Our Presence, shall be like sun in its brightness that covered the heavens. Powerful laser beams will come out of your palms.
Rev 10:1 And I saw another mighty angel come down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow was upon his head, and his face was as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire:

Hab 3:5 Before his face shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth.

BEFORE THE ANGEL OF OUR PRESENCE, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, THE SHE/HE (Shekinaih/Aaron K David), THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), THE OMNIPOTENT, THE INVINCIBLE AND INVISIBLE ARK OF THE COVENANT THAT HOVER IN THE SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE, THE MESSENGER WHOM WE WILL SEND, THE DREADFUL ELIJAH, WHO WAS, AND IS, AND IS TO COME, shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the four corners of the earth. Every place that you set your feet on to execute Our judgment, the people shall tremble: all nations shall be terrified: the principalities and power shall be dashed in pieces and bow before both of you.

Hab 3:7 Because of troubles I looked upon the tents of the Ethiopians: the tabernacles also of the land of Madiam shall be dismayed. Hab 3:8 Wast thou angry, O YAHWEH, with the rivers? or was thy wrath against the rivers, or thine anger against the sea? for thou wilt mount on thine horses, and thy chariots are salvation. Hab 3:9 Surely thou didst bend they bow at scepters, saith THE YAHWEH.

The African and Arab nations including all the nations that are gathered by the beast and false prophet of Revelation 13 to war against Shekinaih and you and Our armies, will be torn asunder by Shekinaih and you and Our armies of glorified saints that are following you.

Hab 3:10 The nations shall see thee and be in pain, as thou dost divide the moving waters: the deep uttered her voice, and raised her form on high. Hab 3:11 The sun was exalted, and the moon stood still in her course: thy darts shall go forth at the light, at the brightness of the gleaming of thine arms. Hab 3:12 Thou wilt bring low the land with threatening, and in wrath thou wilt break down the nations.
Shekinaih and you, shall bring a prolonged eclipse of the sun and brought tsunamis and break down the nations that war against you and Our armies.

Hab 3:13 Thou wentest forth for the salvation of thy people, to save thine anointed: thou shalt bring death on the heads of transgressors; thou has brought bands upon their neck. Pause. Hab 3:14 Thou didst cut asunder the heads of princes with amazement, they shall tremble in it; they shall burst their bridles, they shall be as a poor man devouring in secret. Hab 3:15 And thou dost cause thine horses to enter the sea, disturbing much water.

title:
Epilogue 
Mystery of The Two Cherubim 21/7/2015

segments.text:
Epilogue 
Mystery of The Two Cherubim 21/7/2015
David: Why are the Two Cherubim same size, what do they signify?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me that it signifies their equal manifestation of THE TRINITY, 50/50.
David: Why are they made of gold?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me that they were covered with divinity impartation of THE TRINITY'S substance.
David: Why are they facing each other with their wings tip touching each other?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me five Fold Mysteries of These Two Cherubim:
1) When they spread out their wings to touch each other, I saw a vision of the ying yang logo. It is the concept of duality forming a whole.
2) Their similarity in size signifies THE TRINITY's manifestation in them equally, 50/50.
3) However, I saw THE FATHER pointed to me, who is the standing Cherub and said, "Shekinaih represents the full FATHER'S authority and full HOLY SPIRIT'S authority over David who represents JESUS".

Then I heard JESUS said to you, "You need to be like Me to be subservient and obey My FATHER even unto death. In terms of authority and power, Shekinaih is always greater than you because she has been OFFICIALLY CONFIRMED, APPROVED IRREVOCABLY to be THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S INCARNATION".

Then, I saw THE FATHER wearing a white robe, seated on a higher throne, with THE HOLY SPIRIT also wearing a white robe seated on a throne which is lower than THE FATHER; and I saw both of them rose from their seat from their thrones and descended into me. Next, I saw a big ball of light and a medium size ball of light came down from heaven into me. As I look at THE FATHER'S and THE HOLY SPIRIT'S throne in heaven, they were now emptied. As I looked at these empty thrones wondering where they have gone, I heard them speaking to me, "We are in you now".
Then, I heard THE FATHER said to me, "The Son can do nothing apart from His FATHER; for THE FATHER holds the full authority and power".
Next, I saw myself as the golden Empress seated on a Throne, with these words written on my hand, "Hold the full authority and My power".

Next, I saw myself as the golden Empress seated on the throne and wrote these words on a white piece of paper, "POWER RELEASED", and I saw myself rolled up this white paper and put on a red ribbon and tied it and threw this decree to you who is kneeling down in front of me. You were wearing a white robe. As you picked up the decree, the decree went inside you and you were transformed into different type of weapons in the form of lights according to the different decrees. Sometimes in the decree there was a sabre, sometimes in the decree, there was a hammer and nail, sometimes, in the decree, was a rotating blade, etc. These weapons represent the power for co-execution.

I saw a store house full of weapons and you are only authorize to use them as and when commanded. I saw as I blew the horn, the weapon from the store house flew into my right hand and I then placed it on the decree which I wrote and rolled it up and tied it with a red ribbon and released this decree to you. And as you picked up this decree, the power/weapon for co-execution of what was written in the decree went inside you.

4) I heard THE FATHER said to me, "When David is ready to manifest the full manifestation of MY SON, JESUS, it will leads to a fuller manifestation of THE FATHER/THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih. Therefore, David must always serve Shekinaih as unto Us (THE FATHER and HOLY SPIRIT) because David is also the Angel of THE YAHWEH who must obey THE TRINITY'S command. If he rebel and disobey Us in Shekinaih, she will lock him up in an iron jail".
I saw I locked you up and swallowed the key.
Then, I heard THE FATHER said to you, "THAT'S RIGHT; THAT IS WHY, YOU MUST NOT ENTERTAIN ANY THOUGHT OF REBELLION, BUT BE SUBSERVIENT TO HER AS UNTO THE TRINITY; FOR THIS IS OUR PROTOCOL.

I then heard THE TRINITY said to Us, "AS ONE, YOU ARE OUR TABERNACLE, OUR DWELLING PLACE, THE ARK OF THE COVENANT, THE ARK OF OUR STRENGTH, THE TWO CHERUBIM WHO SIT IN OUR SECRET COUNSEL MANIFESTING OUR MASCULINE AND FEMININE GLORY TO MY PEOPLE.

Rev 21:3 And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and God himself shall be with them, and be their God.

5) Then, I saw a vision of Two Statutes of the Two Cherubim made of white clay. Then I saw the Two Statutes exploded and Two beings in the form of light appeared. They flew over the Cosmoses and then transitted the earth horizontally from the right to the left, then vertically from south to north, before transiting diagonally from the top right to the bottom left. And lastly, diagonally from top left to bottom right.

After that, I saw the Two Cherubim stood on a white triangle roof top and the next vision, I saw I was wearing the golden Empress robe seated on the Great White Throne on a higher plane in the air and you were wearing the golden Emperor robe seated on the golden throne at lower plane in the air. From the throne that I was seated, I could see the saints wearing white below me at much lower plane which had these words written on the plane, "LEVEL 7, PARADISE/ NEW EDEN".

Psa 132:8 Arise, O THE YAHWEH, into thy rest; thou, and the ark of thy strength (H5795 "oz"). Psa 132:9 Let thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let thy saints shout for joy. Psa 132:10 For thy servant David's sake turn not away the face of thine anointed. Psa 132:11 THE YAHWEH hath sworn in truth unto David; he will not turn from it; Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne. Psa 132:12 If thy children will keep my covenant and my testimony that I shall teach them, their children shall also sit upon thy throne for evermore. Psa 132:13 For THE YAHWEH hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his seat. Psa 132:14 This is my rest for ever: here will I be sit; for I have desired it.
David: The Two Cherubim that fly all over the world are they flying in the spirit or are they travelling by airplane?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me both mode.
David: Will we be at home drinking coffee and our spirit fly here and fly there?
Shekinaih: No, I saw us praying in one place and our spirit were flying to those places. But sometimes we will travel physically.
David: Apostle Paul has travelled in the spirit before.
Shekinaih: Correct.
David: Apostle Paul has reached that spiritual level of transfiguration,
Shekinaih: Apostle Paul is now sitting at level 7, Paradise.
David: What I mean is when Paul was alive, he has this ability, am I right?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me, that is correct. In fact all My last day saints will have this ability.
David: Anyone who wants to kill the two witnesses in Revelation 11 will be burned by fire. Can THE FATHER elaborate on this?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY showed me that it's a spiritual fire; but at times, physical fire are involved.
David: What do THE FATHER meant by spiritual fire? Is it Internal combustion?
Shekinaih: I saw when you blew the horn, the fire came out from your mouth and then it entered into the other person's spirit first which later caused the destruction of the body.
David: Did they burn on the spot?
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY shew me that their Spirit was instantaneously burned but their death will only be manifested physically after seven days.
DAVID: If they do not die instantly, how are the two witnesses going to protect themselves if their attackers had knives in their hand attacking them?
SHEKINAIH: I heard THE TRINITY said "IF ONE SINNETH NOT, THE DEVIL TOUCHETH NOT".
1 Joh 5:18 We know that whosoever is born of THE ELOHIM sinneth not; but he that is begotten of THE ELOHIM keepeth himself, and that wicked one toucheth him not.

title: The Confirmation (18 Sept 2017)

segments.text: The Confirmation (18 Sept 2017)
Jessie's Vision (Translation from Mandarin in verbatim) of Revelation Chapter 12 Onwards on 18 Sept 2017
Shekinaih: ABBA FATHER, please let Jessie see visions regarding The Book of Revelation. Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. Imparted into you already as I blow the horn.

JESSIE: Pages are flipping! As they flip, within, there seems to have the images of JESUS; and also images of you wearing an Empress' crown, do you know? Just like this, page by page as it flips, I see images of JESUS, and some images of you wearing an Empress's crown which looks like the one inside this book. In this way, the book page by page is flipping in my mind. I again see the pages flipping very fast; the first half seems to be JESUS's images, the second half are the images of you with the Empress's crown. After this, I see after this book is made public, I now see David holding a sword and pointing the blade at the center of the book. In this way, I see him wearing an armor coat pointing a sword at the book, like this.
Shekinaih: Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. Please Continue!

JESSIE: I see David pierce through the book with his sword and raised it up. As he raise it up, suddenly there appear tumultuous thousands upon thousands of horses and soldiers. And, that sound is very loud; as if there are thousands upon thousands of soldiers and horsemen; ready to fight for him. There are many soldiers wearing ancient armors who are following him in battle. But I don't know what these soldiers will do. There are so many! So many! Many soldiers! Soldiers! A lot of soldiers! Many troops of soldiers! They seem to be lifting their swords ready for war; just like this!

It is after David took the sword and pierced through the book and stood there raising his sword that thousands upon thousands of soldiers and horsemen appeared before him.
