Yes, he gripped the handle of the sword and lifted the pierced book, then thousands upon thousands of soldiers and horsemen started to charge wildly following him for battle.
Shekinaih: Okay.

JESSIE: Then, I see you standing at the rear above the troops blowing horn. I heard the voice of your sounding. In fact, I can also hear the battle cry of the sounds of the trumpets amidst the thousands upon thousands of soldiers and horsemen. After this, I again see David lifting up the sword. I see blood flowing out of that book which flows down along the blade of his sword. The book is now completely soaked with blood.
Shekinaih: Winepress! The leg that presses on the bodies! Blood flows out! The seven legs!
Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. Anymore?

JESSIE: After this, I saw David with the soaked book, like a warrior, pierced the book into the ground. He then with one leg knelt on the ground as if ready to receive an order, cried out to ABBA FATHER. But I cannot hear what he said. I could hear his last sentence is, "Just release your decree, ABBA FATHER! Your Decree!
And then, I see you wave a big flag. David then pointed his sword and rushed forward. Everyone among the thousands upon thousands of soldiers and horsemen follow him rushing forward.
Wow! Before them are all black demons, all black. The demons then clashed with them.
I see David pierced a big black gigantic demon. The moment it was pierced, it turned into a big python. Then, I see behind me was written these words, "Bind this Devil Satan for a thousand years".
David: Battle of Armageddon!
Shekinaih: I see The TRINITY standing here holding three white board with the words written, "Triple Confirmed".

JESSIE: I then see David; followed by a big chain dropping down from heaven. It is not from Shekinaih but I think it is THE ABBA FATHER or JESUS who threw it down. Let me see take a closer look. It seems that THE ABBA FATHER threw down a very thick chain; a very thick iron chain. After that, David catches hold of this python and bound the devil with the chain.
Shekinaih: I see myself throwing the big chain down from heaven. I see myself inside THE ABBA FATHER, wearing the gold garment throwing the big chain down.
JESSIE: I didn't see you do it. Anyway, this chain was from…
Shekinaih: As you were speaking, I was seeing it.

JESSIE: It looks like that, it is from the heaven. But I did not see you, it is from heaven. I seem to see the head of THE ABBA FATHER which is very big. The chain fell from the heaven and then the devil was bound up by David. David with his sword pierces the devil and lifted him up and placed him on his shoulder and threw it into a very deep pit which bottom is a lake of fire. It is very deep.

The moment David threw it into the pit, it appears the pit must be very deep because the devil's fall was taking a long, long, long time to reach to the bottom. It took a very long time to reach the bottom of the pit filled with fire. This is how it is.

After that, everyone cheered and danced. David was also very happy. Everyone cheered. I have never seen everyone being so happy laughing before in this manner; like triumphing after a victory in a war as the devil, the big python has been bound up and thrown inside forever. They are victorious over the devil.
Shekinaih: Okay, while you are in the vision, I heard from The TRINITY that you can see me representing THE HOLY SPIRIT more clearly.
JESSIE: Can you repeat?

Shekinaih: When you were speaking, The TRINITY told me that you can see me representing THE HOLY SPIRIT more clearly. However, your view of me inside THE ABBA FATHER is more blurred, THE TRINITY explained to me.
JESSIE: Oh!

Shekinaih: This is because of your distance. Your distance from Him is too far apart. Your spiritual sight's distance from Him is too far apart. That is the reason you see me representing THE HOLY SPIRIT clearer but your perception of me inside THE ABBA FATHER is blurry. This is because your vision distance from Him was very far, thus you cannot see clearly. This is what The TRINITY explained to me.
JESSIE: Okay.
Shekinaih: Therefore, you only saw that gigantic head coming down but I saw I was inside THE ABBA FATHER wearing a gold garment representing THE ABBA FATHER throwing that chain down.
JESSIE: Yes, the process was like that. Yes.
Shekinaih: Anymore?

JESSIE: After this, the pit which the devil fell into was sealed. The crack closed up. It was closed. That's all. It seems that when you waved the instruction flag, everyone began to retreat and return home. It looks like everyone is returning to their home.

Shekinaih: Okay! I have downloaded Revelation 12 and beyond into you... Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. Okay! The visions have been downloaded. I have blown it into your spirit man and have filled it with light.
JESSIE: Ok, which Chapter in the Book of Revelation?
Shekinaih: Revelation Chapter 12. You do not need to read the bible now. Just tell me what you were seeing.
JESSIE: Oh… Let me check. I don't know what is in Revelation 12 onwards
Shekinaih: It's okay, just tell me what you see regarding Revelation 12 onward.

JESSIE: I saw two horses' heads; two white horses' heads and one bowl of blood; two white horses running wildly coming down from heaven; and blood pouring down from a bowl. A bowl of blood pouring down. Inside the bowl, there is blood, from heaven coming down. Yes! Two horses!
David: Two white horses?
JESSIE: Yes, two white horses!
David: Two horses coming down?
JESSIE: Two horses coming down and also a sickle coming down.
David: There is another sickle coming down? Ah…..
Shekinaih: But I see the words written on the two white horses. One is, "Shekinaih", one is, "David".
David: Okay.
Shekinaih: Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. I blow horn into you to further enlighten you to see clearer.
JESSIE: Okay.
Shekinaih: Anymore?
JESSIE: There are surely two people sitting on these two horses.
Shekinaih: Okay.

JESSIE: I have never seen you riding on a war horse before. You were riding on this horse wearing a red scarf. It seemed that you never wore this kind of costume before. Like Hua Mulan, do you know? Like a general riding on a war horse; wearing boots with a red scarf. I have also never seen David wore a blue costume. You wore the magenta costume. David wore a blue costume. He was also riding on a horse descending from heaven.
Shekinaih: Do you see each person riding on each individual horse?
JESSIE: Yes. I have never seen you attired like this before; like a commander-in-chief.
David: General?
JESSIE: In the beginning, I see the heads of the horses first. Then I see horses; now, I see two persons riding the horses coming down. Then…
Shekinaih: I represent THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, The Lord of Host and also…
JESSIE: David's horse is one horse head ahead of your horse.

title: The Confirmation (18 Sept 2017) (part 2)

segments.text: Shekinaih: He represents the Captain of The Host.

JESSIE: Oh, you were valiantly galloping down. I don't know where the blood came from David's bowl. I also don't know who poured the blood. I only saw a giant hand and the bowl of blood which was pouring down.

Shekinaih: I saw a giant me, representing THE ABBA FATHER, wearing the gold garment, with my right hand holding the bowl, coming down to execute the decree; and David is inside me at below my waist height co-executing it.
JESSIE: That's the bowl which should be on the right hand side of David. Your horse, you were… My sight is facing the horse. Let me explain to you. Let me check, facing the horse.
David: Facing the horse?

JESSIE: Facing the horse. Oh, I don't know how to draw it out. I am seeing from the direction which faces the horse. Opposite me on my right hand is Shekinaih, and facing opposite me on my left is David. After that the bowl is poured from David's right hand side; the bowl of blood. What does this mean?
Shekinaih: Blood of the Martyrs!
David: Okay. Blood of the Martyrs.
JESSIE: I see a sickle also falling down from heaven.
Shekinaih: When you were speaking, I saw me wearing a gold garment threw the sickle down.
JESSIE: I don't know, I didn't see clearly how it fell down. Anyway, it fell down from the heaven.
Shekinaih: Yes, The TRINITY standing here now, triple confirmed what I saw.
JESSIE: Okay.
Shekinaih: Hooooooo.....Hooooooo.....Hooooooo….. Okay! Clarity enhanced! Please continue!

JESSIE: According to your horse coming from the heaven to the ground; have they landed? Coming soon! Next, I saw you picking up white garments; those who are wearing white garments among the small crowd attired with white garments. You then start to count and number them.

After this, David appears to be leading them. Next, I see a ray of light from heaven and like swift horses, they grew wings and flew away. Next, the people in white garments whom you pointed at, followed David and flew away swiftly like a flash of light.

It is David! I see a light from heaven. David was riding a horse and these people swiftly disappeared and my eyes could not behold. Anyway, these people who are wearing white garments are following David. They then disappeared in the light.
David: Disappear in the lights?
Shekinaih: Above this bright white cloud, I see a bright white boat. Like a ship, white colored one. All these people were raptured and go up into a ship; a white color ship.
JESSIE: They all go with him. I saw that you were still selecting, like selecting generals. You point, you find, you select.
Shekinaih: Oh! "Appoint who to rapture", I see this words.
JESSIE: It means when you saw the people wearing white, you will…
Shekinaih: Yes! I look for those who are supposed to be raptured.
JESSIE: They are then taken away by David. How they are taken, I do not know? Anyway, first the light, and the next, these people are lifted up.
Shekinaih: On their way up, there is a bright white boat. David then stood on top of that boat in the air.
JESSIE: I see blood pouring out of that bowl. But when the blood almost hits the ground, it seems to turn into some black things; like black small demons; very small.
Shekinaih: Calamities!
JESSIE: And also the blood seems not to be emptied from the bowl.
Shekinaih: Calamities! Those black things are all calamities.
JESSIE: Calamities? It seems the blood cannot be emptied from the bowl.
The bowl of blood keep flowing out, keep flowing out, blood keep flowing out. As it almost touch the ground, it turn into black demons.
Shekinaih: The bowl has the word, "Calamities" written on it.
JESSIE: I see these black thing while you were selecting those people in white who were holy.
Shekinaih: Yes! "Appoint who to rapture", I see these words.

JESSIE: These holy people I saw were resisting the small black demons who are grabbing their legs. These demons want to pull these people in white garments down. You then with one puff of your breath blow at these small demons and all started falling down.
Shekinaih: They tried to distract them from their destiny and to miss their rapture moment.
JESSIE: When you puff at the demons, these demons seem to become blood again. The people wearing white garments who are saved then followed David in white garment.
I see demons continue to find many in white garments. Oh! There are so many small demons all over the ground. They filled the whole earth looking for those with white garments.
David: That is the Great Tribulation!
JESSIE: Yes! They want to strangle those who are wearing white garments.
Shekinaih: I see THE TRINITY now standing here, each holding a board with the word, "That's right" written on it.
David: The remnant! To make war with the remnant!
JESSIE: Thinking to strangle their necks unto death.
Shekinaih: David, I saw after I brought you up in a carriage to heaven after you were heavily wounded unto death, then we will come down in the white horses.

JESSIE: You never stop doing this action; you keep pointing at certain person, and David will take them away. I see those black blood keep pouring out of the bowl from heaven; they continue to be poured down.
Shekinaih: Calamities!
JESSIE: I see the rainbow in the sky on your right behind you.
Shekinaih: I see these words, "My Promises fulfilled".
JESSIE: Behind, on the right there is rainbow coming out.
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY says, "My Promises are fulfilled".

JESSIE: Rainbow! I see a rainbow coming out! There is a rainbow! I again see people in white garments; it seems they are coming near to the place where the rainbow is, with dancing. When they get closer, they slowly disappeared; just like this.
Shekinaih: My seven…
JESSIE: This vision is amazing! This vision is amazing! If you let me imagine it out, I am very sure I could not made it out. How can it be? I didn't use my brain to imagine!
David: This is exactly what will happen in Revelation 12 onwards.
Shekinaih: "My Seven Names have arisen through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY (Shekinaih and Aaron David) in the rainbow", I see these words.

Because just now I have downloaded it into you when I blew the whole vision into your spirit man. I blow for your eyes to see brightly; your ears, your heart and your brain to be illuminated. There is why you were able to see these visions. That is why, sometimes when you cannot see clearly, I will blow again until you can see clearer.

JESSIE: Yes, the rainbow becomes clearer now. Now I see again, wow, everyone seems to be staying in a paradise. There are many beautiful trees, birds and fishes. It's a place everyone finds leisure. It's a very beautiful place. Everyone is singing holy songs. This is like a paradise with no sorrow nor anxiety. I see such a vision. I again see JESUS together with everyone.
I also see this scene: JESUS is drawing on the ground when everyone was judging the prostitute and is surrounding JESUS. I don't know what he is drawing.
Shekinaih: He wrote these words: "Your sins are forgiven". These are the words written.

JESSIE: Oh, he is drawing there. Many people are surrounding him. After that, everyone is very relaxed in the paradise; everyone is like this. Then, I see them no more and there is silent. However, I can hear the holy songs from afar off; and the sound of blowing horn. Oh! I just do not know how to mimic the blowing of these horns. Woo…Woo…Woo… It's a pity I cannot mimic it.
Shekinaih: Heavenly horn and worship!
JESSIE: The horn's sound is very deep. It's similar to the sound effect in the movie when the Egyptian King is in parade. I can hear the sound but I don't know how to describe it properly.
Shekinaih: It's very deep low bass, right? Hoo…
David: A solemn sound!
JESSIE: Very deep low bassy sound. It's a sound which I can't tell. I hope I can mimic it. It's the sounding of horns in the heavenly kingdom. This is a place which has no sorrow.
Shekinaih: Okay. I see the end. THE HOLY SPIRIT said to you, "That's enough. It's enough. It's enough". THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE TRINITY said, "That's right! It's enough!"

Ok. You have to read Book 3 carefully and let it go into you. The Book 3, "Behold My Messenger 3, Behold My Names", will establish you so that you can enter into your destiny. Amen? THE FATHER loves you! Take care! Bye! Bye!
JESSIE: Amen! Thank you!
David: Amen! Bye! Bye!
JESSIE: Thank you! David, I see you again wearing a warrior's armor riding on a war horse.
David: Very good!
JESSIE: Good!
David: You have to read the Bible.
Shekinaih: You have to read Book 3, THE TRINITY said!
JESSIE: Okay! Okay!

title: MY ARISING

segments.text: MY ARISING

THE FATHER: Lo! And Behold! We will arise through My (Our) Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Shekinaih and Aaron K David; who will manifest Our Presence Worldwide without dispute, unchallengeable, with Our full backing behind them.

They will be empowered by Me(Us) to manifest My(Our) appearance before Mankind during this age; many who have been waiting for My(Our) coming will miss it; due to their carnal mindedness of not seeing through My(Our) eyes of the spirit and be led by the spirit but are led in the flesh in their carnal thinking; that We will appear in the sky as the JESUS whom they have been watching in the movies; instead of JESUS that appears, an unexpected race (a Chinese), together with My appearance through an unexpected race and gender also, a female Chinese.

Many will miss My (Our) Coming just like they missed JESUS'S coming; for I (We) appear as a great offence to break the carnality of Mankind; in order to invite them to partake Our Tree of Life; for this is Our sifting; blessed are those who are not offended but yielded to Our breaking of all their carnality and the works of their flesh; in order to purify and crucify them.

Are you willing to take up your cross and follow JESUS'S footstep; to obey Me, THE FATHER in and represented by Shekinaih, My representative, just like JESUS; even unto death, by learning obedience by going to the cross and the path in which I have prepare for Him and also you.
Are you willing?
For My (Our) coming is at hand now!!!
Are you prepared???

title: JESUS EXPLAINED THE MYSTERY OF THE TWO CHERUBIM'S COMING THROUGH THE SCRIPTURE

segments.text: JESUS EXPLAINED THE MYSTERY OF THE TWO CHERUBIM'S COMING THROUGH THE SCRIPTURE

David: ABBA FATHER, did not the Bible teaches that Jesus is coming? Did not JESUS himself said to His disciple that he, the son of Adam is coming? Therefore, can you enlighten me is there any bible Verses to prove that YOU and THE HOLY SPIRIT is coming through Shekinaih, and JESUS is coming through His incarnate?
THE FATHER: Firstly, We always appear as THE TRINITY to all Our creation throughout the whole Scripture/Bible, from the Book of Genesis to the Book of Revelation.
We usually appear as one person whereby THE HOLY SPIRIT is part of ME and JESUS is part of THE HOLY SPIRIT and ME.
In Exodus 22, We appeared as The Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Shekinaih (representing Me and THE HOLY SPIRIT) and Aaron K David (representing JESUS).
We gave the law to Moses through them in Mount Sinai.
They also representing Us as THE YAHWEH: MAJOR and MINOR, respectively, in the burning bush that appear to Moses.
They are also representing Us to open the Red Sea for the Israelites to cross on dry land.
They are also the three angels that appear to Abraham, and the two angels that appeared to Lot in Sodom and Gomorrah; who brought down the destruction on the city on behalf of Us.
However, subsequently, they are chosen before the foundation of the earth as Our incarnation and reincarnation respectively.

Firstly, Shekinaih and Aaron K David are Our incarnation and reincarnation made of Our DNA, for the purpose of representing Our coming to Mankind again to fulfil the prophecy of the Woman and the Man-child: I and THE HOLY SPIRIT, as the woman through Shekinaih, and JESUS reappear as the Man-child; and together they will represent Our coming again through the appearance of the son of man: which means, We, THE TRINITY will appear in the sky together as the son of man through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); whom the Scripture address in various Names, "An Angel", "My Messenger", "The Mighty Angel", "The Coming Elijah", "Angel of THE YAHWEH", The Coming JESUS".

Therefore, do not be confused nor be upset when We said, We, THE TRINITY, will come as firstly, through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY; for We are shedding light into your limited perspective of Us through the two dimension perspective of the Scripture written, through the perspective of humanity perception of Us which is restricted and limited due to the carnal stronghold since the first Adam fell, and lost their glorious perspective of Us when they lose their glory robe.

Thereby, We chose to reveal Ourselves through Our plan vessels since the beginning of time, the secret to Our Kingdom in all these books; written by Us through Our Two Representatives (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); in Crowned Eagles Global.

Henceforth, you must let Me open your spiritual eyes to see; to behold Our mystery written by Us in all these books through humility and by being teachable to Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY; and to open your spiritual hearing as well as through the renewing of your mind, the loin of your understanding: and through the opening the spiritual perception in your heart by My (Our) SPIRIT, as well as by Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, in Crowned eagles Global.
Therefore, argue and strife not in unprofitable Scripture Debate which only leads to ungodliness.
Therefore, you must relearn all your Theology which stands for
Reading from bottom up:

WHY GO FOR GEOMETRY (FIXED SHAPE, RESTRICTED LEARNING, AND THE 2D PERSPECTIVE) INSTEAD OF OVAL (OPEN MIND, LIMITLESS, BOUNDARYLESS PROGRESS) TOGETHER WITH LETTER (MESSENGER FROM HEAVEN)? OH OH!! BEING EUPHORIA (EMOTIONALLY HIGH, JUMPING UP AND DOWN, THEREBY PULLING YOUR HAIR OFF) DRIVING TO THE POINT OF HEADACHES; THEREBY, TARNISH YOUR SPIRIT MAN AND MISS THE BOAT AND MISS HEAVEN; LEFT BEHIND TO THE POINT OF NO AVAIL.
David: ABBA FATHER, This saying of yours is very hard to swallow.

(THE FATHER then turn to JESUS and said to him, "Give them the Scripture Verses to prove Our coming through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY, Shekinaih and Aaron K David". JESUS then read 2 Sam 22:4-15 and expounded to Shekinaih and David.

2Sa 22:4 I will call on THE YAHWEH, who is worthy to be praised: so shall I be saved from mine enemies. 2Sa 22:5 When the waves of death compassed me, the floods of ungodly men made me afraid; 2Sa 22:6 The sorrows of hell compassed me about; the snares of death prevented me; 2Sa 22:7 In my distress I called upon THE YAHWEH, and cried to my ELOHIM: and he did hear my voice out of his temple, and my cry did enter into his ears. 2Sa 22:8 Then the earth shook and trembled; the foundations of heaven moved and shook, because he was wroth. 2Sa 22:9 There went up a smoke out of his nostrils, and fire out of his mouth devoured: coals were kindled by it. 2Sa 22:10 He bowed the heavens also, and came down; and darkness was under his feet. 2Sa 22:11 And he rode in (H5921 "al") a CHERUB, and did fly: and he was seen in (H5921"al") the wings of wind (H7303 "ruach" THE HOLY SPIRIT). 2Sa 22:12 And he made darkness pavilions round about him, dark waters, and thick clouds of the skies. 2Sa 22:13 Through the brightness (H5051 "nogah") before him were coals of fire kindled. 2Sa 22:14 THE YAHWEH thundered from heaven, and the most High uttered his voice. 2Sa 22:15 And he sent out arrows, and scattered them; lightning, and discomfited them. 2Sa 22:16 And the channels of the sea appeared, the foundations of the world were discovered, at the rebuking of THE YAHWEH, at the blast of the breath of his nostrils.

JESUS: The above passage explain My (Our) stormy reappearance in the last days. It entail the full spectrum of the Cosmoses which include earth through the cry of THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER, in Shekinaih, together with David in Me; to usher in Our punishment for the evil and the ungodly tyranny of the enemy who drove Our sons/daughters to utter despair; and We heard and respond to their cry to bring about justice which longs sought after by My David, who signifies Me.

We will thereby, execute Our vengeance through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY who will soar with their earthly counterpart that has been ordained for this purpose. They are Shekinaih and Aaron K David. The Cherub signifies both of you, who represent THE TRINITY as the Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY. Shekinaih, being the wind (THE HOLY SPIRIT, THE ELOAH) who bore David in your bosom/womb.
Shekinaih and you, are Our Magnificent Glorious Appearance of Our Presence in the brightness of the heaven.

Shekinaih and Aaron K David, represent: THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in her, and Me in you, who sat with Us in Our respective thrones in Our realms respectively; and the rainbow is Our Seven Names, which reflect the seven colors of the rainbow: which signify Shekinaih bearing THE FATHER's Name flowing to THE HOLY SPIRIT and to My realms in you: which reflect the totality of Our Magnificent Glory of Our Names in both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, as THE MAJOR and THE MINOR, with the full spectrum of Our glorious appearance through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY: as Ezekiel saw of the son of Adam on the throne with their glorious appearance.

Eze 1:26 And above the firmament that was over their heads was the likeness of a throne, as the appearance of a sapphire stone: and upon the likeness of the throne was the likeness as the appearance of a man above upon it. Eze 1:27 And I saw as the colour of amber, as the appearance of fire round about within it, from the appearance of his loins even upward, and from the appearance of his loins even downward, I saw as it were the appearance of fire, and it had brightness round about. Eze 1:28 As the appearance of the bow that is in the cloud in the day of rain, so was the appearance of the brightness round about. This was the appearance of the likeness of the glory of THE YAHWEH. And when I saw it, I fell upon my face, and I heard a voice of one that spake.

title: JESUS EXPLAINED THE MYSTERY OF THE TWO CHERUBIM'S COMING THROUGH THE SCRIPTURE (part 2)

segments.text: Henceforth, so shall they appear in the same manner as the sun that rise from the east; so shall they be in Our Glorious Presence and Our Glory.
Mat 24:27 For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also The Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of the Son of Adam be.
Thereafter, representing Us as Our Presence; through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY'S voice, so shall you raise up/rapture those who are in Us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

During the last days, only those who have enter into covenant with THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/I, JESUS represented by Aaron K David, will be sealed with My FATHER'S Name (S) on their foreheads, and be saved to enter into Our everlasting Kingdom; and some will be raptured by them if they remain spotless (holiness) before Us through them.

1Co 15:23 But every man in his own order: Christ the firstfruits; afterward they that are Christs in (G1722 "en") his Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence), 1Co 15:24 Then cometh the end, when he shall have delivered up the kingdom to God, even the Father; when he shall have put down all rule and all authority and power. 1Co 15:25 For he must reign, till he hath put all enemies under his feet. 1Co 15:26 The last enemy that shall be destroyed is death. 1Co 15:27 For he hath put all things under his feet. But when he saith all things are put under him, it is manifest that he is excepted, which did put all things under him. 1Co 15:28 And when all things shall be subdued unto him, then shall the Son also himself be subject unto him that put all things under him, that God may be all in all.

1Th 3:12 And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before God, even our Father, in (G1722"en") The Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his saints.

1Th 4:13 But I would not have you to be ignorant, brethren, concerning them which are asleep, that ye sorrow not, even as others which have no hope. 1Th 4:14 For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again, even so them also which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him. 1Th 4:15 For this we say unto you in (G1722"en") the word of the Lord, that we which are alive and remain into (G1519 "eis") The Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of the Lord shall not prevent them which are asleep. 1Th 4:16 For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven in (G1722 "en") a shout, in (G1722 "en") the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first: 1Th 4:17 Then we which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air: and so shall we ever be with the Lord. 1Th 4:18 Wherefore comfort one another with these words.

Lastly, We will come to execute Our vengeance from Our glorious Presence through them without holding back anymore; but with accelerating momentum, with a loud bang unexpectedly with a great force through Our mighty arm in them (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR, THE EL).

2Th 1:5 Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of God, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of God, for which ye also suffer: 2Th 1:6 Seeing it is a righteous thing with God to recompense tribulation to them that trouble you; 2Th 1:7 And to you who are troubled rest with us, when the Lord Jesus shall be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels, 2Th 1:8 In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not God, and that obey not the gospel of our Lord Jesus Christ: 2Th 1:9 Who shall be punished with everlasting destruction from The Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of the Lord, and from the glory of his might; 2Th 1:10 When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our testimony among you was believed) in that day.

2Pe 3:3 Knowing this first, that there shall come in the last days scoffers, walking after their own lusts, 2Pe 3:4 And saying, Where is the message (G1860 "epaggelia") of his Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence)? for since the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation. 2Pe 3:5 For this they willingly are ignorant of, that by the oracle (G3056 "logos") of God the heavens were of old, and the earth standing out of the water and in the water: 2Pe 3:6 Whereby the world that then was, being overflowed with water, perished: 2Pe 3:7 But the heavens and the earth, which are now, by the same word are kept in store, reserved unto fire against the day of judgment and perdition of ungodly men. 2Pe 3:8 But, beloved, be not ignorant of this one thing, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day. 2Pe 3:9 The Lord is not slack concerning his message (G1860 "epaggelia"), as some men count slackness; but is longsuffering to us-ward, not willing that any should perish, but that all should come to repentance. 2Pe 3:10 But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat, the earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up. 2Pe 3:11 Seeing then that all these things shall be dissolved, what manner of persons ought ye to be in all holy conversation and godliness, 2Pe 3:12 Looking for and hasting The Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of the day of God, wherein the heavens being on fire shall be dissolved, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat?

2Th 2:1 Now we beseech you, brethren, over (G5228 "huper") the Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence) of our Lord Jesus Christ, and by our gathering together unto him, 2Th 2:2 That ye be not soon shaken in mind, or be troubled, neither by spirit, nor by word, nor by letter as from us, as that the day of Christ is at hand. 2Th 2:3 Let no man deceive you by any means: for that day shall not come, except there come a falling away first, and that man of sin be revealed, the son of perdition; 2Th 2:4 Who opposeth and exalteth himself above all that speak of God, or is a worshipper; so that he as God sitteth in the temple of God, show off himself that he is God. 2Th 2:5 Remember ye not, that, when I was yet with you, I told you these things? 2Th 2:6 And now ye know what withholdeth that he might be revealed in his time. 2Th 2:7 For the mystery of lawlessness (G458 "anomia") doth already energize: only he who now letteth will let, until he he that is to be born (G1098 "ginomai") be taken out of the way. 2Th 2:8 And then shall that Wicked be revealed, whom the Lord shall consume with THE SPIRIT of his mouth, and shall destroy with the brightness (G2015 "epiphaneia") of his Presence (G3952 "Parousia" means presence):

title: Epiphaneia (G2016 "epiphanes" brightness)

segments.text: Epiphaneia (G2016 "epiphanes" brightness)

And to add to the above, Our dynamite explosion accelerating throughout the entire Cosmoses through Our incarnate and reincarnate in Shekinaih and Aaron K David respectively, will thereby made Our entire creation to tremble and fear; being shocked by Our unexpected turn around of events which will mark the closing of an era and the beginning of a new era in the Universe(s).
Therefore, mock not at this book, else you will cease to exist, We swear, says THE TRINITY.

Hab 3:1 A PRAYER OF THE PROPHET AMBACUM, WITH A SONG. Hab 3:2 O Lord, I have heard thy report, and was afraid: I considered thy works, and was amazed: thou shalt be known upon THE LIVING CREATURES, thou shalt be acknowledged when the years draw nigh; thou shalt be manifested when the time is come; when my soul is troubled, thou wilt in wrath remember mercy. Hab 3:3 God shall come from Thaeman, and the Holy One from the dark shady mount Pharan. Pause. Hab 3:4 His excellence covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise. And his brightness (the Two Cherubim of Glory) shall be as light; there were horns in his hands, and he caused a mighty love of his strength. Hab 3:5 Before his face(Presence) shall go a report, and it shall go forth into the plains, Hab 3:6 the earth stood at his feet and trembled: he beheld, and the nations melted away: the mountains were violently burst through, the everlasting hills melted at his everlasting going forth.

Act 2:16 But this is that which was spoken by the prophet Joel; Act 2:17 And it shall come to pass in the last days, saith God, I will pour out of my Spirit upon all flesh: and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, and your young men shall see visions, and your old men shall dream dreams: Act 2:18 And on my servants and on my handmaidens I will pour out in those days of my Spirit; and they shall prophesy: Act 2:19 And I will shew wonders in heaven above, and signs in the earth beneath; blood, and fire, and vapour of smoke: Act 2:20 The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before that great and bright (G2016 "epiphanes" bright appearance through the Two Cherubim of Glory) day of THE YAHWEH come: Act 2:21 And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of THE YAHWEH ( The Two Cherubim of Glory (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); who come in Our Names ) shall be saved.

1Ti 6:13 I give thee charge in the sight of God, who quickeneth all things, and before Christ Jesus, who before Pontius Pilate witnessed a good confession; 1Ti 6:14 That thou keep this commandment without spot, unrebukeable, until the brightness ( G2015 "epiphaneia" bright appearance through The Two Cherubim of Glory) of our Lord Jesus Christ : 1Ti 6:15 Which in his times he shall shew, who is the blessed and only Potentate, the King of kings, and Lord of lords (THE TRINITY); 1Ti 6:16 Who only hath immortality, dwelling in the light which no man can approach unto; whom no man hath seen, nor can see: to whom be honour and power everlasting. Amen.

Tit 2:11 For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath shine on all men, Tit 2:12 Teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly, in this present age (G165 "aion"); Tit 2:13 Looking for that blessed hope, and the glorious brightness ( G2015 "epiphaneia" through The Two Cherubim of Glory) of the great God (THE FATHER together with THE HOLY SPIRIT)), and our Saviour Jesus Christ; Tit 2:14 Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works.

title: MY WARNING!!!

segments.text: MY WARNING!!!

Lastly, We swear that WE will come through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, and Aaron K David, representing JESUS); to decree, seal, execute and co-execute all My (Our) LAST DAY JUDGMENT(S).
Lo! And Behold! You will witness these events in your generation (THE YAHWEH speaks to the youth)!!!
I have spoken, and I will speak again, WE have sworn in My (Our) holiness that this age will pass away to make way for the coming New Millennium!!!

Therefore, beware that you do not slumber nor sleep when WE, through Our Two CHERUBIM OF GLORY (Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, Aaron K David, representing JESUS); will appear suddenly without warning when you least expected; you will be sifted by Us through them, and if you were found lacking, your life may be suddenly being taken away without notice all out of a sudden; even if you were healthy now.

Nevertheless, you were instructed to open wide your eyes to behold what is coming your way if you heed not of Our instruction to you: signs will be shown to you that your time is at hand; for the mass cutting down of trees has begun from Year 2018 onwards.

However, if you will to take heed of Our word spoken through this Book, and enroll to be trained as Our skilful warriors and persevere without giving up halfway till the end of Our instruction to you written in this Book to be the fittest warrior Brides, and pass all Our tests for you, you will be rewarded by Us; and you and your family shall be saved.
THE FATHER

title: HANDOVER DECLARATION

segments.text: HANDOVER DECLARATION
Receiving back the authority on behalf of THE TRINITY

title: ABOUT THE AUTHORS

segments.text: ABOUT THE AUTHORS

title: SHEKINAIH

segments.text: SHEKINAIH

She is a humble woman whom I have crushed, powdered, burned and purified in the fire seven times over the last twenty years. Her name "Shekinaih" is given by me as a sign to my people, and I will use her in the last days. Shekinaih is made up of the words "SHEKINAH, ADONAI and YAHWEH SABAOTH".

WE, THE TRINITY (THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE SON) appear to her in person to convey our decrees. She stands in our council and co-rule and reigns with us in the three realms. I am establishing her at the beginning of 2013 to represent our Seven Names in my last days' ministry on Earth. She shall release my decree on Earth to the churches to which I will send her with Aaron K David. They are to proclaim my Acceptable Year and The Day of My Vengeance and to comfort all that mourn in spiritual Zion.

She and Aaron K David are my End Times vessels. I will whisper to their ears and they will read my decree to warn the churches and to turn them to my way before it is too late. They are The Moses and The Elijah.
Her family background is not important, but a spirit whom I have broken and made contrite, ready for my use, is pivotal in my consideration.

title: AARON K DAVID

segments.text: AARON K DAVID

He is my Elijah, my Enoch and my King David whom I have put their anointing on him. He will co-execute my decrees which I will release through Shekinaih. Together, they are my End Times pair representing my left and right hand, symbolizing my severity and mercy.

My churches are now entering into a new phase from the year 2013 onwards, the era of OUR Judgment. My grace period has come to an end. The severity of OUR End Times Judgment on the whole world has begun and judgment shall begin from my house.

Shekinaih is my eye; Aaron K David is my mouth. Shekinaih is my head; Aaron K David is my body. They are my wheel within the wheel. Together, they will deliver my letters to the Seven Churches as in the Book of Revelation.
THE TRINITY

title: APPRECIATION WITH THANKS

segments.text: APPRECIATION WITH THANKS
Many thanks to those who have sacrificed their time, effort and resources unto THE YAHWEH JESUS who energized them in the making of this book.
Many thanks to Jose, our fellow co-laborer in CHRIST JESUS, who contributed greatly to the success of this book through his faithfulness in the role in which THE YAHWEH JESUS had called him.

We also thank Abraham for the artistic contribution of re-drawing the pictures drawn by THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST through the visions shown to Shekinaih and for helping in the editing and publishing the book.
Also, we want to thank Jeremyl for sacrificing her precious time in proof reading of this book.

Not forgetting James for his numerous contribution, dedication including some of the artistic work and in helping to publish the book. Many thanks also to Paul, Sarah, Zechariah, Jessie Jiang, Hezekiah, Jerene, and Melissa for their various contribution in making this book a success.

Very special thanks to Esther, Aaron K David's beloved wife for her sacrifice and support for without which this book may not be able to be completed. Special thanks to Yunus, Aaron K David's beloved daughter for trusting in the calling of her father.

Special thanks for Peow, Shekinaih's husband, for his great sacrifice in releasing her to fulfil her destiny. Also, very special thanks to Jessica for her great sacrifice in releasing her mother to do THE ELOHIM'S work wholeheartedly.

Above all else, we would like to thank THE TRINITY for their faithfulness in revealing their counsel to us and for enlightening us with their deep revelation and for endowing us with the gift of interpretation of their secret heavenly mysteries despite our human frailty. To THE TRINITY be all the glory, honour, power and praise forever and ever. Amen.
